title: Tailored Nanogel Network Topology Enables Clinical Ultrasound‐Induced Mechanochemical Activation for In Vivo Therapy
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Polymer mechanochemistry enables the selective mechanophore activation for precise molecular release. However, this field has long relied on the strong cavitation effects of low‐frequency ultrasound, which are incompatible with clinically high‐frequency ultrasound (> 1 MHz), hindering its biomedical applications. Herein, we report a nanogel network topology‐programmed mechanochemical strategy, enabling iterative activation of mechanophores under high‐frequency (up to 2.4 MHz) and low‐intensity (down to 2 W/cm
                    2
                    ) ultrasound. By introducing network topology as a design parameter, we established the relationship between nanogel topology, ultrasound frequency, and mechanochemical activity, revealing that distinct network topologies selectively accumulate mechanical forces under different ultrasound frequencies. Meanwhile, the thermal effect of high‐frequency ultrasound lowers the activation barrier of mechanophores, further promoting their efficient activation. Remarkably, under high‐frequency ultrasound, nanogels achieve an activation rate of 12.6%/min, placing it among the most efficient activation systems reported to date. Importantly, combining nanogels with clinical low‐intensity focused ultrasound, we developed a new ultrasound‐mediated therapeutic paradigm—synergistic sonothermal and mechanochemical therapy, achieving complete elimination of advanced tumors with a single short treatment. This work establishes network topology engineering as a general strategy for programming mechanochemistry, and opens new opportunities for the in vivo biomedical applications of polymer mechanochemistry.
title_zh: 定制的纳米凝胶网络拓扑使临床超声诱导的机械化学激活能够用于体内治疗
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    聚合物机械化学能够选择性地激活机械力团，从而实现精确的分子释放。然而，该领域长期以来依赖低频超声的强空化效应，与临床高频超声（> 1 MHz）不相容，阻碍了其生物医学应用。在此，我们报告了一种纳米凝胶网络拓扑编程的机械化学策略，能够在高频（高达 2.4 MHz）和低强度（低至 2 W/cm
                    2
                    ）超声波。通过引入网络拓扑作为设计参数，我们建立了纳米凝胶拓扑、超声频率和机械化学活性之间的关系，揭示了不同的网络拓扑在不同超声频率下选择性地积累机械力。同时，高频超声的热效应降低了力团的激活势垒，进一步促进其有效激活。值得注意的是，在高频超声下，纳米凝胶的激活率达到 12.6%/分钟，使其成为迄今为止报道的最有效的激活系统之一。重要的是，将纳米凝胶与临床低强度聚焦超声相结合，我们开发了一种新的超声介导的治疗范式——协同声热和机械化学治疗，通过单次短期治疗实现了晚期肿瘤的完全消除。这项工作将网络拓扑工程确立为机甲编程的通用策略

title: [ASAP] Chiral Covalent Organic Framework for Highly Efficient Spin Polarization
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Two-dimensional chiral covalent organic frameworks (2D-CCOFs) stand out as excellent candidates for chiral spintronic devices owing to their tailorable semiconducting structures and intrinsic chiral sites. However, two critical challenges currently hinder their development: first, the difficulty in synthesizing highly crystalline 2D-CCOF films and, second, the lack of reliable methods to construct stable 2D-CCOF-based spintronic devices. Herein, we successfully synthesized a 2D-CCOF film featuring a high crystallinity and excellent conductivity. In situ magnetic conductive-probe AFM (in situ mCP-AFM) characterization confirms that this 2D-CCOF exhibits excellent chiral-induced spin selectivity (CISS), with a spin polarization over 90% at room temperature. Using graphene as a blocking layer, we have successfully constructed stable half-spin valve devices based on the 2D-CCOF, which exhibit distinct chirality-dependent magnetoresistance. Graphene plays a key role in mitigating the detrimental effect of electrode deposition on the CCOF films. The excellent spin selectivity of 2D-CCOF opens up unprecedented opportunities for efficient control of electron spin and enables solid-state chiral spintronic devices.
title_zh: [ASAP] 用于高效自旋极化的手性共价有机框架
abstract_zh: 二维手性共价有机框架（2D-CCOF）因其可定制的半导体结构和固有的手性位点而成为手性自旋电子器件的优秀候选者。然而，目前有两个关键挑战阻碍了它们的发展：首先，合成高度结晶的 2D-CCOF 薄膜的困难，其次，缺乏构建稳定的基于 2D-CCOF 的自旋电子器件的可靠方法。在此，我们成功合成了具有高结晶度和优异导电性的2D-CCOF薄膜。原位磁导探针 AFM (原位 mCP-AFM) 表征证实，这种 2D-CCOF 表现出优异的手性诱导自旋选择性 (CISS)，在室温下自旋极化超过 90%。使用石墨烯作为阻挡层，我们成功构建了基于 2D-CCOF 的稳定的半自旋阀器件，该器件表现出明显的手性依赖磁阻。石墨烯在减轻电极沉积对 CCOF 薄膜的不利影响方面发挥着关键作用。 2D-CCOF 优异的自旋选择性为有效控制电子自旋开辟了前所未有的机会，并实现了固态手性自旋电子器件。

title: [ASAP] The One Ring: A Monocycle Producing Class II Diterpene Cyclase from Isodon leucophyllus
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Class II diterpene cyclases (DTCs) have long been recognized to mediate distal cyclization of geranylgeranyl pyrophosphate (GGPP) into bicyclic labdane-related products through an acid–base catalytic mechanism, leaving the pyrophosphate ‘head’ group intact. Although distal monocyclic diterpenoids naturally occur, these are historically attributed to tetraterpenoid carotenoid degradation rather than direct enzymatic cyclization. Here, the discovery of a novel DTC from Isodon leucophyllus is reported, which produces the monocyclic (+)-trixagyl pyrophosphate and is, hence, termed IleuTPS, marking the first reported instance of such DTC activity. Notably, IleuTPS harbors an unusual E366XDD instead of the prototypical DXDD motif, where the “middle” aspartate functions as the catalytic acid and can also act as the base. Mutational analysis demonstrated that the E366D variant produces substantial amounts of the rearranged monocycle leucophyllusyl pyrophosphate, and small amounts of bicyclic products, suggesting that the native glutamate typically serves as the catalytic base. Isotope labeling experiments, quantum chemical calculations, and TerDockin simulations were further employed to delineate the enzymatic mechanism, highlighting an unusual fragmentation process underlying monocycle formation and underscoring the critical role of catalytic bases in dictating product outcome. Preliminary evolutionary analyses indicate that IleuTPS arose via early gene duplication and neofunctionalization, with such activity broadly distributed across plants and potentially other taxa. This study not only unlocks new avenues for exploring the functions of long-overlooked DTCs but also reshapes our understanding of distal monocyclic diterpenoid biosynthesis.
title_zh: [ASAP] The One Ring：一种从白叶藻中产生 II 类二萜环化酶的单环酶
abstract_zh: 长期以来，II 类二萜环化酶 (DTC) 一直被认为可以通过酸碱催化机制介导香叶基香叶基焦磷酸 (GGPP) 远端环化成双环 Labdane 相关产物，从而使焦磷酸“头”基团保持完整。尽管远端单环二萜自然存在，但历史上这些都归因于四萜类胡萝卜素降解而不是直接酶促环化。在此，报道了从白叶藻中发现了一种新型 DTC，它产生单环 (+)-triagyl 焦磷酸，因此被称为 IleuTPS，标志着此类 DTC 活性的首次报道。值得注意的是，IleuTPS 具有不寻常的 E366XDD，而不是典型的 DXDD 基序，其中“中间”天冬氨酸充当催化酸，也可以充当碱。突变分析表明，E366D 变体产生大量重排的单环无色叶酰焦磷酸和少量双环产物，表明天然谷氨酸通常充当催化碱。进一步采用同位素标记实验、量子化学计算和 TerDockin 模拟来描述酶促机制，强调单环形成背后的不寻常碎片过程，并强调催化碱基在决定产物结果中的关键作用。初步进化分析表明 IleuTPS 通过早期基因复制和新功能化产生，这种活性广泛分布在植物和潜在的其他类群中。这项研究

title: [ASAP] Coating-Integrated Joule Heating Architecture for Energy-Efficient Hydrogen Release from Chemical Carriers
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Hydrogen carriers offer a practical route to store and transport renewable electricity in chemical form, but the end-to-end efficiency of carrier-based hydrogen supply is often dictated by the terminal hydrogen-release step, where endothermic chemistry and nonproductive heat losses impose a substantial energy penalty. Here we present a coating-integrated Joule heating architecture that improves how energy is coupled into hydrogen-release reactors. A porous silicon carbide skeleton functions as a universal electrothermal converter, while the reaction-required catalyst is directly coated onto the silicon carbide surface, decoupling electrothermal heat generation from catalytic function yet preserving microscale thermal coupling at the active interface. This design removes the constraint of catalyst-bed conductivity and thereby generalizes Joule heating to diverse hydrogen-release chemistries. For ammonia decomposition driven by Joule heating, the Ru/CeO2-coated silicon carbide reactor delivers a hydrogen production rate of 5.6 molH2 gcat-1 h-1 at an input power of 23.4 W, with an energy consumption of 15.5 kWh kgH2-1. Using Pt/CeO2 as the catalyst coating, the same platform is extended to liquid organic hydrogen carrier dehydrogenation, achieving 86.6% cyclohexane conversion at a power input of only 5.5 W─a performance comparable to that achieved by conventional thermal catalysis at 280 °C. Thermal profiling reveals the thermal state of the porous silicon carbide skeleton under Joule heating, captures gas-temperature evolution from inlet to outlet, quantifies energy flow distribution, and provides a theoretical basis for array-scale reactor design. This coating-integrated electrothermal platform is compatible and scalable, offering a general approach to energy-efficient hydrogen release from ammonia and other hydrogen carriers.
title_zh: [ASAP] 涂层集成焦耳加热架构，用于从化学载体中高效释放氢气
abstract_zh: 氢载体提供了一种以化学形式存储和运输可再生电力的实用途径，但基于载体的氢供应的端到端效率通常取决于最终的氢释放步骤，其中吸热化学和非生产性热损失造成了巨大的能量损失。在这里，我们提出了一种涂层集成焦耳加热架构，可改善能量与氢释放反应器的耦合方式。多孔碳化硅骨架充当通用电热转换器，而反应所需的催化剂直接涂覆在碳化硅表面上，将电热发热与催化功能解耦，同时保留活性界面处的微尺度热耦合。这种设计消除了催化剂床电导率的限制，从而将焦耳热推广到各种氢释放化学物质。对于焦耳热驱动的氨分解，Ru/CeO2涂层碳化硅反应器在输入功率为23.4 W时产氢率为5.6 molH2 gcat-1 h-1，能耗为15.5 kWh kgH2-1。使用Pt/CeO2作为催化剂涂层，将同一平台扩展到液态有机氢载体脱氢，在仅5.5 W的功率输入下实现了86.6%的环己烷转化率，性能与280°C下的传统热催化效果相当。热分析揭示了焦耳加热下多孔碳化硅骨架的热状态，捕获从入口到出口的气体温度演变，量化能量流分布

title: [ASAP] DNA-Targeted Sonodynamic Activation Enhances Antibacterial Efficacy in Deep and Hypoxic Infections
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Deep-seated bacterial infections remain difficult to eradicate because both antibiotic delivery and photodynamic therapy are intrinsically constrained by tissue depth, biofilm protection, and hypoxic microenvironments. Sonodynamic therapy (SDT) offers noninvasive activation with clinically relevant penetration depth, but its antibacterial application has been limited by the scarcity of sonosensitizers that combine high activity, target specificity, and clinically relevant molecular scaffolds. Here, we establish TLD1433, a clinically advanced Ru(II) photosensitizer, as a DNA-targeting sonosensitizer for antibacterial therapy. Under ultrasound activation, TLD1433 exhibits strong sonodynamic activity, dominant singlet oxygen generation, and superior antibacterial efficacy relative to conventional sonosensitizers. Mechanistically, TLD1433 preferentially associates with bacterial DNA, thereby enabling localized oxidative damage to an essential intracellular target. In parallel, it catalyzes endogenous H2O2 decomposition to generate O2, thereby relieving biofilm hypoxia and amplifying sonodynamic efficacy. As a result, ultrasound-activated TLD1433 shows potent antibacterial efficacy in a murine Pseudomonas aeruginosa pneumonia model and in patient-derived bronchoalveolar lavage fluid under deep-tissue conditions. This work establishes a mechanistically distinct antibacterial sonodynamic strategy based on a clinically advanced ruthenium complex, providing a design framework for target-specific sonosensitizers against deep and hypoxic bacterial infections.
title_zh: [ASAP] DNA 靶向声动力激活增强深度和缺氧感染的抗菌功效
abstract_zh: 深层细菌感染仍然难以根除，因为抗生素输送和光动力疗法本质上都受到组织深度、生物膜保护和缺氧微环境的限制。声动力疗法 (SDT) 提供具有临床相关穿透深度的无创激活，但其抗菌应用受到缺乏结合高活性、目标特异性和临床相关分子支架的声敏剂的限制。在这里，我们建立了 TLD1433，一种临床先进的 Ru(II) 光敏剂，作为用于抗菌治疗的 DNA 靶向声敏剂。在超声激活下，TLD1433 表现出强大的声动力活性、占主导地位的单线态氧生成以及相对于传统声敏剂更优异的抗菌功效。从机制上讲，TLD1433 优先与细菌 DNA 结合，从而对重要的细胞内靶标产生局部氧化损伤。同时，它催化内源性 H2O2 分解产生 O2，从而缓解生物膜缺氧并增强声动力功效。因此，超声激活的 TLD1433 在小鼠铜绿假单胞菌肺炎模型和深部组织条件下患者来源的支气管肺泡灌洗液中显示出有效的抗菌功效。这项工作基于临床先进的钌络合物建立了一种机制独特的抗菌声动力策略，为针对深层和缺氧细菌感染的目标特异性声敏剂提供了设计框架。

title: [ASAP] Ligand-Symmetry-Driven Metal-Cluster Rotation for Accessing Compressed Pore Regimes in Metal–Organic Frameworks
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Isoreticular chemistry conventionally tunes pore dimensions by varying linker length or manipulating substituents. While widely used, this strategy is constrained by the intrinsic chemistry of molecular building units, rendering certain size regimes and pore geometries inaccessible. Here, we establish coordination symmetry as an independent and powerful design variable for unit-cell compression in pore-partitioned acs (pacs) metal-organic frameworks. Replacement of D3h-symmetric tris(4-pyridyl) ligands with their C3h-symmetric tris(3-pyridyl) positional isomers induces controlled rotation of metal clusters without altering ligand size or framework topology. Curvature-encoded dicarboxylate linkers define a finite metal-cluster rotation window, within which donor-position symmetry selects distinct rotational states, producing systematic contraction along the hexagonal a/b directions and up to ∼15% reduction in unit-cell volume. Across multiple metal trimers and ligand combinations, this symmetry-controlled compression enhances framework stability and dramatically improves gas-separation performance. Importantly, the strategy enables simultaneous increases in C2H2 uptake and C2H2/CO2 or C2H2/C2H4 selectivity, overcoming the commonly observed trade-off between adsorption capacity and selectivity in porous material design. Ni3-24fdc-3tpt achieves record C2H2/CO2 and C2H2/C2H4 selectivities within the pacs family (42.35 and 25.14, respectively), together with high separation potentials and robust breakthrough performance. These results demonstrate that ligand-symmetry-driven metal-cluster rotation provides a general and predictive route to access compressed pore regimes beyond conventional linker-length modulation and expands the conceptual framework of isoreticular chemistry.
title_zh: [ASAP] 配体对称驱动的金属簇旋转，用于访问金属有机框架中的压缩孔隙状态
abstract_zh: 等网化学通常通过改变连接体长度或操纵取代基来调节孔尺寸。虽然广泛使用，但该策略受到分子构建单元的固有化学性质的限制，导致某些尺寸范围和孔隙几何形状难以实现。在这里，我们将配位对称性建立为孔分区 acs (pacs) 金属有机框架中晶胞压缩的独立且强大的设计变量。用 C3h 对称三(3-吡啶基) 位置异构体替换 D3h 对称三(4-吡啶基) 配体可诱导金属簇的受控旋转，而不改变配体大小或框架拓扑。曲率编码的二羧酸连接体定义了一个有限的金属簇旋转窗口，在该窗口内供体位置对称性选择不同的旋转状态，产生沿六边形 a/b 方向的系统收缩，并使晶胞体积减少高达~15%。在多种金属三聚体和配体组合中，这种对称控制的压缩增强了框架稳定性并显着提高了气体分离性能。重要的是，该策略能够同时提高 C2H2 吸收和 C2H2/CO2 或 C2H2/C2H4 选择性，克服了多孔材料设计中吸附容量和选择性之间常见的权衡问题。 Ni3-24fdc-3tpt 在 pacs 系列中实现了创纪录的 C2H2/CO2 和 C2H2/C2H4 选择性（分别为 42.35 和 25.14），以及高分离潜力和强大的突破性性能。这些结果表明配体对称驱动的元

title: [ASAP] NaI-Mediated Defluorination: A Mild Route to Reduced Ruddlesden–Popper Oxyfluorides Demonstrated on La2CoO3F3 as Model System
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: We introduce NaI as a mild reagent for low-temperature topochemical defluorination of Ruddlesden-Popper oxyfluorides. In a topochemical fluorination and subsequent defluorination process La2CoO3F3 is obtained from La2CoO4, using poly(vinylidene fluoride) (PVDF) or polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) as fluorine sources, and converted to La2CoO3F2 by the addition of NaI. Both processes were studied by laboratory in situ X-ray diffraction, which reveals a stepwise fluorine uptake through four crystalline intermediates. Subsequent NaI treatment enables controlled F- removal to form La2CoO3F2. This Co(II) phase is not accessible by direct topochemical fluorination of La2CoO4 and is not observed along the La2CoO3F3 formation pathway. X-ray and neutron powder diffraction establish La2CoO3F3 as monoclinic (P21/c) with full occupation of the interstitial anion layer, whereas La2CoO3F2 is isotypic to La2NiO3F2 (Cccm) and exhibits a channel-like interstitial anion arrangement. Thermal analysis by in situ XRD is used to scan the temperature ranges over which both oxyfluorides retain their structure, and magnetization measurements indicate the change in cobalt oxidation and spin state upon fluorination/defluorination. This study uses the La2CoO4 → La2CoO3F3 → La2CoO3F2 reaction sequence as model system to demonstrate that, sequential topochemical fluorination and NaI-mediated defluorination provides access to metastable, anion-ordered RP oxyfluorides under milder conditions than conventional hydride-based reductions, avoiding both reduction of the metal cations to their metallic state and anion substitution reactions due to size effects of the iodide ion.
title_zh: [ASAP] NaI 介导的脱氟：以 La2CoO3F3 作为模型系统演示的减少 Ruddlesden-Popper 氟氧化物的温和途径
abstract_zh: 我们引入 NaI 作为温和试剂，用于 Ruddlesden-Popper 氟氧化物的低温拓扑化学脱氟。在拓扑化学氟化和随后的脱氟过程中，使用聚偏二氟乙烯（PVDF）或聚四氟乙烯（PTFE）作为氟源，从La2CoO4获得La2CoO3F3，并通过添加NaI将其转化为La2CoO3F2。这两个过程均通过实验室原位 X 射线衍射进行了研究，结果显示通过四种结晶中间体逐步吸收氟。随后的 NaI 处理可以控制 F- 去除，形成 La2CoO3F2。这种 Co(II) 相不能通过 La2CoO4 的直接拓扑化学氟化来获得，并且沿着 La2CoO3F3 形成途径也没有观察到。 X 射线和中子粉末衍射确定 La2CoO3F3 为单斜晶系 (P21/c)，完全占据间隙阴离子层，而 La2CoO3F2 与 La2NiO3F2 (Cccm) 是同型的，并表现出通道状间隙阴离子排列。原位 XRD 热分析用于扫描两种氟氧化物保持其结构的温度范围，磁化测量表明氟化/脱氟时钴氧化和自旋状态的变化。本研究使用 La2CoO4 → La2CoO3F3 → La2CoO3F2 反应序列作为模型系统，证明顺序拓扑化学氟化和 NaI 介导的脱氟可以在比传统氢化物还原更温和的条件下获得亚稳态、阴离子有序的 RP 氟氧化物，避免金属阳离子还原为其金属态和

title: [ASAP] The Intricate Nonadiabatic Dynamics of NO+ and NO3– Mutual Neutralization
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Mutual neutralization reactions play a subtle but crucial role in atmospheric chemistry. The intrinsic gap between typical ionization energies and electron affinities allows cation–anion reactions to produce a broad range of neutral products. Specifically, mutual neutralization of NO+ and NO3– ions in the presence of water has been proposed to play a key role in the formation of atmospheric nitrous acid (HONO) and, consequently, also OH radical formation. Nevertheless, the mechanisms and products of molecular anion–cation reactions are largely unknown. Here, we present a detailed experimental study of the isolated NO+ and NO3– reactions, using three-dimensional coincidence imaging of the neutral products of low-energy collisions in merged cation and anion beams. We found that while 15 product channels are energetically accessible, the reaction proceeds exclusively via a single nonadiabatic pathway yielding NO + NO2 + O. Momentum correlation analysis revealed an intricate nonadiabatic mechanism, initiated by a long-range electron transfer at ∼6 Å distance between the ions, resulting in vibrationally hot NO and an electronically excited NO3 (2E′) intermediate that undergoes subsequent dissociation, attributed to a conical intersection with the lower lying NO3 (2E″) state. The mechanistic picture of NO+ + NO3– neutralization and identification of specific intermediates provides a basis for considering the competing processes that in the presence of water can lead to HONO formation.
title_zh: [ASAP] NO+ 和 NO3– 相互中和的复杂非绝热动力学
abstract_zh: 相互中和反应在大气化学中发挥着微妙但至关重要的作用。典型电离能和电子亲和力之间的固有差距允许阳离子-阴离子反应产生多种中性产物。具体来说，NO+ 和 NO3- 离子在水存在下的相互中和在大气亚硝酸 (HONO) 的形成以及 OH 自由基的形成中发挥着关键作用。然而，分子阴离子-阳离子反应的机制和产物在很大程度上还是未知的。在这里，我们利用合并阳离子和阴离子束中低能碰撞的中性产物的三维符合成像，对孤立的 NO+ 和 NO3- 反应进行了详细的实验研究。我们发现，虽然 15 个产物通道在能量上是可访问的，但反应仅通过单一非绝热途径进行，产生 NO + NO2 + O。动量相关分析揭示了一种复杂的非绝热机制，该机制是由离子之间 ∼6 Å 距离的长程电子转移引发的，导致振动热 NO 和电子激发的 NO3 (2E') 中间体，该中间体随后发生解离，归因于与下方 NO3 的圆锥形交叉(2E”)状态。 NO+ + NO3– 中和的机理图以及特定中间体的识别为考虑在水存在下可导致 HONO 形成的竞争过程提供了基础。

title: [ASAP] Metal Foam Morphology Affects the Run to Run Reproducibility of OER Using Nickel Catalysts
source: ACS Energy Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Nickel (Ni) foam-based electrodes are excellent catalysts for the oxygen evolution reaction; however, we found that the random pore-size distribution of Ni foams contributes to a significant variability in electrochemically active surface area, compromising experimental reproducibility. We provide insights into quantifying this critical material property, verified by four electrochemical laboratories.
title_zh: [ASAP] 金属泡沫形态影响使用镍催化剂的 OER 的运行重现性
abstract_zh: 泡沫镍 (Ni) 电极是析氧反应的优异催化剂；然而，我们发现镍泡沫的随机孔径分布导致电化学活性表面积的显着变化，从而损害了实验的再现性。我们提供了量化这一关键材料特性的见解，并由四个电化学实验室验证。

title: [ASAP] Catalytic Enantioselective Dearomatizing [2,3]-Wittig Rearrangements Allow Divergent [2,3]-, [1,2]-, and Sommelet–Hauser-Type Products
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: The development of catalytic enantioselective dearomatizing [2,3]-rearrangement processes involving the C═C bond of a pendant (hetero)aromatic substituent remains a recognized significant challenge, primarily due to the energetic penalty associated with the loss of aromaticity in this process. The most common strategy in this area relies upon rearrangement from an onium ylide intermediate, followed by rearomatization, to generate Sommelet-Hauser-type products. Only limited enantioselective variants have been disclosed to date. In this paper, the enantioselective dearomatizing [2,3]-Wittig rearrangement of oxindole-substituted heteroaryl ethers employing a chiral bifunctional iminophosphorane (BIMP) catalyst is demonstrated. Solvent-dependent reactivity is observed, with 1,4-dioxane allowing preferential access to highly enantioenriched [2,3]-Wittig rearrangement products (up to 94:6 dr, 98:2 er). In mesitylene, the formation of enantioenriched [1,2]-Wittig products (up to 97:3 er) is favored via a cascade process consisting of initial [2,3]-rearrangement followed by an enantioretentive fragmentation/recombination event (equivalent to a [1,3]-rearrangement). Sommelet-Hauser-type products (up to 98:2 er) can be accessed by enantioselective [2,3]-Wittig rearrangement followed by selective tautomerization upon treatment with acid. Together, these processes deliver divergent access to heteroaryl-substituted 3-hydroxyoxindole derivatives in high yields and excellent stereoselectivities. Computational DFT studies provide insights into the origin of stereocontrol in the dearomatizing [2,3]-rearrangement event that underpins the observed stereoselectivity.
title_zh: [ASAP] 催化对映选择性脱芳构化 [2,3]-Wittig 重排可产生不同的 [2,3]-、[1,2]- 和 Sommelet–Hauser 型产品
abstract_zh: 涉及悬垂（杂）芳族取代基的 C=C 键的催化对映选择性脱芳构化 [2,3]-重排过程的发展仍然是一个公认的重大挑战，主要是由于该过程中与芳香性损失相关的能量损失。该领域最常见的策略依赖于鎓叶立德中间体的重排，然后进行重芳构化，以生成 Sommelet-Hauser 型产品。迄今为止仅公开了有限的对映选择性变体。在本文中，证明了使用手性双功​​能亚氨基正膦（BIMP）催化剂对羟吲哚取代的杂芳基醚进行对映选择性脱芳构化[2,3]-Wittig重排。观察到溶剂依赖性反应性，1,4-二恶烷允许优先获得高度对映体富集的 [2,3]-Wittig 重排产物（高达 94:6 dr、98:2 er）。在均三甲苯中，通过由初始[2,3]-重排和随后的对映体保留断裂/重组事件（相当于[1,3]-重排）组成的级联过程，有利于形成对映体富集的[1,2]-Wittig产物（高达97:3 er）。 Sommelet-Hauser 型产品（高达 98:2 er）可以通过对映选择性 [2,3]-Wittig 重排，然后用酸处理后进行选择性互变异构化来获得。总之，这些方法以高产率和优异的立体选择性提供了杂芳基取代的 3-羟基吲哚衍生物的不同途径。计算 DFT 研究提供了对 deomatizi 立体控制起源的见解

title: [ASAP] Ab Initio Polariton Spectra of ZnTPP Molecules Collectively Coupled Inside an Optical Cavity
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Exciton-polaritons are quasi-particles formed by the quantum mechanical hybridization of electronic and photonic excitations. Despite extensive investigations, a fundamental understanding of molecular polariton spectra and the polariton delocalization from an ab initio theoretical perspective remains elusive. We simulate experimentally measured linear transmission spectroscopy of many Zinc(II) tetraphenylporphyrin (ZnTPP) molecules collectively coupled to a cavity from first principles. Our theoretical approach incorporates many low-lying electronic excitations in ZnTPP molecules, as well as collective light-matter couplings between ZnTPP and the quantized radiation modes, both of which are shown to be the key to accurately recovering the experimental spectra. We further analyzed to what extent the polariton and dark states are delocalized over many molecules, for the first time, using fully ab initio descriptions of the molecules. We finally investigate the line width as a function of detuning, providing new theoretical insights into the experimentally observed motional narrowing behavior. Our work presents first-of-its-kind theoretical studies on molecular polariton spectra, offering a new perspective on molecular polariton formation in realistic ab initio molecular systems whose rich, many-state nature provides spectral features enabled by the high density of electronic states beyond simple quantum optics models.
title_zh: [ASAP] 光腔内集体耦合的 ZnTPP 分子的从头算极化子光谱
abstract_zh: 激子极化子是由电子和光子激发的量子力学杂化形成的准粒子。尽管进行了广泛的研究，但从头算理论角度对分子极化子光谱和极化子离域的基本理解仍然难以捉摸。我们根据第一原理模拟了许多四苯基卟啉锌 (II) (ZnTPP) 分子的实验测量线性透射光谱，这些分子共同耦合到空腔。我们的理论方法结合了 ZnTPP 分子中的许多低位电子激发，以及 ZnTPP 和量化辐射模式之间的集体光物质耦合，这两者都被证明是准确恢复实验光谱的关键。我们首次使用分子的完全从头开始描述，进一步分析了许多分子上极化子和暗态的离域程度。最后，我们研究了线宽作为失谐函数的关系，为实验观察到的运动变窄行为提供了新的理论见解。我们的工作首次对分子极化子光谱进行了理论研究，为现实的从头算分子系统中分子极化子的形成提供了新的视角，该系统丰富的多态性质提供了超越简单量子光学模型的高密度电子态所带来的光谱特征。

title: [ASAP] Proton-Feeding Dual-N Claw Sites in a Copper-Covalent Organic Framework Promote Hydrogenation Kinetics for Electrocatalytic Nitrate Reduction
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: The electrocatalytic conversion of nitrate to ammonia offers a sustainable solution for both environmental remediation and green energy production, yet its complex proton-coupled electron transfer kinetics poses a grand challenge for catalyst design. Herein, we demonstrate a proton-feeding dual-nitrogen claw site (DNCS) within a copper-covalent organic framework (DNCS-CuCOF) that captures and supplies localized protons to nitrogenous intermediates on the Cu center, enabling efficient hydrogenation. Compared with pristine CuCOF, DNCS-CuCOF maintains structural stability and exhibits significantly enhanced electrocatalytic performance, achieving a high Faradaic efficiency of 94% and an ammonia yield of 10.6 mg h-1 mgcat-1 at -0.8 V vs RHE. In-situ characterizations and density functional theory calculations reveal that the DNCS, by supplying localized protons, accelerates proton transfer kinetics and reduces the energy barrier for the rate-limiting step (*NO → *NHO) via an N-site-assisted Langmuir-Hinshelwood mechanism. This work establishes a new design principle of atomically precise innovation-engineering by creating localized proton feeding, offering a versatile platform for advancing electrocatalysis.
title_zh: [ASAP] 铜共价有机框架中的质子馈送双 N 爪位点促进电催化硝酸盐还原的氢化动力学
abstract_zh: 硝酸盐电催化转化为氨为环境修复和绿色能源生产提供了可持续的解决方案，但其复杂的质子耦合电子转移动力学对催化剂设计提出了巨大的挑战。在此，我们展示了铜共价有机框架（DNCS-CuCOF）内的质子供给双氮爪位点（DNCS），它捕获并向铜中心的含氮中间体提供局部质子，从而实现高效氢化。与原始CuCOF相比，DNCS-CuCOF保持了结构稳定性，并表现出显着增强的电催化性能，在-0.8 V vs RHE下实现了94%的高法拉第效率和10.6 mg h-1 mgcat-1的氨产率。原位表征和密度泛函理论计算表明，DNCS 通过提供局域质子，加速了质子转移动力学，并通过 N 位辅助的 Langmuir-Hinshelwood 机制降低了限速步骤 (*NO → *NHO) 的能垒。这项工作通过创建局部质子供给，建立了原子级精确创新工程的新设计原则，为推进电催化提供了一个多功能平台。

title: [ASAP] Isolating Coupled Effects by Interface Editing of Intermetallic Heterostructures for Fuel Cells
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Heterostructured nanomaterials have demonstrated extraordinary catalytic enhancements through engineered heterostructure-induced interactions, yet the origins remain largely elusive since current limitations in fabricating model systems can isolate various coupled effects. Here, we report an interdiffusion-controlled atomic replacement strategy to achieve programmable customization for two distinct intermetallic heterostructure (i-HS) systems. The (1-m)PdTe||mPdBi Janus hexagonal nanoplatelet [(1-m)PdTe||mPdBi JHPs] system maintains a highly coherent heterointerface through proper lattice matching, enabling isolated investigation for ligand effects; the (1-n)Pd20Te7||nPdBi core-crown hexagonal nanoplatelet [(1-n)Pd20Te7||nPdBi CHPs] system with severe lattice distortion establishes a complementary model to explore strain activity. Systematic oxygen reduction reaction analyses reveal the volcano-shaped activity trends in both systems, where (1-n)Pd20Te7||nPdBi CHPs at low bismuth (Bi) loading (31 at. %) with 4.1% interfacial lattice mismatching achieve the highest peak performance compared to (1-m)PdTe||mPdBi JHPs at high Bi loading (62 at. %), which demonstrates that the strain effect provides a superior complement to the ligand effect for optimizing the catalytic performance. Remarkably, in the anion exchange membrane fuel cells (AEMFCs), the best-performing 0.69Pd20Te7||0.31PdBi CHP-based membrane electrode assembly delivers a peak power density of 1.37 W cm-2 and specific power of 27.4 W mgPd-1, substantially outperforming all cutting-edge AEMFCs, as well as long-term durability with a negligible power density loss after 100 h. This study establishes a programmable synthesis platform for interface-precise i-HSs, being critical for heterostructure design systems toward catalysis and energy conversion technologies.
title_zh: [ASAP] 通过燃料电池金属间异质结构的界面编辑来隔离耦合效应
abstract_zh: 异质结构纳米材料已通过工程异质结构诱导的相互作用表现出非凡的催化增强作用，但其起源在很大程度上仍难以捉摸，因为目前制造模型系统的限制可以隔离各种耦合效应。在这里，我们报告了一种相互扩散控制的原子替换策略，以实现两种不同金属间异质结构（i-HS）系统的可编程定制。 (1-m)PdTe||mPdBi Janus 六方纳米片 [(1-m)PdTe||mPdBi JHPs] 系统通过适当的晶格匹配保持高度相干的异质界面，从而能够对配体效应进行独立研究；具有严重晶格畸变的(1-n)Pd20Te7||nPdBi核冠六方纳米片[(1-n)Pd20Te7||nPdBi CHPs]系统建立了一个互补模型来探索应变活性。系统氧还原反应分析揭示了两个系统中的火山形活性趋势，其中，与高 Bi 负载量 (62 at.%) 的 (1-m)PdTe||mPdBi JHPs 相比，低铋 (Bi) 负载量 (31 at.%) 且界面晶格失配为 4.1% 的 (1-n)Pd20Te7||nPdBi CHPs 实现了最高峰值性能，这表明应变效应为配体效应优化催化性能。值得注意的是，在阴离子交换膜燃料电池（AEMFC）中，性能最好的 0.69Pd20Te7||0.31PdBi CHP 膜电极组件可提供 1.37 W cm-2 的峰值功率密度和 27.4 W mgPd-1 的比功率，大大优于所有尖端 AEMFC，并且长期耐用。

title: Enhancing Perovskite/Organic Tandem Solar Cell Efficiencies via Gradient‐Regulated Crystallization of Mixed‐Halide Perovskites
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Mixed‐halide wide‐bandgap (WBG) perovskites suffer from inhomogeneous crystallization and vertical halide segregation during film formation and device operation. Here, we report a gradient‐controlled crystallization strategy to regulate crystallization kinetics and halide distribution in mixed‐halide perovskite films. Enabled by selective interactions with halide species and surface‐directed accumulation, this approach establishes a surface‐to‐bulk additive concentration gradient that synchronizes halide incorporation and suppresses the formation of Br‐rich regions. The strategy alleviates compositional heterogeneity, and the resulting surface‐enriched layer further retards the penetration of moisture and oxygen. Importantly, this strategy is broadly effective for mixed‐halide compositions spanning diverse halide mixing ratios. Consequently, WBG perovskite devices deliver superior photovoltaic performance, achieving a high
                    V
                    OC
                    of 1.385 V and a PCE of 17.78%. Integration of the WBG subcells into perovskite/organic tandem devices yields a champion efficiency of 25.91% with a
                    V
                    OC
                    of 2.191 V, while retaining more than 80% of the initial PCE after 600 h of continuous operation.
title_zh: 通过混合卤化物钙钛矿的梯度调节结晶提高钙钛矿/有机串联太阳能电池效率
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    混合卤化物宽带隙（WBG）钙钛矿在成膜和器件运行过程中会出现不均匀结晶和垂直卤化物偏析。在这里，我们报告了一种梯度控制结晶策略，用于调节混合卤化物钙钛矿薄膜中的结晶动力学和卤化物分布。通过与卤化物物质的选择性相互作用和表面定向积累，该方法建立了表面到本体的添加剂浓度梯度，同步卤化物的掺入并抑制富溴区域的形成。该策略减轻了成分的不均匀性，所得的表面富集层进一步阻碍了水分和氧气的渗透。重要的是，该策略对于跨越不同卤化物混合比例的混合卤化物组合物广泛有效。因此，WBG 钙钛矿器件可提供卓越的光伏性能，实现高

                    1.385 V，PCE 为 17.78%。将 WBG 子电池集成到钙钛矿/有机串联器件中，可实现 25.91% 的冠军效率
                    V
                    奥克
                    2.191 V，同时在连续运行 600 小时后保留超过 80% 的初始 PCE。

title: [ASAP] Targeted Coacervates Enabled by Polyphenol–Peptide Networks for Therapeutic Delivery
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Precise intracellular delivery remains a critical barrier to the efficacy of therapeutic biomolecules. Coacervates, with their high loading capacity, have emerged as a transformative drug delivery platform that can facilitate the intracellular delivery of diverse therapeutic cargos but are limited by poor stability, nonspecific cellular internalization, and uncontrolled release. Herein, we report a simple and versatile surface-engineering strategy that improves the stability of coacervates and enables programmable cell targeting and precise intracellular delivery. Peptide coacervates (PCs) designed with programmable release were coated with polyphenol-peptide networks (PC@PPNs) to encapsulate diverse cargos, including fluorophores, toxic proteins, pro-apoptotic peptides, and plasmid DNA. The dual pH- and glutathione-responsive disassembly of PC@PPNs facilitates endosomal escape and enables controlled cytosolic release. Notably, the association of PC@PPNs with specific cells can be readily programmed by modulating the peptide sequence on PPNs. For example, incorporating HER2-targeting peptides increases the specific association of PC@PPNs with SKOV3 cells from 14% to 75%. The cell-specific targeting is further validated in vivo, as demonstrated by a pronounced size reduction in HER2-overexpressing tumors. This work establishes a rational framework for engineering functional coacervates, advancing their development as versatile and programmable platforms for intracellular delivery.
title_zh: [ASAP] 多酚肽网络实现的靶向凝聚层用于治疗传递
abstract_zh: 精确的细胞内递送仍然是治疗生物分子功效的关键障碍。凝聚层具有高负载能力，已成为一种变革性的药物递送平台，可以促进多种治疗药物的细胞内递送，但受到稳定性差、非特异性细胞内化和不受控释放的限制。在此，我们报告了一种简单且通用的表面工程策略，该策略可提高凝聚层的稳定性并实现可编程细胞靶向和精确的细胞内递送。采用可编程释放设计的肽凝聚层 (PC) 被多酚肽网络 (PC@PPN) 包被，以封装不同的货物，包括荧光团、有毒蛋白质、促凋亡肽和质粒 DNA。 PC@PPNs 的双重 pH 和谷胱甘肽响应性分解促进内体逃逸并实现受控的胞质释放。值得注意的是，PC@PPNs 与特定细胞的关联可以通过调节 PPNs 上的肽序列来轻松编程。例如，掺入 HER2 靶向肽可将 PC@PPN 与 SKOV3 细胞的特异性关联从 14% 增加至 75%。细胞特异性靶向在体内得到进一步验证，HER2 过表达肿瘤的尺寸明显减小就证明了这一点。这项工作为工程功能凝聚层建立了一个合理的框架，促进了它们作为细胞内递送的多功能和可编程平台的发展。

title: [ASAP] Axially Chiral Bifluorenylidene Radical Anions with Long Spin–Lattice Relaxation Times at Room Temperature in Fluid Solution
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Despite the recent interest in magnetochiral phenomena, well-characterized radicals that possess both molecular chirality and spin remain scarce. Herein, we report the synthesis of a series of axially chiral bifluorenylidene (BF) molecules and their singly reduced radical anions with varying degrees of fjord-region benzannulation. Our systematic structural perturbations provide insight into how the twist angle across their central C═C bond influences their redox state, electronic structure, stereochemical dynamics, and spin properties. Variable-temperature nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) and electron paramagnetic resonance (EPR) studies are used to explore the barriers to major racemization processes. UV-vis-NIR absorption and magnetic circular dichroism spectroscopies provide insight into the electronic structures of the systems and are combined with multireference computational techniques to characterize the potential energy surfaces. Pulsed EPR measurements revealed that the BF radical anions displayed notably long spin-lattice (T1) relaxation times that approached 0.1 ms in fluid 2-methyltetrahydrofuran solution at room temperature, nearly 2 orders of magnitude longer than typical organic radicals. Remarkably, we found the unique combination of π delocalization, electronic structure, and low anisotropy insulates the spin from longitudinal relaxation due to molecular tumbling. The T1 temperature dependence is instead consistent with relaxation through thermally activated local-mode processes, suggesting that molecular design to control vibrations may be just as important in extending solution-phase T1 times as in the solid state. Our results establish BF radical anions as a versatile framework to explore spin-chirality interactions and to achieve long-lived spin states in nonviscous fluid solution at room temperature.
title_zh: [ASAP] 室温下流体溶液中具有长自旋晶格弛豫时间的轴向手性双芴基阴离子
abstract_zh: 尽管最近人们对磁手性现象很感兴趣，但同时具有分子手性和自旋的良好表征的自由基仍然很少。在此，我们报道了一系列轴向手性二芴基（BF）分子及其具有不同程度的峡湾区苯并环化的单还原自由基阴离子的合成。我们的系统结构扰动提供了关于中心 C=C 键扭转角如何影响其氧化还原态、电子结构、立体化学动力学和自旋特性的见解。变温核磁共振（NMR）和电子顺磁共振（EPR）研究用于探索主要外消旋过程的障碍。紫外-可见-近红外吸收和磁圆二色光谱可以深入了解系统的电子结构，并与多参考计算技术相结合来表征势能表面。脉冲 EPR 测量表明，BF 自由基阴离子表现出显着长的自旋晶格 (T1) 弛豫时间，在室温下的流体 2-甲基四氢呋喃溶液中接近 0.1 毫秒，比典型有机自由基长近 2 个数量级。值得注意的是，我们发现 π 离域、电子结构和低各向异性的独特组合使自旋免受分子翻滚引起的纵向弛豫的影响。相反，T1 温度依赖性与热激活局部模式过程的弛豫一致，这表明控制振动的分子设计可能同样重要

title: [ASAP] Cd-Rich Shell-Engineered ZnCdS Nanocrystals for Ultrahigh-Performance Adjustable Shielding of Ultraviolet–Blue Light
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Excessive exposure to ultraviolet (UV)-blue light (250-500 nm) has detrimental effects on human health, polymeric materials, and natural substances. The development of stable, efficient, and multifunctional materials capable of selectively absorbing harmful UV-blue light while preserving high transparency at longer wavelengths remains highly desirable yet challenging. Herein, we report a Cd-rich shell-engineering strategy to precisely tailor the band-edge states of ZnCdS nanocrystals (NCs), thereby achieving markedly enhanced the colloidal solution's absorption (optical path: 1 cm) in the UV-blue region, with nearly complete blocking of hazardous radiation (<1% transmittance at 500 nm), while maintaining outstanding optical transparency (>90% transmittance above 528 nm). Moreover, incorporation of ZnCdS@Cd-rich NCs into ethyl cellulose polymer matrix enables the fabrication of transparent composite films with excellent UV-blue light shielding ability, effectively protecting organic substrates such as wood against photodegradation. Even under laser diodes radiation, the NC-based transparent film still can possess outstanding shielding performance. The introduction of Cd-rich shell engineering as a versatile strategy to enhance short-wavelength absorption in semiconductor NCs, enabling the fabrication of optical films that effectively block harmful UV-blue light while maintaining high visible transparency, offering promising applications in optical filters and protective coatings.
title_zh: [ASAP] 富镉壳工程 ZnCdS 纳米晶体，用于超高性能可调节紫外-蓝光屏蔽
abstract_zh: 过度暴露于紫外线 (UV)-蓝光（250-500 nm）会对人体健康、高分子材料和天然物质产生有害影响。开发能够选择性吸收有害紫外光、同时在较长波长下保持高透明度的稳定、高效和多功能材料仍然是非常理想的，但也具有挑战性。在此，我们报告了一种富镉壳工程策略，可精确定制ZnCdS纳米晶体（NC）的带边状态，从而显着增强胶体溶液在紫外蓝色区域的吸收（光程：1 cm），几乎完全阻挡有害辐射（500 nm处的透射率<1％），同时保持出色的光学透明度（528 nm以上的透射率> 90％）。此外，将ZnCdS@富含Cd的NCs加入乙基纤维素聚合物基体中，可以制备具有优异的紫外蓝光屏蔽能力的透明复合薄膜，有效保护木材等有机基材免受光降解。即使在激光二极管辐射下，NC基透明薄膜仍能具有出色的屏蔽性能。引入富镉壳工程作为增强半导体NC中短波长吸收的通用策略，使得能够制造出有效阻挡有害紫外蓝光同时保持高可见透明度的光学薄膜，从而在光学滤波器和保护涂层中提供有前景的应用。

title: [ASAP] Accelerating Proton Exchange in 1,8-Bis(dialkylamino)naphthalene Proton Sponges through Intramolecular Catalysis for CEST MRI
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Chemical exchange saturation transfer (CEST) MRI generates contrast by transferring saturation from exchangeable protons to bulk water. In diamagnetic agents, labile -NH/-OH protons typically resonate close to water (1-5 ppm), severely limiting selectivity. Thus, larger chemical shift offsets are highly desirable for in vivo applications. Efficient CEST at clinical field strengths also requires exchange rates within a narrow kinetic window. Tetraalkyl 1,8-diaminonaphthalenes (proton sponges) are attractive scaffolds for diaCEST agents because the labile proton locked in a strong hydrogen bond between the two nitrogens in the monoprotonated forms can exhibit extraordinarily large downfield chemical shift offsets from water. However, these compounds do not have CEST because the strong H-bond also results in very slow exchange with the bulk. Here, we report the design, synthesis, and evaluation of a new tetrasubstituted 1,8-diaminonaphthalene derivative in which proton exchange is accelerated by intramolecular catalysis. Detailed structural, thermodynamic, and kinetic studies of 1,8-diaminonaphthalene tetraacetic acid (DANTA) reveal that the carboxylate groups participate in intramolecular hydrogen-bonding interactions with the central N···H+···N bridge, markedly accelerating the proton exchange rate to 492 s-1 at 37 °C, which is within the optimal kinetic regime for CEST at 3 T. Importantly, the carboxylate substituents do not affect the chemical shift offset of the exchanging proton, which remains substantially deshielded and highly downfield shifted at 12.5 ppm from water. In vivo MRI studies further demonstrate that DANTA generates exquisite CEST contrast in the kidneys of mice at 3 T using clinically permissible saturation RF field strengths.
title_zh: [ASAP] 通过分子内催化加速 1,8-双（二​​烷基氨基）萘质子海绵中的质子交换，用于 CEST MRI
abstract_zh: 化学交换饱和度转移 (CEST) MRI 通过将饱和度从可交换质子转移到大量水中来产生对比度。在抗磁剂中，不稳定的 -NH/-OH 质子通常会在水附近 (1-5 ppm) 共振，严重限制选择性。因此，体内应用非常需要更大的化学位移偏移。在临床场强下有效的 CEST 还需要在狭窄的动力学窗口内进行汇率。四烷基 1,8-二氨基萘（质子海绵）是 diaCEST 试剂的有吸引力的支架，因为锁定在单质子化形式的两个氮之间的强氢键中的不稳定质子可以表现出与水的非常大的低场化学位移偏移。然而，这些化合物不具有 CEST，因为强氢键也会导致与本体的交换非常缓慢。在这里，我们报告了一种新型四取代1,8-二氨基萘衍生物的设计、合成和评估，其中质子交换通过分子内催化加速。 1,8-二氨基萘四乙酸 (DANTA) 的详细结构、热力学和动力学研究表明，羧酸根基团参与与中心 N·H+·N 桥的分子内氢键相互作用，在 37 °C 下将质子交换速率显着加速至 492 s-1，这处于 3 T 下 CEST 的最佳动力学范围内。重要的是，羧酸根取代基不会影响化学位移偏移交换质子，其仍然基本上是去屏蔽的并且高度低场偏移，距水 12.5 ppm。

title: [ASAP] AI-Guided De Novo Design of a Caffeine-Induced Protein Dissociation System
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Chemically induced proximity (CIP) and chemically disrupted proximity (CDP) technologies have transformed biological research by enabling precise temporal control of protein-protein interactions and cellular functions. However, despite the extensive development of CIP systems, CDP tools with strong translational potential remain comparatively underdeveloped, calling for the need to expand the CDP toolkit. Here, we present a caffeine-operated dissociation system (CODS), a CDP platform activated by caffeine-an inexpensive and widely available small molecule from food or beverages with a well-established safety profile. Using an AI-guided de novo protein design framework, we reprogrammed an existing caffeine-responsive CIP module into a ligand-dependent dissociation system. CODS exhibits high sensitivity and rapid functional switching, with an EC50 below 90 nM and minute-scale dissociation and reassociation kinetics. We further demonstrate the utility of CODS across diverse cellular contexts, including caffeine-dependent suppression of gene expression, induction of programmed cell death via pyroptosis, and conditional deactivation of chimeric antigen receptor (CAR) T-cell activity. CODS establishes a broadly applicable CDP platform for tunable control of cellular functions and provides a potentially generalizable strategy for engineering chemically controlled dissociation systems from existing CIP architectures.
title_zh: [ASAP] 人工智能引导的咖啡因诱导蛋白质解离系统的从头设计
abstract_zh: 化学诱导接近 (CIP) 和化学破坏接近 (CDP) 技术通过实现对蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用和细胞功能的精确时间控制，改变了生物学研究。然而，尽管CIP系统得到了广泛的发展，但具有强大转化潜力的CDP工具仍然相对不发达，需要扩展CDP工具包。在这里，我们提出了一种咖啡因操作解离系统（CODS），这是一种由咖啡因激活的 CDP 平台，咖啡因是一种廉价且广泛使用的小分子，来自食品或饮料，具有良好的安全性。使用人工智能引导的从头蛋白质设计框架，我们将现有的咖啡因响应 CIP 模块重新编程为配体依赖性解离系统。 CODS 表现出高灵敏度和快速功能切换，EC50 低于 90 nM，具有分钟级解离和重结合动力学。我们进一步证明了 CODS 在不同细胞环境中的效用，包括咖啡因依赖性基因表达抑制、通过细胞焦亡诱导程序性细胞死亡以及嵌合抗原受体 (CAR) T 细胞活性的条件失活。 CODS 建立了一个广泛适用的 CDP 平台，用于细胞功能的可调控制，并为从现有 CIP 架构设计化学控制解离系统提供了潜在的通用策略。

title: An ecosystem of carbon dioxide removal reviews – part 2: CO2 removal via blue carbon ecosystems
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Carbon dioxide removal (CDR) is essential for achieving global climate goals, such as those outlined in the Paris Agreement. This systematic review investigates the current state of CDR through management pathways for blue carbon ecosystems (BCEs) and assesses their role in the global CDR portfolio. This article analyzed 2622 peer-reviewed and gray literature articles out of 13 859 identified using a machine learning-assisted review process published through November 2025. The review focuses primarily on mangroves, seagrass meadows, salt marshes, and macroalgae. These ecosystems collectively sequester approximately 270 MtC year−1 (106–516) to various long-term sinks, with macroalgal export to deep ocean environments and dissolved inorganic carbon (DIC) pools contributing the most. BCE conservation and restoration offer potential CO2 emission reductions between 60–96 MtC year−1 and removals between 21–448 MtC year−1 by 2050, though these estimates remain uncertain and vary widely in cost and feasibility. The study highlights significant gaps in integrating BCEs into climate policy, particularly regarding their representation in national inventories, carbon accounting frameworks, and cost assessments. It emphasizes the need for multi-benefit strategies that balance carbon sequestration with local livelihoods and ecosystem co-benefits. Translating these insights into practice will require that climate policy frameworks explicitly incorporate blue carbon pathways through combining carbon sequestration with financial reward systems and additional incentives to realize co-benefits and interaction effects that would also increase social acceptance.
title_zh: 二氧化碳清除生态系统评论 - 第 2 部分：通过蓝碳生态系统清除二氧化碳
abstract_zh: 二氧化碳清除 (CDR) 对于实现全球气候目标至关重要，例如《巴黎协定》中概述的目标。本系统综述通过蓝碳生态系统 (BCE) 的管理途径调查了 CDR 的现状，并评估了它们在全球 CDR 组合中的作用。本文分析了截至 2025 年 11 月发布的 13,859 篇同行评审文章和灰色文献文章，这些文章是使用机器学习辅助评审流程确定的。该评审主要关注红树林、海草草甸、盐沼和大型藻类。这些生态系统总共将大约 270 MtC 1 年 (106-516) 封存到各种长期汇中，其中向深海环境和溶解无机碳 (DIC) 库输出的大型藻类贡献最大。到 2050 年，BCE 保护和恢复可能会减少 60-96 MtCyear-1 的二氧化碳排放量，清除 21-448 MtCyear−1 的二氧化碳，尽管这些估计仍然不确定，并且成本和可行性差异很大。该研究强调了将 BCE 纳入气候政策方面的重大差距，特别是在它们在国家清单、碳核算框架和成本评估中的代表性方面。它强调需要采取多效益战略，平衡碳固存与当地生计和生态系统的共同效益。将这些见解转化为实践需要气候政策框架通过将碳封存与财政奖励制度和额外激励措施相结合来明确纳入蓝碳途径，以实现共同利益

title: Indium-based colloidal quantum dots for photocatalytic applications: advances and perspectives
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Indium-based quantum dots (InQDs), including both III–V (e.g., InP and InAs) and I–III–VI (e.g., CuInS2, CuInSe2, and AgInS2) families, have attracted growing attention as environmentally friendly alternatives to traditional Cd- and Pb-based QDs for photocatalytic energy conversion and environmental applications. Their size- and composition-tunable electronic structures, broad visible-light absorption, and excellent photochemical stability under most circumstances make them ideal platforms for driving various photocatalytic reactions, including hydrogen evolution, carbon dioxide reduction, and organic transformations. This review systematically summarizes recent advances in the rational design and performance optimization of InQDs for photocatalytic applications, with a particular focus on structural modulation, surface passivation, and interface engineering strategies that enhance charge separation and suppress nonradiative recombination. We further elucidate the fundamental relationships between the composition, shell configuration, and defect states of InQDs and their corresponding catalytic activities and stabilities. In addition, emerging strategies, such as co-catalyst coupling, heterostructure construction, and hybrid integration, are discussed to enhance light harvesting and reaction kinetics. Finally, the current challenges and future perspectives are outlined, including scalable green synthesis, precise interfacial control, and data-driven design, which provide insights to accelerate the development of high-efficiency, heavy-metal-free InQDs for sustainable photocatalytic hydrogen generation, CO2 conversion, and organic transformations.
title_zh: 用于光催化应用的铟基胶体量子点：进展和前景
abstract_zh: 包括III-V族（例如InP和InAs）和I-III-VI族（例如CuInS2、CuInSe2和AgInS2）在内的铟基量子点（InQD）作为用于光催化能量转换和环境应用的传统镉基和铅基量子点的环保替代品而受到越来越多的关注。它们的尺寸和成分可调的电子结构、广泛的可见光吸收以及在大多数情况下出色的光化学稳定性使它们成为驱动各种光催化反应（包括析氢、二氧化碳还原和有机转化）的理想平台。本文系统地总结了 InQD 光催化应用的合理设计和性能优化的最新进展，特别关注增强电荷分离和抑制非辐射复合的结构调制、表面钝化和界面工程策略。我们进一步阐明了InQD的组成、壳层构型和缺陷态及其相应的催化活性和稳定性之间的基本关系。此外，还讨论了诸如助催化剂耦合、异质结构构建和混合集成等新兴策略，以增强光捕获和反应动力学。最后，概述了当前的挑战和未来的前景，包括可扩展的绿色合成、精确的界面控制和数据驱动的设计，这为加速开发用于可持续光合作用的高效、无重金属的InQD提供了见解。

title: Blocking oxidation of α-hydrogens enables non-fluorinated solvents to achieve high-potential stability in lithium batteries
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Developing next-generation batteries that are high-energy, low-cost and eco-friendly is crucial for industrial applications. Lithium-rich manganese-based oxide positive electrodes offer substantial specific energy, enabled by their high specific capacity at high charging potential (>4.6 V versus Li/Li+). However, stable operation at such high potentials remains challenging, as most electrolytes rely on environmentally unfriendly fluorinated solvents. Here we identified α-oxidation of the carbonyl group as the main oxidation mechanism of carboxylate esters. By removing all the reactive α-hydrogens of methyl acetate, we demonstrate that methyl trimethylacetate is a non-fluorinated, high-potential-stable solvent. This solvent exhibits outstanding oxidative stability up to 5.6 V versus Li/Li+, and electrochemical cells using methyl-trimethylacetate-based electrolytes maintain stable cycling at 4.6/4.7 V, outperforming many fluorinated systems. An industrial-scale 7.2-Ah pouch cell reached a maximum specific energy of 652.4 Wh kg−1 with 94.5% capacity retention after 28 cycles at 0.1 C/0.2 C. This work provides a simple molecular design strategy that addresses specific energy, cost and sustainability in next-generation high-voltage lithium batteries.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 阻止α-氢的氧化使非氟化溶剂在锂电池中实现高电位稳定性
abstract_zh: 开发高能、低成本、环保的下一代电池对于工业应用至关重要。富锂锰基氧化物正极可提供大量的比能量，这得益于其在高充电电位（相对于 Li/Li+ 而言>4.6 V）下的高比容量。然而，在如此高的电势下稳定运行仍然具有挑战性，因为大多数电解质依赖于对环境不友好的氟化溶剂。在这里，我们确定羰基的α-氧化是羧酸酯的主要氧化机制。通过去除乙酸甲酯的所有活性 α-氢，我们证明三甲基乙酸甲酯是一种非氟化、高电位稳定的溶剂。与 Li/Li+ 相比，该溶剂在高达 5.6 V 的电压下表现出出色的氧化稳定性，并且使用基于三甲基乙酸甲酯的电解质的电化学电池可在 4.6/4.7 V 下保持稳定的循环，优于许多氟化系统。工业规模的 7.2-Ah 软包电池在 0.1 C/0.2 C 下循环 28 次后达到了 652.4 Wh kg−1 的最大比能量，容量保持率为 94.5%。这项工作提供了一种简单的分子设计策略，可解决下一代高压锂电池的比能量、成本和可持续性问题。该图像的替代文本可能是使用 AI 生成的。

title: Metal electrode potential diverges with ion additions
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: The electrode redox potential, which varies substantially with the electrolyte, governs both the direction and thermodynamic driving force of electrochemical reactions. However, a comprehensive understanding and effective control of redox potential shifts remain unestablished. Here we report the pronounced effect of coordination-shell ions on the redox potential of metal electrodes. Cooperative interactions between the metal ion and surrounding anions and cations with large differences in hardness/softness amplify the redox potential shift, as corroborated by liquid Madelung potential. Specifically, in the Zn/Zn2+ system, the addition of soft anions paired with hard cations destabilizes the Zn2+ solution structure and upshifts the redox potential, whereas hard anions with soft cations stabilize the structure and induce a downshift. Following this principle, a potential gap exceeding 0.6 V was achieved—a remarkably large but reasonable value for a divalent system. This ion hardness/softness-based strategy also demonstrates practical benefits in Zn plating/stripping tests, where electrolytes with upshifted redox potentials enable an average Coulombic efficiency exceeding 99.9%.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 金属电极电势随离子添加而变化
abstract_zh: 电极氧化还原电位随电解质变化很大，决定着电化学反应的方向和热力学驱动力。然而，对氧化还原电位变化的全面理解和有效控制仍未建立。在这里，我们报告了配位壳离子对金属电极氧化还原电位的显着影响。金属离子与周围硬度/软度差异较大的阴离子和阳离子之间的协同相互作用放大了氧化还原电位的变化，液体马德隆电位证实了这一点。具体来说，在 Zn/Zn2+ 体系中，添加软阴离子与硬阳离子配对会破坏 Zn2+ 溶液结构的稳定性并提高氧化还原电位，而硬阴离子与软阳离子则稳定结构并导致氧化还原电位降低。遵循这一原理，可以实现超过 0.6 V 的电位间隙——对于二价系统来说，这是一个非常大但合理的值。这种基于离子硬度/软度的策略还证明了在镀锌/剥离测试中的实际优势，其中氧化还原电位升高的电解质使平均库仑效率超过 99.9%。该图像的替代文本可能是使用 AI 生成的。

title: Ion-triggered reconfigurable hydrogels with salt-enhanced mechanical and swelling properties via network topological adaptation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Hydrogels typically deteriorate under high-salinity conditions because electrostatic screening and reduced polymer-solvent affinity suppress swelling and weaken load-bearing network connectivity. Here, we report a double-network hydrogel that strengthens while swelling in brine. Compared with its behavior in water, the network undergoes an ion-triggered topological reconfiguration upon salt exposure. The intrachain zwitterionic ion pairs open and reform as inter-network SBVI+-AMPS− bridges, increasing effective bridge density at lower polymer fraction. The hydrogel exhibits 1.63-fold tensile strength and 1.21-fold swelling ratio in 200 g/L NaCl compared to deionized water. SAXS and XPS confirm salt-induced structural homogenization and charge redistribution. Density functional theory calculations support strengthened ionic association under saline conditions between SBVI and AMPS. Free energy analysis reveals that reduced loop fraction and increased connectivity enable associative stabilization to compensate for elastic swelling penalties. Core-flooding demonstrates robust injectability in high-salinity porous rock. This mechanism provides design rules for salt-adaptive hydrogels.
title_zh: 通过网络拓扑适应，离子触发可重构水凝胶具有盐增强的机械和膨胀特性
abstract_zh: 水凝胶通常在高盐条件下恶化，因为静电屏蔽和聚合物-溶剂亲和力降低会抑制膨胀并削弱承载网络连接性。在这里，我们报道了一种双网络水凝胶，它在盐水中膨胀时会增强。与在水中的行为相比，该网络在暴露于盐时会经历离子触发的拓扑重构。链内两性离子对打开并重组为网络间 SBVI+-AMPS− 桥，在较低聚合物分数下增加了有效桥密度。与去离子水相比，该水凝胶在200 g/L NaCl中表现出1.63倍的拉伸强度和1.21倍的溶胀比。 SAXS 和 XPS 证实了盐诱导的结构均质化和电荷重新分布。密度泛函理论计算支持 SBVI 和 AMPS 之间在盐水条件下离子缔合的加强。自由能分析表明，环路分数的减少和连通性的增加使得关联稳定性能够补偿弹性膨胀损失。岩心驱替在高盐度多孔岩石中表现出强大的可注入性。该机制为盐适应性水凝胶提供了设计规则。

title: Experimental asymmetric relativistic zero-knowledge proofs with unconditional security
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Zero-knowledge proofs (ZKPs) are widely applied in digital economies, such as cryptocurrencies and smart contracts, for establishing trust and privacy between untrusted parties. Classical ZKPs rely on computational assumptions and are vulnerable to quantum attacks. While a recent advance suggests quantum-sound symmetric relativistic ZKPs for the graph three-coloring problem without computational assumptions, the high round complexity, which leads to unachievable runtime and overall randomness cost, renders them impractical for real-life deployment. To overcome this, we develop an efficient asymmetric relativistic ZKP protocol using relativistic bit commitments, and prove its quantum soundness by relating it to the nonlocal Clauser-Horne-Shimony-Holt (CHSH) game. Our protocol achieves a linear relationship between the round complexity and the number of edges, and thus significantly improves practical feasibility. In addition, we implement a proof-of-principle experiment which completes all interactive rounds in about 0.22 seconds and requires an overall randomness cost of 430.81 MB. Our work illustrates the powerful potential of integrating special relativity with quantum theory in trustless cryptography, paving the way for robust applications against quantum attacks in distrustful Internet environments.
title_zh: 具有无条件安全性的实验性非对称相对论零知识证明
abstract_zh: 零知识证明（ZKP）广泛应用于数字经济中，例如加密货币和智能合约，用于在不可信各方之间建立信任和隐私。经典的 ZKP 依赖于计算假设，并且容易受到量子攻击。虽然最近的一项进展表明，在没有计算假设的情况下，可以使用量子声音对称相对论 ZKP 来解决图三着色问题，但较高的轮复杂度会导致无法实现的运行时间和总体随机性成本，使得它们对于现实生活中的部署来说是不切实际的。为了克服这个问题，我们使用相对论比特承诺开发了一种高效的非对称相对论 ZKP 协议，并通过将其与非局域 Clauser-Horne-Shimony-Holt (CHSH) 博弈相关来证明其量子可靠性。我们的协议实现了轮复杂度和边数之间的线性关系，从而显着提高了实际可行性。此外，我们还实施了一个原理验证实验，该实验在大约 0.22 秒内完成所有交互轮次，并且需要 430.81 MB 的总体随机性成本。我们的工作展示了将狭义相对论与量子理论在去信任密码学中相结合的强大潜力，为在不信任的互联网环境中抵御量子攻击的强大应用程序铺平了道路。

title: Robust flat-magnetoresistivity in D03-Fe3Ga driven by chiral anomaly
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Topologically non‑trivial nodes emerging from flat‑band crossings not only enhance unconventional topological responses but also play a fundamental role in exploring correlation‑driven topological physics. Here, we report the exceptionally robust chiral-anomaly-dominated transport in D03-Fe3Ga. Firstly, we observe a perfect combination of positive/negative magnetoresistance, ideal planar longitudinal magnetoresistance (PLMR), and planar Hall effect (PHE). Secondly, ultra-low-temperature resistivity exhibits pronounced non-Fermi-liquid (NFL) behavior, accompanied by the emergence of giant intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity (AHC), in excellent agreement with our DFT calculations, which confirm the existence of tilted Weyl points arising from crossings of nearly three-dimensional (3D) flat-bands. Most remarkably, we detect an exceptionally robust flat-magnetoresistance (flat-MR) that persists without decay up to 33 T. This distinctive set of phenomena provides strong evidence that the Fermi level intersects the flattened Weyl crossings, offering unambiguous confirmation of a long-sought hallmark of ideal topological semimetals. Unlike previous systems, D03-Fe3Ga exhibits the pristine characteristics of a topological flat-band semimetal. Our findings also highlight a promising magnetic platform for quantum device innovations.
title_zh: 由手性异常驱动的 D03-Fe3Ga 中鲁棒的平坦磁阻
abstract_zh: 从平带交叉中出现的拓扑非平凡节点不仅增强了非常规拓扑响应，而且在探索相关驱动的拓扑物理中发挥着基础作用。在这里，我们报告了 D03-Fe3Ga 中异常强大的手性异常主导的传输。首先，我们观察到正/负磁阻、理想平面纵向磁阻（PLMR）和平面霍尔效应（PHE）的完美结合。其次，超低温电阻率表现出明显的非费米液体（NFL）行为，伴随着巨大的本征反常霍尔电导率（AHC）的出现，与我们的DFT计算非常一致，这证实了由于近三维（3D）平带交叉而产生的倾斜Weyl点的存在。最值得注意的是，我们检测到异常强大的平坦磁阻 (flat-MR)，其在高达 33 T 的温度下仍能保持不衰变。这组独特的现象提供了强有力的证据，证明费米能级与平坦的外尔交叉点相交，从而明确证实了长期以来寻求的理想拓扑半金属的标志。与以前的系统不同，D03-Fe3Ga 表现出拓扑平带半金属的原始特征。我们的研究结果还强调了量子器件创新的一个有前途的磁性平台。

title: Topological structure optimization of B,N-doped nanographenes for deep-blue emitters
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: B,N-doped nanographenes are promising blue OLED dopants owing to their narrowband emission and triplet-exciton harvesting capability, but their inefficient reverse intersystem crossing (RISC) remains a bottleneck for practical applications. Although π-extension is widely used to accelerate RISC and improve color purity, the role of molecular topology remains unclear. Here we report three deep-blue, quadruple-borylated nanographenes with isomeric skeletons and topology-dependent conformations ranging from negatively curved to quasi-planar. Combined theoretical and experimental studies reveal that enhanced planarity can facilitate the resonance effect, promote charge-transfer delocalization, and increase structural rigidity. Consequently, the most planarized emitter achieves an ultranarrow emission bandwidth of 13 nm/0.07 eV and a high RISC rate constant of 2.7 × 106 s−1, outperforming the curved analogues. The corresponding OLED delivers an external quantum efficiency of 30.4% at 1000 cd m−2 with color coordinates of (0.127, 0.078), establishing conformation-guided design principles for high-performance narrowband emitters toward ultrahigh-definition displays.
title_zh: 用于深蓝色发射器的 B,N 掺杂纳米石墨烯拓扑结构优化
abstract_zh: B,N掺杂纳米石墨烯由于其窄带发射和三线态激子捕获能力而成为有前途的蓝色OLED掺杂剂，但其低效的反向系间窜越（RISC）仍然是实际应用的瓶颈。尽管 π 扩展被广泛用于加速 RISC 和提高颜色纯度，但分子拓扑的作用仍不清楚。在这里，我们报告了三种深蓝色四硼化纳米石墨烯，具有异构骨架和从负弯曲到准平面的拓扑依赖构象。理论和实验研究相结合表明，增强的平面性可以促进共振效应，促进电荷转移离域，并增加结构刚性。因此，最平坦的发射器实现了 13 nm/0.07 eV 的超窄发射带宽和 2.7 × 106 s−1 的高 RISC 速率常数，优于弯曲的类似物。相应的 OLED 在 1000 cd m−2 下具有 30.4% 的外量子效率，色坐标为 (0.127, 0.078)，为面向超高清显示器的高性能窄带发射器建立了构象引导设计原则。

title: Strain-localized luminescent e-skin for high-resolution pressure mapping and visual force feedback
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Electronic skins (e-skins) that emulate human intuitive tactile perception with visual feedback capabilities are vital for next-generation wearables, robotics, and biomedical applications. However, existing visualized pressure mapping systems either require dense pixelated arrays that add bulk, complexity and signal crosstalk, or rely on rigid or semi‑rigid architecture, and are not able to conform to dynamically changing curved, soft surfaces. Here, we report a soft mechano-electroluminescent e-skin for high-resolution visualized pressure mapping. Quantitative pressure sensing is achieved on curved and compliant substrates. Built with an ultrathin, entirely soft microstructured architecture, it harnesses strain-localized deformation and intrinsic, in‑situ force–electric–optical coupling within a continuous device stack to achieve high‑fidelity pressure mapping without discrete sensing pixels. It achieves a spatial resolution of 30 μm (847 dpi) and high luminescent sensitivity (1.12 cd·m⁻²·kPa⁻¹). This e-skin allows real-time mapping of pressure distributions and recognition of fine tactile features like fingerprints. Integrated with plantar sensors and also laparoscopic tools, it also enables visual force feedback, enhancing gait analysis and surgical training, respectively. This approach offers a soft, compact, multimodal platform for intelligent tactile interfaces.
title_zh: 应变局部发光电子皮肤，用于高分辨率压力图和视觉力反馈
abstract_zh: 具有视觉反馈功能的模拟人类直觉触觉感知的电子皮肤（e-skin）对于下一代可穿戴设备、机器人和生物医学应用至关重要。然而，现有的可视化压力测绘系统要么需要密集的像素化阵列，从而增加体积、复杂性和信号串扰，要么依赖刚性或半刚性架构，并且无法适应动态变化的弯曲、柔软表面。在这里，我们报告了一种用于高分辨率可视化压力测绘的软机械电致发光电子皮肤。在弯曲且柔顺的基板上实现定量压力传感。它采用超薄、完全柔软的微结构架构构建，利用连续器件堆栈内的应变局部变形和固有的原位力-电-光耦合，无需离散传感像素即可实现高保真压力映射。它实现了30μm（847dpi）的空间分辨率和高发光灵敏度（1.12cd·m⁻²·kPa⁻）。这种电子皮肤可以实时绘制压力分布图并识别指纹等精细触觉特征。它与足底传感器和腹腔镜工具集成，还可以实现视觉力反馈，分别增强步态分析和手术训练。这种方法为智能触觉界面提供了一个柔软、紧凑、多模式的平台。

title: Super-robust and sustainable bamboo structural material enabled by bonding network reconstruction
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Lightweight, homogeneously high-strength, and sustainable structural materials exert a crucial role in advanced engineering fields. Bamboo can be processed into high-performance structural material if its mechanical strength and homogeneity are remarkably enhanced. Herein, we report a strategy to process natural bamboo into a lightweight, robust, and durable structural material (HoRo-Bamboo) with homogenously high strengths in both longitudinal (L) and transversal (T) directions through bonding network reconstruction technology. The process requires the dispersion of fibers through H2O2/O3 treatment, followed by the introduction of Al3+ and rapid pressing to reconstruct the ionic-hydrogen bonding network (IHBN). The as-prepared HoRo-Bamboo exhibits a low density of 0.83 g·cm−3 with superb high tensile strengths in both L (631 MPa) and T (628 MPa) directions, as well as the excellent environmental resistance and flame retardancy. Life cycle assessment shows that the carbon emissions from producing 1 kg of HoRo-Bamboo are 1.67 kg of CO2 eq. Our approach enables bamboo to be an excellent alternative to existing structural materials, offering lightweight, super-robust, decarbonized, and sustainable features.
title_zh: 通过粘合网络重建实现超坚固且可持续的竹结构材料
abstract_zh: 轻质、均匀高强度、可持续的结构材料在先进工程领域发挥着至关重要的作用。如果竹子的机械强度和均质性显着提高，则可以加工成高性能结构材料。在此，我们报告了一种通过粘合网络重建技术将天然竹子加工成轻质、坚固且耐用的结构材料（HoRo-Bamboo）的策略，该材料在纵向（L）和横向（T）方向上具有均匀的高强度。该工艺需要通过H2O2/O3处理分散纤维，然后引入Al3+并快速压制以重建离子氢键网络（IHBN）。所制备的HoRo-Bamboo具有0.83 g·cm−3的低密度，在L（631 MPa）和T（628 MPa）方向上具有优异的高拉伸强度，以及优异的耐环境性和阻燃性。生命周期评估显示，生产 1 公斤 HoRo-Bamboo 的碳排放量为 1.67 公斤二氧化碳当量。我们的方法使竹子成为现有结构材料的绝佳替代品，具有轻质、超坚固、脱碳和可持续的特性。

title: A step-channel gel polymer electrolyte for solid-state sodium batteries
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Gel polymer electrolytes (GPEs) paired with abundant sodium (Na) and high-voltage polyanion cathode, offer improved energy density and superior safety, positioning them as scalable candidates for resource-limited lithium batteries. However, such technologies are plagued by critical interfacial engineering challenges: existing GPEs fail to sustain (electro)-chemical stability and mechanical close contact at high-loading cathode and high-reactive anode. Here, we report a rationally-engineered GPE featuring biphasic polymer, creating step channels and polymer-solvent dipole adsorption to address the key issues. The volume-constrained bidirectional transport of infilling linear ether and cyclic carbonate solvents and differential polymer mechanical viscoelasticity bearing high-loading cathode and ductile Na anode. Therefore, a high-energy-density full cell of Na||Na3V2(PO4)3 (34.1 mg cmcathode−2, 194.4 Wh kg−1, based on total cell mass) and a stable pouch cell of 4.5 V-class Na||Na2.466Fe1.724Mg0.043(SO4)3 (18.7 mg cmcathode−2, ~100% after 100 cycles) were demonstrated, with safety validation included. The design principles were established for this new chemical engineering pathway towards practical solid-state batteries.
title_zh: 用于固态钠电池的阶梯通道凝胶聚合物电解质
abstract_zh: 凝胶聚合物电解质（GPE）与丰富的钠（Na）和高压聚阴离子阴极相结合，可提供更高的能量密度和卓越的安全性，使其成为资源有限的锂电池的可扩展候选者。然而，此类技术受到关键的界面工程挑战的困扰：现有的 GPE 无法维持高负载阴极和高反应性阳极的（电化学）稳定性和机械紧密接触。在这里，我们报告了一种合理设计的 GPE，其特征是双相聚合物，通过创建阶梯通道和聚合物-溶剂偶极吸附来解决关键问题。填充线性醚和环状碳酸酯溶剂的体积约束双向传输和高负载阴极和延性钠阳极的微分聚合物机械粘弹性。因此，Na||Na3V2(PO4)3 的高能量密度全电池（34.1 mg cmcathode−2，194.4 Wh kg−1，基于总电池质量）和 4.5 V 级 Na||Na2.466Fe1.724Mg0.043(SO4)3 的稳定软包电池（18.7 mg cmcathode−2，100 次后~100%）周期）进行了论证，包括安全验证。为实现实用固态电池的新化学工程途径制定了设计原则。

title: The widening partisan gap in legislative support for civil rights in the United States
source: Scientific community and society : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The history of civil rights legislation offers a window into how American democracy codified social justice over time, and whether this process unfolded gradually or through punctuated shifts. Sixty years after the civil rights movement, we apply natural language processing to legislative archives to track how civil rights has evolved as a policy domain. We show that civil rights legislation has become more common, but also has diverged by party. Divergence accelerated during the early 1990s and mid-2010s—the latter coinciding with the rise of the Black Lives Matter movement and driven by a surge in sponsorship among racial minority Democrats in Congress. Topic modeling reveals that divergence is concentrated in legislation concerning racial minorities, women, and LGBTQ+ populations, while attention to older adults and people with disabilities has declined across both parties. Our findings offer potential insights into party divergence, race and ethnicity politics, and collective action tipping points.
title_zh: 美国民权立法支持方面的党派差距不断扩大
abstract_zh: 民权立法的历史提供了一个窗口，让我们了解美国民主如何随着时间的推移将社会正义编入法典，以及这一过程是逐渐展开还是通过间断的转变。民权运动六十年后，我们将自然语言处理应用于立法档案，以跟踪民权作为政策领域的演变。我们表明，民权立法已变得更加普遍，但也因党派而存在分歧。 2010 年代中期和 2010 年代中期，分歧加速——后者恰逢“黑人命也是命”运动兴起，并受到国会少数族裔民主党人支持率激增的推动。主题模型显示，分歧集中在有关少数族裔、妇女和 LGBTQ+ 人群的立法上，而两党对老年人和残疾人的关注度都有所下降。我们的研究结果为政党分歧、种族和族裔政治以及集体行动临界点提供了潜在的见解。

title: Direct ink writing of tantalum: tailorable hierarchical porous scaffold for osteogenesis
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: To mitigate the risk of osseointegration failure in bone defect reconstruction, innovative fabrication strategies for developing implants with optimal biocompatibility and enhanced osteogenic capacity are crucial. Hierarchical porous structures formed by the synergistic combination of macropores (approximately 300–600 μm) and micropores (smaller than 20 μm) can better mimic the structural characteristics of native bone, thereby promoting osteogenesis. In this study, we developed direct ink writing (DIW) technology to fabricate a graded porous tantalum scaffold designed to promote osteogenesis. In the DIW printing process, a rheologically optimized ink and carefully calibrated printing parameters were utilized, enabling stable fabrication of patient-specific scaffold precursors with well-defined macropores. Following a controlled sintering process, the scaffolds exhibited macropores (approximately 400–500 μm in diameter) and interconnected micropores (approximately 0.5–23 μm in diameter), allowing tailoring of the mechanical properties and porosity to closely approximate those of native human bone. The well-controlled hierarchical porous structure exhibited excellent biocompatibility and significantly increased osteoinductive performance both in vitro and in vivo, accelerating new bone formation. We validated the reliable customization capabilities of this DIW-based tantalum scaffold printing method. The controllable porous structure further enhances the osseointegration potential of the implant, opening promising new avenues for the development of personalized bone implants.
title_zh: 钽的直接墨水书写：用于成骨的可定制分层多孔支架
abstract_zh: 为了降低骨缺损重建中骨整合失败的风险，开发具有最佳生物相容性和增强成骨能力的种植体的创新制造策略至关重要。大孔（约300-600μm）和微孔（小于20μm）协同组合形成的分级多孔结构可以更好地模拟天然骨的结构特征，从而促进成骨。在这项研究中，我们开发了直接墨水书写（DIW）技术来制造旨在促进成骨的分级多孔钽支架。在 DIW 打印过程中，使用了流变优化的墨水和仔细校准的打印参数，能够稳定制造具有明确大孔的患者特异性支架前体。经过受控的烧结过程，支架呈现出大孔（直径约 400-500 μm）和互连的微孔（直径约 0.5-23 μm），从而可以定制机械性能和孔隙率，以非常接近天然人骨的机械性能和孔隙率。控制良好的分层多孔结构表现出优异的生物相容性，并显着提高体外和体内的骨诱导性能，加速新骨形成。我们验证了这种基于 DIW 的钽支架打印方法的可靠定制能力。可控的多孔结构进一步增强了种植体的骨整合潜力，为个性化骨种植体的开发开辟了有前景的新途径

title: Switchable synthesis of aldehydes and alcohols by hydroformylation with ligand-modified Rh single-atom catalyst
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Controlling product selectivity in catalysis is fundamental for green synthesis, yet challenging, especially aiming for switchable outcomes between different products within a single catalytic system. This is exemplified in the industrially crucial hydroformylation reaction, where achieving controlled switching between aldehydes and alcohols remains difficult due to the inability of uniform active site to independently govern the hydrogenation and desorption steps of the aldehyde intermediate. Herein, we report CeO2-supported single-atom Rh catalyst, in which triphenylphosphine (PPh3) serves as molecular switch to precisely modulate the chemoselectivity between alcohols and aldehydes in alkene hydroformylation with broad substrate compatibility and excellent stability. The Rh/CeO2 exhibits up to 99% chemoselectivity and 93% yield toward alcohols, while the PPh3-Rh/CeO2 shifts the chemoselectivity to aldehydes with up to 99% with 91% yield. Characterizations and theoretical calculations reveal that the coordination of PPh3 modulates the electronic structure of Rh, increasing the electron density at Rh centers. This electronic modification alters the hydrogenation pathway from oxygen-then-carbon to carbon-then-oxygen, raising the Gibbs free energy barrier for the rate-determining step of aldehyde hydrogenation by 0.26 eV, thereby switching the chemoselectivity to aldehyde. This work establishes ligand-modified single-atom catalysts as a versatile platform for controlling reaction chemoselectivity.
title_zh: 配体修饰Rh单原子催化剂加氢甲酰化可切换合成醛和醇
abstract_zh: 控制催化中的产物选择性是绿色合成的基础，但也具有挑战性，特别是针对单一催化系统内不同产物之间的可切换结果。这在工业上至关重要的加氢甲酰化反应中得到了例证，其中由于均匀的活性位点无法独立控制醛中间体的氢化和解吸步骤，因此实现醛和醇之间的受控转换仍然很困难。在此，我们报道了CeO2负载的单原子Rh催化剂，其中三苯基膦（PPh3）作为分子开关，精确调节烯烃加氢甲酰化中醇和醛之间的化学选择性，具有广泛的底物兼容性和优异的稳定性。 Rh/CeO2 对醇的化学选择性高达 99%，收率高达 93%，而 PPh3-Rh/CeO2 对醛的化学选择性高达 99%，收率 91%。表征和理论计算表明，PPh3 的配位调节了 Rh 的电子结构，增加了 Rh 中心的电子密度。这种电子修饰改变了氢化途径，从氧→碳变为碳→氧，将醛氢化的速率决定步骤的吉布斯自由能垒提高了0.26 eV，从而将化学选择性转变为醛。这项工作将配体修饰的单原子催化剂建立为控制反应化学选择性的通用平台。

title: Steam-induced cation exchange in oxygen electrodes for superior protonic solid oxide cells
source: Joule
abstract: A steam-engineered BaCo0.8Fe0.1Hf0.05W0.05O3−δ oxygen electrode featuring dynamic W-Fe cation exchange enables protonic solid oxide cells with benchmark fuel cell and electrolysis performance. In situ spectroscopy, impedance measurements, DRT analysis, and DFT calculations elucidate the proton-involved ORR mechanism, while scalable fabrication demonstrates excellent manufacturability and broad applicability.

title: Redox-decoupled electrolysis for direct air capture of CO2
source: Nature Chemical Engineering
abstract: Electrochemical direct air capture (eDAC) leverages renewable electricity to remove atmospheric carbon dioxide (CO2), offering an alternative to carbon-intensive thermal methods. However, existing eDAC systems achieve high energy efficiency only when producing a dilute hydroxide stream (pH ≈ 13) that is incompatible with current air contactors. Attempts to generate more concentrated capture solutions encounter the fundamental limitation of proton and hydroxide recombination, lowering the current efficiency and increasing energy requirements. Here we present a decoupled strategy whereby CO2 liberation and sorbent regeneration are spatially separated, achieving high current and energy efficiency via redox-decoupled electrolysis. We tuned the redox mediator and synthesized a cation exchange membrane to ensure fast reaction kinetics, a low operating voltage and stability. The combined redox-decoupled approach achieved a capture-rate-normalized energy intensity of 0.22 GJ m2 yr t−2 (at 50 mA cm−2), a threefold improvement over previous work. Redox-decoupled eDAC provides an energy-efficient means of generating the concentrated alkaline capture solutions needed for large-scale direct air capture.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 用于直接空气捕获二氧化碳的氧化还原解耦电解
abstract_zh: 电化学直接空气捕获 (eDAC) 利用可再生电力去除大气中的二氧化碳 (CO2)，为碳密集型热法提供了替代方案。然而，现有的 eDAC 系统只有在产生与当前空气接触器不兼容的稀氢氧化物流（pH ≈ 13）时才能实现高能效。尝试产生更浓缩的捕获溶液遇到了质子和氢氧根复合的根本限制，降低了电流效率并增加了能量需求。在这里，我们提出了一种解耦策略，其中二氧化碳释放和吸附剂再生在空间上分离，通过氧化还原解耦电解实现高电流和能量效率。我们调整了氧化还原介体并合成了阳离子交换膜，以确保快速反应动力学、低工作电压和稳定性。组合的氧化还原解耦方法实现了 0.22 GJ m2 yr t−2 （在 50 mA cm−2 下）的捕获率归一化能量强度，比之前的工作提高了三倍。氧化还原解耦 eDAC 提供了一种高效节能的方法来生成大规模直接空气捕获所需的浓缩碱性捕获溶液。该图像的替代文本可能是使用 AI 生成的。

title: Bottom-Up Synthesis of Molecular Nanodiamond from Nanographene
source: Nature
abstract: Nanodiamonds hosting colour centres are promising building blocks for quantum technologies, enabling advances in quantum computation1,2, nanoscale NMR spectroscopy3–6, single-spin magnetometry7,8, wide-field quantum imaging9 and single-photon sources10,11. However, the controlled bottom-up synthesis of ultrasmall and structurally uniform nanodiamonds has remained a major challenge, with existing methods producing heterogeneous materials that vary in size, morphology, impurity content and defect quality. Here we show that well-defined, hydrogen-terminated molecular nanographenes serve as chemically confined precursors for high-pressure, high-temperature synthesis of ultrasmall (3–4 nm), monodisperse and highly crystalline molecular nanodiamonds (m-NDs) with only a single sp² surface reconstruction and produced on a milligram scale. The same bottom-up platform also enables a two-component strategy for incorporating silicon- and germanium-based colour centres during synthesis, yielding SiV⁻ and GeV⁻ emitters without ion implantation, irradiation or post-treatment. Because the nanographene precursor defines both the confined carbon framework and the hydrogen content, this approach provides intrinsic, precursor-level control over nanodiamond size and composition, particularly in the low-nanometre regime relevant for biological and quantum sensing. Molecular nanographenes, ultralarge polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons, therefore establish a scalable and modular route to high-quality molecular and fluorescent nanodiamonds and offer a general design principle for tailored quantum materials and nanoscale devices.
title_zh: 从纳米石墨烯自下而上合成分子纳米金刚石
abstract_zh: 托管色心的纳米金刚石是量子技术的有前景的构建模块，可促进量子计算1,2、纳米级核磁共振光谱3-6、单自旋磁力测量7,8、宽场量子成像9和单光子源10,11的进步。然而，超小且结构均匀的纳米金刚石的受控自下而上合成仍然是一个重大挑战，现有方法生产尺寸、形态、杂质含量和缺陷质量各不相同的异质材料。在这里，我们展示了明确的氢封端分子纳米石墨烯作为化学限制的前体，用于高压、高温合成超小（3-4 nm）、单分散和高度结晶的分子纳米金刚石（m-ND），仅具有单个 sp2 表面重构并以毫克规模生产。相同的自下而上平台还支持在合成过程中结合硅基和锗基色心的双组分策略，无需离子注入、辐照或后处理即可产生 SiV⁻ 和 GeV⁻ 发射体。由于纳米石墨烯前体定义了受限的碳框架和氢含量，因此该方法提供了对纳米金刚石尺寸和成分的内在前体水平控制，特别是在与生物和量子传感相关的低纳米范围内。因此，分子纳米石墨烯、超大多环芳烃建立了一条可扩展和模块化的高质量分子和荧光纳米金刚石路线，并为定制量子垫提供了通用设计原理
