title: Proteins for a sustainable future
source: Nature Reviews Materials
abstract: Modern industries exhibit a systemic disconnect in the management of carbon resources across sectors that contributes to disproportionately high greenhouse gas emissions. The food sector, for example, discards protein-rich side streams and carbohydrate-rich waste that could be converted into renewable carbon feedstocks, whereas the manufacturing sector consumes non-renewable, petroleum-based carbon feedstocks for material synthesis. This Review examines valorization routes that could address this imbalance by transforming proteins extracted from food side streams or created by fungal bioconversion of carbohydrate-rich food waste into feedstocks that enable the production of sustainable materials for packaging, water purification, CO2 capture and energy conversion, as well as surface-engineered applications such as coatings, biosensors and emulsifiers. At the end of their useful or service life, these materials (unlike those recycled using conventional linear approaches) can be repeatedly recycled via depolymerization into amino acids and reassembly into new proteins to yield new material feedstocks. Embedding ‘safe and sustainable by design’ principles into the early stages of material development further ensures that environmental and societal considerations are integrated throughout the material’s life cycle. Together, these advances define a nature-inspired circular-economy material recycling framework grounded in scalable innovation, molecular renewal and upcycling that positions proteins as key to closing the carbon loop.
title_zh: 蛋白质促进可持续的未来
abstract_zh: 现代工业在跨部门碳资源管理方面表现出系统性脱节，导致温室气体排放量过高。例如，食品部门丢弃了富含蛋白质的侧流和富含碳水化合物的废物，这些废物可以转化为可再生碳原料，而制造业则消耗不可再生的石油基碳原料来进行材料合成。本综述探讨了可以解决这种不平衡问题的增值途径，即将从食物侧流中提取的蛋白质或通过富含碳水化合物的食物垃圾的真菌生物转化产生的蛋白质转化为原料，从而能够生产用于包装、水净化、二氧化碳捕获和能源转换的可持续材料，以及涂料、生物传感器和乳化剂等表面工程应用。在其使用寿命结束时，这些材料（与使用传统线性方法回收的材料不同）可以通过解聚成氨基酸并重新组装成新的蛋白质来重复回收，以产生新的材料原料。将“安全和可持续设计”原则融入材料开发的早期阶段，进一步确保在材料的整个生命周期中融入环境和社会考虑因素。这些进步共同定义了一个受自然启发的循环经济材料回收框架，该框架以可扩展的创新、分子更新和升级回收为基础，将蛋白质定位为闭合碳循环的关键。

title: Directing intermediate phase crystallographic orientation promotes carbon-based CsPbI3 perovskite solar cells to beyond 20% efficiency
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Inorganic CsPbI3 perovskite, known for its high chemical stability and near-ideal bandgap, offers a promising solution to the instability of organic-inorganic hybrid perovskites that limit perovskite solar cells (PSCs) longevity. However, the conventional intermediate phase (dimethylammonium lead iodide, DMAPbI3) templating method suffers from inefficient phase conversion, hindering high-performance PSC development. To overcome this limitation, we engineered the crystallographic orientation of DMAPbI3 to promote rapid volatilization of DMAI and accelerating the transformation. Through in situ anchoring of Pb2+-complexing groups (-F 4) on TiO2 substrates during chemical bath deposition, we direct the preferential in-plane growth of Pb-rich (100) planes of DMAPbI3, enhancing its [100] orientation. Crucially, stronger complexing groups yield higher orientation degrees, accelerating thermal conversion into highly oriented CsPbI3 perovskite with higher purity and better optoelectronic properties. This strategy enables carbon-based, hole-transport-layer-free CsPbI3 PSCs to achieve a record 20.72% efficiency (certified as 20.35%). Unencapsulated device retains > 85% of their initial efficiency after 1156 h of continuous maximum power point tracking under 1-sun illumination.
title_zh: 引导中间相晶体取向可促进碳基 CsPbI3 钙钛矿太阳能电池的效率超过 20%
abstract_zh: 无机 CsPbI3 钙钛矿以其高化学稳定性和接近理想的带隙而闻名，为限制钙钛矿太阳能电池 (PSC) 寿命的有机-无机杂化钙钛矿的不稳定性提供了一种有前景的解决方案。然而，传统的中间相（二甲基碘化铅，DMAPbI3）模板方法存在相转换效率低下的问题，阻碍了高性能PSC的开发。为了克服这一限制，我们设计了 DMAPbI3 的晶体取向，以促进 DMAI 的快速挥发并加速转化。通过化学浴沉积过程中将 Pb2+ 络合基团 (-F 4) 原位锚定在 TiO2 基底上，我们引导 DMAPbI3 的富 Pb (100) 平面优先面内生长，增强其 [100] 取向。至关重要的是，更强的络合基团会产生更高的取向度，从而加速热转化为具有更高纯度和更好光电性能的高度取向的 CsPbI3 钙钛矿。该策略使碳基、无空穴传输层的 CsPbI3 PSC 的效率达到创纪录的 20.72%（认证为 20.35%）。在 1 太阳光照下连续最大功率点跟踪 1156 小时后，未封装的器件仍保持其初始效率的 85% 以上。

title: Self-charged polar nematic monopoles and hybrid topological states: intertwining and domain integration
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Polar topological solitons are quasi-particles essential in condensed matter physics, with a key challenge being their topological diversification, control, and arrangement. This study demonstrates that confinement asymmetry can tailor and diversify electrically polar topological solitons in fluid ferroelectrics, providing a key pathway to solving the long-standing problem of designing large-scale, complex domain structures. We discover nonclassical electric monopoles and hybrid topological states, including chiral meron and anti-meron variants and their composite hybridization with a nested skyrmion core. They exhibit intrinsic self-charge and interact via nematic elasticity and electric polar interactions. The unique mechanism leads to the formation of multibody topological configurations by intertwining their polar flux. We propose utilizing solitonic structures as fundamental quasiparticles to design large-scale charged arrays in insulating fluids that function as local conductors. The self-organization offers an unprecedented opportunity to realize large-scale engineering of in-plane domain structures that were previously unachievable in traditional ferroelectrics.
title_zh: 自带电极性向列单极子和混合拓扑态：交织和域集成
abstract_zh: 极性拓扑孤子是凝聚态物理中必不可少的准粒子，其面临的关键挑战是其拓扑多样化、控制和排列。这项研究表明，限制不对称性可以定制流体铁电体中的极性拓扑孤子并使其多样化，为解决设计大规模复杂域结构的长期问题提供了关键途径。我们发现了非经典电单极子和混合拓扑态，包括手性梅子和反梅子变体及其与嵌套斯格明子核心的复合杂化。它们表现出内在的自电荷，并通过向列弹性和电极相互作用相互作用。这种独特的机制导致通过交织极通量而形成多体拓扑结构。我们建议利用孤子结构作为基本准粒子来设计绝缘流体中充当局部导体的大规模带电阵列。自组织为实现面内域结构的大规模工程提供了前所未有的机会，这在传统铁电体中是无法实现的。

title: Monolithically integrated photon-mapping infrared imager
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Conventional infrared imaging systems rely heavily on external power supplies, limiting their applicability, flexibility, and portability. Here, we present a monolithically integrated photon-mapping near-infrared (780-900 nm) imager that operates in a self-driven mode, achieving a resolution of 5799 ppi and a frame rate of 18.5 kHz. The device vertically integrates multiple photovoltage-generating light-sensing units with a light-emitting unit in a cascaded configuration, enabling visible emission upon near-infrared excitation via internal carrier transfer. Its circuit-free architecture confers intrinsic flexibility and large-area scalability while remaining fully compatible with room-temperature operation. The system eliminates the need for pixel-level readout, thereby enabling spatial resolution beyond conventional pixel limits under optical excitation control. It further supports high-speed imaging governed by the transit dynamics of photogenerated carriers. In addition, its self-driven characteristic ensures inherently low background noise, enhancing the signal-to-background ratio and improving imaging quality. This work introduces a simplified, energy-efficient approach to infrared visualization.
title_zh: 单片集成光子映射红外成像仪
abstract_zh: 传统的红外成像系统严重依赖外部电源，限制了其适用性、灵活性和便携性。在这里，我们提出了一种单片集成光子映射近红外（780-900 nm）成像仪，该成像仪以自驱动模式运行，实现了 5799 ppi 的分辨率和 18.5 kHz 的帧速率。该器件以级联配置垂直集成多个光电压生成光传感单元和发光单元，通过内部载流子转移在近红外激发下实现可见光发射。其无电路架构赋予了固有的灵活性和大面积可扩展性，同时保持与室温操作完全兼容。该系统消除了对像素级读出的需要，从而在光学激发控制下实现了超出传统像素限制的空间分辨率。它还支持由光生载流子的传输动力学控制的高速成像。此外，其自驱动特性确保了固有的低背景噪声，增强了信号背景比并提高了成像质量。这项工作介绍了一种简化、节能的红外可视化方法。

title: TAK1 drives inflammatory fibroblast acquisition and shapes myocardial infarction responses in male mice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Organ function depends on communication among cell types to coordinate tissue growth and repair. Although fibroblasts are critical to this process, their role in regulating inflammatory responses to injury remain ambiguous. Here, we show that transforming growth factor β-activated kinase 1 (TAK1) is a gatekeeper of an inflammatory cardiac fibroblast phenotype. In cardiac fibroblasts, TAK1 signaling controls the acquisition of defining features of inflammatory fibroblasts, including chemokine and cytokine synthesis, lipid mediator production, metalloproteinase activity, and damage-associated molecular pattern recognition. Moreover, TAK1 propagates IL-1β and TNF-α signaling, but not TGF-β-SMAD signaling, regulating inflammatory programs by increasing chemokine secretion while decreasing lipid mediator production. Fibroblast-specific TAK1 deletion decreases neutrophil chemotaxis in vitro and immune cell recruitment after myocardial infarction in vivo, which is associated with improved cardiac remodeling and function in male mice. These results further resolve the nature and function of inflammatory fibroblasts in cardiac responses to injury and identify TAK1 signaling as a critical mediator.
title_zh: TAK1 驱动雄性小鼠炎症成纤维细胞获得并塑造心肌梗死反应
abstract_zh: 器官功能取决于细胞类型之间的通讯来协调组织生长和修复。尽管成纤维细胞对此过程至关重要，但它们在调节损伤炎症反应中的作用仍然不明确。在这里，我们证明转化生长因子 β 激活激酶 1 (TAK1) 是炎症性心脏成纤维细胞表型的看门人。在心脏成纤维细胞中，TAK1 信号传导控制炎症成纤维细胞的定义特征的获得，包括趋化因子和细胞因子的合成、脂质介质的产生、金属蛋白酶活性和损伤相关的分子模式识别。此外，TAK1 传播 IL-1β 和 TNF-α 信号，但不传播 TGF-β-SMAD 信号，通过增加趋化因子分泌同时减少脂质介质产生来调节炎症程序。成纤维细胞特异性 TAK1 缺失会降低体外中性粒细胞的趋化性和体内心肌梗死后免疫细胞的募集，这与雄性小鼠心脏重塑和功能的改善有关。这些结果进一步解析了炎症成纤维细胞在心脏损伤反应中的性质和功能，并将 TAK1 信号传导确定为关键介质。

title: A pivotal Wnt antagonist role promoting digit joint specification by constraining Wnt activity
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Bmps and Wnts often act antagonistically. Here we report that in mouse digit progenitors, unlike long bone joints, they cooperate to promote chondrogenic over joint (interzone) commitment. Elevated Bmp signaling prevents 5’HoxdΔ/Δ digit progenitors from forming interzones, causing joint loss. We show that constitutive βCatenin activation (βCatCA) in 5’HoxdΔ/Δ interdigits restores digit joints indirectly and cell non-autonomously. RNA profiling reveals βCatCA induces secreted Wnt antagonists that restore 5’HoxdΔ/Δ digit joints by reducing digit-tip Bmp activity. Deleting the βCatCA-induced Wnt antagonist Dkk2 in 5’HoxdΔ/Δ interdigits abolishes joint rescue by βCatCA. Wnts inhibit Gsk3β kinase, which phosphorylates and destabilizes both βCatenin and Bmp-activated receptors pSmad1/5. In cultured limb buds, Gsk3β antagonists stabilize pSmad1/5, enhancing digit-tip Bmp activity. We propose that Wnt antagonists prevent precocious pSmad1/5 accumulation by stabilizing Gsk3β, favoring joint fate. Excess Bmp-pSmad1/5 activity in 5’HoxdΔ/Δ digit-tips accelerates chondrogenic commitment, impeding a switch to joint fate. Wnt antagonists maintain mesenchymal plasticity for normal phalanx-joint specification by slowing the pace of chondrogenic commitment.
title_zh: 关键的 Wnt 拮抗剂通过限制 Wnt 活性来促进数字关节规范
abstract_zh: Bmp 和 Wnt 常常表现相反。在这里，我们报告说，在小鼠手指祖细胞中，与长骨关节不同，它们合作促进关节（区间）的软骨形成。 Bmp 信号升高会阻止 5’HoxdΔ/Δ 数字祖细胞形成带间区，从而导致关节损失。我们发现 5'HoxdΔ/Δ 指间的组成型 β 连环蛋白激活 (βCatCA) 可间接恢复手指关节，并且细胞非自主地恢复。 RNA 分析揭示 βCatCA 诱导分泌的 Wnt 拮抗剂，通过减少指尖 Bmp 活性来恢复 5'HoxdΔ/Δ 数字关节。删除 5'HoxdΔ/Δ 指间的 βCatCA 诱导的 Wnt 拮抗剂 Dkk2 可以消除 βCatCA 的联合救援。 Wnts 抑制 Gsk3β 激酶，该激酶使 β 连环蛋白和 Bmp 激活受体 pSmad1/5 磷酸化并使其不稳定。在培养的肢芽中，Gsk3β 拮抗剂可稳定 pSmad1/5，从而增强指尖 Bmp 活性。我们建议 Wnt 拮抗剂通过稳定 Gsk3β 来防止早熟的 pSmad1/5 积累，从而有利于联合命运。 5'HoxdΔ/Δ 指尖中过量的 Bmp-pSmad1/5 活性会加速软骨形成，阻碍向联合命运的转变。 Wnt 拮抗剂通过减缓软骨形成的速度来维持正常指骨关节规范的间充质可塑性。

title: Distributional effects of marine conservation on coastal livelihoods in Eastern Indonesia
source: Scientific community and society : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Marine protected areas (MPAs) are widely adopted to conserve marine biodiversity, yet their distributional impacts on resource-dependent communities remain underexplored. This study investigates socioeconomic inequality linked to MPAs in eastern Indonesia using a quasi-experimental design and multi-round household surveys of over 10,000 households across 180 coastal settlements in 10 MPAs (2010–2017). We assess poverty through objective (asset-based index) and subjective (perceived economic trends) measures. Findings reveal overall poverty reduction and persistent pre-existing inequalities by gender, age, occupation, and tenure rights. MPAs did not cause short-term economic losses or widen objective inequality but constrained perceived economic improvement, particularly among female-headed households. Community engagement moderated these effects: gender disparities were greater where female participation in groups was low. These findings suggest that promoting inclusive participation can help ensure more equitable conservation outcomes.
title_zh: 海洋保护对印度尼西亚东部沿海生计的分布影响
abstract_zh: 海洋保护区（MPA）被广泛用于保护海洋生物多样性，但其对资源依赖型社区的分布影响仍未得到充分研究。本研究采用准实验设计和对 10 个海洋保护区 180 个沿海定居点的 10,000 多个家庭进行的多轮家庭调查（2010-2017 年），调查了与印度尼西亚东部海洋保护区相关的社会经济不平等。我们通过客观（基于资产的指数）和主观（感知的经济趋势）措施来评估贫困。调查结果揭示了贫困的总体减少和性别、年龄、职业和保有权方面持续存在的不平等。海洋保护区并没有造成短期经济损失或扩大客观不平等，但限制了人们感知到的经济改善，特别是对女性户主家庭而言。社区参与调节了这些影响：当女性群体参与度较低时，性别差异就更大。这些发现表明，促进包容性参与有助于确保更公平的保护成果。

title: PIWIL3-piRNA pathway controls rabbit oogenesis and embryogenesis via broad regulation of the transcriptome and proteome
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Female infertility often arises from oogenic defects, yet the underlying molecular mechanisms remain elusive. The Piwi-piRNA pathway is crucial for gametogenesis, but its role in mammalian female fertility remains unclear, partly due to reliance on mouse models lacking PIWIL3. PIWIL3 exits in most other placental mammals and is highly expressed in human oocytes, but its function remains largely unexplored. Here, we show that rabbit PIWIL3 closely resembles its human counterpart and is the predominant PIWI protein in oocytes. Using CRISPR-Cas9 knockout, we demonstrate that PIWIL3 is essential for female fertility in rabbits, its loss leads to severe defects in oogenesis. Embryos lacking maternal PIWIL3 arrest by the 8-cell stage. Mechanistically, PIWIL3 binds ~18-nucleotide piRNAs, supports piRNA biogenesis, and regulates transcriptomic, proteomic, and transposable element dynamics during oocyte maturation and early embryogenesis. These findings establish PIWIL3 as an essential regulator of female fertility in non-rodent mammals, potentially including humans.
title_zh: PIWIL3-piRNA 通路通过转录组和蛋白质组的广泛调节控制兔卵子发生和胚胎发生
abstract_zh: 女性不孕症通常是由卵子缺陷引起的，但潜在的分子机制仍然难以捉摸。 Piwi-piRNA 途径对于配子发生至关重要，但其在哺乳动物雌性生育力中的作用仍不清楚，部分原因是依赖于缺乏 PIWIL3 的小鼠模型。 PIWIL3 存在于大多数其他胎盘哺乳动物中，并且在人类卵母细胞中高度表达，但其功能在很大程度上仍未被探索。在这里，我们证明兔 PIWIL3 与人类对应物非常相似，并且是卵母细胞中主要的 PIWI 蛋白。通过 CRISPR-Cas9 敲除，我们证明 PIWIL3 对于雌性兔子的生育能力至关重要，它的缺失会导致卵子发生的严重缺陷。缺乏母体 PIWIL3 的胚胎在 8 细胞阶段停滞。从机制上讲，PIWIL3 结合约 18 个核苷酸的 piRNA，支持 piRNA 生物发生，并在卵母细胞成熟和早期胚胎发生过程中调节转录组、蛋白质组和转座元件动态。这些发现表明 PIWIL3 是非啮齿类哺乳动物（可能包括人类）雌性生育力的重要调节因子。

title: qChIP-MS reveals the local chromatin composition by label-free quantitative proteomics
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Chromatin immunoprecipitation (ChIP) has been a cornerstone for epigenetic analyses over the last decades, but even coupled to sequencing approaches (ChIP-seq), it is ultimately limited to one protein at a time. In a complementary effort, we here combine ChIP with label-free quantitative mass spectrometry (qChIP-MS) to interrogate local chromatin compositions. We demonstrate the versatility of our approach at telomeres, with transcription factors, in tissue and by dCas9-mediated locus-specific enrichment.
title_zh: qChIP-MS 通过无标记定量蛋白质组学揭示局部染色质组成
abstract_zh: 过去几十年来，染色质免疫沉淀 (ChIP) 一直是表观遗传学分析的基石，但即使与测序方法 (ChIP-seq) 结合使用，它最终也仅限于一次分析一种蛋白质。作为补充，我们将 ChIP 与无标记定量质谱 (qChIP-MS) 结合起来，以检测局部染色质组成。我们证明了我们的方法在端粒、转录因子、组织中以及通过 dCas9 介导的位点特异性富集方面的多功能性。

title: Benchmarking genome choice in functional genomics analyses
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The human genome reference established a shared coordinate system for genome function, but it is incomplete and not fully representative of human diversity. Here, we benchmark how genome representation and corresponding analytical frameworks for each representation shape functional genomics using chromatin accessibility sequencing (ATAC-seq), RNA sequencing, whole-genome bisulfite sequencing, and chromosome conformation capture (Hi-C) data from lymphoblastoid cell lines derived from five individuals with fully phased genome assemblies. We compare results across hg38, CHM13, the draft human pangenome, and each individual’s maternal and paternal assemblies. Because current pipelines and quality control conventions are tuned to hg38, several of these comparisons reflect genome representation in the context of available methods, rather than sequence alone. Individual identity accounts for 57.52-78.47% of total variance in functional estimates, whereas genome choice contributes 0.002-7.85% and sample-by-genome interactions contribute 0.63-5.43%. About 2% of biological signals are detectable only with personal assemblies. Although these effects are modest overall, some biologically important features remain inaccessible to linear references. Consistent with this, graph-based DNA methylation analysis in the human pangenome reveals a non-reference AluY5a insertion within a putative TNKS enhancer at chromosome 8p23.1 that becomes visible and hypermethylated only in the pangenome.
title_zh: 功能基因组学分析中基因组选择的基准测试
abstract_zh: 人类基因组参考建立了基因组功能的共享坐标系，但它是不完整的，不能完全代表人类多样性。在这里，我们使用染色质可及性测序 (ATAC-seq)、RNA 测序、全基因组亚硫酸氢盐测序和染色体构象捕获 (Hi-C) 数据对基因组表示和每种表示的相应分析框架如何塑造功能基因组进行基准测试，这些数据来自来自五个具有完全定相基因组组装的个体的淋巴母细胞系。我们比较了 hg38、CHM13、人类全基因组草案以及每个个体的母本和父本组合的结果。由于当前的流程和质量控制惯例已调整为 hg38，因此其中一些比较反映了可用方法背景下的基因组表示，而不是单独的序列。个体身份占功能估计总方差的 57.52-78.47%，而基因组选择贡献 0.002-7.85%，样本与基因组相互作用贡献 0.63-5.43%。大约 2% 的生物信号只能通过个人装配才能检​​测到。尽管这些影响总体上不大，但一些生物学上重要的特征仍然无法通过线性参考获得。与此一致的是，人类全基因组中基于图的 DNA 甲基化分析揭示了染色体 8p23.1 上假定的 TNKS 增强子内的非参考 AluY5a 插入，该插入仅在全基因组中可见且高度甲基化。

title: Unveiling gene modules at Atlas scale through hierarchical clustering of single-cell data
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: A major challenge in single-cell RNA sequencing (scRNA-seq) analysis is recovering biologically meaningful cell ontology trees and conserved gene modules across datasets. Data integration and batch-effect correction methods have enabled effective analyses of multiple datasets but often fail to disentangle cell states in heterogeneous samples, such as cancer and the immune system. Here, we present Super Single-Cell Clustering (SuperSCC), a computational framework that utilizes machine learning models to discover cell identities and gene modules across multiple datasets without the need for data integration. Notably, SuperSCC can be implemented at both the cell lineage and cell state levels, thereby allowing the creation of hierarchies of cell programs with specific cell identities and gene modules. This information can be used to identify shared rare populations across datasets regardless of batch effects and has advantages for mapping cell labels from reference to query datasets. We used SuperSCC to perform atlas-level data analysis with more than 90 datasets and built cell state maps of complex tissues, such as the human lung, in healthy and diseased states. SuperSCC outperforms existing approaches in identifying cellular contexts, achieves higher annotation accuracy, and identifies gene modules that indicate conserved immune cell statuses in the lung microenvironment.
title_zh: 通过单细胞数据的层次聚类揭示Atlas规模的基因模块
abstract_zh: 单细胞 RNA 测序 (scRNA-seq) 分析的一个主要挑战是恢复具有生物学意义的细胞本体树和跨数据集的保守基因模块。数据集成和批量效应校正方法可以对多个数据集进行有效分析，但通常无法理清异质样本（例如癌症和免疫系统）中的细胞状态。在这里，我们提出了超级单细胞聚类（SuperSCC），这是一种计算框架，利用机器学习模型来发现跨多个数据集的细胞身份和基因模块，而无需数据集成。值得注意的是，SuperSCC 可以在细胞谱系和细胞状态水平上实施，从而允许创建具有特定细胞身份和基因模块的细胞程序的层次结构。该信息可用于识别跨数据集共享的稀有种群，无论批处理效果如何，并且对于将单元标签从参考数据集映射到查询数据集具有优势。我们使用 SuperSCC 对 90 多个数据集进行图谱级数据分析，并构建了健康和患病状态下复杂组织（例如人肺）的细胞状态图。 SuperSCC 在识别细胞环境方面优于现有方法，实现了更高的注释准确性，并识别了指示肺微环境中保守免疫细胞状态的基因模块。

title: Asymmetric life-history trade-offs shape sex-biased longevity patterns
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Sex differences in ageing and lifespan are widespread across taxa, yet their evolutionary causes remain debated. A leading hypothesis proposes that such differences arise adaptively from sex-specific life-history trade-offs, but formal theoretical support is lacking. We therefore develop a mathematical model to examine how these trade-offs shape lifespan evolution across ecological and mating system contexts. Under monogamy, individuals optimise a survival-reproduction trade-off, mediated by mating opportunities in males and offspring production in females. Varying trade-off strengths shows that male-biased longevity emerges across a wider parameter range, consistent with patterns in monogamous species. This asymmetry arises because increased female longevity reduces offspring production, lowering population size and mating rates and thereby constraining selection on female lifespan, whereas longer male lifespan evolves more readily unless mating costs are high. Incorporating density dependence shows that ecological feedbacks disproportionately reduce survival in the intrinsically longer-lived sex, potentially masking evolved differences. Beyond monogamy, we show that mating system variation shapes longevity through competition intensity, determined by the limiting sex, and demographic scaling, where female number sets reproductive output and the selective context for longevity. Overall, we highlight that life-history trade-offs and demographic feedbacks jointly determine the direction and magnitude of sex differences in lifespan.
title_zh: 不对称的生活史权衡塑造了性别偏见的长寿模式
abstract_zh: 衰老和寿命方面的性别差异在各个分类群中普遍存在，但其进化原因仍然存在争议。一个主要的假设提出，这种差异是由特定性别的生活史权衡适应性产生的，但缺乏正式的理论支持。因此，我们开发了一个数学模型来研究这些权衡如何影响生态和交配系统背景下的寿命进化。在一夫一妻制下，个体通过雄性的交配机会和雌性的后代生产来优化生存与繁殖的权衡。不同的权衡优势表明，男性偏向的长寿出现在更广泛的参数范围内，与一夫一妻制物种的模式一致。这种不对称的出现是因为雌性寿命的延长减少了后代的产量，降低了种群规模和交配率，从而限制了对雌性寿命的选择，而更长的雄性寿命更容易进化，除非交配成本很高。结合密度依赖性表明，生态反馈不成比例地降低了本质上寿命较长的性别的生存率，可能掩盖了进化的差异。除了一夫一妻制之外，我们还发现，交配系统的变异通过竞争强度来影响寿命，而竞争强度是由性别限制和人口规模决定的，其中女性数量决定了生殖产出和长寿的选择性环境。总体而言，我们强调，生活史权衡和人口反馈共同决定了寿命中性别差异的方向和程度。

title: Allosteric network of dynamic coupling within BAP1-UCH revealed by methyl NMR
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: BRCA1-associated protein 1 (BAP1) is a tumor suppressor whose deubiquitinase (DUB) activity is essential for transcriptional regulation and is frequently compromised in cancer by mutations clustered in its ubiquitin carboxyl-terminal hydrolase (UCH) domain. The structural and dynamic bases of these oncogenic mutations remain elusive. Here, we introduce 22 cancer mutations and additional methyl mutations on the other 22 cancer mutation sites of BAP1-UCH to map their effects on the methyl chemical shifts. This analysis reveals an allosteric coupling network centered on a conserved leucine (L49) shared across human UCH paralogs. Strikingly, a single-carbon side-chain truncation in the L49V variant abolishes DUB activity, coinciding with disruption of correlated μs–ms timescale motions within a phenylalanine cluster that undergoes concerted motions within the L49 hub. These findings uncover how BAP1-UCH sustains its catalytic competence through a delicately tuned dynamic network and how minute alterations can collapse this allosteric balance, providing a mechanistic link between subtle structural perturbations and oncogenesis.
title_zh: 甲基 NMR 揭示 BAP1-UCH 内动态耦合的变构网络
abstract_zh: BRCA1 相关蛋白 1 (BAP1) 是一种肿瘤抑制因子，其去泛素酶 (DUB) 活性对于转录调节至关重要，并且在癌症中经常因其泛素羧基末端水解酶 (UCH) 结构域中聚集的突变而受到损害。这些致癌突变的结构和动态基础仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们引入了 22 个癌症突变以及 BAP1-UCH 的其他 22 个癌症突变位点上的额外甲基突变，以绘制它们对甲基化学位移的影响。该分析揭示了以人类 UCH 旁系同源物共享的保守亮氨酸 (L49) 为中心的变构耦合网络。引人注目的是，L49V 变体中的单碳侧链截断消除了 DUB 活性，同时破坏了苯丙氨酸簇内相关的 μs-ms 时间尺度运动，该簇在 L49 中枢内进行协调运动。这些发现揭示了 BAP1-UCH 如何通过精心调整的动态网络维持其催化能力，以及微小的改变如何破坏这种变构平衡，从而在微妙的结构扰动和肿瘤发生之间提供了机制联系。

title: Self-limiting population suppression gene drive design in the West Nile vector mosquito, Culex quinquefasciatus
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Culex quinquefasciatus is a major vector of West Nile virus and other pathogens, yet genetic population suppression tools for this species remain limited. Here, we develop a self-limiting, CRISPR-based suppression gene drive system targeting doublesex, close to the male-determining locus, promoting male transmission. A recoded dsxM sequence converts females into sterile intersexes, preventing population-level spread. The drive achieves super-Mendelian inheritance ( ~ 71%) and generates resistance alleles that are fully or partially dominant female sterile. Single-release cage trials show extended but self-limiting population suppression. Population modeling of this RIDD (Release of Insects carrying a Dominant-sterile Drive) system further indicates that repeated releases can substantially reduce fertile female numbers at low release ratios and intrinsic growth rates, outperforming non-drive strategies under comparable conditions. Together, these results establish a self-limiting suppression gene drive platform for Culex, providing a confined and sustainable framework for vector population control.
title_zh: 西尼罗河媒介蚊子致倦库蚊的自限性种群抑制基因驱动设计
abstract_zh: 致倦库蚊是西尼罗河病毒和其他病原体的主要载体，但针对该物种的遗传种群抑制工具仍然有限。在这里，我们开发了一种基于 CRISPR 的自我限制抑制基因驱动系统，针对双性，靠近雄性决定基因座，促进雄性传播。重新编码的 dsxM 序列可将雌性转化为不育的雌雄同体，从而防止群体传播。该驱动力实现了超孟德尔遗传（约 71%），并产生了完全或部分显性雌性不育的抗性等位基因。单次释放笼试验显示，种群抑制时间较长但具有自限性。该RIDD（携带显性不育驱动器的昆虫的释放）系统的种群模型进一步表明，在低释放率和内在增长率下，重复释放可以大大减少可育雌性数量，在可比条件下优于非驱动策略。总之，这些结果为库蚊建立了一个自限性抑制基因驱动平台，为病媒种群控制提供了一个有限且可持续的框架。

title: High-impact weather effects on wind and solar power systems under future climate scenarios in China
source: Scientific community and society : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: High-impact weather events (HIWs) threaten power system reliability by inducing prolonged, concurrent deficits in wind and solar generation. Here, we present an integrated assessment of China’s future renewable-dominated power system under climate change, leveraging 5-kilometer resolution spatial and hourly temporal meteorological data, spatially explicit electricity demand projections, and a climate-informed coordinated optimization of renewable generation and cross-regional transmission. Under the SSP5-8.5 scenario by 2040, we find that HIWs can trigger generation deficits persisting up to 24 days annually, reducing wind and solar output by as much as 41.2% in inland provinces and 22.7% across northern-central grids, respectively. Inner Mongolia and the Northwest China Grid emerge as key export hubs, with a combined cross-regional transmission potential of 605 gigawatts to alleviate regional imbalances. These results underscore the amplifying role of HIWs in disrupting renewable supply chains and highlight the necessity of spatially coordinated, climate-resilient infrastructure planning to secure a low-carbon energy future.
title_zh: 未来气候情景下中国风能和太阳能发电系统的高影响天气影响
abstract_zh: 高影响天气事件 (HIW) 会导致风能和太阳能发电长期并发的短缺，从而威胁电力系统的可靠性。在这里，我们利用5公里分辨率的时空气象数据、空间明确的电力需求预测以及气候信息下可再生能源发电和跨区域输电的协调优化，对气候变化下中国未来以可再生能源为主的电力系统进行了综合评估。在 SSP5-8.5 情景下，到 2040 年，HIW 可能引发每年持续长达 24 天的发电赤字，使内陆省份的风能和太阳能发电量分别减少 41.2% 和中北部电网的 22.7%。内蒙古和西北电网成为重要的出口枢纽，跨区域输电潜力合计达 605 吉瓦，可缓解区域失衡。这些结果强调了HIW在扰乱可再生能源供应链方面的放大作用，并强调了空间协调、气候适应型基础设施规划的必要性，以确保低碳能源的未来。

title: Stable tin–lead perovskite inks for efficient all-perovskite tandems
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Low-bandgap (Eg ~ 1.25 eV) tin–lead perovskite solar cells hold great potential for constructing efficient all-perovskite tandem solar cells (TSCs). However, rapid degradation of perovskite precursor solutions, owing to easy oxidation of Sn2+, remains a major challenge. Here we elucidate oxidation pathways in Sn–Pb perovskite precursors. We further introduce basic amino acids and basic amino acids sulfate (BAAS) as proton scavengers, which stabilize the ink for over 300 days. BAAS neutralizes excess protons to mitigate dimethyl sulfoxide-driven oxidation reactions, whereas sulfate ions coordinate Sn2+ to passivate defects and regulate crystallization. The optimized low-bandgap perovskite solar cell achieves a power conversion efficiency of 24.06% with an open-circuit voltage of 0.905 V, enabling two-terminal all-perovskite TSCs with a power conversion efficiency of 30.24% (certified 29.56%). The BAAS-passivated TSCs retain over 85% of their initial performance after 1,000 hours of the maximum power point operation under 1-sun illumination.
title_zh: 稳定的锡铅钙钛矿油墨，用于高效的全钙钛矿串联
abstract_zh: 低带隙（例如~1.25 eV）锡铅钙钛矿太阳能电池在构建高效全钙钛矿串联太阳能电池（TSC）方面具有巨大潜力。然而，由于 Sn2+ 容易氧化，钙钛矿前体溶液的快速降解仍然是一个主要挑战。在这里，我们阐明了 Sn-Pb 钙钛矿前体的氧化途径。我们进一步引入碱性氨基酸和碱性氨基酸硫酸盐（BAAS）作为质子清除剂，可稳定墨水超过300天。 BAAS 中和过量的质子以减轻二甲亚砜驱动的氧化反应，而硫酸根离子则协调 Sn2+ 以钝化缺陷并调节结晶。优化后的低带隙钙钛矿太阳能电池在开路电压为0.905 V时实现了24.06%的功率转换效率，使得两端全钙钛矿TSC的功率转换效率达到30.24%（认证为29.56%）。经过 BAAS 钝化的 TSC 在 1 太阳光照下以最大功率点运行 1,000 小时后，仍保留了 85% 以上的初始性能。

title: Analysing agrivoltaic systems with pvlib python
source: Nature Reviews Clean Technology
title_zh: 使用 pvlib python 分析农业光伏系统

title: Taking perovskite photovoltaics from promise to product
source: Nature Reviews Clean Technology
abstract: Perovskite photovoltaics (PV) have delivered rapid efficiency gains; however, commercial deployment remains constrained by issues related to scale-up, reliability and system-level uncertainties. The field is now limited less by material discovery than by the complex choreography of commercialization. In this Perspective, we reframe the commercialization of perovskite PV as a multidimensional, product-centric evolution spanning materials, manufacturing, standards, policy and market design. In this Perspective, we examine perovskite and perovskite–silicon tandem photovoltaic technologies, focusing on their manufacturing maturity and commercial readiness. We highlight a plateau effect, in which additional laboratory-scale efficiency gains provide limited benefit unless accompanied by improvements in production yield, operational stability and overall factory economics. Drawing on lessons from early pilot lines, regional industrial strategies and analogue technologies such as OLEDs, we highlight the roles of supply chains, adaptive standards and risk capital in creating bankable products. Future research must treat manufacturability, stability, resource constraints and recyclability as primary design variables, and coordinated, application-driven roadmaps are essential to translate perovskite PV from record-setting devices into a credible product.
title_zh: 将钙钛矿光伏发电从承诺变为产品
abstract_zh: 钙钛矿光伏发电 (PV) 的效率快速提升；然而，商业部署仍然受到与规模扩大、可靠性和系统级不确定性相关的问题的限制。现在，该领域受到的限制不再是材料发现，而是商业化的复杂编排。在这个视角中，我们将钙钛矿光伏的商业化重新定义为跨越材料、制造、标准、政策和市场设计的多维、以产品为中心的演变。在本视角中，我们研究了钙钛矿和钙钛矿-硅串联光伏技术，重点关注其制造成熟度和商业准备情况。我们强调了一种平台效应，即实验室规模的额外效率提升带来的效益有限，除非伴随着产量、操作稳定性和整体工厂经济效益的提高。借鉴早期试点、区域产业战略和 OLED 等模拟技术的经验教训，我们强调供应链、适应性标准和风险资本在创造可融资产品中的作用。未来的研究必须将可制造性、稳定性、资源限制和可回收性视为主要设计变量，而协调的、应用驱动的路线图对于将钙钛矿光伏从创纪录的设备转化为可靠的产品至关重要。

title: Topology-dependent node dynamics under mechanical manipulation in moiré ferroelectrics
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Van der Waals moiré superlattices can host interfacial ferroelectric domains, whose arrangement is influenced by the topology of nodes. Here, we investigate the dynamic behavior and topological protection of node types in twisted WSe2 homobilayers under local mechanical perturbations. Dark-field transmission electron microscopy and Kelvin probe force microscopy reveal symmetric sixfold nodes as well as non-ideal nodes, including fourfold and eightfold types. Mechanical loading with an atomic force microscopy tip shows striking contrasts in node motion: symmetric sixfold nodes are dynamically robust, whereas an asymmetric sixfold node can be displaced and guided by the tip scan direction, as confirmed by quasi-static loading simulations. Furthermore, we observe a fourfold node that fractured due to its lack of topological protection. These findings establish a direct link between node topology and mechanical response, providing fundamental insights into moiré ferroelectricity and advancing our understanding of topological defects in two-dimensional van der Waals materials.
title_zh: 莫尔铁电体机械操作下拓扑依赖的节点动力学
abstract_zh: 范德瓦尔斯莫尔超晶格可以容纳界面铁电域，其排列受到节点拓扑的影响。在这里，我们研究了扭曲 WSe2 同双层中节点类型在局部机械扰动下的动态行为和拓扑保护。暗场透射电子显微镜和开尔文探针力显微镜揭示了对称的六重节点以及非理想节点，包括四重和八重类型。原子力显微镜尖端的机械加载在节点运动中显示出惊人的对比：对称六重节点动态鲁棒，而不对称六重节点可以通过尖端扫描方向移动和引导，正如准静态加载模拟所证实的那样。此外，我们观察到一个四重节点由于缺乏拓扑保护而断裂。这些发现在节点拓扑和机械响应之间建立了直接联系，为莫尔铁电性提供了基本见解，并增进了我们对二维范德华材料拓扑缺陷的理解。

title: Small extracellular vesicle signaling and mitochondrial transfer reprogram T helper cell function in human asthma
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Small extracellular vesicles (sEVs) orchestrate cell-cell communication, but the role of sEV signaling via mitochondria in perpetuating asthmatic airway inflammation is unknown. Myeloid-derived regulatory cells (MDRCs) control CD4+ T cell responses in asthma. We demonstrate that airway MDRC-derived sEVs from asthmatics mediate T cell receptor engagement and transfer of mitochondria that induce antigen-specific activation and polarization of Th17 and Th2 cells. sEV-dependent T cell activation and Th polarization were mediated by mitochondrial oxidant-dependent NF-κB signaling, which, when blocked, mitigated CD4+ T cell activation. Mitochondrial fission regulator, DRP-1, promoted mitochondrial packaging within MDRC-sEVs. Internalized sEVs co-localized with the polarized cytoskeleton and mitochondrial networks in recipient T cells. Intranasal transfer of mitochondria packaged sEVs enhanced allergic airway inflammation and Th polarization in a murine asthma model. Our studies indicate a previously unrecognized role for mitochondrial fission and sEV- mitochondria-mediated signaling in dysregulated T cell activation, Th polarization, and pathology in asthma.
title_zh: 人类哮喘中小细胞外囊泡信号传导和线粒体转移重编程 T 辅助细胞功能
abstract_zh: 小细胞外囊泡 (sEV) 协调细胞间通讯，但 sEV 信号通过线粒体在持续哮喘气道炎症中的作用尚不清楚。骨髓源性调节细胞 (MDRC) 控制哮喘中的 CD4+ T 细胞反应。我们证明，来自哮喘患者的气道 MDRC 衍生的 sEV 介导 T 细胞受体接合和线粒体转移，从而诱导 Th17 和 Th2 细胞的抗原特异性激活和极化。 sEV 依赖性 T 细胞激活和 Th 极化是由线粒体氧化剂依赖性 NF-κB 信号传导介导的，当该信号被阻断时，会减轻 CD4+ T 细胞的激活。线粒体裂变调节剂 DRP-1 促进 MDRC-sEV 内的线粒体包装。内化的 sEV 与受体 T 细胞中的极化细胞骨架和线粒体网络共定位。线粒体包装的 sEV 的鼻内转移增强了小鼠哮喘模型中的过敏性气道炎症和 Th 极化。我们的研究表明，线粒体裂变和 sEV 线粒体介导的信号传导在 T 细胞激活失调、Th 极化和哮喘病理学中发挥着先前未被认识的作用。

title: Predictive acoustical processing in human cortical layers
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: In our dynamic environments, predictive processing is vital for auditory perception and its associated behaviors. Predictive coding formalizes inferential processes by implementing them as information exchange across cortical layers and areas. With laminar-specific blood oxygenation level-dependent imaging we measured responses to a cascading oddball paradigm, to ground predictive auditory processes on the mesoscopic human cortical architecture. Using a modeling approach, we derive putative changes in neural dynamics while accounting for draining effects. We show that the violations of predictions are potentially hierarchically organized and associated with responses in superficial layers of the planum polare and middle layers of the lateral temporal cortex. Moreover, we relate the updating of the brain’s internal model to changes in deep layers. Our results support the role of temporal cortical architecture in the implementation of predictive coding and highlight the ability of laminar fMRI to investigate mesoscopic processes in a large extent of temporal areas.
title_zh: 人类皮质层的预测声学处理
abstract_zh: 在我们的动态环境中，预测处理对于听觉感知及其相关行为至关重要。预测编码通过将推理过程实现为跨皮质层和区域的信息交换来形式化推理过程。通过层流特异性血氧水平依赖成像，我们测量了对级联奇怪范式的反应，以及对介观人类皮质结构的基础预测听觉过程的反应。使用建模方法，我们推导出神经动力学的假定变化，同时考虑消耗效应。我们表明，违反预测可能是分层组织的，并且与平面极浅层和外侧颞叶皮层中层的反应相关。此外，我们将大脑内部模型的更新与深层的变化联系起来。我们的结果支持了颞叶皮质结构在预测编码实施中的作用，并强调了层流功能磁共振成像研究大范围颞区介观过程的能力。

title: A bit-parallel molybdenum disulfide computer built through multi-level co-optimization
source: Nature Electronics
abstract: The sustainable development of artificial intelligence requires energy-efficient computing technology. Two-dimensional semiconductor digital electronics could potentially provide such capabilities, and promising single devices and small circuits have been developed. However, very large-scale integration remains challenging due to the inability to control atomic-scale defects and mesoscopic device variations, as well as the lack of macroscopic variation-aware design methodology. Here we report a molybdenum disulfide computer that combines a 0.5-μm industrial fabrication process and a back-end-of-line-integrated academia laboratory process. The computer comprises 1,433 transistors interconnected by four metal layers within a compact footprint, offering an integration density of around 9,336 transistors per square millimetre. The computer can store data on-chip in the register file and perform arithmetic operations on multiple-bit data parallelly at a 1-kHz clock frequency. Key to the development of this system is a multi-level co-optimization methodology that spans transistor, standard cell, logic synthesis and interconnect design.
title_zh: 多级协同优化构建的位并行二硫化钼计算机
abstract_zh: 人工智能的可持续发展需要高效节能的计算技术。二维半导体数字电子器件有可能提供这种能力，并且已经开发出有前景的单一器件和小型电路。然而，由于无法控制原子级缺陷和介观器件变化，以及缺乏宏观变化感知的设计方法，超大规模集成仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们报告了一种二硫化钼计算机，它结合了 0.5μm 工业制造工艺和后端集成学术实验室工艺。该计算机由 1,433 个晶体​​管组成，这些晶体管在紧凑的占地面积内通过四个金属层互连，提供每平方毫米约 9,336 个晶体管的集成密度。计算机可以将片内数据存储在寄存器文件中，并以 1kHz 时钟频率并行地对多位数据进行算术运算。该系统开发的关键是涵盖晶体管、标准单元、逻辑综合和互连设计的多级协同优化方法。

title: Gene-in-gene coding generates dual-isoform Fha condensates to control type VI secretion system assembly
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: While eukaryotes employ alternative splicing to diversify protein functions, analogous strategies in bacteria remain underexplored. Here we identify a conserved intragenic coding mechanism in Vibrio cholerae that generates two isoforms of the essential scaffold Fha and show that these isoforms cooperate through liquid–liquid phase separation to promote the assembly of the type VI secretion system (T6SS). The full-length isoform, FhaL, seeds assembly by engaging the membrane complex, whereas an internally translated isoform, FhaS, enhances secretion efficiency by strengthening specific interactions with baseplate components. This isoform partitioning is ecologically critical; a mutant producing only FhaL is impaired in bacterial competition, susceptible to eukaryotic predation, and defective in host colonization. Both isoforms form condensates, and a single residue change within a C-terminal helix abolishes condensate formation and significantly reduces T6SS activities. The internal translation and condensate-forming residues are strictly conserved across >10,000 V. cholerae isolates and active in diverse Vibrio species. These findings define a translational–biophysical mechanism that tunes a widespread contractile protein nanomachine for ecological success.
title_zh: 基因内基因编码产生双亚型 Fha 缩合物来控制 VI 型分泌系统组装
abstract_zh: 虽然真核生物利用选择性剪接来使蛋白质功能多样化，但细菌中的类似策略仍未得到充分探索。在这里，我们鉴定了霍乱弧菌中保守的基因内编码机制，该机制产生必需支架Fha的两种亚型，并表明这些亚型通过液-液相分离协同促进VI型分泌系统（T6SS）的组装。全长亚型 FhaL 通过与膜复合物接合来组装种子，而内部翻译的亚型 FhaS 通过加强与底板成分的特异性相互作用来提高分泌效率。这种异构体的划分在生态学上是至关重要的。仅产生 FhaL 的突变体在细菌竞争中受到损害，容易受到真核生物的捕食，并且在宿主定植方面存在缺陷。两种异构体均形成缩合物，C 末端螺旋内的单个残基变化可消除缩合物形成并显着降低 T6SS 活性。内部翻译和缩合形成残基在超过 10,000 个霍乱弧菌分离株中严格保守，并且在多种弧菌物种中具有活性。这些发现定义了一种转化生物物理机制，可以调整广泛的收缩蛋白纳米机器以实现生态成功。

title: Skin-mimicking biogel-based iontronic sensor with hierarchical bionic coupling for dexterous tactile e-skin
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The human fingertip skin, with its interlocked epidermal-dermal architecture and dense tactile receptors, enables unique perception and inspires the design of innovative electronic skin (e-skin). However, most e-skin materials fail to replicate the hierarchical integration of composition, structure, and function found in natural skin. Drawing direct inspiration from the dermal extracellular matrix–a composite hydrogel reinforced by a collagen-hyaluronic acid, here we report an e-skin that mimics key composition and architectural features of human skin. By incorporating sodium lactate and montmorillonite nanosheets into a gelatin matrix, we engineer a biomimic gel with mechanical and hydration properties similar to those of natural skin through dynamic ionic crosslinking and hydrogen bond networks. The microstructure resembling the dermal papillae is designed using a sandpaper-templating strategy. The resulting iontronic sensor achieves high sensitivity (466.3 kPa−1), rapid response (47 ms), and a wide pressure detection range (20 Pa–2000 kPa). We further develop a stretchable, ultrathin, hand-shaped iontronic sensor array that integrates seamlessly with a dexterous robotic hand, achieving precise, nondestructive grasping and high-fidelity, multichannel pressure mapping.
title_zh: 基于仿皮肤生物凝胶的离子电子传感器，具有分层仿生耦合，用于灵巧的触觉电子皮肤
abstract_zh: 人类指尖皮肤具有交错的表皮-真皮结构和密集的触觉感受器，可实现独特的感知并激发创新电子皮肤（e-skin）的设计。然而，大多数电子皮肤材料无法复制天然皮肤中成分、结构和功能的层次整合。直接从真皮细胞外基质（一种由胶原蛋白透明质酸增强的复合水凝胶）中汲取灵感，我们在此报告了一种模仿人类皮肤关键成分和结构特征的电子皮肤。通过将乳酸钠和蒙脱石纳米片融入明胶基质中，我们通过动态离子交联和氢键网络设计了一种仿生凝胶，其机械和水合特性与天然皮肤相似。类似于真皮乳头的微观结构是使用砂纸模板策略设计的。由此产生的离子电子传感器实现了高灵敏度（466.3 kPa−1）、快速响应（47 ms）和宽压力检测范围（20 Pa–2000 kPa）。我们进一步开发了一种可拉伸、超薄、手形离子电子传感器阵列，它与灵巧的机械手无缝集成，实现精确、无损的抓取和高保真、多通道压力映射。

title: Loop extrusion by cohesin plays a role in enhancer-activated gene expression early in differentiation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Enhancers and their target promoters often come into close physical proximity when activated. This may be explained by a variety of mechanisms, including cohesin-mediated chromatin loop extrusion. However, acute depletion of cohesin does not cause widespread changes in gene expression. We have tested the role of cohesin-mediated loop extrusion in gene expression at the mouse alpha-globin locus during erythropoiesis. Acute depletion of cohesin disrupts alpha-globin expression at early but not late stages of differentiation. Furthermore, when single or multiple CTCF sites, known to block cohesin, are placed between the alpha-globin enhancers and promoters, alpha-gene expression is disrupted. Importantly, the CTCF site’s orientation is critical, suggesting that within this activated domain, in definitive erythroid cells, cohesin predominantly but not exclusively, translocates from the enhancers to the promoters. We find that loop extrusion does play an important role in establishing enhancer-promoter proximity and consequent expression of inducible genes during differentiation.
title_zh: 粘连蛋白的环挤出在分化早期增强子激活的基因表达中发挥作用
abstract_zh: 增强子及其目标启动子在被激活时通常在物理上非常接近。这可以通过多种机制来解释，包括粘连蛋白介导的染色质环挤出。然而，粘连蛋白的急性消耗不会引起基因表达的广泛变化。我们测试了粘连蛋白介导的环挤压在红细胞生成过程中小鼠α珠蛋白位点基因表达中的作用。粘连蛋白的急性消耗会破坏分化早期而非晚期的α-珠蛋白表达。此外，当将单个或多个已知可阻断粘连蛋白的 CTCF 位点置于 α 珠蛋白增强子和启动子之间时，α 基因表达会受到破坏。重要的是，CTCF 位点的方向至关重要，这表明在定型红细胞中，在这个激活的结构域内，粘连蛋白主要（但不完全）从增强子易位到启动子。我们发现环挤出确实在分化过程中建立增强子-启动子邻近性和诱导基因的后续表达中发挥重要作用。

title: Giant spin-orbit magnetic state readout enhanced by a magnetic tunnel junction
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Magnetoelectric spin-orbit (MESO) logic, composed of a voltage-controlled magnetoelectric writing module and a spin-orbit readout module, is highly expected to substitute the silicon-based transistors and enable energy-efficient and scalable computing. Nevertheless, the output voltage of readout module based on spin-to-charge conversion is far less than the minimum magnetoelectric writing voltage, which greatly restricts the cascading function of MESO logic. Here, we first propose a magnetic tunnel junction (MTJ)-enhanced MESO logic to implement giant readout signal. Up to 1.5 mV output voltage is obtained, marking a significant improvement of approximately two orders of magnitude compared to previous findings. We ascribe the substantial enhancement to current modulation by junction resistance and the spin filtering effect of MgO-based MTJ. Moreover, the naturally integrated MTJ and MESO enables instantaneous and nonvolatile data exchange between computing module and external unit. Our work not only enhances output signal of readout module for direct cascading of MESO logic but also refines the design architecture, marking a pivotal stride forward in propelling MESO technology toward practical applications.
title_zh: 通过磁隧道结增强巨型自旋轨道磁状态读数
abstract_zh: 磁电自旋轨道（MESO）逻辑由压控磁电写入模块和自旋轨道读出模块组成，有望取代硅基晶体管并实现节能和可扩展计算。然而，基于自旋电荷转换的读出模块的输出电压远小于最小磁电写入电压，这极大地限制了MESO逻辑的级联功能。在这里，我们首先提出了一种磁隧道结（MTJ）增强型 MESO 逻辑来实现巨大的读出信号。获得了高达 1.5 mV 的输出电压，与之前的发现相比，显着提高了大约两个数量级。我们将结电阻的显着增强归因于基于 MgO 的 MTJ 的自旋过滤效应。此外，自然集成的MTJ和MESO可实现计算模块和外部单元之间的即时且非易失性的数据交换。我们的工作不仅增强了读出模块的输出信号以实现MESO逻辑的直接级联，而且还完善了设计架构，标志着推动MESO技术走向实际应用的关键一步。

title: A general method for synthesizing heteropore covalent organic framework membranes to rapidly enrich uranyl ions
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Heteropore covalent organic framework membranes are predicted to exhibit excellent uranium extraction capabilities due to their combination of rapid transport and strong affinity. However, the growth orientation of covalent organic framework networks is susceptible to disturbance when a supporting substrate is introduced, posing a major challenge to the fabrication of covalent organic framework membranes with well-defined hierarchical pores. Here, a general synthetic method is introduced for the preparation of heteropore covalent organic framework membranes. By pre-coating covalent organic framework nanoparticles onto a nylon substrate, the subsequent covalent organic framework network grows following the orientation of the nanoparticles under solvothermal conditions. This method demonstrates remarkable versatility across a broad range of covalent organic framework systems, including single-pore (with sql net) and dual-pore (with kgm net) networks. Several heteropore covalent organic framework membranes are fabricated with pore sizes ranging from 7.1/26.9 Å to 11.2/34.3 Å and 14.0/42.1 Å. The covalent organic framework membrane with 7.1/26.9 Å dual-pores exhibits the fastest uranyl ion transport rate among all Schiff-base porous membranes, which is 4.3 times faster than that of typical covalent organic framework membranes with single-pore channels. After irradiation treatment, the covalent organic framework membrane enables the conversion of uranium (VI) ions from seawater into insoluble precipitates, which suggests a versatile design paradigm for heteropore covalent organic framework membranes with synthetically engineered functionalities.
title_zh: 一种合成异孔共价有机骨架膜快速富集铀酰离子的通用方法
abstract_zh: 由于其快速传输和强亲和力的结合，异孔共价有机框架膜预计将表现出优异的铀提取能力。然而，当引入支撑基底时，共价有机框架网络的生长方向容易受到干扰，这对制造具有明确分级孔的共价有机框架膜构成了重大挑战。这里介绍了制备异孔共价有机骨架膜的一般合成方法。通过将共价有机骨架纳米颗粒预涂覆到尼龙基材上，随后的共价有机骨架网络在溶剂热条件下沿着纳米颗粒的取向生长。该方法在广泛的共价有机框架系统中表现出显着的多功能性，包括单孔（带有 sql net）和双孔（带有 kgm net）网络。几种异孔共价有机框架膜的孔径范围为 7.1/26.9 Å 至 11.2/34.3 Å 和 14.0/42.1 Å。具有7.1/26.9 Å双孔的共价有机骨架膜在所有希夫碱多孔膜中表现出最快的铀酰离子传输速率，比典型的单孔通道共价有机骨架膜快4.3倍。经过辐照处理后，共价有机框架膜能够将海水中的铀（VI）离子转化为不溶性沉淀物，这表明异孔共价有机框架膜的通用设计范例

title: Optimising DNA origami assembly by reducing off-target interactions
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: DNA origami enables the programmable self-assembly of nucleic acids into precisely defined nanostructures, yet the influence of primary base sequence on folding reliability remains incompletely understood. In particular, off-target interactions between scaffold and staple strands may introduce kinetic traps and reduce assembly yield, even when the intended Watson-Crick complementarity is preserved. Here we show that scaffold sequence strongly affects DNA origami assembly through the prevalence of off-target binding reactions implicit in the chosen base sequence. We developed a multi-objective computational framework that scores candidate scaffold sequences according to four classes of off-target interactions and selects variants predicted to minimise these effects for a given origami design. Using this approach, we identified both favourable and unfavourable scaffold regions from biological and synthetic sequences and tested them experimentally across 2D and 3D DNA origami structures. Atomic force microscopy showed that scaffolds predicted to have fewer off-target interactions consistently folded with higher yield, whereas off-target-prone scaffolds largely failed despite having fully complementary staple sets. Single-molecule optical tweezers further revealed that scaffold variants with fewer predicted off-target interactions assemble into more mechanically uniform origami structures. These results establish off-target sequence effects as a major determinant of origami folding and we provide a software tool to select scaffold sequences that minimise off-target reactions for any DNA origami design.
title_zh: 通过减少脱靶相互作用来优化 DNA 折纸组装
abstract_zh: DNA折纸技术能够将核酸可编程地自组装成精确定义的纳米结构，但初级碱基序列对折叠可靠性的影响仍不完全清楚。特别是，即使保留了预期的沃森-克里克互补性，支架和主链之间的脱靶相互作用也可能会引入动力学陷阱并降低组装产量。在这里，我们表明支架序列通过所选碱基序列中隐含的脱靶结合反应的普遍性强烈影响 DNA 折纸组装。我们开发了一个多目标计算框架，根据四类脱靶相互作用对候选支架序列进行评分，并选择预测可最大程度地减少给定折纸设计的这些影响的变体。使用这种方法，我们从生物和合成序列中识别出有利和不利的支架区域，并在 2D 和 3D DNA 折纸结构中对它们进行实验测试。原子力显微镜显示，预测脱靶相互作用较少的支架始终以较高的产率折叠，而尽管具有完全互补的订书钉组，但易于脱靶的支架在很大程度上失败了。单分子光镊进一步揭示，预测脱靶相互作用较少的支架变体可以组装成机械上更均匀的折纸结构。这些结果确立了脱靶序列效应作为折纸折叠的主要决定因素，我们提供了一个软件工具来选择支架序列，以最大限度地减少脱靶反应

title: A self-powered spherical compound eye with 8 ns-motion response for source-constrained drones
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Ultrafast dynamic vision remains a major challenge for autonomous systems like drones, particularly considering their strict power and computational constraints. Here, we present an artificial spherical compound eye (ASCE) that enables nanosecond-scale, event-driven motion detection across a panoramic field of view (294°). Each pixel is self-powered and responds exclusively to dynamic light changes, enabling real-time sensing with minimal processing. An 8 ns response time is achieved under femtosecond laser excitation, alongside exceptional stability exceeding 10⁸ switching cycles. In addition, the ASCE features a simple structure with in situ grown nanowires and dielectric layer. The one-step fabrication process allows for conformal pixel integration on spherical and other three-dimensional surfaces. We demonstrate its versatility across multi-scale applications, including drone-based laser alarming and real-time motion tracking. These results establish ASCE as a promising platform for energy-efficient, high-speed vision in autonomous robotics and intelligent surveillance.
title_zh: 用于源受限无人机的自供电球形复眼，具有 8 ns 运动响应
abstract_zh: 超快动态视觉仍然是无人机等自主系统的主要挑战，特别是考虑到其严格的功率和计算限制。在这里，我们提出了一种人工球形复眼（ASCE），它能够在全景视场（294°）内实现纳秒级、事件驱动的运动检测。每个像素都是自供电的，专门响应动态光线变化，从而以最少的处理实现实时传感。在飞秒激光激发下可实现 8 ns 响应时间，并且具有超过 10⁸ 开关周期的卓越稳定性。此外，ASCE 具有简单的结构，具有原位生长的纳米线和介电层。一步制造工艺允许在球形和其他三维表面上进行共形像素集成。我们展示了其在多尺度应用中的多功能性，包括基于无人机的激光报警和实时运动跟踪。这些结果使 ASCE 成为自主机器人和智能监控领域高效节能、高速视觉的一个有前途的平台。

title: Absolute quantification of enantiomeric purity of sorted carbon nanotubes by correlating hyperspectral fluorescence microscopy with ensemble chiroptical spectroscopy
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Accurate determination of enantiomeric purity is essential for advancing chiral materials in nanotechnology, optoelectronics, and quantum information science. Chiroptical spectroscopic techniques provide rapid, non-destructive measurements of enantiomeric excess (ee), but their use for complex systems like single-walled carbon nanotubes (SWCNTs) is limited by the lack of enantiopure references for calibration. Here we demonstrate an absolute approach combining hyperspectral imaging (HSI) with single-nanotube counting statistics and ensemble chiroptical spectroscopy such as electronic circular dichroism (ECD) and Raman optical activity (ROA) to quantify ee without requiring such standards. Analysis of thousands of individual nanotubes reveals sensitivity of HSI and chiroptical responses to synthesis, purification, and SWCNT concentration, highlighting pronounced source-dependent inhomogeneity. Nevertheless, universal calibration curves for ECD and ROA intensities are established from the purest, most uniform enantiomer-sorted samples. This methodology is extendable to other SWCNT chiralities and chiroptical techniques, enabling quantitative enantiomer sorting and systematic investigations of chirality-dependent properties and applications.
title_zh: 通过将高光谱荧光显微镜与系综手性光谱相关联，对分选碳纳米管的对映体纯度进行绝对定量
abstract_zh: 准确测定对映体纯度对于推进纳米技术、光电子学和量子信息科学中的手性材料至关重要。手性光学光谱技术可对对映体过量 (ee) 进行快速、无损测量，但由于缺乏用于校准的对映体纯参考，其在单壁碳纳米管 (SWCNT) 等复杂系统中的使用受到限制。在这里，我们展示了一种将高光谱成像 (HSI) 与单纳米管计数统计和整体手性光谱（例如电子圆二色性 (ECD) 和拉曼旋光性 (ROA)）相结合的绝对方法，无需此类标准即可量化 ee。对数千个单独纳米管的分析揭示了 HSI 和手性光学响应对合成、纯化和单壁碳纳米管浓度的敏感性，突出了明显的来源依赖性不均匀性。尽管如此，ECD 和 ROA 强度的通用校准曲线是根据最纯净、最均匀的对映体分类样品建立的。该方法可扩展到其他单壁碳纳米管手性和手性光学技术，从而实现定量对映体分类以及手性相关特性和应用的系统研究。

title: Electrically reconfigurable polarization control with double tri-layer black phosphorus heterostructures
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Accessing diverse polarization states across the Poincaré sphere via electrical control is highly desirable in optical communications, bio-imaging and quantum information processing, where fast continuous switching, compactness, and ease of integration into photonikic circuits are essential. Layered anisotropic 2D materials enable polarization modulation in a fast and compact manner, thereby overcoming the speed and size limitations of liquid-crystal based spatial light modulators and electro-optic Pockels cell modulators. Here, we report a Fabry-Perot cavity that integrates two cross-aligned black phosphorus layers, with each layer being independently gated to access the inherently two-dimensional range of polarization states across the Poincaré sphere surface. Our heterostructure design predicts electronic access to 86% of the Poincaré sphere at its S-band operating wavelength. We experimentally validate the design by fabricating and testing such a device in reflection, where we demonstrate independent, two-parameter electronic control of the output polarization.
title_zh: 双三层黑磷异质结构的电可重构偏振控制
abstract_zh: 在光通信、生物成像和量子信息处理中，通过电控制访问庞加莱球上的不同偏振态是非常理想的，其中快速连续切换、紧凑性和易于集成到光子电路中是至关重要的。分层各向异性二维材料能够以快速、紧凑的方式进行偏振调制，从而克服基于液晶的空间光调制器和电光普克尔斯盒调制器的速度和尺寸限制。在这里，我们报告了一个法布里-珀罗腔，它集成了两个交叉排列的黑磷层，每个层都被独立地门控以访问庞加莱球表面固有的二维范围的偏振态。我们的异质结构设计预测，在其 S 波段工作波长下，电子可以访问 86% 的庞加莱球。我们通过在反射中制造和测试此类设备来实验验证设计，其中我们演示了输出偏振的独立、二参数电子控制。

title: Author Correction: Volatile resorption expedites eruption onset in large silicic systems
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
title_zh: 作者更正：挥发性吸收加速了大型硅质系统的喷发

title: Gut bacteria prime and reinforce mature leaf oviposition preference in beetles via plant mediated feedback
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The gut microbiota can profoundly influence host behavior, yet underlying mechanisms for microbiota-driven behavioral adaptation remain elusive. We previously observed that female Plagiodera versicolora leaf beetles preferentially oviposit on mature leaves despite feeding on new leaves. Here, we demonstrate that this oviposition preference is gut microbiota-dependent, as it is abolished by microbiota depletion and restored by microbiota transplantation. Gut Pseudomonas putida emerges as the key driver, with its abundance positively correlating with mature-leaf preference. Further investigation reveals that beetle feeding induces elevated indole-3-acetic acid (IAA) levels, promoting bacterial translocation from feeding sites to new leaves. This colonization facilitates bacterial dissemination while reducing F1 fitness during larval feeding. Comparative transcriptomics implicates the takeout gene (TO1) in regulating oviposition preference, and TO1 knockdown abolishes this behavior. Moreover, P. putida supplementation restores TO1 expression and mature-leaf preference in germ-free females. These findings reveal an insect–microbe–plant feedback loop driving microbiota-associated behavioral adaptation.
title_zh: 肠道细菌通过植物介导的反馈启动并增强甲虫成熟叶的产卵偏好
abstract_zh: 肠道微生物群可以深刻影响宿主行为，但微生物群驱动的行为适应的潜在机制仍然难以捉摸。我们之前观察到雌性花斑叶甲虫尽管以新叶为食，但仍优先在成熟的叶子上产卵。在这里，我们证明这种产卵偏好是肠道微生物群依赖性的，因为它会被微生物群耗竭所消除，并通过微生物群移植来恢复。肠道恶臭假单胞菌成为关键驱动因素，其丰度与成熟叶偏好呈正相关。进一步的研究表明，甲虫取食会导致吲哚-3-乙酸（IAA）水平升高，促进细菌从取食地点转移到新叶。这种定植促进了细菌传播，同时降低了幼虫进食期间 F1 的适应性。比较转录组学表明外带基因 (TO1) 参与调节产卵偏好，而 TO1 敲除消除了这种行为。此外，补充恶臭假单胞菌可以恢复无菌雌性中的 TO1 表达和成熟叶偏好。这些发现揭示了驱动微生物相关行为适应的昆虫-微生物-植物反馈回路。

title: Measuring morphogen transport over multiple spatial scales in live zebrafish embryos
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Morphogenesis, the development of multicellular organisms, is controlled by morphogens, small signalling molecules, that form gradients across the embryo. While such gradients can emerge through several mechanisms, the establishment of stable gradients requires the reduction of morphogen diffusion by at least one order of magnitude, a process that has not been directly observed. Here, we develop Single-Plane Illumination Microscopy-based spatial Fluorescence Cross-Correlation Spectroscopy (SPIM- sFCCS) to directly measure the diffusion coefficient of the morphogen Squint in early zebrafish embryos as a function of topography and length scale. The diffusion coefficient of Squint is a function of its molecular size, the viscosity within the interstitial spaces, and possible crowding. Here, we show that beyond these general parameters, Squint’s diffusion coefficient changes on length scales that are commensurate with the diameter of the intercellular spaces in the embryo and that its slowdown is regulated by receptor binding, which is crucial for gradient formation and embryonic patterning.
title_zh: 测量活体斑马鱼胚胎在多个空间尺度上的形态发生素运输
abstract_zh: 形态发生，即多细胞生物体的发育，是由形态发生素（一种小信号分子）控制的，它们在胚胎中形成梯度。虽然这种梯度可以通过多种机制出现，但稳定梯度的建立需要将形态发生素扩散减少至少一个数量级，这一过程尚未被直接观察到。在这里，我们开发了基于单平面照明显微镜的空间荧光互相关光谱（SPIM-sFCCS）来直接测量早期斑马鱼胚胎中形态发生素斜视的扩散系数作为地形和长度尺度的函数。 Squint 的扩散系数是其分子大小、间隙空间内的粘度以及可能的拥挤的函数。在这里，我们表明，除了这些一般参数之外，Squint 的扩散系数在与胚胎中细胞间隙的直径相称的长度尺度上发生变化，并且其减慢受到受体结合的调节，这对于梯度形成和胚胎模式至关重要。

title: Reply to: “No evidence of neural feature-specific pre-activation during the prediction of an upcoming stimulus”

title_zh: 回复：“在预测即将到来的刺激期间，没有证据表明神经功能特定的预激活”

title: Targeting arginine metabolism reverses bone immunosuppressive microenvironment and metastasis in ARID1A-deficient triple negative breast cancer
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Bone metastasis is a lethal consequence of breast cancer. AT-rich interaction domain 1 A gene (ARID1A), a subunit of the switch/sucrose non-fermentable (SWI/SNF) complex, regulates immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment. However, its specific role in bone metastasis remains unclear. Here, we show that female patients with ARID1A‑mutated triple negative breast cancer (TNBC) exhibit a higher bone metastasis incidence. Most ARID1A mutations result in loss of protein expression. ARID1A deficiency upregulates the arginine metabolic pathway, increasing ornithine and spermine levels that promote the expansion of polymorphonuclear myeloid-derived suppressor cells (PMN-MDSCs) within the bone marrow, thereby facilitating bone metastasis. Targeting key enzymes of arginase 2 (ARG2) and ornithine decarboxylase 1 (ODC1) in arginine metabolic pathway effectively reduces bone metastasis in ARID1A-deficient models. Collectively, these findings reveal that ARID1A deficiency promotes bone metastasis by activating arginine metabolism to expand PMN-MDSCs and potentially offers therapeutic strategies for preventing bone metastasis in female patients with ARID1A-deficient TNBC.
title_zh: 靶向精氨酸代谢可逆转 ARID1A 缺陷型三阴性乳腺癌的骨免疫抑制微环境和转移
abstract_zh: 骨转移是乳腺癌的致命后果。富含 AT 的相互作用域 1 A 基因 (ARID1A) 是开关/蔗糖不可发酵 (SWI/SNF) 复合物的一个亚基，可调节免疫抑制肿瘤微环境。然而，其在骨转移中的具体作用仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现患有 ARID1A 突变的三阴性乳腺癌 (TNBC) 的女性患者表现出更高的骨转移发生率。大多数 ARID1A 突变会导致蛋白质表达丧失。 ARID1A缺陷会上调精氨酸代谢途径，增加鸟氨酸和精胺水平，促进骨髓内多形核骨髓源性抑制细胞（PMN-MDSC）的扩张，从而促进骨转移。靶向精氨酸代谢途径中的关键酶精氨酸酶 2 (ARG2) 和鸟氨酸脱羧酶 1 (ODC1) 可有效减少 ARID1A 缺陷模型中的骨转移。总的来说，这些研究结果表明，ARID1A 缺陷通过激活精氨酸代谢来扩增 PMN-MDSC，从而促进骨转移，并可能为预防 ARID1A 缺陷女性 TNBC 患者的骨转移提供治疗策略。

title: Quantum beats of exciton-polarons in CsPbI3 perovskite nanocrystals
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The optical response of semiconductors is governed by coupled electronic and vibrational excitations. In lead-halide perovskite nanocrystals, strong exciton–phonon interaction forms a ladder of exciton-polaron states accessible by femtosecond laser pulses. We demonstrate a fully coherent regime of exciton-polaron dynamics with long optical coherence times (T2 ≈ 300 ps) in CsPbI3 nanocrystals embedded in glass. Using transient two-pulse photon echo at a temperature of 2 K, we observe quantum beats between exciton-polaron states, with decay determined by optical phonon lifetimes of 5-15 ps. Within a four-level model, we directly quantify the exciton–phonon coupling strength through Huang–Rhys factors of 0.05 − 0.12 and 0.02 − 0.04 for low-energy optical phonons with energies of 3.2 and 5.1 meV, respectively. The pronounced size dependence of both coupling strengths and phonon lifetimes offers a route to tune the optical transitions between exciton-polaron states and tailor the coherent optical dynamics in perovskite semiconductors for solid-state quantum technologies.
title_zh: CsPbI3 钙钛矿纳米晶体中激子极化子的量子拍
abstract_zh: 半导体的光学响应由耦合的电子和振动激励控制。在卤化铅钙钛矿纳米晶体中，强激子-声子相互作用形成飞秒激光脉冲可访问的激子-极化子态阶梯。我们在嵌入玻璃的 CsPbI3 纳米晶体中展示了具有长光学相干时间 (T2 ≈ 300 ps) 的激子-极化子动力学的完全相干机制。使用 2 K 温度下的瞬态双脉冲光子回波，我们观察到激子-极化子态之间的量子拍，其衰减由 5-15 ps 的光学声子寿命决定。在四能级模型中，我们通过分别为 3.2 和 5.1 meV 能量的低能光学声子的 0.05 − 0.12 和 0.02 − 0.04 的 Huang-Rhys 因子直接量化激子-声子耦合强度。耦合强度和声子寿命的明显尺寸依赖性提供了一种调节激子-极化子态之间的光学跃迁并为固态量子技术定制钙钛矿半导体中的相干光学动力学的途径。

title: Transport of enzymatic activity across liquid-liquid interfaces using dynamic assemblies of magnetic particles via field-modulated interactions
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Biological systems dynamically grow high-aspect-ratio architectures from a site, enabling traversal of phase boundaries and functional execution. Emulating this growth strategy in synthetic systems could yield functional microsystems for operation across interfaces. However, engineering such bio-inspired growth to proceed out of plane from a substrate in synthetic colloidal assemblies remains challenging, as it requires overcoming gravitational collapse while maintaining structural coherence during extension. Here, we present a field-driven particle system that achieves gravity-resisting growth of high-aspect-ratio structures via frequency-modulated magnetic and hydrodynamic interactions. This growth is enabled by combining static and oscillating magnetic fields, which guide the assembly of magnetic particles into dynamic structures exhibiting a distinct segmented, seaweed-like morphology. These architectures are reconfigurable, stabilizable, programmably actuatable, and capable of penetrating a perfluorohexane–water interface. When functionalized with enzymes, the growing structures act as micro-transporters, delivering catalytic activity across the interface and triggering detectable reactions in both bulk two-phase and microfluidic chip systems. This work establishes a field-driven assembly-to-function approach that integrates structural growth, phase-boundary penetration, and triggered functionality, enabling active microsystems capable of interfacial transport and functional execution.
title_zh: 通过场调制相互作用使用磁性颗粒的动态组装跨液-液界面传输酶活性
abstract_zh: 生物系统从一个位点动态地生长高纵横比架构，从而实现相边界的遍历和功能执行。在合成系统中模拟这种增长策略可以产生跨界面操作的功能微系统。然而，设计这种仿生生长以从合成胶体组件中的基底进行平面外仍然具有挑战性，因为它需要克服重力塌陷，同时在延伸过程中保持结构的连贯性。在这里，我们提出了一种场驱动的粒子系统，该系统通过调频磁力和流体动力相互作用实现高纵横比结构的抗重力生长。这种生长是通过结合静态和振荡磁场来实现的，它引导磁性颗粒组装成动态结构，表现出独特的分段、海藻状形态。这些架构是可重构的、可稳定的、可编程驱动的，并且能够穿透全氟己烷-水界面。当用酶进行功能化时，生长的结构充当微转运体，在界面上传递催化活性，并在本体两相和微流控芯片系统中触发可检测的反应。这项工作建立了一种场驱动的组装到功能的方法，集成了结构生长、相边界渗透和触发功能，使主动微系统能够进行界面传输和功能执行。

title: Photonic Intrinsic Chiral Flatband With Tailorable Quality Factor and Circular Dichroism
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Engineering spin‐selective light‐matter interactions in photonic systems requires precise control of the radiative loss, optical chirality, and dispersion of resonant modes; however, these properties are intricately dependent on the structural parameters, making their independent tuning challenging. Herein, a partially etched dielectric metasurface supporting an intrinsic chiral quasi‐guided mode (QGM) with flatband dispersion is proposed, for which the quality (Q) factor and circular dichroism (CD) can be independently modulated. The QGM is generated via Brillouin zone folding, with its flatband dispersion remaining robust against structural variations within a certain range. The radiative loss and spin‐dependent coupling strength of the QGM can be independently engineered by adjusting the scaling ratio and rotation angle of individual nanostructures, enabling decoupled control of Q factor and CD while maintaining the flatband dispersion. Experimental measurements of the chiral QGM confirm the independent tunability of Q factor and CD, demonstrating angle‐insensitive linear and nonlinear CD. Our work establishes a general physical mechanism for realizing flatband QGMs with independently tunable Q factor and CD, providing a versatile platform for next‐generation functional chiral metasurfaces with potential applications in chiral emission, harmonic generation, and ultrasensitive optical sensing.
title_zh: 具有可定制品质因数和圆二色性的光子本征手性平带
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  光子系统中的工程自旋选择性光与物质相互作用需要精确控制辐射损耗、光学手性和谐振模式的色散；然而，这些特性错综复杂地依赖于结构参数，使得它们的独立调整具有挑战性。在此，提出了一种支持具有平带色散的本征手性准引导模式（QGM）的部分蚀刻介电超表面，其质量（Q）因子和圆二色性（CD）可以独立调制。 QGM 通过布里渊区折叠生成，其平带色散在一定范围内对结构变化保持稳健。 QGM 的辐射损耗和自旋相关耦合强度可以通过调整单个纳米结构的缩放比和旋转角度来独立设计，从而在保持平带色散的同时实现 Q 因子和 CD 的解耦控制。手性 QGM 的实验测量证实了 Q 因子和 CD 的独立可调性，证明了角度不敏感的线性和非线性 CD。我们的工作建立了一种通用的物理机制，用于实现具有独立可调的 Q 因子和 CD 的平带 QGM，为下一代功能性手性超表面提供了一个通用平台，在手性发射、谐波生成和超灵敏光学传感方面具有潜在的应用。

title_zh: 离子液体触发非晶化工程设计用于实用锂硫电池的具有电偶极域的对称破缺p块氧化铋

摘要
                  
                    硫氧化还原动力学缓慢和臭名昭著的多硫化锂（LiPS）穿梭效应严重阻碍了锂硫电池的实际应用。在此，我们报告了一种利用铁基离子液体触发非晶化、工程对称性破缺的策略

title: Metasurface‐Enabled Light‐Driven Liquid Crystal Elastomer Actuators
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Soft actuators based on liquid crystal elastomers (LCEs) offer programmable shape‐morphing capabilities for biomedical devices and microrobotics. However, conventional photothermal LCE actuators lack spatial selectivity in actuation, suffer from low photothermal conversion efficiency and poor wavelength versatility, which severely limit their performance, especially at the challenging 980 nm window. Here, we introduce a plasmonic metasurface strategy that enables spatially selective, high‐efficiency photothermal actuation. By patterning designed gold nanostructures onto LCEs, we create programmable “hot spots” that drive localized deformations under NIR illumination. This platform achieves unprecedented combined performance at 980 nm, including high photothermal conversion efficiency, low driving power, and competitive response times, while enabling patterned actuation. Moreover, we employ photoluminescence thermography to directly visualize and quantify thermal gradients generated across the LCE film, providing crucial insights into the spatiotemporal thermal dynamics. We also provide a comprehensive analysis from nanoscale plasmonic heating to macroscopic heat transfer. By integrating metasurface patterning with photoalignment, we demonstrate diverse actuation modes, from simple 2D bending to complex 3D morphing. This work establishes a new paradigm for high‐performance soft actuators, opening avenues for advanced applications in soft robotics, adaptive optics, and intelligent responsive systems.
title_zh: 超表面光驱动液晶弹性体致动器
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  基于液晶弹性体 (LCE) 的软执行器为生物医学设备和微型机器人提供可编程形状变形功能。然而，传统的光热 LCE 驱动器缺乏驱动的空间选择性，光热转换效率低，波长通用性差，这严重限制了它们的性能，特别是在具有挑战性的 980 nm 窗口。在这里，我们引入了一种等离子体超表面策略，可以实现空间选择性、高效的光热驱动。通过将设计的金纳米结构图案化到 LCE 上，我们创建了可编程“热点”，可在近红外照明下驱动局部变形。该平台在 980 nm 处实现了前所未有的综合性能，包括高光热转换效率、低驱动功率和具有竞争力的响应时间，同时实现图案化驱动。此外，我们采用光致发光热成像技术来直接可视化和量化 LCE 薄膜上产生的热梯度，为时空热动力学提供重要的见解。我们还提供从纳米级等离子体加热到宏观传热的全面分析。通过将超表面图案化与光对准相结合，我们展示了多种驱动模式，从简单的 2D 弯曲到复杂的 3D 变形。 这项工作为高性能软执行器建立了新的范例，为软机器人、自适应光学和智能响应系统的高级应用开辟了途径。

title: Enabling Record‐Breaking 19.05% Efficiency Organic Solar Cells by Crystallization Engineering of Simple Nonfused Ring Electron Acceptors
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  We report a novel nonfused ring electron acceptor, 2BTh‐2Cl, featuring a chlorinated end group that significantly enhances intermolecular interactions of acceptors. 2BTh‐2Cl displays lower solubility but higher crystallinity than the analogue 2BTh‐2F. Owing to the similar molecular skeleton, 2BTh‐2Cl exhibits excellent miscibility with 2BTh‐2F while maintaining high crystallinity. By adopting a ternary blend strategy and introducing 2BTh‐2Cl into the D18:2BTh‐2F system, the intermolecular interactions between acceptors are significantly enhanced, promoting the formation of a high‐crystallinity acceptor alloy phase. Through this crystallization engineering strategy, the ternary blend film composed of D18:2BTh‐2F:2BTh‐2Cl demonstrates remarkable crystallinity and mobility, achieving a record‐breaking power conversion efficiency of 19.05%. This achievement sets a new benchmark in the field of organic solar cells based on nonfused ring electron acceptors. Overall, this work effectively improves the crystallinity and mobility of nonfused‐ring acceptors through rational molecular design and ternary‐blend strategy, culminating in highly efficient OSCs.

title: Impact of sex chromosomes and gonad type in stress susceptibility in corticostriatal brain regions
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Major depressive disorder (MDD) is characterized by symptom heterogeneity and sex differences in prevalence. To gain insight into these sex differences, we utilized the subchronic variable stress paradigm (SCVS) in which female mice are susceptible, while males are behaviorally resilient. We used the Four Core Genotypes mice to differentiate between sex chromosome complement (XX vs. XY) and gonad type (ovaries vs. testes) in stress susceptibility, uncoupling these factors by removing the testes-determining SRY gene from the Y chromosome. Mice were subjected to SCVS followed by assays to assess anxiety-/depressive-like behaviors. Regardless of gonads, XX mice were stress susceptible, while XY mice were stress resilient, underscoring the importance of sex chromosome effects to sex differences in susceptibility to SCVS, independent of gonad type. We then performed RNA-sequencing of the prefrontal cortex (PFC) and nucleus accumbens (NAc). Consistent with human MDD and previous rodent SCVS findings, there was little overlap in genes altered by SCVS across sex. In stress susceptible XX mice, stress exposure altered pathways related to immune function, while in resilient XY mice, stress exposure altered pathways involved in neuronal function. There was brain region specificity to how sex chromosome complement and gonad type contributed to sex-specific stress effects. In the NAc, sex chromosome complement was the primary contributor to stress-induced gene expression, while in the PFC, both sex chromosome complement and gonad type contributed. These findings underscore a complex relationship between sex chromosome complement and gonadal factors in shaping stress vulnerability, partly through immune-related pathways.
title_zh: 性染色体和性腺类型对皮质纹状体脑区应激敏感性的影响
abstract_zh: 重度抑郁症（MDD）的特点是症状异质性和患病率的性别差异。为了深入了解这些性别差异，我们利用了亚慢性可变应激范式（SCVS），其中雌性小鼠易受影响，而雄性小鼠则具有行为弹性。我们使用四核心基因型小鼠来区分应激易感性中的性染色体补体（XX 与 XY）和性腺类型（卵巢与睾丸），通过从 Y 染色体上去除决定睾丸的 SRY 基因来解耦这些因素。对小鼠进行 SCVS，然后进行评估焦虑/抑郁样行为的分析。无论性腺如何，XX 小鼠都对应激敏感，而 XY 小鼠则具有应激恢复能力，这强调了性染色体效应对 SCVS 易感性性别差异的重要性，与性腺类型无关。然后我们对前额皮质 (PFC) 和伏核 (NAc) 进行了 RNA 测序。与人类 MDD 和之前的啮齿动物 SCVS 发现一致，不同性别的 SCVS 改变的基因几乎没有重叠。在对压力敏感的 XX 小鼠中，压力暴露改变了与免疫功能相关的通路，而在有弹性的 XY 小鼠中，压力暴露改变了与神经元功能相关的通路。性染色体补体和性腺类型如何导致性别特异性压力效应存在大脑区域特异性。在 NAc 中，性染色体补体是应激诱导基因表达的主要贡献者，而在 PFC 中，性染色体补体和性腺类型都有贡献。这些发现强调了一个复杂的关系

title: amyloid-predict and LLPS-predict: Predicting phase separation propensities in the intrinsically disordered proteome
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Amyloid formation and liquid–liquid phase separation (LLPS) are two important phenomena in cellular biology, linked to both normal physiological functions and various pathologies. Here, we present a computational framework that scores amyloid propensities (amyloid-predict) or LLPS propensities (LLPS-predict) from protein language model embeddings, enabling rapid proteome-wide annotation of peptides and residues. amyloid-predict achieves classification performance that exceeds existing AI and physics-based tools on a hexapeptide benchmark while enabling substantially faster high-throughput screening; notably, amyloid-predict is sensitive to subtle mutational effects and is influenced by sequence patterning and context rather than amino acid composition alone. We apply these protein language model classifiers to all the IDRs in the human proteome and uncover several protein categories with significant enhancement in amyloid and/or LLPS propensity, suggesting insights into the biological roles of these protein categories. For example, signaling receptors, carbohydrate-binding proteins, and Ca
                    2+
                    binding proteins are enriched in aggregation propensity, while mRNA-binding proteins, ribonucleoprotein complex, and nuclear matrix proteins are enriched in LLPS propensity. Interestingly, we observe patterns of both high amyloid and LLPS propensity in several amyloid-forming and prionic proteins. Together, these results provide side-by-side landscapes of LLPS and amyloid potential across the disordered human proteome while offering a rapid screening tool for basic biology, disease-mechanism studies, and rational design of peptide therapeutics.
title_zh: 淀粉样蛋白预测和 LLPS 预测：预测本质上无序的蛋白质组中的相分离倾向
abstract_zh:
淀粉样蛋白形成和液-液相分离（LLPS）是细胞生物学中的两个重要现象，与正常生理功能和各种病理相关。在这里，我们提出了一个计算框架，可以根据蛋白质语言模型嵌入对淀粉样蛋白倾向（淀粉样蛋白预测）或 LLPS 倾向（LLPS 预测）进行评分，从而实现肽和残基的快速蛋白质组范围注释。淀粉样蛋白预测在六肽基准上实现了超过现有人工智能和基于物理的工具的分类性能，同时实现了更快的高通量筛选；值得注意的是，淀粉样蛋白预测对微妙的突变效应敏感，并且受到序列模式和背景的影响，而不仅仅是氨基酸组成的影响。我们将这些蛋白质语言模型分类器应用于人类蛋白质组中的所有 IDR，并发现了几种淀粉样蛋白和/或 LLPS 倾向显着增强的蛋白质类别，这表明对这些蛋白质类别的生物学作用的深入了解。例如，信号传导受体、碳水化合物结合蛋白和 Ca
                    2+
                    结合蛋白在聚集倾向上富集，而mRNA结合蛋白、核糖核蛋白复合物和核基质蛋白在LLPS倾向上富集。有趣的是，我们在几种淀粉样蛋白形成蛋白和朊病毒蛋白中观察到高淀粉样蛋白和 LLPS 倾向的模式。总之，这些结果提供了无序人类蛋白质组中 LLPS 和淀粉样蛋白潜力的并排景观，同时提供了快速筛选

title: In situ evidence of self-accelerating turbidity currents
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Self-accelerating turbidity currents (SATCs) are hypothesized to be the primary mechanism for transporting vast amounts of sediment to the deep ocean. However, theoretical predictions of SATCs have preceded field observations by decades, leaving a critical gap in our understanding of this long-distance delivery process. Here, we present results from a four-year field survey of turbidity currents and bathymetric evolution in the Xiaolangdi Reservoir on the Yellow River (China), the world’s most sediment-laden river. We provide definitive in situ evidence of SATCs, characterized by synchronous down-channel increases in sediment mass and current momentum, alongside massive channel incision at the event scale. Notably, these SATCs occur in a low-gradient lacustrine setting, challenging the prevailing hypothesis that such phenomena are restricted to steep submarine channels or high velocity conditions. We identify a dimensionless threshold, incorporating current velocity, channel slope, and sediment settling velocity, that governs SATC formation across sublacustrine and marine environments. This threshold provides a robust framework for predicting SATC occurrence and informs engineering strategies to sustain reservoir capacity and restore sediment connectivity in dammed river systems.
title_zh: 自加速浊流的现场证据
abstract_zh: 据推测，自加速浊流（SATC）是将大量沉积物输送到深海的主要机制。然而，SATC 的理论预测早于现场观测数十年，这使得我们对这种长距离传输过程的理解存在严重差距。在这里，我们展示了对世界上沉积物最多的河流——黄河（中国）小浪底水库浊流和水深演变进行的四年现场调查的结果。我们提供了 SATC 的明确现场证据，其特征是沉积物质量和水流动量同步向下河道增加，以及事件规模的大规模河道切口。值得注意的是，这些 SATC 发生在低梯度湖泊环境中，挑战了这种现象仅限于陡峭海底通道或高速条件的普遍假设。我们确定了一个无量纲阈值，结合了水流速度、河道坡度和沉积物沉降速度，控制着湖底和海洋环境中 SATC 的形成。该阈值为预测 SATC 的发生提供了一个强大的框架，并为维持水库容量和恢复拦河系统中沉积物连通性的工程策略提供了信息。
