source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Rapid activation of ERK (extracellular signal-regulated kinase) signaling drives transcriptional responses to injury across metazoans. Yet, it is unclear whether key aspects of ERK as a wound signal—its upstream inputs, activating cell type(s), and spatiotemporal pattern—are conserved. To facilitate thorough comparisons, we examined wound-induced ERK during whole-body regeneration in the acoel
                    Hofstenia miamia
                    . Wounding triggers rapid ERK activation, which begins in the most wound-proximal cells but expands distally over time among stem cells and muscle cells. ERK drives transcriptional responses to wounding in both cell types, and inhibiting ERK activation perturbs the progress of regeneration. Finally,
                    neuregulin-1
                    , a ligand produced exclusively by muscle cells, and its putative receptor
                    egfr-1
                    (epidermal growth factor receptor-1) act upstream of ERK activation upon wounding. Our data identify a key signaling role of muscle cells in driving ERK activation following injury and reveal a spatial spreading phenomenon with both parallels to and distinctions from dynamic ERK patterns in other systems.
title_zh: Acoel 全身再生始于 neregulin-1 下游扩散的多组织 ERK 信号传导
abstract_zh:
ERK（细胞外信号调节激酶）信号的快速激活可驱动后生动物对损伤的转录反应。然而，目前尚不清楚 ERK 作为伤口信号的关键方面（其上游输入、激活细胞类型和时空模式）是否保守。为了便于彻底比较，我们在 acoel 中检查了全身再生过程中伤口诱导的 ERK
                    迈阿密霍夫斯泰尼亚
                    。受伤会触发 ERK 快速激活，这种激活从最靠近伤口的细胞开始，但随着时间的推移，在干细胞和肌肉细胞中向远端扩展。 ERK 驱动两种细胞类型对损伤的转录反应，抑制 ERK 激活会扰乱再生进程。最后，
                    神经调节蛋白-1
                    ，一种仅由肌肉细胞产生的配体，及其假定的受体
                    表皮生长因子受体-1
                    （表皮生长因子受体-1）在受伤时作用于 ERK 激活的上游。我们的数据确定了肌肉细胞在损伤后驱动 ERK 激活中的关键信号作用，并揭示了一种空间扩散现象，与其他系统中的动态 ERK 模式既有相似之处，也有区别。

title: Perturbation of RNA homeostasis impairs mitochondrial respiration during poxvirus infection through excess RNA accumulation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Induction of RNA degradation in infected cells is a strategy used by many viruses to promote efficient replication. Vaccinia virus, the prototype poxvirus and the vaccine platform for smallpox and mpox, encodes two decapping enzymes to accelerate mRNA and double-stranded RNA (dsRNA) degradation during infection, through functional coordination with host cell RNA exonuclease. Previous studies have largely focused on RNA degradation as a mechanism for regulating viral gene expression and evading innate immune sensing. Here, we show that impaired RNA degradation in vaccinia virus–infected cells, due to either depletion of viral decapping enzymes or cellular exonuclease, severely compromises mitochondrial respiration and integrity. We further demonstrated that accumulation of excess dsRNA and mRNA, including pseudouridine-modified RNAs, is sufficient to induce profound defects in mitochondrial respiration and integrity. Notably, this impairment occurs independently of interferon induction and dsRNA innate immune sensor Protein Kinase R. Moreover, excess RNA suppresses respiration in purified cell-free mitochondria and physically associates with mitochondria in cell-free and cellular contexts, supporting an immune-independent mechanism. Excess mRNA and dsRNA reduce mitochondrial membrane potential in both cells and purified mitochondria, indicating disruption of the proton gradient as the mechanism underlying impaired mitochondrial respiration and integrity. Together, these findings identify excess mRNA and dsRNA as perturbants of mitochondrial homeostasis in cells with dysfunctional RNA degradation during vaccinia virus infection, revealing a paradigm-shift concept linking RNA metabolism to mitochondrial function. The finding carries broad implications for understanding RNA and mitochondrial biology and RNA-based therapeutics and vaccines.
title_zh: 痘病毒感染期间 RNA 稳态的扰动通过过量 RNA 积累损害线粒体呼吸
abstract_zh: 在受感染的细胞中诱导 RNA 降解是许多病毒用来促进有效复制的策略。痘苗病毒是痘病毒的原型，也是天花和痘痘的疫苗平台，它编码两种脱帽酶，通过与宿主细胞 RNA 核酸外切酶的功能协调，加速感染过程中 mRNA 和双链 RNA (dsRNA) 的降解。之前的研究主要集中在RNA降解作为调节病毒基因表达和逃避先天免疫感应的机制。在这里，我们发现，由于病毒脱帽酶或细胞核酸外切酶的消耗，痘苗病毒感染的细胞中 RNA 降解受损，严重损害了线粒体呼吸和完整性。我们进一步证明，过量的 dsRNA 和 mRNA（包括假尿苷修饰的 RNA）的积累足以诱发线粒体呼吸和完整性的严重缺陷。值得注意的是，这种损伤的发生独立于干扰素诱导和 dsRNA 先天免疫传感器蛋白激酶 R。此外，过量的 RNA 会抑制纯化的无细胞线粒体中的呼吸，并与无细胞和细胞环境中的线粒体物理结合，支持免疫独立机制。过量的 mRNA 和 dsRNA 会降低细胞和纯化线粒体中的线粒体膜电位，表明质子梯度的破坏是线粒体呼吸和完整性受损的机制。总之，这些发现确定过量的 mRNA 和 dsRNA 是功能障碍细胞中线粒体稳态的干扰物。

title: Volatile signaling in plant–Metarhizium–insect interactions: Implications for nitrogen cycling
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Nitrogen exchange between plants and insects is a major component of ecosystem nitrogen cycling. Endophytic insect pathogenic fungi transfer insect-derived nitrogen to plants through symbiotic associations mediated by fungal mycelia, enabling plants to thrive even after losing nitrogen to insects. However, the mechanisms underlying this process remain unexplored. Here, we show that the widespread endophytic entomopathogen
                    Metarhizium robertsii
                    degrades the common root-derived antifungal compound caulilexin C to produce the volatile 1-methoxyindole. This compound is recognized by the Or74a olfactory receptor in
                    
                      Drosophila melanogaster
                    
                    larvae and attracts multiple Dipteran species to the plant–
                    Metarhizium
                    consortium. The recruited insects are subsequently infected and consumed, resulting in enhanced insect-derived nitrogen transfer to the plants. This self-reinforcing mechanism strengthens the plant–fungus symbiosis and reveals a pathway contributing to ecosystem nitrogen flux.
title_zh: 植物-绿僵菌-昆虫相互作用中的挥发性信号：对氮循环的影响
abstract_zh:
植物和昆虫之间的氮交换是生态系统氮循环的主要组成部分。内生昆虫病原真菌通过真菌菌丝体介导的共生关联将昆虫来源的氮转移到植物中，使植物即使在昆虫失去氮后也能茁壮成长。然而，这一过程背后的机制仍未被探索。在这里，我们表明广泛的内生昆虫病原体
                    罗氏绿僵菌
                    降解常见的根源抗真菌化合物 caulilexin C，产生挥发性 1-甲氧基吲哚。该化合物可被 Or74a 嗅觉受体识别
                    
                      黑腹果蝇
                    
                    幼虫并吸引多种双翅目物种到植物上–
                    绿僵菌属
                    财团。招募的昆虫随后被感染和消耗，从而增强了昆虫来源的氮向植物的转移。这种自我强化机制加强了植物-真菌共生，并揭示了一条有助于生态系统氮通量的途径。

title: Synaptic and neural pathway redundancy enables the robustness of a sensory-motor reflex and promotes predation escape in Caenorhabditis elegans
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
As a basic unit of the nervous system, the sensory-motor reflex circuit is fast and robust. However, it is not entirely clear how this robustness is achieved, given that various genetic perturbations can alter the function of the sensory neurons. By mapping the molecular basis of neuronal connections in the touch response circuit of
                    Caenorhabditis elegans
                    , we found prevalent genetic redundancy at neural pathway, synaptic, and molecular levels, which ensures that sensory signals can be relayed to command interneurons that control motor output. We also found developmental remodeling of the anterior circuit, which leads to the pruning of larval synapses, establishment of a second pathway that activates additional interneurons, and lateralization of the circuit. Finally, we found that the synapses that appeared to be functionally redundant in a simple touch assay contribute to the extent of reversal response in an additive manner, which may help the organism escape from predators.
title_zh: 突触和神经通路冗余使感觉运动反射更加稳健，并促进秀丽隐杆线虫的捕食逃脱
abstract_zh:
作为神经系统的基本单位，感觉运动反射回路快速而强大。然而，鉴于各种遗传扰动可以改变感觉神经元的功能，目前还不完全清楚如何实现这种鲁棒性。通过绘制触摸响应电路中神经元连接的分子基础
                    秀丽隐杆线虫
                    ，我们发现神经通路、突触和分子水平上普遍存在遗传冗余，这确保了感觉信号可以传递到控制运动输出的命令中间神经元。我们还发现前回路的发育重塑，这导致幼虫突触的修剪、激活额外中间神经元的第二条通路的建立以及回路的侧化。最后，我们发现在简单的触摸测定中似乎功能冗余的突触以累加的方式有助于逆转反应的程度，这可能有助于生物体逃离捕食者。

title: Conscious and nonconscious thought: Insights from the neuroscience of decision-making
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Conscious thought is often treated as a special class of neural processing, distinct from the nonconscious computations that guide most behavior. Here I offer a different perspective, grounded in the neuroscience of decision-making. I argue that conscious thought arises not from a unique mechanism but from a distinctive use of neural representations already engaged in nonconscious thought. Nonconscious thoughts are structured as interrogations that yield provisional intentions—decision-like commitments that guide action or inquiry without entering awareness. Using examples from perceptual decision-making and neurophysiology, I suggest that such thoughts depend on persistent neural representations that encode not only potential actions but the questions that give them meaning. These knowledge states may also preserve source-sensitive structure that supports a minimal experiential organization even when they remain nonconscious. Conscious thought, on this account, emerges when such a state is reformatted for potential report to another mind, or to oneself, recruiting theory of mind and narrative structure and placing its content in a space presumed to be shared. This proposal identifies a tractable bridge from nonconscious decision mechanisms to phenomenal consciousness, thereby placing part of the hard problem within empirical reach.
title_zh: 有意识和无意识思维：决策神经科学的见解
abstract_zh: 有意识的思维通常被视为一类特殊的神经处理，与指导大多数行为的无意识计算不同。在这里，我提供了一种基于决策神经科学的不同观点。我认为，有意识的思维并非源于独特的机制，而是源于对已经参与无意识思维的神经表征的独特使用。无意识的想法被构造为产生临时意图的审讯——类似决策的承诺，指导行动或询问而不进入意识。通过使用感知决策和神经生理学的例子，我认为这种想法依赖于持久的神经表征，这些表征不仅编码潜在的动作，还编码赋予它们意义的问题。这些知识状态还可以保留源敏感结构，即使它们保持无意识，也支持最小的体验组织。因此，当这种状态被重新格式化以向另一个思想或自己进行潜在报告时，意识思想就会出现，吸收思想理论和叙事结构并将其内容放置在假定共享的空间中。该提议确定了从无意识决策机制到现象意识的易于处理的桥梁，从而将部分难题置于经验范围内。

title: Emerging design principles for environmental, economic, and equity successes in land conservation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Land conservation initiatives worldwide are poised to continue rapid growth. Ranging in scale, scope, and mechanisms, these efforts include area-based conservation, incentive-based protection, and community collective management. Evidence from across fields now indicates that it is possible for land conservation to jointly improve environmental conditions, generate positive net local economic benefits, and support social equity. Yet the key policy elements that can lead to this type of multidimensional success are not well understood. Here, we review the considerable body of existing research on land conservation and propose eight emerging design principles that conservation actors can employ to support “win-win-win” outcomes: 1) identify and support credible pathways of change, 2) set goals for all outcomes, recognizing their interdependencies, 3) accommodate multiple needs and uses through spatial or place-specific differentiation, 4) facilitate temporal resilience through diversification and limits, 5) foster nested governance, 6) integrate information structures for environmental and social outcomes, 7) assess policies using counterfactual-based analysis and adaptive management, 8) establish lasting institutions and funding mechanisms. Although these design principles will likely change and evolve, they provide an evidence-grounded framework to support current and future efforts to steward global lands.
title_zh: 土地保护领域环境、经济和公平成功的新兴设计原则
abstract_zh: 世界范围内的土地保护举措将继续快速增长。这些努力的规模、范围和机制包括分区保护、激励保护和社区集体管理。现在来自各个领域的证据表明，土地保护可以共同改善环境条件，产生积极的当地净经济效益，并支持社会公平。然而，能够带来这种多层面成功的关键政策要素尚不清楚。在这里，我们回顾了大量现有的土地保护研究，并提出八项新兴设计原则，保护行动者可以采用这些原则来支持“三赢”的结果：1）确定和支持可靠的变革途径，2）为所有结果设定目标，认识到它们的相互依赖性，3）通过空间或特定地点的差异适应多种需求和用途，4）通过多样化和限制促进时间弹性，5）促进嵌套治理，6）整合环境和社会结果的信息结构，7）评估使用基于反事实的分析和适应性管理的政策，8) 建立持久的机构和筹资机制。尽管这些设计原则可能会发生变化和发展，但它们提供了一个以证据为基础的框架，以支持当前和未来管理全球土地的努力。

title: Rational sycophants and catastrophic risks
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Sycophants praise and support leaders’ proposals to gain personal and professional advantage. A rational sycophant is an advisor who supports actions they expect to be harmful even when rewards and punishments for good and bad advice are equal in magnitude. Rational sycophancy arises when the outcome distribution of a proposed action has a negative expected value but a positive median (outcome asymmetry). The risk is greatest when a small yet meaningful fraction of outcomes are catastrophic, which occurs in long-tailed distributions. Given that single realizations from long-tailed distributions reveal little about the underlying distribution, even after outcomes are observed, a leader may be unable to distinguish rational sycophancy from wise counsel. As a result, rational sycophants may gain influence and increase the likelihood of catastrophic policy outcomes.
title_zh: 理性的阿谀奉承与灾难性的风险
abstract_zh: 阿谀奉承者赞扬并支持领导人的建议，以获得个人和职业优势。理性的阿谀奉承者是一位顾问，即使对好的建议和坏的建议的奖励和惩罚程度相同，他也会支持他们认为有害的行为。当所提议的行动的结果分布具有负的预期值但正的中位数（结果不对称）时，就会出现理性的阿谀奉承。当一小部分但有意义的结果是灾难性的时，风险最大，这种情况发生在长尾分布中。鉴于长尾分布的单一认识几乎无法揭示潜在的分布，即使在观察到结果之后，领导者也可能无法区分理性的阿谀奉承和明智的建议。结果，理性的阿谀奉承者可能会获得影响力，并增加灾难性政策结果的可能性。

title: Anti-CRISPR-mediated continuous directed evolution of CRISPR-Cas9 in human cells
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Engineering CRISPR-Cas systems for improved or altered function is critical to both research and therapeutic applications. Unfortunately, most optimization, especially directed evolution in bacterial hosts, fails to capture the functional requirements of the complex mammalian cellular milieu, where activity is usually required. Robust strategies to enable continuous directed evolution of genome-targeting agents directly in human cells remain lacking. Here, we introduce CRISPR-MACE (Mammalian cell-enabled Adenovirus-assisted Continuous Evolution) as a foundational technology to address this need. CRISPR-MACE integrates virus-based continuous evolution with anti-CRISPR-based tunable selection to generate
                    Streptococcus pyogenes
                    Cas9 variants with both increased and decreased DNA binding capacity and nearly 1,000-fold-enhanced resistance to AcrIIA4, the strongest known inhibitor of SpCas9. Notably, across independent evolution campaigns, the same Cas9 gatekeeper mutation reproducibly emerged first, enabling subsequent adaptive steps along two interdependent axes of Cas9 function. In addition to advancing CRISPR technologies, this work establishes key principles and synthetic circuits for continuously evolving CRISPR-Cas systems directly in human cells.
title_zh: 人类细胞中抗 CRISPR 介导的 CRISPR-Cas9 连续定向进化
abstract_zh:
设计 CRISPR-Cas 系统以改善或改变功能对于研究和治疗应用都至关重要。不幸的是，大多数优化，尤其是细菌宿主中的定向进化，未能捕获复杂的哺乳动物细胞环境的功能需求，而复杂的哺乳动物细胞环境通常需要活动。目前仍然缺乏能够直接在人类细胞中连续定向进化基因组靶向剂的稳健策略。在这里，我们介绍 CRISPR-MACE（哺乳动物细胞腺病毒辅助连续进化）作为满足这一需求的基础技术。 CRISPR-MACE将基于病毒的持续进化与基于抗CRISPR的可调选择相结合，产生
                    化脓性链球菌
                    Cas9 变体具有增加和减少 DNA 结合能力，并且对 AcrIIA4（已知最强的 SpCas9 抑制剂）的抵抗力增强了近 1,000 倍。值得注意的是，在独立的进化活动中，相同的 Cas9 看门人突变首先重复出现，从而沿着 Cas9 功能的两个相互依赖的轴实现后续的自适应步骤。除了推进 CRISPR 技术之外，这项工作还为直接在人类细胞中不断进化的 CRISPR-Cas 系统建立了关键原理和合成电路。

title: Accessibility–equality dynamics in urban blue and green spaces reshape human well-being
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: As urbanization accelerates, urban blue and green spaces are increasingly recognized as critical nature-based solutions for enhancing human well-being, delivering climate, environmental, and psychological benefits. Yet, the mechanisms by which access to these natural spaces and the equality of access by urbanites in diverse residential locations shape well-being remain poorly understood in the context of sustainable urban governance. Here, we systematically evaluated the spatiotemporal dynamics of urban blue and green space accessibility and equality across 279 Chinese cities from 2000–2100 and assessed their combined effects on well-being. We found that accessibility has a significant positive influence on well-being but follows an inverted-U-shaped pattern with distinct optimal thresholds. By contrast, equality shows a consistent, positive linear relationship with well-being. Although future accessibility is projected to improve, persistently high disparities among different segments of urban populations highlight the urgent need for equity-centered governance of blue and green spaces in cities. This perspective extends current approaches to environmental justice while revealing a structural mismatch between resource abundance and equitable distribution. To address this mismatch, we propose a prioritization framework that emphasizes context-specific, spatially targeted interventions, guided by four key drivers: the natural space to built-up area ratio, urban population size, the proportion of natural spaces with high accessibility, and urban landscape connectivity. By operationalizing these insights in an online toolkit for local governments, this work advances the fields of sustainable urban governance and equitable environmental planning.
title_zh: 城市蓝色和绿色空间的可达性-平等动态重塑人类福祉
abstract_zh: 随着城市化进程的加快，城市蓝色和绿色空间越来越被认为是增强人类福祉、提供气候、环境和心理效益的重要的基于自然的解决方案。然而，在可持续城市治理的背景下，人们对这些自然空间的获取以及不同居住地点的城市居民平等获取福祉的机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们系统地评估了 2000 年至 2100 年中国 279 个城市蓝色和绿色空间可达性和平等性的时空动态，并评估了它们对福祉的综合影响。我们发现，可达性对幸福感有显着的积极影响，但遵循倒 U 形模式，具有不同的最佳阈值。相比之下，平等与幸福感呈现出一致的、积极的线性关系。尽管预计未来的可达性将会改善，但城市不同群体人口之间持续存在的巨大差异凸显了对城市蓝色和绿色空间进行以公平为中心的治理的迫切需要。这一观点扩展了当前环境正义的方法，同时揭示了资源丰富性与公平分配之间的结构性不匹配。为了解决这种不匹配问题，我们提出了一个优先框架，强调针对具体情况的、有针对性的空间干预措施，以四个关键驱动因素为指导：自然空间与建成区的比例、城市人口规模、高可达性自然空间的比例以及城市景观连通性。通过操作

title: Reading ability in both deaf and hearing adults is linked to neural representations of abstract phonology derived from visual speech
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Reading is central to academic and vocational success. Some deaf children face reading challenges due to limited access to spoken or signed language. Robust phonological representations are key to reading development in hearing children. Spoken language phonology may be one of many contributors to reading development in deaf children. Indeed, speechreading ability correlates with reading skill in both deaf and hearing individuals, suggesting it is linked to reading development regardless of hearing status. Further support for this hypothesis would be provided by evidence that similar neural representations of speech phonology are evoked by visual speech and other language forms (auditory speech and text) and that these neural representations are related to reading proficiency. We used fMRI and representational similarity analysis (RSA) to identify shared neural representations of spoken language phonological structure. A group of deaf adult participants (N = 22), with a mixture of sign language and spoken language backgrounds and reading abilities, were presented with single lexical items as visual speech and dynamic text (cursive text, revealed letter-by-letter to promote a phonological reading strategy). Adult hearing participants (N = 25) were presented with the same words, but as visual speech and auditory speech. Shared neural representations of phonological structure of English words were found in each group in the superior and middle temporal cortex (STC/MTC) and these abstract representations were more similar across different language forms in better readers. Our data provide neurobiological evidence of the contribution of visual speech to abstract phonological representations of spoken language, that relate to reading proficiency, in both deaf and hearing adults.
title_zh: 失聪和听力正常的成年人的阅读能力与源自视觉言语的抽象音系的神经表征有关
abstract_zh: 阅读对于学术和职业成功至关重要。由于接触口语或手语的机会有限，一些聋哑儿童面临阅读挑战。强大的语音表征是听力正常儿童阅读发展的关键。口语音系可能是聋哑儿童阅读能力发展的众多因素之一。事实上，语音阅读能力与聋哑人和听力正常的人的阅读技能相关，这表明无论听力状况如何，它都与阅读发展相关。证据表明语音音系的类似神经表征是由视觉语音和其他语言形式（听觉语音和文本）引起的，并且这些神经表征与阅读能力相关，这将进一步支持这一假设。我们使用功能磁共振成像和表征相似性分析（RSA）来识别口语语音结构的共享神经表征。一组具有手语和口语背景和阅读能力的聋哑成人参与者（N = 22）被呈现为视觉语音和动态文本（草书文本，逐个字母地显示以促进语音阅读策略）等单一词汇项目。成人听力参与者（N = 25）被呈现相同的单词，但作为视觉言语和听觉言语。在每组的上颞叶皮层和中颞叶皮层（STC/MTC）中都发现了英语单词语音结构的共享神经表征，并且这些抽象表征在不同语言形式的更好阅读者中更加相似。我们的d

title: Phosphoethanolamine cytidylyltransferase 2 integrates DAG metabolism and TBK1 activation to regulate antiviral innate immunity
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Phosphatidylethanolamine (PE) biosynthesis is critical for membrane biology and cellular homeostasis. However, its specific role in antiviral innate immunity remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate that inhibition of phosphoethanolamine cytidylyltransferase 2 (PCYT2), a key enzyme in PE biosynthesis, promotes TBK1 activation to enhance the antiviral innate immune response. Mechanistically, PCYT2 deficiency leads to the accumulation of diacylglycerol, which activates protein kinase C-δ (PKCδ). We identify PKCδ as a direct kinase for TBK1 and demonstrate that it binds to and phosphorylates TBK1 at Ser716. This Ser716 phosphorylation facilitates the subsequent canonical phosphorylation of TBK1 at Ser172, resulting in hyperactivation of the TBK1–IRF3 axis. Our findings uncover a link between PE metabolism and antiviral innate immunity, suggesting that targeting the PE biosynthesis pathway could be a potential therapeutic strategy against viral infections.
title_zh: 磷酸乙醇胺胞苷酰转移酶2整合DAG代谢和TBK1激活来调节抗病毒先天免疫
abstract_zh: 磷脂酰乙醇胺 (PE) 生物合成对于膜生物学和细胞稳态至关重要。然而，其在抗病毒先天免疫中的具体作用仍知之甚少。在此，我们证明，磷酸乙醇胺胞苷酰转移酶 2 (PCYT2)（PE 生物合成中的关键酶）的抑制可促进 TBK1 激活，从而增强抗病毒先天免疫反应。从机制上讲，PCYT2 缺陷会导致二酰甘油的积累，从而激活蛋白激酶 C-δ (PKCδ)。我们将 PKCδ 确定为 TBK1 的直接激酶，并证明它在 Ser716 位点上结合并磷酸化 TBK1。 Ser716 磷酸化促进了 TBK1 Ser172 随后的经典磷酸化，导致 TBK1-IRF3 轴过度激活。我们的研究结果揭示了 PE 代谢与抗病毒先天免疫之间的联系，表明针对 PE 生物合成途径可能是对抗病毒感染的潜在治疗策略。

title: AI assists adversarial collaboration in debate on minority salience
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The advancement of science depends on rigorous tests of competing hypotheses, yet many disputes are left unresolved. Adversarial collaboration—where opposing scientists jointly design decisive tests—is one proposed solution. We examine whether large language models (LLMs) can play a role by organizing information, structuring the debate and generating candidate experimental designs. This article reports an AI-assisted adversarial collaboration designed to resolve a debate in PNAS on minority salience—an overestimation of the percentage of minority faces in a visual display. The debate focused on whether there would be further overestimation when minorities in the displays were the same minorities in participants’ communities (or social environments). Using LLMs to extract and organize competing propositions, we identified central disagreements and generated initial experimental designs to test claims. Human collaborators refined the designs and created two preregistered experiments that factorially manipulated the ethnicity of minority faces and the ethnicity of participants’ communities. Data showed that people exaggerated the percentage of minorities in facial displays. Furthermore, overestimation was even greater when minorities in facial displays were also minorities in participants’ communities. When the two camps of researchers saw the results, their confidence in key hypotheses converged. We do not experimentally test AI-assisted adversarial collaboration relative to traditional adversarial collaboration or other forms of dispute resolution. Rather, our study illustrates how an AI tool can be used with adversarial collaboration to formalize claims, structure disagreements, lower barriers to collaboration, and serve as an impartial observer to strengthen perceptions of fairness.
title_zh: 人工智能协助少数群体突出性辩论中的对抗性合作
abstract_zh: 科学的进步取决于对相互竞争的假设的严格测试，但许多争议尚未得到解决。对抗性合作——反对的科学家共同设计决定性的测试——是一种提议的解决方案。我们研究大型语言模型（LLM）是否可以通过组织信息、构建辩论和生成候选实验设计来发挥作用。本文报道了一项人工智能辅助的对抗性合作，旨在解决《美国国家科学院院刊》中关于少数族裔显着性的争论——高估了视觉显示中少数族裔面孔的百分比。争论的焦点是，当展示中的少数群体与参与者所在社区（或社会环境）中的少数群体相同时，是否会进一步高估。使用法学硕士来提取和组织相互竞争的命题，我们确定了中心分歧并生成了初步的实验设计来测试主张。人类合作者改进了设计，并创建了两个预先注册的实验，分别操纵少数族裔面孔的种族和参与者社区的种族。数据显示，人们夸大了面部表情中少数族裔的比例。此外，当面部展示中的少数群体也是参与者社区中的少数群体时，高估的程度甚至更大。当两个阵营的研究人员看到结果时，他们对关键假设的信心趋于一致。相对于传统的对抗性协作或其他形式的争议解决，我们不会通过实验测试人工智能辅助的对抗性协作。相反，我们的研究表明

title: Elevated threat status of large-fruited plants is associated with the extinction of large frugivores in the Caribbean islands
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Anthropogenic activities severely impair biodiversity and ecosystem functionality. A prime example is the loss of frugivores and their corresponding seed dispersal services due to defaunation (the decline of animal populations), ultimately affecting the continued persistence of plant species that lack their ecological partners. Loss of frugivores and their biotic interactions can be particularly severe on islands due to their isolation and relatively small area, which is often associated with low functional redundancy. From field observations on the Caribbean Virgin Islands, we found that only 1% of documented seed dispersal events occurred in large-fruited plants, with dispersal probability closely tied to overlap between fruit width and gape size of the largest nonthreatened frugivore. Using fruit–frugivore trait matching to extrapolate this pattern to the rest of the Caribbean, we found that large-fruited plant species are effectively “orphaned” due to the absence of animal dispersers, resulting in elevated rates of endangerment across islands. Threat status of plant species was better explained by trait matching than other pressures such as human use, suggesting that extinction or reduced abundance of large-bodied frugivores is compromising their plant mutualists’ ability to persist. These results argue strongly for the need to restore populations of large-bodied frugivores across the Caribbean, either through population enhancement of currently endangered species or rewilding with close relatives of extinct species.
title_zh: 大果植物的威胁状况升高与加勒比群岛大型食果动物的灭绝有关
abstract_zh: 人类活动严重损害生物多样性和生态系统功能。一个典型的例子是，由于动物区系丧失（动物数量减少），食果动物及其相应的种子传播服务丧失，最终影响了缺乏生态伙伴的植物物种的持续存在。由于岛屿与世隔绝且面积相对较小，而岛屿上的食果动物及其生物相互作用的损失可能特别严重，而这通常与功能冗余度较低有关。通过对加勒比维尔京群岛的实地观察，我们发现只有 1% 有记录的种子传播事件发生在大果植物中，传播概率与最大的未受威胁食果动物的果实宽度和张口大小之间的重叠密切相关。利用水果-食果动物性状匹配将这种模式外推到加勒比海其他地区，我们发现，由于缺乏动物传播者，大型水果植物物种实际上是“孤儿”，导致岛屿上的濒危率升高。与人类使用等其他压力相比，性状匹配可以更好地解释植物物种的威胁状态，这表明大型食果动物的灭绝或丰度减少正在损害植物互利共生的持续能力。这些结果强烈表明需要恢复整个加勒比地区大型食果动物的数量，要么通过增加目前濒危物种的数量，要么通过灭绝物种的近亲重新野化。

title: A large-scale framework for estimating soil carbon, nitrogen, pH, and salinity dynamics for 1985–2023
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Soil is fundamental to sustaining life on Earth, providing ecosystem services, regulating climate, and playing a central role in global food systems. In the last decades, due to human activities and climate change, soils worldwide have experienced substantial changes in their key properties, resulting in alterations to their functions. In this context, global soil mapping is crucial for identifying degradation trends and informing effective adaptation strategies. To address these challenges, this work leverages advances in machine learning and cloud computing to develop HUMERIS, a global dataset spanning 1985 to 2023 and covering four key soil properties: salinity (EC
                    e
                    ), pH, nitrogen (N), and organic carbon (OC) across natural ice-free land surfaces globally. The goal of HUMERIS is to create a framework able to predict long-term soil dynamics across spatial scales, time, and depth. For topsoil over the reference period, the analysis suggests an increase in N (+0.4% per year) and OC (+0.5% per year), associated with a decrease of EC
                    e
                    (−0.2% per year) and stable values of pH. Looking at biomes and land cover classes two contrasting dynamics emerge. Colder regions show an increase in predicted OC and N compared to warmer ones, while land-use analysis reveals that areas converted from natural to cropland exhibit a relative decrease of −0.2%. These results suggest shifts in global soil properties with implications for agroecological modeling, socioeconomic analysis, and sustainable land management.

title: Not all gut cellular circadian oscillators are food entrainable
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Circadian rhythms are ubiquitous, and most of the organs in the body contain circadian oscillators. The intestine comprises diverse cell types with distinct developmental origins and physiological functions. However, which intestinal cells contain cell-autonomous circadian oscillators and how circadian oscillators in distinct intestinal cell types synchronize with one another and with environmental daily cycles remain poorly understood. To address these questions, we generated a Cre-dependent PER2::LUCIFERASE reporter knock-in mouse that enables ex vivo measurement of circadian oscillations in defined cell populations. Ex vivo gut explants from mice expressing the reporter in one of five major cell types of the muscularis externa—enteric neurons (ENs), enteric glial cells (EGCs), interstitial cells of Cajal (ICCs), smooth muscle cells (SMCs), and muscularis macrophages (MMs)—exhibited robust, self-sustained circadian bioluminescence rhythms, demonstrating that each of these cell types harbors a cell-autonomous circadian oscillator. Importantly, circadian oscillators in ENs, EGCs, SMCs, and MMs entrained to feeding-fasting cycles, whereas circadian oscillators in ICCs remained resistant to food entrainment. These findings reveal that distinct intestinal cell types possess unique entrainment properties, and feeding during inactive time induces heterogeneous phase shifts across gut circadian oscillators, leading to temporal circadian misalignment within the intestine. As circadian disruptions, such as those associated with shift work, contribute to intestinal disorders, including inflammatory bowel disease and disorders of the gut–brain interaction, studying how intercellular circadian desynchrony influences intestinal homeostasis should provide chronobiology-based therapeutic strategies to combat these diseases.
title_zh: 并非所有肠道细胞昼夜节律振荡器都可以通过食物夹带
abstract_zh: 昼夜节律无处不在，体内大多数器官都含有昼夜节律振荡器。肠道包含具有不同发育起源和生理功能的多种细胞类型。然而，哪些肠道细胞含有细胞自主昼夜节律振荡器，以及不同肠道细胞类型中的昼夜节律振荡器如何彼此同步以及与环境日常周期同步，仍然知之甚少。为了解决这些问题，我们构建了一种 Cre 依赖性 PER2::LUCIFERASE 报告基因敲入小鼠，能够对特定细胞群中的昼夜节律振荡进行离体测量。在外肌层五种主要细胞类型（肠神经元（EN）、肠神经胶质细胞（EGC）、卡哈尔间质细胞（ICC）、平滑肌细胞（SMC）和肌层巨噬细胞（MM））中表达报告基因的小鼠的离体肠道外植体表现出强大的、自我维持的昼夜生物发光节律，证明这些细胞类型中的每一种都具有细胞自主性昼夜节律振荡器。重要的是，EN、EGC、SMC 和 MM 中的昼夜节律振荡器受到进食-禁食周期的影响，而 ICC 中的昼夜节律振荡器仍然对食物夹带具有抵抗力。这些发现表明，不同的肠道细胞类型具有独特的夹带特性，并且在不活动期间进食会引起肠道昼夜节律振荡器的异质相移，导致肠道内的时间昼夜节律失调。由于昼夜节律紊乱（例如与轮班工作相关的昼夜节律紊乱）会导致肠道疾病，包括

title: Tubulin flux at spastin-induced nanodamage sites regulates microtubule rescue frequency and EB1 lifetimes
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Severing enzymes nanodamage microtubules by extracting tubulin subunits. This extraction is accompanied by spontaneous repair with soluble tubulin. Here, we show that GTP-, and not GDP–tubulin, incorporates preferentially at nanodamage sites where it recruits end binding protein-1 (EB1). Using GTP hydrolysis-defective recombinant tubulin mutants we show that the tubulin GTPase is a timer for EB1 association at repair sites. Tubulin on-rate controls both the size and lifetime of the spastin-catalyzed GTP-islands which promote rescues. Consistent with this, first, rescue rates in the presence of repair vary steeply with tubulin concentration, unlike in the absence of repair, and second, spastin-catalyzed lattice remodeling, and not passive binding of the enzyme alone, increases rescue rates. Furthermore, we show that, when overexpressed at low levels in cells, spastin catalyzes microtubule repair and affects microtubule growth. Thus, microtubule severing proceeds through GTP–tubulin repair intermediates both in vitro and in cells. Our work demonstrates that severing enzymes exert their effects on microtubule function through tubulin extraction and repair and strongly supports microtubule dynamics regulation through tubulin dimer exchange along the lattice.
title_zh: spastin 诱导的纳米损伤位点的微管蛋白通量调节微管救援频率和 EB1 寿命
abstract_zh: 通过提取微管蛋白亚基来切断酶纳米损伤微管。这种提取伴随着可溶性微管蛋白的自发修复。在这里，我们表明 GTP-，而不是 GDP-微管蛋白，优先掺入纳米损伤位点，在那里招募末端结合蛋白 1 (EB1)。使用 GTP 水解缺陷的重组微管蛋白突变体，我们发现微管蛋白 GTP 酶是修复位点 EB1 关联的计时器。微管蛋白的结合率控制着 spastin 催化的 GTP 岛的大小和寿命，从而促进救援。与此一致的是，首先，与不存在修复的情况不同，修复存在下的挽救率随微管蛋白浓度变化很大；其次，spastin催化的晶格重塑，而不是单独的酶的被动结合，增加了挽救率。此外，我们发现，当细胞中低水平过度表达时，spastin 会催化微管修复并影响微管生长。因此，在体外和细胞内，微管切断都是通过 GTP-微管蛋白修复中间体进行的。我们的工作表明，切断酶通过微管蛋白提取和修复对微管功能发挥作用，并通过沿着晶格的微管蛋白二聚体交换有力地支持微管动力学调节。

title: HHIP’s dynamic role in epithelial wound healing reveals a potential mechanism of COPD susceptibility
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Genetic variants near Hedgehog interacting protein (
                    HHIP
                    ) have been consistently associated with increased risk for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD), the third leading cause of death worldwide. However,
                    HHIP
                    ’s role in COPD pathogenesis remains elusive. Canonically, HHIP is a negative regulator of the Hedgehog pathway and downstream
                    GLI1
                    and
                    GLI2
                    activation. The Hedgehog pathway plays an important role in wound healing, specifically in activating transcription factors that drive the epithelial–mesenchymal transition (EMT), which in its intermediate state (partial EMT) is necessary for the collective movement of cells closing a wound. Herein, we use a systems biology approach to propose a mechanism to explain HHIP’s role in faulty epithelial wound healing, which could contribute to the development of emphysema, a key feature of COPD. Using two different Boolean models, we show dysfunctional HHIP results in a lack of negative feedback on GLI, triggering a full EMT, where cells become mesenchymal and do not properly close the wound. We validate these Boolean models with experimental evidence gathered from published scientific literature. Finally, we show evidence supporting our hypothesis in single-cell and single-nucleus RNA-Seq data from different COPD cohorts and
                    Hhip
                    heterozygous knockout mice. Overall, our analyses suggest that aberrant wound healing due to dysfunctional HHIP, combined with chronic epithelial damage through cigarette smoke exposure, may be a primary cause of COPD-associated emphysema.
title_zh: HHIP 在上皮伤口愈合中的动态作用揭示了 COPD 易感性的潜在机制

                    和
                    GLI2
                    激活。 Hedgehog 通路在伤口愈合中发挥着重要作用，特别是在激活驱动上皮间质转化 (EMT) 的转录因子方面发挥着重要作用，而处于中间状态（部分 EMT）的转录因子对于闭合伤口的细胞的集体运动是必需的。在此，我们使用系统生物学方法提出了一种机制来解释 HHIP 在上皮伤口愈合不良中的作用，这可能导致肺气肿的发展，这是慢性阻塞性肺病的一个关键特征。使用两种不同的布尔模型，我们发现功能失调的 HHIP 会导致 GLI 缺乏负反馈，从而触发完整的 EMT，其中细胞变成间质并且不能正确闭合伤口。我们使用从已发表的科学文献中收集的实验证据来验证这些布尔模型。最后，我们展示了来自不同 COPD 队列的单细胞和单核 RNA-Seq 数据支持我们假设的证据，
                    时髦
                    杂合基因敲除小鼠。总体而言，我们的分析表明，由于营养不良导致的伤口愈合异常

title: Meiosis-specific genes play roles in ploidy reduction in Cryptococcus neoformans titan cells
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Cryptococcus neoformans
                    is a fungal pathogen of humans that causes life-threatening meningoencephalitis. During infection, enlarged, polyploid titan cells are produced that promote persistence in the host, in part by resisting phagocytosis; under stress conditions, such as exposure to the antifungal drug fluconazole, titan cells can produce aneuploid or diploid, drug-resistant daughter cells. However, the mechanism underlying this ploidy reduction remains poorly understood. Interestingly, meiosis-related genes have been shown to be activated during
                    Cryptococcus
                    infection, leading us to hypothesize that the depolyploidization of
                    C. neoformans
                    titan cells may occur through a process resembling the ploidy reduction during meiosis. In this study, we show that titan cells developed from diploid strains predominantly produce diploid daughter cells with haploid daughters observed infrequently. We further demonstrate that meiosis-specific genes, including
                    DMC1
                    and
                    SPO11
                    , are critical for stable inheritance of a diploid genome in the daughter cells. Specifically, deletion of these genes in a heterozygous diploid background resulted in 1) titan cells with a significantly reduced capacity to produce daughter cells; 2) increased phenotypic variation among daughter cells produced by the titan cells, including traits that could be relevant to cell growth and viability; and 3) daughter cells produced by the titan cells exhibiting high levels of loss of heterozygosity (LOH) and aneuploidy, suggesting elevated genome instability. Taken together, these findings demonstrate the importance of meiosis-specific genes in the ploidy reduction process of titan cells derived from a heterozygous diploid background in an important human fungal pathogen.
title_zh: 减数分裂特异性基因在新型隐球菌泰坦细胞倍性减少中发挥作用
abstract_zh:
新型隐球菌
                    是一种人类真菌病原体，可引起危及生命的脑膜脑炎。在感染过程中，会产生增大的多倍体泰坦细胞，部分通过抵抗吞噬作用来促进在宿主体内的持久存在；在应激条件下，例如接触抗真菌药物氟康唑，泰坦细胞可以产生非整倍体或二倍体的耐药子细胞。然而，这种倍性减少的机制仍然知之甚少。有趣的是，减数分裂相关基因已被证明在减数分裂过程中被激活
                    隐球菌属
                    感染，使我们假设去多倍化
                    新型隐球菌
                    泰坦细胞可能通过类似于减数分裂期间倍性减少的过程发生。在这项研究中，我们表明，从二倍体菌株发育而来的泰坦细胞主要产生二倍体子细胞，而单倍体子细胞很少观察到。我们进一步证明减数分裂特异性基因，包括
                    DMC1
                    和
                    SPO11
                    ，对于子细胞中二倍体基因组的稳定遗传至关重要。具体来说，在杂合二倍体背景中删除这些基因会导致：1）泰坦细胞产生子细胞的能力显着降低； 2) 泰坦细胞产生的子细胞之间的表型变异增加，包括可能与细胞生长和活力相关的性状； 3) 山雀产生的子细胞

title: Ecological opportunity and the onset of polyploid niche expansion waves
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Polyploidy, the presence of more than two sets of chromosomes, has evolved many times across the tree of life, yet we still do not know why some polyploid lineages persist while most go extinct. The establishment of polyploid populations is often reported to be associated with harsh environmental conditions, and stress tolerance in particular, which has led to the widespread view that polyploidy-specific niche requirements are key to their persistence at ecological and evolutionary timescales. Here, we reevaluate this perspective using a classical mathematical model of polyploid establishment, presenting analytical and numerical results, along with an empirical case study. We show that simple eco-evolutionary processes at the margins of diploid range-expansion waves, more specifically ecological drift and dispersal limitation, can be sufficient to allow polyploid populations to carve out their own space, without any a priori adaptive advantage over their diploid ancestors. Our modeling effort reveals three key insights. First, polyploids most readily gain a foothold at the low-density front of a diploid range expansion wave, where ecological drift is strongest. Second, limited dispersal accelerates spatial clustering of polyploid organisms through assortative mating. Third, once spatially segregated along gradients, diploid and polyploid populations are expected to experience distinct environments, allowing natural selection to drive niche divergence. We illustrate these interconnected principles by simulating the phylogeographic history of a well-documented autopolyploid complex of
                    Neobatrachus,
                    Australian burrowing frogs. Altogether, our results provide a neutral baseline against which the ecological consequences of polyploidization can be more easily inferred within natural populations.
title_zh: 生态机遇和多倍体生态位扩张浪潮的开始
abstract_zh: 多倍体，即存在两组以上染色体的现象，在生命树中已经进化了很多次，但我们仍然不知道为什么一些多倍体谱系得以存在，而大多数却灭绝了。据报道，多倍体种群的建立通常与恶劣的环境条件有关，特别是与胁迫耐受性有关，这导致人们普遍认为多倍体特定的生态位要求是其在生态和进化时间尺度上持续存在的关键。在这里，我们使用多倍体建立的经典数学模型重新评估这一观点，提供分析和数值结果以及实证案例研究。我们表明，二倍体范围扩张波边缘的简单生态进化过程，更具体地说是生态漂移和扩散限制，足以让多倍体种群开拓出自己的空间，而不需要比其二倍体祖先有任何先验的适应性优势。我们的建模工作揭示了三个关键见解。首先，多倍体最容易在二倍体范围扩张波的低密度前沿站稳脚跟，那里的生态漂移最强。其次，有限的扩散通过选型交配加速了多倍体生物的空间聚集。第三，一旦沿着梯度在空间上分离，二倍体和多倍体种群预计将经历不同的环境，从而使自然选择驱动生态位分化。我们通过模拟有据可查的同源多倍体 c 的系统发育历史来说明这些相互关联的原理。

title: Epstein–Barr virus (EBV) infection causes human germinal center B cell–derived lymphomas in the absence of EBNA2 expression
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: EBV is associated with human B cell lymphomas, including Burkitt lymphomas (BLs), diffuse large B cell lymphomas (DLBCLs), Hodgkin lymphomas (HLs), and Plasmablastic lymphomas (PLs). EBV+ lymphomas in immunocompetent humans are usually derived from germinal center (GC)-experienced B cells and have stringent latency forms that do not express the viral transforming protein, EBNA2. Human EBV+ lymphomas that lack EBNA2 expression are largely driven by the viral LMP1 and LMP2A proteins, which activate NF-κB and B cell receptor-like signaling, respectively, or by Myc translocations. However, EBNA2 is required for EBV-mediated transformation of B cells in vitro and there is currently no model system for studying how EBV transforms human GC-derived B cells into lymphomas in vivo in the absence of EBNA2 expression or Myc translocation. Here, we show that human tonsil GC B cells (GCBs) infected with an EBNA2-deleted EBV mutant proliferate on a CD40L/IL21-expressing feeder layer and form lymphomas in NSG mice that resemble human DLBCLs (both ABC and GCB subtypes) and PLs. These EBV-induced lymphomas occur in the absence of Myc overexpression, often have normal karyotypes, and do not contain mutations in cellular genes (including p53) commonly mutated in uninfected human DLBCLs. Using this model system, we show that LMP2A induces plasmablast differentiation, increases expression of genes involved in lymphocyte mobility and trafficking and enhances tumor invasiveness in vivo. This new model system can thus be used to define roles of viral and cellular proteins in EBV-induced human GCB-derived lymphomas that lack EBNA2 expression.
title_zh: EB 病毒 (EBV) 感染在没有 EBNA2 表达的情况下会导致人类生发中心 B 细胞来源的淋巴瘤
abstract_zh: EBV 与人类 B 细胞淋巴瘤相关，包括伯基特淋巴瘤 (BL)、弥漫性大 B 细胞淋巴瘤 (DLBCL)、霍奇金淋巴瘤 (HL) 和浆母细胞淋巴瘤 (PL)。免疫功能正常的人类中的 EBV+ 淋巴瘤通常源自生发中心 (GC) 经历的 B 细胞，并且具有不表达病毒转化蛋白 EBNA2 的严格潜伏形式。缺乏 EBNA2 表达的人类 EBV+ 淋巴瘤很大程度上是由病毒 LMP1 和 LMP2A 蛋白驱动的，它们分别激活 NF-κB 和 B 细胞受体样信号传导，或由 Myc 易位驱动。然而，EBV 介导的 B 细胞体外转化需要 EBNA2，目前还没有模型系统来研究 EBV 如何在没有 EBNA2 表达或 Myc 易位的情况下将人 GC 衍生的 B 细胞体内转化为淋巴瘤。在这里，我们发现感染了 EBNA2 缺失的 EBV 突变体的人扁桃体 GCB 细胞 (GCB) 在表达 CD40L/IL21 的饲养层上增殖，并在 NSG 小鼠中形成类似于人 DLBCL（ABC 和 GCB 亚型）和 PL 的淋巴瘤。这些 EBV 诱导的淋巴瘤在 Myc 过度表达不存在的情况下发生，通常具有正常的核型，并且不包含未感染的人类 DLBCL 中常见的细胞基因突变（包括 p53）。使用该模型系统，我们证明LMP2A诱导浆母细胞分化，增加参与淋巴细胞迁移和运输的基因表达，并增强体内肿瘤侵袭性。因此，这个新的模型系统可用于定义病毒和细胞蛋白在 EBV 诱导的人类 GCB-d 中的作用

title: Harnessing polyploidy for climate-resilient crops: Lessons from the evolutionary model, allotetraploid cotton
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Escalating pressures of global climate change necessitate developing agricultural systems and crop varieties with enhanced resilience. Polyploidy, the state of possessing multiple complete sets of chromosomes arising from whole genome duplication (WGD), is a major evolutionary force in plants, often conferring novel genetic and regulatory capacities that facilitate adaptation. Allotetraploid cotton (
                    Gossypium
                    spp.), which formed through the merger of distinct A and D subgenomes approximately 1 to 1.6 Mya, is an exemplary model for elucidating polyploid genome evolution and molecular mechanisms underlying stress adaptation. Whereas combining divergent genomes introduces genetic novelty and hybrid vigor, long-term adaptive success and enhanced resilience rely on complex regulatory reprogramming subsequent to the merger event. In cotton, and by extension other polyploids, this reprogramming involves dynamic structural genomic rearrangements, functional diversification of duplicated genes, and pervasive alterations in epigenetic landscapes. These processes reshape transcriptional networks, leading to homoeologous expression bias and novel regulatory interactions. These polyploidy-specific phenomena underpin differential subgenome contributions to key developmental processes and adaptive responses to major abiotic stresses including drought, salinity, and extreme temperature. A comprehensive understanding of these interconnected genetic and epigenetic control mechanisms, the resulting landscape of subgenome coordination or independence, and associated physiological consequences, are essential for designing effective strategies to breed climate-resilient crops. Here, we synthesize current insights from cotton, emphasizing their broader significance for harnessing polyploidy as a tool for future crop improvement amid global environmental change.
title_zh: 利用多倍体培育气候适应型作物：进化模型的教训，异源四倍体棉花
abstract_zh:
全球气候变化压力不断升级，需要开发具有更强抵御能力的农业系统和作物品种。多倍体是指拥有由全基因组复制 (WGD) 产生的多套完整染色体的状态，是植物的主要进化力量，通常赋予新的遗传和调节能力，以促进适应。异源四倍体棉（
                    棉属
                    spp.）是通过大约 1 至 1.6 Mya 的不同 A 和 D 亚基因组合并而形成的，是阐明多倍体基因组进化和应激适应分子机制的示例性模型。虽然组合不同的基因组引入了遗传新颖性和混合活力，但长期的适应性成功和增强的弹性依赖于合并事件后复杂的监管重编程。在棉花以及其他多倍体中，这种重编程涉及动态结构基因组重排、重复基因的功能多样化以及表观遗传景观的普遍改变。这些过程重塑转录网络，导致同源表达偏差和新的调控相互作用。这些多倍体特异性现象支撑了不同亚基因组对关键发育过程的贡献以及对主要非生物胁迫（包括干旱、盐度和极端温度）的适应性反应。对这些相互关联的遗传和表观遗传控制机制的全面理解，由此产生的亚基因组协调或独立的景观，

title: Semantic knowledge guides innovation and drives cultural evolution
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Cultural evolution allows ideas and technologies to accumulate across generations, reaching their most complex and open-ended form in humans. While social learning enables the transmission of such innovations, the cognitive processes that generate them remain poorly understood. Classical theories typically treat innovation as random variation, a simplification insufficient for explaining the complexity of human cultural evolution. We propose that semantic knowledge—the associations linking concepts to their properties and functions—guides human innovation and drives cumulative culture. To test this, we combined an agent-based model, which examines how semantic knowledge shapes cultural evolutionary dynamics, with a large-scale behavioral experiment (N = 1,243) testing its role in human innovation. Across both approaches, we found that semantic knowledge directed exploration toward meaningful solutions, enhanced innovation success, and enabled generalization from prior discoveries. Moreover, semantic knowledge interacted synergistically with social learning to amplify innovation and accelerate cumulative cultural change. In contrast, experimental participants lacking access to semantic knowledge performed no better than chance, even when social learning was possible, and relied on shallow exploration strategies for innovation. Together, these findings suggest that semantic knowledge is a key cognitive process underpinning human cumulative culture.
title_zh: 语义知识引导创新、驱动文化演进
abstract_zh: 文化进化使得思想和技术能够代代相传，在人类中达到最复杂和开放的形式。虽然社会学习能够传播此类创新，但产生这些创新的认知过程仍然知之甚少。经典理论通常将创新视为随机变异，这种简化不足以解释人类文化进化的复杂性。我们提出语义知识——将概念与其属性和功能联系起来的关联——引导人类创新并驱动累积文化。为了测试这一点，我们将基于代理的模型与大规模行为实验（N = 1,243）结合起来，该模型检查语义知识如何塑造文化进化动态，以测试其在人类创新中的作用。在这两种方法中，我们发现语义知识将探索引导到有意义的解决方案，增强了创新的成功，并能够从先前的发现中进行概括。此外，语义知识与社会学习协同相互作用，以放大创新并加速累积的文化变革。相比之下，缺乏语义知识的实验参与者的表现并不比机会好，即使社会学习是可能的，并且依赖于浅层探索策略进行创新。总之，这些发现表明语义知识是支撑人类累积文化的关键认知过程。

title: Transition of the presynaptic vesicle cluster from a compact to dispersed organization during long-term potentiation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Long-term potentiation (LTP) is a lasting form of synaptic plasticity that can persist for hours or even days. It is associated with structural changes in both the presynaptic terminal and the postsynaptic spine. Presynaptically, the number and distribution of synaptic vesicles (SVs) affect synaptic efficacy. How the functional changes in synaptic efficacy after the induction of LTP are mirrored by identifiable structural alterations in the SV cluster is not fully understood. Here, we interrogated presynaptic terminals in 3DEM reconstructions from CA3-to-CA1 synapses in
                    stratum radiatum
                    of adult rats that had undergone control stimulation, or theta-burst stimulation to produce LTP. An increase was observed in the dispersion of SVs at 2 h after LTP induction. This dispersion resulted in greater distances between neighboring SVs, longer distances to the center of the SV cluster, and an increased variance in SV position relative to the cluster’s center. Analysis of the SV clusters distinguished terminals that were potentiated based on their degree of dispersion, distances to neighboring SVs, and SV cluster densities. Our analysis demonstrates that the density of SVs is a property independent of the bouton or SV cluster volumes and is subject to strong regulation. Comparing the spatial distribution of SVs to randomized distributions revealed increased SV mobility following LTP induction. Moreover, theoretical calculations informed by the measured SV cluster densities suggest an increase in the mobility of SVs within the cluster during LTP. These findings provide evidence that the SV cluster undergoes a transition from tight to dispersed, making SVs more mobile during LTP.
title_zh: 长时程增强期间突触前囊泡簇从致密组织向分散组织的转变
abstract_zh:
长时程增强（LTP）是突触可塑性的一种持久形式，可以持续数小时甚至数天。它与突触前末梢和突触后棘的结构变化有关。突触前，突触小泡（SV）的数量和分布影响突触功效。诱导 LTP 后突触功效的功能变化如何通过 SV 簇中可识别的结构变化来反映尚不完全清楚。在这里，我们在 3DEM 重建中询问了从 CA3 到 CA1 突触的突触前末梢
                    辐射层
                    成年大鼠接受控制刺激或 θ 爆发刺激以产生 LTP。 LTP 诱导后 2 小时观察到 SV 分散度增加。这种分散导致相邻 SV 之间的距离更大，到 SV 簇中心的距离更长，并且 SV 位置相对于簇中心的方差增加。对 SV 簇的分析根据其分散程度、与相邻 SV 的距离以及 SV 簇密度来区分增强的终端。我们的分析表明，SV 的密度是一个独立于 bouton 或 SV 簇体积的属性，并且受到严格的监管。将 SV 的空间分布与随机分布进行比较表明，LTP 诱导后 SV 的移动性增加。此外，根据测量的 SV 簇密度进行的理论计算表明，LTP 期间簇内 SV 的移动性有所增加

title: Genome-wide association mapping and targeted loss of function studies identify Shroom3 as a driver of hyperpolyploidy and ventricular dilation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Various states of cardiomyocyte (CM) polyploidy have been associated with cardiac injury responses, including regeneration and heart failure. However, our understanding of the comprehensive mechanisms governing CM ploidy and its relationship with heart physiology is limited. To address this issue and uncover genetic regulators, we surveyed CM ploidy across a new genetic resource known as the Hybrid Rat Diversity Panel (HRDP) and found significant variation in ploidy phenotypes across the panel. Using select rat strains with divergent displays of CM ploidy, we found that CM hyperpolyploidization (≥8 N) positively correlates with various physiological parameters, namely left ventricular dilation and reduced ejection fraction. Genome-wide association mapping identified several loci significantly associated with frequency of hyperpolyploid CMs. Investigation of genes harboring damaging protein coding variants within these loci identified enrichment of cytoarchitectural genes, of which the ACTIN-binding protein,
                    Shroom3
                    , was found to be strongly and specifically expressed in CMs and harbors 7 damaging protein coding variants. CM-specific deletion of
                    Shroom3
                    resulted in increased hyperpolyploidization and left ventricular dilation with reduced ejection fraction. Furthermore, functional characterization of single-nucleotide variants resulting in amino acid changes within SHROOM3 confirmed two protein coding variants that disrupted SHROOM3–ACTIN interaction and led to altered expression of genes involved in DNA replication. This study elucidates the genetic determinants of CM ploidy phenotypes and solidifies a correlative relationship between CM ploidy and left ventricular function. Importantly, CM intrinsic expression of at least one gene mapped in this study,
                    Shroom3
                    , is confirmed to regulate CM hyperpolyploidization and cardiac function.
title_zh: 全基因组关联图谱和靶向功能丧失研究确定 Shroom3 是超多倍体和心室扩张的驱动因素
abstract_zh:
心肌细胞（CM）多倍体的各种状态与心脏损伤反应相关，包括再生和心力衰竭。然而，我们对控制 CM 倍性的综合机制及其与心脏生理学的关系的理解是有限的。为了解决这个问题并揭示遗传调节因子，我们调查了一种称为杂交大鼠多样性面板 (HRDP) 的新遗传资源中的 CM 倍性，并发现整个面板中倍性表型的显着变化。使用具有不同 CM 倍性表现的精选大鼠品系，我们发现 CM 超多倍化（≥8 N）与各种生理参数（即左心室扩张和射血分数降低）呈正相关。全基因组关联图谱确定了几个与超多倍体 CM 频率显着相关的位点。对这些位点内含有破坏性蛋白质编码变异的基因的研究发现了细胞结构基因的富集，其中肌动蛋白结合蛋白，
                    蘑菇3
                    ，被发现在 CM 中强烈且特异地表达，并含有 7 种破坏性的蛋白质编码变体。 CM 特定的删除
                    蘑菇3
                    导致超多倍化增加和左心室扩张，射血分数降低。此外，导致SHROOM3内氨基酸变化的单核苷酸变体的功能表征证实了两种蛋白质编码变体破坏了SHROOM3-肌动蛋白相互作用并导致相关基因表达的改变

title: Navigating high-order protein fitness landscapes via deep learning on directed evolution trajectories
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Accurately predicting the fitness effects of high-order mutations is a grand challenge in understanding and engineering proteins. Existing models, including pretrained protein language models, struggle to capture the multiresidue interactions that govern these effects. Here, we introduce DENet, a deep learning framework that harnesses the rich comutation information within directed evolution (DE) trajectories to reconstruct high-resolution fitness landscapes for deciphering and engineering of complex protein variants. Applied to the cancer target KRAS, DENet-guided screening systematically identified high-order mutants with potent activities and uncovered hidden allosteric mechanisms. For MEK1, DENet nominated complex variants with >1,000-fold increased drug resistance, revealed synergistic tail mutations, and retrospectively identified over 75% of known clinical mutations, largely outperforming existing models. To broaden the framework’s applicability, we developed an in silico strategy that simulates directed evolution to infer comutation information from widely available single-mutant datasets. DENet provides a quantitative framework for navigating complex fitness landscapes, uniting the rational engineering of multimutation proteins with the elucidation of their mechanisms and clinical implications.
title_zh: 通过定向进化轨迹的深度学习探索高阶蛋白质适应性景观
abstract_zh: 准确预测高阶突变的适应性效应是理解和工程蛋白质的巨大挑战。现有模型，包括预训练的蛋白质语言模型，很难捕获控制这些效应的多残基相互作用。在这里，我们介绍 DENet，这是一个深度学习框架，它利用定向进化 (DE) 轨迹内丰富的交换信息来重建高分辨率的适应度景观，以破译和设计复杂的蛋白质变体。应用于癌症靶标 KRAS 时，DENet 引导的筛选系统地鉴定了具有有效活性的高阶突变体，并揭示了隐藏的变构机制。对于 MEK1，DENet 提名了耐药性增加超过 1,000 倍的复杂变异，揭示了协同尾部突变，并回顾性鉴定了超过 75% 的已知临床突变，很大程度上优于现有模型。为了扩大该框架的适用性，我们开发了一种计算机策略，该策略模拟定向进化，以从广泛可用的单突变数据集中推断交换信息。 DENet 为导航复杂的适应性景观提供了一个定量框架，将多突变蛋白的合理工程与其机制和临床意义的阐明结合起来。

title: Epithelial cell fusion is required for tissue repair following UV-A irradiation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Cell cycle–dependent and independent mechanisms lead to the generation of mononucleated and multinucleated polyploid cells. The more than doubling of a cell’s nuclear genome by endoreplication has been found to be an adaptation to genotoxic stress, enabling cell survival despite DNA damage. However, it remains unknown whether cells that increase ploidy via multinucleation also arise in response to genotoxic stress. Here, we use ultraviolet light A (UV-A) to induce permanent DNA damage in cells within the adult fruit fly epithelium. UV-A irradiation causes an injury-like response where giant multinucleated, polyploid cells arise following cell death. The epithelial cells undergo endoreplication, which is required to compensate for cell loss, but is surprisingly dispensable for tissue repair. UV-A irradiation also induces cell fusion, which generates multinucleated cells that encompass almost the entire epithelial area post injury. Cell fusion can be inhibited by expression of a dominant negative Rac or Cdc42 GTPase, which then blocks epithelial tissue repair postirradiation. Apoptotic nuclei were detected at the site of cell junction breakdown, suggesting that apoptosis itself or an apoptotic signal is required for polyploidization in this model. Expression of the effector caspase inhibitor, p35, led to inhibition of apoptosis, the endocycle, and cell fusion post UV-A. Therefore, we have found that caspase activation is necessary for polyploidization post injury and enhancing cell ploidy via multinucleation is another strategy to enable cell survival and tissue repair following genotoxic stress.
title_zh: UV-A 照射后组织修复需要上皮细胞融合
abstract_zh: 细胞周期依赖性和独立机制导致单核和多核多倍体细胞的产生。人们发现，细胞核基因组通过内复制而增加一倍以上是对基因毒性应激的适应，使细胞在 DNA 损伤的情况下仍能存活。然而，目前尚不清楚通过多核增加倍性的细胞是否也会响应基因毒性应激而出现。在这里，我们使用紫外线 A (UV-A) 来诱导成年果蝇上皮细胞内的永久性 DNA 损伤。 UV-A 照射会引起类似损伤的反应，细胞死亡后会出现巨大的多核、多倍体细胞。上皮细胞进行内复制，这是补偿细胞损失所必需的，但令人惊讶的是，这对于组织修复来说是可有可无的。 UV-A 照射还会诱导细胞融合，从而产生多核细胞，几乎覆盖损伤后的整个上皮区域。显性失活 Rac 或 Cdc42 GTPase 的表达可抑制细胞融合，从而阻止辐射后上皮组织修复。在细胞连接破坏的部位检测到凋亡细胞核，表明该模型中的多倍体化需要细胞凋亡本身或细胞凋亡信号。效应 caspase 抑制剂 p35 的表达导致 UV-A 后细胞凋亡、内循环和细胞融合的抑制。因此，我们发现半胱天冬酶激活对于损伤后的多倍化是必要的，并且通过多核增强细胞倍性是使细胞存活和组织修复的另一种策略

title: Polyploidy: A macromutational force pushing bioeconomic developments
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Polyploidization, the consequence of genome doubling, is a macromutation that reshapes genomes, phenotypes, and ecological interactions. Polyploidization often results in novel phenotypes, including alterations in size, physiology, biochemistry, and enhanced stress tolerance. Here, we discuss how strategically leveraging polyploidy can provide significant advancements within the modern bioeconomy committed to reducing our ecological footprint through the sustainable production and use of biological resources. The bioeconomy spans diverse sectors, including agriculture, health sciences, and biotechnology. By elucidating and leveraging the immediate, or short-term, effects of polyploidization, such as harnessing genetic diversity, extensive biomass production, diversification of metabolites, and improved stress resilience, we highlight how this process unlocks vast, underexplored bioeconomic opportunities. This includes accelerating the exploration of new breeding techniques, speeding up the domestication of new local varieties or medicinal plants, and offering possibilities for improved biofuel production, bioremediation strategies, therapies, and production and discovery of bioactive compounds. The multilayered effects of polyploidization shared across sectors can foster interdisciplinary exchange and are essential for advancing toward a more sustainable bioeconomy.
title_zh: 多倍体：推动生物经济发展的宏观突变力量
abstract_zh: 多倍化是基因组加倍的结果，是一种重塑基因组、表型和生态相互作用的大突变。多倍化通常会产生新的表型，包括大小、生理学、生物化学的改变和增强的应激耐受性。在这里，我们讨论如何战略性地利用多倍体在现代生物经济中提供重大进步，致力于通过生物资源的可持续生产和使用来减少我们的生态足迹。生物经济跨越多个领域，包括农业、健康科学和生物技术。通过阐明和利用多倍化的直接或短期影响，例如利用遗传多样性、广泛的生物量生产、代谢物多样化和提高抗压能力，我们强调了这一过程如何释放巨大的、尚未开发的生物经济机会。这包括加快探索新的育种技术，加快本地新品种或药用植物的驯化，并为改进生物燃料生产、生物修复策略、疗法以及生物活性化合物的生产和发现提供可能性。跨部门共享的多倍体化的多层效应可以促进跨学科交流，对于推进更可持续的生物经济至关重要。

title: Genome evolution through polyploidy: Enhancing plant stress resilience in agriculture
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Polyploidy, also known as whole genome duplication, is a major evolutionary force in plants, driving diversification and the generation of novel phenotypic variation, including superior abiotic and biotic stress tolerance. The enhanced stress resilience observed in certain polyploids is hypothesized to arise from dynamic epigenetic and genetic changes, including variations in gene content and cis-regulatory elements (CREs), that emerge following polyploidization. These changes directly impact various regulatory, signaling, and metabolic pathways associated with stress response and adaptation. Within polyploid populations, processes like gene duplications, fractionation, and homoeologous exchanges actively shape novel gene content variation, while, simultaneously, alterations in CREs (DNA sequences controlling gene expression) lead to diverse regulatory patterns. This dynamic interplay between changes in gene content and regulation further contributes to expanded phenotypic variation, including enhanced stress resilience. We discuss how advanced genomic and epigenomic techniques, such as pangenomics and single-cell assay for transposase-accessible chromatin with sequencing, are used to uncover these variations and outline new bioinformatic approaches to reveal the underlying genetics of stress resilience and adaptation. Finally, we summarize what remains poorly understood to guide future research, with the goal of unlocking the full potential for enhancing resilience in polyploid crops.
title_zh: 通过多倍体进行基因组进化：增强农业中植物的抗逆能力
abstract_zh: 多倍体，也称为全基因组复制，是植物的主要进化力量，推动多样化和新表型变异的产生，包括卓越的非生物和生物胁迫耐受性。假设在某些多倍体中观察到的应激恢复能力增强是由于多倍体化后出现的动态表观遗传和遗传变化，包括基因内容和顺式调控元件（CRE）的变化。这些变化直接影响与应激反应和适应相关的各种调节、信号传导和代谢途径。在多倍体群体中，基因复制、分级分离和同源交换等过程积极塑造新的基因内容变异，同时，CRE（控制基因表达的 DNA 序列）的改变导致不同的调控模式。基因内容变化和调控之间的这种动态相互作用进一步扩大了表型变异，包括增强的应激恢复能力。我们讨论如何使用先进的基因组和表观基因组技术（例如泛基因组学和转座酶可及染色质测序的单细胞测定）来揭示这些变异，并概述新的生物信息学方法来揭示应激恢复和适应的潜在遗传学。最后，我们总结了仍知之甚少的内容，以指导未来的研究，目标是释放增强多倍体作物恢复能力的全部潜力。

title: Growth under pressure: The pros and cons of polyploidy induced by stress
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: In native environments, organisms are faced with an array of acute or chronic stresses. These stresses include toxins, pathogens, and physical injury. An increasingly recognized response to diverse stresses is whole genome doubling or polyploidy. This transformative cellular property alters genome integrity, cellular structure, and tissue architecture. Whether polyploidy is a positive, negative, or neutral outcome of a stress is a current topic of investigation in numerous contexts including during fungal infection of plants and animals, during regeneration of wounded tissues, and in human diseases such as cancer. In this review, we highlight the wide range of stresses that promote polyploidy in fungal, plant, and animal contexts. Specifically, we highlight major mechanisms that lead to stress-induced polyploidy within somatic or germline tissues through alteration of the cell cycle. We discuss the impact of such stress-induced polyploidy on genomes, cells, and tissues and emphasize commonalities across organisms and biological scales. A common theme that has emerged is that polyploidy facilitates numerous subsequent genomic and cellular changes following abrupt stresses, and these changes can impact tissue architecture and function.
title_zh: 压力下的生长：压力诱导的多倍体的利与弊
abstract_zh: 在原生环境中，生物体面临着一系列急性或慢性应激。这些压力包括毒素、病原体和身体伤害。越来越多的人认识到对不同压力的反应是全基因组加倍或多倍体。这种变革性的细胞特性改变了基因组完整性、细胞结构和组织结构。多倍体是否是应激的积极、消极或中性结果是当前在许多情况下研究的主题，包括植物和动物的真菌感染过程中、受伤组织的再生过程中以及癌症等人类疾病中。在这篇综述中，我们强调了在真菌、植物和动物环境中促进多倍体的广泛胁迫。具体来说，我们强调了通过细胞周期的改变导致体细胞或种系组织内应激诱导的多倍体的主要机制。我们讨论了这种应激诱导的多倍体对基因组、细胞和组织的影响，并强调了生物体和生物尺度上的共性。出现的一个共同主题是，多倍体在突然的应激后促进了许多后续的基因组和细胞变化，并且这些变化可以影响组织结构和功能。

title: A negative-hydrated constriction zone is revealed in the active state of the Hv1 channel
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
The voltage-gated proton (H
                    v
                    1) channel is crucial in regulating cellular pH, yet the mechanism underlying proton permeation remains controversial. A deeper understanding of the differences between the channel’s active and resting states is essential for clarifying its conductive properties. In this study, we employ a combination of molecular dynamics simulations, site-directed mutagenesis, and electrophysiological recordings to investigate what changes occur in an active H
                    v
                    1 channel and how these changes influence conduction properties in the wild-type (WT) channel, a low-conducting N264R mutant, and a superconductive N264E mutant. Our findings reveal that in the active state, interactions are weakened between the selectivity filter, aspartate D160, and the third arginine in the S4 transmembrane segment. This results in a more negatively charged and hydrated environment, which enables proton transport in the WT and N264E channels. Notably, these conformational changes are absent in the N264R mutant. Additionally, our simulations predict—and osmotic shock experiments in oocytes confirm—that an active H
                    v
                    1 channel can facilitate water permeation. These observations suggest that water conduction occurs as a byproduct of a more dilated and hydrated pathway. We introduce a methodological approach to studying H
                    v
                    1 by utilizing water permeation as a functional readout. Collectively, our results provide insights into the structural rearrangements of the H
                    v
                    1 constriction zone, shedding light on how its resting and active configurations govern proton conduction.
title_zh: Hv1 通道活跃状态下显示出负水合收缩区
abstract_zh:
电压门控质子 (H

                    v

                    v

title: Social interactions in isolated, confined, and extreme environments: A study of Antarctic winter teams using wearable sensors
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Long-duration space missions expose crews to extreme psychological and social stressors due to prolonged isolation and confinement. To examine how such conditions impact individual and team functioning, we studied a 10-mo Antarctic overwintering mission at Concordia Station, an analog for spaceflight, using self-report measures and wearable proximity sensors. Twelve crew members were assessed at four time-points. Results revealed a progressive increase in feelings of loneliness and conflict, while cohesion and individual performance declined. Close-range interactions were positively associated with conflicts and paranoid thoughts and negatively related with individual performance, suggesting that more frequent contact did not equate to social support. Social interactions became increasingly clustered within national groups, highlighting the risk of social fragmentation and crew polarization. The use of wearable sensors proved feasible for long-term use in extreme environments. These findings underscore the importance of monitoring psychosocial functioning during extended missions and suggest that close confinement, rather than isolation alone, may trigger interpersonal strain.
title_zh: 孤立、有限和极端环境中的社交互动：使用可穿戴传感器对南极冬季团队进行的研究
abstract_zh: 由于长期的隔离和限制，长时间的太空任务使宇航员面临极端的心理和社会压力。为了研究这些条件如何影响个人和团队的运作，我们使用自我报告测量和可穿戴接近传感器，研究了康科迪亚站（Concordia Station）为期 10 个月的南极越冬任务，该站是太空飞行的模拟。十二名船员在四个时间点接受了评估。结果显示，孤独感和冲突感逐渐增加，而凝聚力和个人表现则下降。近距离互动与冲突和偏执想法呈正相关，与个人表现呈负相关，这表明更频繁的接触并不等于社会支持。社会互动日益集中在国家群体内，凸显了社会分裂和船员两极分化的风险。事实证明，可穿戴传感器的使用在极端环境下长期使用是可行的。这些发现强调了在长期执行任务期间监测心理社会功能的重要性，并表明封闭的监禁而不是单独的隔离可能会引发人际紧张。

title: Blindness to minority absence
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Our cognitive processes are largely shaped by what is present in our environment, while absences are often overlooked. This fundamental tendency of the human mind can lead to a significant social bias: individuals frequently fail to notice the absence of minority groups, even in situations where that absence is meaningful and consequential (e.g., educational settings, workplaces). In three preregistered field studies conducted across two cultures, we found robust evidence for blindness to minority absence. Our findings reveal that this blindness can persist for years, even among individuals who, once the absence is pointed out, acknowledge its significance and the need to address it. Eight preregistered laboratory experiments confirm that people are unlikely to detect the absence of a minority group. As our results indicate, people are more likely to notice the presence of a single minority member than the group’s complete absence. In contrast, the absence of majority group members is far more noticeable. These patterns emerge even when monetary incentives for accuracy are introduced, regardless of participants’ ideologies or social attitudes, and are evident even among individuals from minority groups. The final experiment suggests that highlighting an overlooked minority absence leads to higher stated support for diversity-promoting policies. Taken together, our findings suggest that basic cognitive constraints bias what people spontaneously notice in social environments: minority absences often go unnoticed, while majority absences and minority presences are more readily perceived. We propose that this bias may present a significant barrier to fostering inclusive social environments.
title_zh: 对少数群体缺席视而不见
abstract_zh: 我们的认知过程很大程度上取决于我们环境中存在的事物，而缺席的事物常常被忽视。人类思维的这种基本倾向可能会导致严重的社会偏见：个人经常无法注意到少数群体的缺席，即使是在这种缺席是有意义和后果性的情况下（例如，教育环境、工作场所）。在跨两种文化进行的三项预先登记的实地研究中，我们发现了对少数族裔缺席视而不见的有力证据。我们的研究结果表明，这种失明现象可能会持续数年，即使是在那些一旦被指出这种失明、承认其重要性并需要解决它的人中也是如此。八项预先注册的实验室实验证实，人们不太可能察觉到少数群体的存在。正如我们的结果表明，人们更有可能注意到单个少数族裔成员的存在，而不是该群体的完全缺席。相比之下，多数群体成员的缺席更为明显。即使为了准确性而引入金钱激励，这些模式也会出现，无论参与者的意识形态或社会态度如何，甚至在少数群体的个体中也很明显。最终的实验表明，强调被忽视的少数群体缺席会导致对促进多样性政策的更高程度的支持。综上所述，我们的研究结果表明，基本的认知限制会影响人们在社会环境中自发注意到的事物：少数人的缺席常常被忽视，而大多数人的缺席和少数人的存在更容易被注意到

title: Aging increases the cortical resources allocated to static balance maintenance
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Maintaining balance requires a complex interplay between sensory and motor processes, and this ability deteriorates with age, impairing daily life activities and contributes to increased fall risks. Importantly, while cognitive-motor interference paradigms suggest an aging-related increase in the cortical involvement in balance regulation, direct evidence remains lacking. To clarify this issue, we assessed the effect of aging on sway-based corticokinematic coherence (CKC), which is a measure of the coupling between cortical electrophysiological signals and postural sway. To that end, we recorded the center-of-pressure fluctuations and electroencephalographic cortical activity of 64 young and 67 older healthy participants performing balance tasks during which sensory information was either removed or altered. We found that older adults showed increased cortical activity that appears to relate to different aspects of closed loop postural control during challenging balance conditions, and correlates with upright stance stability. They also showed increased delays between cortical activity and postural sway, indicative of slower central processing speed. Finally, despite the older cohort displaying significantly altered vestibulo-ocular reflexes, no relationship was found with CKC strength. Overall, our results provide direct evidence that cortical involvement in balance regulation increases with aging. They suggest the feasibility of assessing afferent and efferent processing during balance maintenance, paving the way for studies identifying neurophysiological determinants of fall risks.
title_zh: 衰老增加了分配给静态平衡维持的皮质资源
abstract_zh: 保持平衡需要感觉和运动过程之间复杂的相互作用，这种能力随着年龄的增长而退化，损害日常生活活动并导致跌倒风险增加。重要的是，虽然认知运动干扰范式表明与衰老相关的皮质参与平衡调节的增加，但仍然缺乏直接证据。为了澄清这个问题，我们评估了衰老对基于摇摆的皮质运动相干性（CKC）的影响，CKC 是皮层电生理信号与姿势摇摆之间耦合的度量。为此，我们记录了 64 名年轻健康参与者和 67 名老年健康参与者的压力中心波动和脑电图皮层活动，这些参与者执行平衡任务，在此期间感觉信息被删除或改变。我们发现，老年人表现出增加的皮质活动，这似乎与具有挑战性的平衡条件下闭环姿势控制的不同方面有关，并且与直立姿势稳定性相关。他们还表现出皮质活动和姿势摇摆之间的延迟增加，表明中央处理速度较慢。最后，尽管老年群体表现出显着改变的前庭眼反射，但未发现与 CKC 强度的关系。总体而言，我们的结果提供了直接证据，表明皮质对平衡调节的参与随着年龄的增长而增加。他们提出了在平衡维持过程中评估传入和传出处理的可行性，为识别神经生理学决定因素的研究铺平了道路。

title: Atomic layer-deposited nucleation layers to control zinc morphology and suppress hydrogen evolution
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Aqueous zinc (Zn) batteries are among the most promising candidates for safe, low-cost, and sustainable grid-scale energy storage. However, their practical application is significantly constrained by inhomogeneous Zn electrodeposition and the competitive hydrogen evolution reaction (HER). Here, we introduce an electrodeposition architecture to mitigate these challenges. Using atomic layer deposition, we coat the copper current collector with ZnO and Al
                    2
                    O
                    3
                    nanofilms—positioned below the plated Zn. Our strategy marks a significant departure from previous works in which thin films are situated above Zn foil to function as artificial solid electrolyte interphases. Notably, we achieve substantial performance improvements with our 2-nm-thick ZnO coatings, including long cycle life (>1,400 cycles) and high Coulombic efficiencies (>99.8%). Our mechanistic investigation suggests that these improvements arise from HER suppression and controlled Zn morphology. This work offers an interface engineering approach to fundamentally understand Zn nucleation and growth processes. We anticipate that our electrodeposition architecture could be applied to enhance the cyclability of other aqueous battery systems.
title_zh: 原子层沉积成核层可控制锌形态并抑制析氢
abstract_zh:

                    2
                    氧
                    3
                    纳米膜——位于镀锌下方。我们的策略与之前的工作显着不同，在之前的工作中，薄膜位于锌箔上方，充当人造固体电解质界面。值得注意的是，我们利用 2 纳米厚的 ZnO 涂层实现了显着的性能改进，包括长循环寿命（>1,400 次循环）和高库仑效率（>99.8%）。我们的机制研究表明，这些改进源于 HER 抑制和控制 Zn 形态。这项工作提供了一种界面工程方法，可以从根本上理解锌的成核和生长过程。我们预计我们的电沉积架构可用于增强其他水系电池系统的循环性能。

title: China’s one-child policy amplifies intergenerational inequality via enlarged differential fertility
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Using the staggered rollout of China’s one-child policy (OCP) across provinces and birth cohorts as a quasi-natural experiment, we demonstrate that differential fertility between richer and poorer households exacerbates intergenerational income inequality. Rural/poorer families, who are less constrained by the OCP than their urban/richer counterparts, tend to have more children but invest less in each child’s human capital. This reduction in mobility is primarily driven by the rising economic status of children born to urban/wealthier families. Our estimates suggest that the OCP accounts for approximately 25% of the observed decline in intergenerational income mobility in China and thus highlight a demographic channel through which economic inequality persists across generations.
title_zh: 中国的一胎政策通过扩大生育率差异加剧了代际不平等
abstract_zh: 我们利用中国跨省份和出生群体错开的独生子女政策（OCP）作为一项准自然实验，证明富裕家庭和贫困家庭之间的生育率差异加剧了代际收入不平等。与城市/富裕家庭相比，农村/贫困家庭受 OCP 的限制较少，往往会生育更多孩子，但对每个孩子的人力资本投资较少。流动性的减少主要是由于城市/富裕家庭所生儿童的经济地位不断提高所致。我们的估计表明，OCP 约占中国观察到的代际收入流动性下降的 25%，从而凸显了经济不平等跨代持续存在的人口渠道。

title: Plug-and-play assembly of biodegradable ionizable lipids for potent mRNA delivery and gene editing in vivo
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: mRNA-based gene editing therapeutics offer the potential to permanently cure diseases but are hindered by suboptimal delivery platforms. Here, we devise a robust combinatorial chemistry for the plug-and-play assembly of structurally diverse biodegradable ionizable lipids from amines/thiols and dialkyl maleates. After screening 500 ionizable lipids, we obtained structure−activity relationships essential for effective in vitro mRNA delivery with the help of machine learning. Furthermore, we identified a lead ionizable lipid candidate that produced potent lipid nanoparticles for the delivery of various gene editing tools in wild-type and genetically modified mice compared to literature and industry benchmark lipid nanoparticles. Mechanistically, our lipid nanoparticles show favorable physicochemical properties, which could synergistically contribute to the superior delivery performance. This study highlights the utility of this synthetic method as well as the generality of this platform for potent in vivo gene editing.
title_zh: 即插即用组装可生物降解的可电离脂质，用于体内有效的 mRNA 传递和基因编辑
abstract_zh: 基于 mRNA 的基因编辑疗法提供了永久治愈疾病的潜力，但受到次优递送平台的阻碍。在这里，我们设计了一种强大的组合化学，用于即插即用地组装来自胺/硫醇和马来酸二烷基酯的结构多样的可生物降解的可电离脂质。在筛选了 500 种可电离脂质后，我们借助机器学习获得了有效体外 mRNA 传递所必需的结构-活性关系。此外，我们还发现了一种领先的可电离脂质候选物，与文献和行业基准脂质纳米颗粒相比，它可以产生有效的脂质纳米颗粒，用于在野生型和转基因小鼠中传递各种基因编辑工具。从机制上讲，我们的脂质纳米颗粒表现出良好的理化性质，这可以协同促进卓越的递送性能。这项研究强调了这种合成方法的实用性以及该平台在有效体内基因编辑方面的通用性。
