title: Br‐Mediated Pd Catalysis Promotes Intermediates Stabilization and Coupling for Anodic Electrosynthesis of Dimethyl Carbonate
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Electrosynthesis of dimethyl carbonate (DMC) from methanol (MeOH) and CO on a Pd‐based catalyst has shown high selectivity; however, most of the corresponding total current densities (
                    j
                    total
                    ) are still too small to support industrial applications. In this study, we built a Pd‐Br electrocatalytic system in a flow cell to produce DMC with both high selectivity and high reaction rate. Remarkably, up to 89.4% of the DMC Faradaic efficiency (FE
                    DMC
                    ) was achieved at
                    j
                    total
                    of 100 mA cm
                    −2
                    . Mechanism studies suggest that the in situ generation of active sites with a proper distribution of Br‐modified Pd(I) sites and PdBr
                    2
                    for the coadsorption of CO and MeOH is vital for this reactivity. Under Br mediation, the excessive formation of high‐valence Pd species was inhibited, while the DMC formation was substantially facilitated in thermodynamic terms. These findings shed vital methodological and mechanistic insights for developing efficacious electrocatalytic systems for DMC synthesis.
title_zh: Br介导的Pd催化促进阳极电合成碳酸二甲酯的中间体稳定和偶联
abstract_zh:

                    在 Pd 基催化剂上由甲醇 (MeOH) 和 CO 电合成碳酸二甲酯 (DMC) 显示出高选择性；然而，大多数相应的总电流密度（

                    总计
                    ）仍然太小，无法支持工业应用。在这项研究中，我们在流动池中构建了 Pd-Br 电催化系统，以高选择性和高反应速率生产 DMC。值得注意的是，高达 89.4% 的 DMC 法拉第效率 (FE
                    DMC
                    ）实现于
                    j
                    总计
                    100 mA·cm
                    −2
                    。机制研究表明，原位生成具有适当分布的 Br 修饰的 Pd(I) 位点和 PdBr 的活性位点
                    2
                    CO 和 MeOH 的共吸附对于这种反应至关重要。在 Br 介导下，高价 Pd 物质的过度形成受到抑制，而从热力学角度来看，DMC 的形成则大大促进。这些发现为开发有效的 DMC 合成电催化系统提供了重要的方法论和机制见解。

title: Meso‐Strap Engineering of Aromaticity Redistribution in Porphyrinoids
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Porphyrins possess one of the most robust aromatic circuits in chemistry, and even highly distorted derivatives preserve the intrinsic [18]π aromatic framework. Here we demonstrate that
                    meso
                    ‐strap engineering can override this intrinsic stability and induce controllable aromaticity redistribution within porphyrinoid networks. Systematic installation of tripyrrin‐, 1,8‐dipyrrylcarbazole‐, and tetrapyrrolic straps reveals that short straps impose severe geometric strain that collapses the central [18] porphyrin aromatic circuit, generating alternative aromatic subunits or nonaromatic cores. In contrast, elongation to a tetrapyrrolic linker preserves the porphyrin aromaticity even in doubly bridged architectures. Structural, spectroscopic, and computational analyses collectively reveal that the intrinsic balance between strain energy and aromatic stabilization governs the fate of conjugation in these systems. These findings establish
                    meso
                    ‐strap engineering as a predictive design principle for controlling aromaticity redistribution in porphyrinoids and related π‐conjugated macrocycles.
title_zh: 卟啉类化合物芳香性重新分布的介观带工程
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    卟啉拥有化学中最强大的芳香回路之一，甚至高度扭曲的衍生物也保留了固有的[18]π芳香框架。在这里我们证明
                    细观
                    ‐带工程可以超越这种内在稳定性，并在卟啉网络内诱导可控的芳香性重新分布。三吡啉、1,8-二吡咯咔唑和四吡咯带的系统安装表明，短带会施加严重的几何应变，使中心[18]卟啉芳香回路崩溃，产生替代的芳香亚基或非芳香核。相比之下，即使在双桥结构中，延伸至四吡咯连接体也保留了卟啉芳香性。结构、光谱和计算分析共同表明，应变能和芳香稳定之间的内在平衡决定了这些系统中共轭的命运。这些发现确立了
                    细观
                    ‐带工程作为控制卟啉类化合物和相关π共轭大环化合物芳香性重新分布的预测设计原理。

title: Mechanically Regulated Nanozymes for Remote Metabolic Reprogramming and Precise Cancer Therapy
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Mechanoenzymes, featuring catalytic activity controlled by mechanical stimuli, play key roles in maintaining metabolic order and cellular homeostasis. However, artificial nanozymes with strict spatiotemporal regulation are still rare, limiting their effectiveness in complex biological environments. Here, we introduce a mechanically regulated nanozyme (MRNZ) by integrating mechano‐responsive ferrocene (Fc) units into a flexible framework. Similar to natural enzymatic activation, acoustic shear forces cause sub‐nanostructural transformations of Fc units, leading to decreased electron density and reduced steric hindrance at Fe active sites, reinforcing metabolic peroxidase (POD)‐like activity. This mechanical activation enables precise modulation of metabolic reprogramming by controlled generation of low‐dose hydroxyl radicals (•OH) as second messengers, improving stem cells resilience to oxidative stress for safer and more effective therapeutic interventions. Using this mechanically regulated method, we encapsulated glucose oxidase (GOx) inside hollow MRNZ to create a multienzyme regulated nanoreactor (MRNZ@GOx) that orchestrates a cascade GOx‐POD reaction under ultrasound stimulation. Such a cascade reactive oxygen species generation in tumor microenvironments potentiates chemodynamic therapy combined with immune activation. Our work introduces a mechanically responsive strategy for regulating nanozyme activity, expanding the horizons of next‐generation remote and smart catalytic technologies for precise disease treatments.
title_zh: 用于远程代谢重编程和精确癌症治疗的机械调控纳米酶
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  机械酶具有受机械刺激控制的催化活性，在维持代谢秩序和细胞稳态方面发挥着关键作用。然而，具有严格时空调控的人工纳米酶仍然很少，限制了它们在复杂生物环境中的有效性。在这里，我们通过将机械响应二茂铁（Fc）单元集成到灵活的框架中，引入了机械调节纳米酶（MRNZ）。与自然酶促激活类似，声剪切力会引起 Fc 单元的亚纳米结构转变，导致 Fe 活性位点的电子密度降低和空间位阻减少，从而增强代谢过氧化物酶 (POD) 样活性。这种机械激活能够通过控制产生作为第二信使的低剂量羟基自由基（·OH）来精确调节代谢重编程，从而提高干细胞对氧化应激的抵抗力，从而实现更安全、更有效的治疗干预。使用这种机械调节方法，我们将葡萄糖氧化酶（GOx）封装在空心 MRNZ 内，以创建多酶调节纳米反应器（MRNZ@GOx），该反应器在超声刺激下协调级联 GOx-POD 反应。肿瘤微环境中这种级联活性氧的产生增强了与免疫激活相结合的化学动力学治疗。我们的工作引入了一种调节纳米酶活性的机械响应策略，扩大了用于精确疾病治疗的下一代远程和智能催化技术的视野。

title: Nature‐Inspired Organic–Inorganic Hybridization Enables High‐Temperature and Multicolor Organic Phosphorescence
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Organic room‐temperature phosphorescence (RTP) has shown diverse practical applications; however, most organic RTP materials exhibit poor thermal resistance, with afterglow vanishing above ambient temperatures. Inspired by robust afterglow in natural minerals, we introduce a general organic–inorganic hybridization strategy that functionally replaces metallic dopants with organic chromophores. Specifically, carboxylated polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons are molecularly embedded into the hydroxyapatite (
                    HAP
                    ) lattice via an in situ co‐precipitation method. The resulting artificial minerals exhibit strong and tunable RTP from organic chromophores with quantum yields of up to 31.1% and afterglow exceeding 10 s. By incorporating carboxylated triphenylamine,
                    TPA‐3COOH
                    , into
                    HAP
                    , the obtained
                    TPA‐3COOH/HAP
                    can even exhibit organic phosphorescence at 500 K. Mechanistic investigations reveal that the
                    HAP
                    lattice not only suppresses triplet nonradiative decay but also promotes the generation of triplet excitons via local electric‐field‐induced charge‐transfer (CT) states and energy traps. This strategy is broadly applicable to various π‐conjugated chromophores, enabling multicolor afterglows. Furthermore, solution‐processable RTP‐active artificial minerals and hydrogels are prepared to demonstrate the potential in UV‐responsive sensing and medical treatment. This work provides a powerful platform for “lighting up” tunable organic RTP in artificial minerals.
title_zh: 受自然启发的有机-无机杂化实现高温多色有机磷光
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    有机室温磷光（RTP）已显示出多种实际应用；然而，大多数有机 RTP 材料的耐热性较差，在高于环境温度时余辉就会消失。受天然矿物中强烈余辉的启发，我们引入了一种通用的有机-无机杂化策略，在功能上用有机发色团取代金属掺杂剂。具体来说，羧化多环芳烃以分子方式嵌入羟基磷灰石中（
                    羟基磷灰石
                    ）通过原位共沉淀法形成晶格。由此产生的人造矿物表现出来自有机发色团的强且可调节的 RTP，量子产率高达 31.1%，余辉超过 10 秒。通过掺入羧化三苯胺，
                    TPA-3COOH
                    , 进入
                    羟基磷灰石
                    ，得到的
                    TPA-3COOH/HAP
                    甚至可以在 500 K 下表现出有机磷光。机理研究表明
                    羟基磷灰石
                    晶格不仅抑制三重态非辐射衰变，而且还通过局部电场诱导的电荷转移（CT）态和能量陷阱促进三重态激子的产生。该策略广泛适用于各种π共轭生色团，可实现多色余辉。此外，还制备了可溶液加工的 RTP 活性人造矿物和水凝胶，以展示紫外线响应传感和

title: [ASAP] Enantiospecific Magnetoconductance Asymmetry in a Racemic Conglomerate Driven by Surface-Assisted Symmetry Breaking
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Chirality-induced spin selectivity (CISS) has been predominantly demonstrated in enantiopure systems, while racemic mixtures are considered spin-inactive due to the cancellation of opposite enantiomeric contributions. Here, we demonstrate that surface-assisted symmetry breaking activates CISS in racemic systems. A racemic bis-helical [1]benzothieno[3,2-b]benzothiophene (BTBT) derivative (Rac-1) spontaneously segregates into homochiral (M,M) and (P,P) domains, forming a two-dimensional (2D) racemic conglomerate directly visualized by scanning tunneling microscopy (STM). Scanning tunneling spectroscopy (STS) reveals enantiospecific magnetoconductance asymmetry (EMA) within individual homochiral domains at room temperature, reaching +(40 ± 5)% for (P,P) domains and -(35 ± 10)% for (M,M) domains when the ferromagnetic Co layer is magnetized perpendicular to the substrate plane. Magnetization-direction-dependent STS measurements show that EMA is reduced from ∼35% for out-of-plane to <6% for in-plane Co layer orientation. Distance-dependent STS and control measurements on Au(111)/Mica without a ferromagnetic layer further confirm that EMA is intrinsic to CISS and independent of junction artifacts. Despite surface-induced planarization of the molecular backbone upon adsorption, as revealed by DFT calculations, EMA persists, driven by the collective 2D chiral packing and the resulting chiral electrostatic potential at the molecule-surface interface. These results establish that bulk homochirality is not a prerequisite for room-temperature CISS, identifying racemic conglomerates as a synthetically accessible platform for investigating CISS at the nanoscale.
title_zh: [ASAP] 表面辅助对称破缺驱动的外消旋聚集体中的对映特异性磁导不对称性
abstract_zh: 手性诱导的自旋选择性（CISS）主要在对映体纯系统中得到证明，而外消旋混合物由于消除了相反的对映体贡献而被认为是自旋非活性的。在这里，我们证明表面辅助对称性破缺可以激活外消旋系统中的 CISS。外消旋双螺旋[1]苯并噻吩并[3,2-b]苯并噻吩 (BTBT) 衍生物 (Rac-1) 自发分离成纯手性 (M,M) 和 (P,P) 结构域，形成可通过扫描隧道显微镜 (STM) 直接观察到的二维 (2D) 外消旋聚集体。扫描隧道光谱 (STS) 揭示了室温下各个同手性域内的对映特异性磁导不对称性 (EMA)，当铁磁 Co 层垂直于基底平面磁化时，(P,P) 域达到 +(40 ± 5)%，(M,M) 域达到 -(35 ± 10)%。磁化方向相关的 STS 测量表明，EMA 从面外 Co 层取向的 ∼35% 降低到面内 Co 层取向的 <6%。距离相关的 STS 和在没有铁磁层的 Au(111)/云母上的控制测量进一步证实了 EMA 是 CISS 固有的并且与结伪影无关。尽管 DFT 计算显示，吸附时分子主链发生表面诱导平坦化，但在集体 2D 手性堆积以及分子表面界面处产生的手性静电势的驱动下，EMA 仍然存在。这些结果表明，本体同手性不是室温 CISS 的先决条件，将外消旋聚集体识别为

title: [ASAP] Fe(porphyrin)-Catalyzed Alkene Epoxidation with NaOCl: A Practical Small- and Large-Scale Alternative to mCPBA
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Epoxides are important intermediates in synthetic chemistry. Stoichiometric peroxyacids, such as meta-chloroperoxybenzoic acid (mCPBA), are widely used to convert alkenes to epoxides but show poor compatibility with aromatic heterocycles and present hazards when scaled. Herein, we report a highly practical alkene epoxidation method that uses the commercially available iron porphyrin, Fe(TPFPP)Cl (TPFPP = tetrakis(pentafluorophenyl)porphyrin), as a catalyst (0.05 mol %) and aqueous NaOCl as the oxidant in acetonitrile as the solvent. No additional ligands or additives are needed, and the reactions proceed under ambient conditions. The method shows a broad scope, affording high yields of epoxides in reactions with terminal and internal aromatic and aliphatic alkenes, heterocycle-containing substrates, glycals, and polyenes. The practicality of the method is demonstrated in the 100 g scale epoxidation of tri-O-acetyl-D-glucal, which proceeds to completion in 15 min at room temperature.
title_zh: [ASAP] Fe(卟啉) 催化的 NaOCl 烯烃环氧化：mCPBA 的实用小规模和大规模替代品
abstract_zh: 环氧化物是合成化学中重要的中间体。化学计量的过氧酸，例如间氯过苯甲酸（mCPBA），广泛用于将烯烃转化为环氧化物，但与芳香族杂环的相容性较差，并且在结垢时存在危险。在此，我们报道了一种高度实用的烯烃环氧化方法，该方法使用市售的铁卟啉 Fe(TPFPP)Cl（TPFPP = 四（五氟苯基）卟啉）作为催化剂（0.05 mol%），NaOCl 水溶液作为氧化剂，乙腈为溶剂。不需要额外的配体或添加剂，反应在环境条件下进行。该方法显示了广泛的范围，在与末端和内部芳香族和脂肪族烯烃、含杂环的底物、聚糖和多烯的反应中提供高产率的环氧化物。该方法的实用性在 100 g 规模的三-O-乙酰基-D-葡萄糖环氧化反应中得到了证明，该环氧化反应在室温下 15 分钟内即可完成。

title: [ASAP] Operando Imaging of Adsorbate-Charge Cooperative Reconstruction into Terminal Active Co–OH Sites
source: Journal of the American Chemical Society: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Layered transition-metal (oxy)hydroxides are highly active oxygen evolution reaction (OER) catalysts, yet the origins of their structural dynamics and the pre-OER redox processes governing active-site formation and charge compensation remain unclear. Here we introduce an adsorbate-and-charge cooperative activation framework: reaction intermediates and local charge compensation jointly induce and stabilize catalytically competent coordination/valence motifs. Operando imaging and DFT calculations reveal that, under OER conditions, tetrahedral and undercoordinated edge Co sites convert into metastable terminal octahedral Co-OH motifs. These motifs mediate OH- adsorption and stabilize oxygen intermediates, serving as key initiation centers for subsequent oxygen evolution. Concomitant electronic restructuring increases states near the Fermi level and enhances electron transfer. Mechanistically, activation proceeds via two potential-dependent stages: an initial adsorbate- and charge-driven formation of active Co-OH-stabilized octahedral motifs, followed by higher-potential lattice oxidation that does not generate new active sites but instead constructs a charge-storage host framework, thereby functionally distinguishing active-site generation from lattice charge regulation. This framework stabilizes and electronically optimizes the active Co-OH centers. This assignment is corroborated by in situ XRD (11° → 12.5° → 13°), consistent with DFT-simulated diffraction and cross-sectional STEM (∼0.68 nm). Collectively, these results uncover the preoxidation-triggered formation of Co-OH motifs as a key origin of terminal Co activity and reveal the intrinsically reaction- and charge-coupled dynamic nature of layered transition-metal (oxy)hydroxide catalysts, providing a conceptual foundation for designing dynamically adaptive electrocatalysts.
title_zh: [ASAP] 吸附质电荷协同重建末端活性 Co-OH 位点的操作成像
abstract_zh: 层状过渡金属（羟基）氢氧化物是高活性的析氧反应（OER）催化剂，但其结构动力学的起源以及控制活性位点形成和电荷补偿的预OER氧化还原过程仍不清楚。在这里，我们引入了吸附物和电荷协同活化框架：反应中间体和局部电荷补偿共同诱导和稳定具有催化能力的配位/价态基序。 Operando成像和DFT计算表明，在OER条件下，四面体和欠配位边缘Co位点转化为亚稳态末端八面体Co-OH基序。这些基序介导 OH- 吸附并稳定氧中间体，作为后续氧析出的关键引发中心。伴随的电子重组增加了费米能级附近的状态并增强了电子转移。从机制上讲，活化过程通过两个电位依赖阶段进行：初始吸附和电荷驱动形成活性Co-OH稳定的八面体基序，随后进行更高电位的晶格氧化，该氧化不会产生新的活性位点，而是构建电荷存储主体框架，从而在功能上区分活性位点生成和晶格电荷调节。该框架稳定并电子优化了活性 Co-OH 中心。这一分配得到了原位 XRD (11° → 12.5° → 13°) 的证实，与 DFT 模拟衍射和横截面 STEM (∼0.68 nm) 一致。总的来说，这些结果揭示了预氧化引发的 Co-OH m 的形成

title: [ASAP] Potential-Induced Degradation in Perovskite Photovoltaics Mitigated by Positive-Voltage Systems
source: ACS Energy Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
abstract: Long-term reliability remains a major barrier to the commercialization of perovskite photovoltaics, with potential-induced degradation (PID) emerging as a critical system-level failure mode. Specifically, PID has been observed in thin-film perovskite solar cells under strong negative voltage and was attributed to sodium ions migrating from the glass substrate to the cell. Here, we report a PID study of encapsulated inverted (p-i-n) perovskite solar cells subjected to positive and negative voltage (±1000 V) for 168 h following the IEC aluminum-foil testing protocol. We find that devices under positive voltage retained more than 95% of the initial power output, meeting the qualification criterion typically applied to commercial modules. These results highlight that PID can be resolved at the system level, thereby relaxing constraints at both the cell and module levels.
title_zh: [ASAP] 正电压系统缓解钙钛矿光伏电池的电势诱导降解
abstract_zh: 长期可靠性仍然是钙钛矿光伏商业化的主要障碍，电势诱导退化（PID）成为一种关键的系统级故障模式。具体来说，在强负电压下的薄膜钙钛矿太阳能电池中观察到PID，这归因于钠离子从玻璃基板迁移到电池。在这里，我们报告了封装倒置 (p-i-n) 钙钛矿太阳能电池的 PID 研究，该电池按照 IEC 铝箔测试协议在正负电压 (±1000 V) 下持续 168 小时。我们发现正电压下的器件保留了 95% 以上的初始功率输出，满足通常应用于商业模块的资格标准。这些结果凸显了 PID 可以在系统级解决，从而放松电池和模块级的约束。

title: Spider Dragline Silk-Inspired 3D Printed Sustainable Zinc Ion Battery with Ultrahigh Stability
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Aqueous zinc-ion batteries have garnered considerable attention in the field of large-scale energy storage due to their low cost, inherent safety, and environmental friendliness. Nevertheless, the issues of uncontrollable dendrite growth and hydrogen evolution reaction encountered by Zn metal anodes during cycling trigger electrode structural failure and lifespan decay, severely impeding their commercialization process. Here, we utilize a green process to extract recovered alginate (rSA) from the waste algae and obtain a hydrogel carrier (rSP) with high ionic conductivity through one-step crosslinking.Inspired by the bionic structure of spider silk, rSP was combined with an MXene conductive network to directly fabricate a dual-network Zn anode (rSP/MXene/ZP) via multi-band UV 3D printing technology. Integrated experimental and theoretical analyses reveal that the cross-linking of rSP ensures the formation of a polyoxygen coordination network to create fast ionconducting pathways, while simultaneously establishing multiple hydrogen bonds to constitute a dynamic cross-linking network. Consequently, symmetrical cells achieve the exceptional cyclic stability over 3,000 h. The rSP/MXene/ZP anode is compatible with organic cathode materials (G-PAQS), and the assembled Zn-organic cell exhibits enhanced electrochemical performance and superior stability over 10,560 cycles.
title_zh: 受蜘蛛丝启发的 3D 打印可持续锌离子电池，具有超高稳定性
abstract_zh: 水系锌离子电池因其成本低廉、本质安全、环境友好等优点在大规模储能领域受到广泛关注。然而，锌金属阳极在循环触发电极结构失效和寿命衰减过程中遇到的不可控枝晶生长和析氢反应的问题严重阻碍了其商业化进程。在此，我们采用绿色工艺从废藻中提取回收海藻酸盐（rSA），并通过一步交联获得具有高离子电导率的水凝胶载体（rSP）。受蜘蛛丝仿生结构的启发，将rSP与MXene导电网络结合，通过多波段UV 3D打印技术直接制造双网络锌阳极（rSP/MXene/ZP）。综合实验和理论分析表明，rSP的交联确保了多氧配位网络的形成，以创建快速离子传导路径，同时建立多个氢键以构成动态交联网络。因此，对称电池可实现超过 3,000 小时的卓越循环稳定性。 rSP/MXene/ZP 阳极与有机阴极材料 (G-PAQS) 兼容，组装的锌有机电池在 10,560 次循环中表现出增强的电化学性能和卓越的稳定性。

title: Disentangling the Activity-Charge Coupling in Cocatalyst-Semiconductor Heterojunctions for Optimized Oxygen Evolution
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Decoupling cocatalyst effects in photocatalysis, often intertwined between enhancing photocarrier accumulation and boosting intrinsic catalytic activity (ICA), is essential yet challenging for rational photocatalyst design. Using cocatalyst-IrO2/TiO2 heterojunction as a prototype, we integrate ab initio molecular dynamics with first-principles microkinetic modeling to elucidate the oxygen evolution reaction (OER) mechanism at the aqueous interface under varying light intensities. Our analysis reveals how IrO2 modulates photo-hole harvesting to regulate water activation and O-O coupling, enabling a quantitative separation of ICA from cocatalyst-mediated effects. Surprisingly, IrO2/TiO2 does not exceed bare TiO2 in ICA, as excessively strong oxygen binding at surface Ir sites hinders O-O bond formation. Instead, the enhanced O2 turnover originates from an increased surface hole concentration, facilitated by the superior hole accumulation capacity (HAC) of IrO2 and the formation of Schottky junction, which compensate for its limited ICA. Extending this analysis to rutile-type metal oxide cocatalysts with varying oxygen affinities uncovers an intrinsic ICA-HAC seesaw relationship that gives rise to a volcanotype OER activity trend. We further identify the work function (ɸ) as a unifying descriptor, with moderate-ɸ cocatalysts (e.g., RhO2 and CrO2 ) predicted to deliver optimal performance by balancing these competing effects. This study provides the first quantitative disentanglement of cocatalyst functions, establishing a general design principle for efficient OER cocatalysts.
title_zh: 解开助催化剂-半导体异质结中的活性-电荷耦合以优化析氧
abstract_zh: 光催化中的解耦助催化剂效应通常与增强光载流子积累和提高内在催化活性（ICA）交织在一起，对于合理的光催化剂设计至关重要但也具有挑战性。使用助催化剂-IrO2/TiO2异质结作为原型，我们将从头算分子动力学与第一原理微动力学模型相结合，以阐明不同光强度下水界面的析氧反应（OER）机制。我们的分析揭示了 IrO2 如何调节光空穴收集以调节水活化和 O-O 耦合，从而能够定量分离 IC​​A 与助催化剂介导的效应。令人惊讶的是，ICA 中的 IrO2/TiO2 并不超过裸露的 TiO2，因为表面 Ir 位点处过强的氧结合阻碍了 O-O 键的形成。相反，O2 转换的增强源于表面空穴浓度的增加，这得益于 IrO2 卓越的空穴积累能力 (HAC) 和肖特基结的形成，从而补偿了其有限的 ICA。将此分析扩展到具有不同氧亲和力的金红石型金属氧化物助催化剂，揭示了一种内在的 ICA-HAC 跷跷板关系，该关系产生了火山型 OER 活性趋势。我们进一步将功函数 (ɸ) 确定为统一描述符，预计中等 ɸ 助催化剂（例如 RhO2 和 CrO2）可通过平衡这些竞争效应来提供最佳性能。这项研究首次定量阐明了助催化剂的功能，建立了高效 OER 助催化剂的一般设计原则。

title: SORS and SESORS: deep Raman spectroscopy in biomedical analysis and disease diagnosis
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Spatially offset Raman spectroscopy (SORS) and its surface-enhanced variant, SESORS, have emerged as transformative techniques in analytical chemistry and biomedical diagnostics, enabling non-invasive, depth-resolved molecular sensing. SORS facilitates the probing of endogenous signals from subsurface layers, while SESORS enhances sensitivity through plasmonic nanostructures, allowing sensitive targeted detection of exogenous diagnostic agents. Spatially offset Raman spectroscopy is now making significant strides in clinical diagnostics. This review focuses on the rapid advancements in the field over the past five years, including applications in cancer diagnosis, monitoring of therapeutic response, bone health assessment, and tracking of neurotransmitters and SERS-labelled nanoparticles through tissue depths exceeding 7 cm in a tissue wrapped mouse model and 14 cm from within a porcine tissue stack. The integration of tailored nanostructures, resonant Raman labels, and advanced optical instrumentation has expanded the versatility of SESORS, with modalities such as transmission, backscattered, and resonance-enhanced configurations offering flexibility across diverse clinical scenarios. Despite challenges in standardisation, biocompatibility, and instrumentation, interdisciplinary progress in optics, nanotechnology, and spectroscopy continues to drive innovation. This review critically examines the recent evolution, classification, and biomedical applications of SORS and SESORS, highlighting their limitations and future potential in translational medical research.
title_zh: SORS 和 SESORS：生物医学分析和疾病诊断中的深度拉曼光谱
abstract_zh: 空间偏移拉曼光谱 (SORS) 及其表面增强变体 SESORS 已成为分析化学和生物医学诊断领域的变革性技术，可实现非侵入式深度分辨分子传感。 SORS 有助于探测来自地下层的内源信号，而 SEORS 通过等离子体纳米结构增强灵敏度，从而可以灵敏地靶向检测外源诊断剂。空间偏移拉曼光谱现在在临床诊断方面取得了重大进展。本综述重点关注过去五年该领域的快速进展，包括在癌症诊断、治疗反应监测、骨骼健康评估以及在组织包裹小鼠模型中超过 7 厘米的组织深度和猪组织堆栈中超过 14 厘米的组织深度中跟踪神经递质和 SERS 标记的纳米粒子的应用。定制纳米结构、共振拉曼标签和先进光学仪器的集成扩展了 SESORS 的多功能性，其传输、反向散射和共振增强配置等模式在不同的临床场景中提供了灵活性。尽管在标准化、生物相容性和仪器方面面临挑战，但光学、纳米技术和光谱学的跨学科进步继续推动创新。这篇综述批判性地审视了 SORS 和 SESORS 的最新演变、分类和生物医学应用，强调了它们在转化医学研究中的局限性和未来潜力。

title: Multiscale Microenvironment Engineering at Gas-Liquid-Solid Triple-Phase Interface for Electrochemical Hydrogen Evolution
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: The electrocatalytic hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) has emerged as a promising strategy for sustainable hydrogen production. Contrary to current reviews that primarily focus on catalyst design, this review offers an insight into multiscale microenvironment engineering at the gas-liquid-solid triple-phase interface for HER. We elaborate on the latest developments from three aspects, including atomic/molecular-level, mesoscale, and macroscale microenvironment engineering. Based on representative studies, the unique characteristics, underlying mechanisms, and regulatory strategies of each category are discussed in detail, emphasizing their prospects in HER. This review concludes with a perspective on the challenges and future directions in microenvironment engineering for HER, offering guidance for the development of efficient and durable hydrogen production systems.
title_zh: 电化学析氢气-液-固三相界面的多尺度微环境工程
abstract_zh: 电催化析氢反应（HER）已成为可持续制氢的一种有前景的策略。与当前主要关注催化剂设计的评论相反，这篇评论提供了对 HER 气-液-固三相界面多尺度微环境工程的深入了解。我们从原子/分子水平、介观尺度和宏观微环境工程三个方面阐述了最新进展。基于代表性研究，详细讨论了每个类别的独特特征、潜在机制和监管策略，强调了它们在 HER 中的前景。本综述最后对 HER 微环境工程的挑战和未来方向进行了展望，为开发高效、耐用的制氢系统提供了指导。

title: Electronic-structure descriptor-guided design of high-entropy perovskites for efficient CO2 electrolysis
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: The electrochemical conversion of CO2 into value-added chemicals via solid oxide electrolysis cells (SOECs) offers a promising pathway for renewable energy storage and carbon-neutral fuel production, yet its advancement is limited by the lack of predictive design principles for high-performance cathodes. Conventional trial-and-error materials discovery is time-consuming and inefficient. Here we combine density functional theory calculation and experimental observations to suggest the oxygen 2p-band center (εₚ) as an activity-relevant descriptor for perovskite cathodes, and integrate this insight with interpretable machine learning to establish composition-electronic structure-performance relationships. Regression models trained on 230 perovskites reveal electronegativity mismatch and configurational entropy as primary factors modulating εₚ. Guided by these physically interpretable descriptors, interpretable machine learning is employed to explore a large chemical space of 9703 A-site high-entropy perovskites and identify candidates with optimized εₚ positions. A representative composition, La1/6Sr1/6Li1/6Ba1/6Ca1/6Sm1/6FeO3-δ cathode delivers a current density of 2.55 A cm-2 at 800 °C and 1.5 V together with stable operation exceeding 1000 h. These findings provide a descriptor-informed strategy for advancing scalable CO2 electrolysis technologies in sustainable energy systems.
title_zh: 电子结构描述符引导的高熵钙钛矿设计用于高效二氧化碳电解
abstract_zh: 通过固体氧化物电解池（SOEC）将二氧化碳电化学转化为增值化学品，为可再生能源存储和碳中性燃料生产提供了一条有前途的途径，但由于缺乏高性能阴极的预测设计原理，其进展受到限制。传统的试错法材料发现既耗时又低效。在这里，我们结合密度泛函理论计算和实验观察，建议将氧 2p 能带中心 (εₚ) 作为钙钛矿阴极的活性相关描述符，并将这一见解与可解释的机器学习相结合，以建立成分-电子结构-性能关系。在 230 种钙钛矿上训练的回归模型揭示了电负性失配和构型熵是调节 εₚ 的主要因素。在这些物理可解释描述符的指导下，可解释的机器学习被用来探索 9703 A 位高熵钙钛矿的大化学空间，并识别具有优化 εₚ 位置的候选物。代表性成分 La1/6Sr1/6Li1/6Ba1/6Ca1/6Sm1/6FeO3-δ 阴极在 800 °C 和 1.5 V 下可提供 2.55 A cm-2 的电流密度，并且稳定运行超过 1000 小时。这些发现为在可持续能源系统中推进可扩展的二氧化碳电解技术提供了一种基于描述符的策略。

title: Suppressing Dendrites via Lateral Lithium Flux in Li Metal Solid-State Batteries
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Lithium dendrite growth at the lithium | solid-state electrolyte (SSE) interface, driven by void formation, remains a major barrier to the deployment of Li metal solid-state batteries. Here, we reveal a mechanism of lateral lithium flux that explains how interfacial layers (ILs) along the Li | SSE interface enable suppressing void formation and thereby prevent dendrite growth. Using Li3Sb as a model IL and Li7La3Zr2O12 as a benchmark SSE, we directly visualize and quantify lateral lithium transport, demonstrating that ILs mitigate void formation by defocusing the local current density. This mechanism accounts for the cycling stability of IL-functionalized Li | SSE interfaces and provides design principles for safe, high-energy-density Li metal solid-state batteries.
title_zh: 通过锂金属固态电池中的横向锂通量抑制枝晶
abstract_zh: 锂枝晶生长由空隙形成驱动的固态电解质（SSE）界面仍然是锂金属固态电池部署的主要障碍。在这里，我们揭示了横向锂通量的机制，解释了界面层（IL）如何沿着Li | SSE 界面能够抑制空洞形成，从而防止枝晶生长。使用Li3Sb作为模型IL和Li7La3Zr2O12作为基准SSE，我们直接可视化和量化横向锂传输，证明IL通过散焦局部电流密度来减轻空洞形成。这种机制解释了 IL 功能化 Li 的循环稳定性。 SSE 连接并提供安全、高能量密度锂金属固态电池的设计原理。

title: Direct deaminative functionalization
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Amines, ubiquitous both in nature and synthetic molecules, have long been regarded as static end points in organic synthesis. Unlocking their potential as distinct reactive handles for molecular editing represents a profound shift in synthetic logic. To address this limitation, direct deaminative functionalization has emerged as a transformative solution. This step-economic strategy revolutionizes synthetic design by converting readily available C–N bonds into valuable C–C and C–heteroatom linkages. Herein, we move beyond the fragmented landscape of isolated reports to establish a unified bond-centric framework. By organizing advances according to the specific bond formed, this Review provides a comprehensive and systematic overview of this rapidly expanding field. We highlight the strategic utility of distinct activation platforms in late-stage functionalization, illustrating their value as practical tools for molecular diversification.
title_zh: 直接脱氨基功能化
abstract_zh: 胺在自然界和合成分子中普遍存在，长期以来一直被视为有机合成中的静态终点。释放它们作为分子编辑的独特反应手柄的潜力代表了合成逻辑的深刻转变。为了解决这一限制，直接脱氨基功能化已成为一种变革性的解决方案。这种分步经济策略通过将容易获得的 C-N 键转化为有价值的 C-C 和 C-杂原子键，彻底改变了合成设计。在这里，我们超越了孤立报告的碎片化格局，建立了一个统一的以债券为中心的框架。通过根据所形成的特定债券来组织进展，本综述对这个快速扩展的领域提供了全面、系统的概述。我们强调了不同激活平台在后期功能化中的战略效用，说明了它们作为分子多样化实用工具的价值。

title: Transcription factor codes patterning neuronal groundplans of the cerebrum
source: Nature
abstract: Brain regions that regulate motivated behaviours, including the vertebrate hypothalamus and arthropod cerebrum, house bespoke neural circuits dedicated to perceptual and internal regulation of many behavioural states1,2. These circuits are built to purpose from complex sets of cell types whose patterning has been challenging to elucidate. Here we developed methods in Drosophila melanogaster to embed well-studied neurons that regulate mating in the transcriptional contexts of the neuronal lineages that generate them3,4,5. By comparing transcription within and between lineages, we identified a large set of transcription factors expressed in complex combinations that delineate cerebral hemilineages—classes of postmitotic neurons born from the same stem cell and sharing Notch status6,7. Hemilineages comprise the major anatomic classes in the cerebrum8,9,10 and these transcription factors are required to generate their gross features. We show that subtypes of the same hemilineage can provide a common computational module to circuits regulating different drives, and identify an orthogonal set of transcription factors that stratify hemilineage subtypes of differing birth order. Our findings suggest that distinct sets of transcription factors operate in a hierarchical system to build, diversify and sexually differentiate lineally related neurons that compose motivated behaviour circuits. By linking developmental patterning to separable transcriptional axes that produce gross versus fine aspects of information flow, we provide a logical framework for cerebral control of diverse drives.
title_zh: 转录因子编码大脑神经元的基本结构
abstract_zh: 调节动机行为的大脑区域，包括脊椎动物的下丘脑和节肢动物的大脑，拥有专门用于许多行为状态的感知和内部调节的定制神经回路1,2。这些电路是根据复杂的细胞类型组构建的，其模式一直难以阐明。在这里，我们开发了在果蝇中嵌入经过充分研究的神经元的方法，这些神经元在产生它们的神经元谱系的转录环境中调节交配3,4,5。通过比较谱系内部和谱系之间的转录，我们确定了一大组以复杂组合表达的转录因子，这些转录因子描绘了大脑半谱系——从同一干细胞产生并共享Notch状态的有丝分裂后神经元类别6,7。半脑谱系包括大脑中的主要解剖类别8、9、10，这些转录因子是生成其总体特征所必需的。我们表明，相同半世系的亚型可以为调节不同驱动的电路提供通用的计算模块，并识别一组正交的转录因子，对不同出生顺序的半世系亚型进行分层。我们的研究结果表明，不同的转录因子组在分层系统中运作，以构建、多样化和性别分化构成动机行为回路的直系相关神经元。通过将发育模式与产生信息流的粗略和精细方面的可分离转录轴联系起来，我们为不同驱动力的大脑控制提供了一个逻辑框架。

title: Substrate selectivity of the human RNA m5C methyltransferase NSUN2
source: Nature
abstract: Specific deposition of RNA modifications is important for regulating gene expression1,2. 5-Methylcytosine (m5C) is a common epitranscriptomic modification, and NSUN2 is a key enzyme responsible for m5C methylation of various types of RNA. Dysregulation of NSUN2 is associated with numerous diseases, including cancers and neurological disorders3. The versatility of NSUN2 complicates our understanding of its substrate specificity and molecular roles in biology and disease. Here we show how NSUN2 interacts with RNA substrates at distinct stages of its catalytic cycle to modify cytidines. Furthermore, we show the role of RNA structure in facilitating NSUN2 activity at multiple tRNA positions. We identify RNA duplexes surrounding the m5C modification site as crucial recognition elements for methylation, which enabled us to derive a minimized substrate that captures the preferred features of an NSUN2 substrate—a dual-stem structure containing the CNNRR motif at the 5′ end of the first stem. Insights into the mechanisms underlying substrate-specific NSUN2 enzymatic activity provide opportunities for understanding and therapeutically targeting NSUN2-dependent methylation. Overall, our work highlights the roles of RNA structure and sequence in defining substrate specificity and regulating RNA-modifying enzymes.
title_zh: 人 RNA m5C 甲基转移酶 NSUN2 的底物选择性
abstract_zh: RNA 修饰的特异性沉积对于调节基因表达非常重要1,2。 5-甲基胞嘧啶（m5C）是一种常见的表观转录组修饰，NSUN2是负责各类RNA m5C甲基化的关键酶。 NSUN2 失调与多种疾病有关，包括癌症和神经系统疾病3。 NSUN2 的多功能性使我们对其底物特异性以及在生物学和疾病中的分子作用的理解变得复杂。在这里，我们展示了 NSUN2 如何在其催化循环的不同阶段与 RNA 底物相互作用以修饰胞苷。此外，我们还展示了 RNA 结构在促进多个 tRNA 位点 NSUN2 活性中的作用。我们将 m5C 修饰位点周围的 RNA 双链体确定为甲基化的关键识别元件，这使我们能够获得最小化的底物，该底物捕获了 NSUN2 底物的首选特征，即在第一个茎的 5' 端包含 CNNRR 基序的双茎结构。深入了解底物特异性 NSUN2 酶活性的机制，为理解和治疗性靶向 NSUN2 依赖性甲基化提供了机会。总的来说，我们的工作强调了 RNA 结构和序列在定义底物特异性和调节 RNA 修饰酶中的作用。

title: Universal transcriptomic hallmarks of mammalian ageing and mortality
source: Nature
abstract: Ageing and interventions modulate health and mortality1, yet the underlying molecular mechanisms of this modulation remain unclear. Here we integrate more than 11,000 transcriptomes from more than 25 tissues across 4 mammals (mouse, rat, macaque and human) to develop accurate, interpretable rodent and multi-species biomarkers of chronological age and expected mortality, predicting lifespan-modulating interventions, time to death, chronic diseases and rejuvenation. Ageing-related changes were conserved across species and cell types, revealing universal transcriptomic signatures of mammalian ageing and mortality, including CDKN1A and LGALS3, whose protein levels were also associated with mortality and multimorbidity in UK Biobank. Mortality-associated features were recapitulated across in vivo and in vitro damage-accumulation models, including inflammation, replicative senescence, metabolic inhibition and γ-irradiation, and were attenuated or reversed by cell immortalization, reprogramming, heterochronic parabiosis and early embryogenesis. Network analysis uncovered a modular architecture of ageing- and mortality-associated hallmarks, encompassing inflammation, interferon signalling, mitochondrial function, chromatin modification and extracellular matrix organization. To quantify ageing of individual cellular components, we developed module-specific clocks, which revealed pathway-specific effects of interventions: chronic diseases primarily accelerated inflammatory-module ageing, whereas caloric restriction and Klotho (also known as Kl) deficiency targeted mitochondrial and metabolic modules. Transcriptomic and DNA methylation clocks showed correlated age acceleration in human blood, which was strongest for the chromatin-associated module clock, highlighting mechanistic links between molecular ageing modalities. This study reveals conserved signatures and a modular architecture of mortality regulation, providing a framework for quantifying and targeting ageing of cellular subsystems across species and tissues.
title_zh: 哺乳动物衰老和死亡的普遍转录组学特征
abstract_zh: 衰老和干预措施会调节健康和死亡率1，但这种调节的潜在分子机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们整合了来自 4 种哺乳动物（小鼠、大鼠、猕猴和人类）超过 25 个组织的 11,000 多个转录组，以开发准确、可解释的啮齿动物和多物种生物标志物，包括实际年龄和预期死亡率，预测寿命调节干预措施、死亡时间、慢性疾病和返老还童。与衰老相关的变化在物种和细胞类型中是保守的，揭示了哺乳动物衰老和死亡率的普遍转录组特征，包括CDKN1A和LGALS3，其蛋白质水平也与英国生物银行的死亡率和多发病相关。与死亡相关的特征在体内和体外损伤累积模型中得到重现，包括炎症、复制性衰老、代谢抑制和γ-辐射，并通过细胞永生化、重编程、异时共生和早期胚胎发生来减弱或逆转。网络分析揭示了衰老和死亡相关标志的模块化结构，包括炎症、干扰素信号传导、线粒体功能、染色质修饰和细胞外基质组织。为了量化单个细胞成分的衰老，我们开发了模块特异性时钟，揭示了干预措施的通路特异性效应：慢性疾病主要加速炎症模块衰老，而热量限制和 Klotho（也称为 Kl）缺乏则针对线粒体和 m

title: Extending the theory of classical nonsolvent induced phase separation to regulate membrane pores
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Nonsolvent induced phase separation, employed for over 60 years to prepare porous membranes, still has unclear pore formation mechanisms due to coupled variables. Classical theory links the distinct pore morphologies, i.e. macrovoids or cellular pores, to instantaneous and delayed phase separation, respectively. However, when the formations of macrovoids and cellular pores were decoupled in a tunable device that regulates the nonsolvent hydrodynamics, it was proven that hydrodynamic instability drives macrovoid formation, while cellular pores form via a nucleation-growth mechanism. By establishing a quantitative relationship between nonsolvent and area density of cellular pores, we achieved further optimization of the membrane morphology, enabling its application in vanadium flow batteries with significantly enhanced performance. This work extends the theory of phase separation and provides a causality-driven framework for precision membrane design.
title_zh: 扩展经典非溶剂诱导相分离理论来调节膜孔
abstract_zh: 非溶剂诱导相分离用于制备多孔膜已有 60 多年的历史，但由于耦合变量，其孔形成机制仍然不清楚。经典理论将不同的孔隙形态（即大孔隙或细胞孔）分别与瞬时和延迟相分离联系起来。然而，当大空隙和细胞孔的形成在调节非溶剂流体动力学的可调装置中解耦时，事实证明，流体动力学不稳定性驱动大空隙的形成，而细胞孔通过成核生长机制形成。通过建立非溶剂与细胞孔面积密度之间的定量关系，我们实现了膜形态的进一步优化，使其在钒液流电池中的应用具有显着增强的性能。这项工作扩展了相分离理论，并为精密膜设计提供了因果驱动的框架。

title: Rising global hail damage potential in a warming world
source: Nature
abstract: Anthropogenic climate change (ACC) is expected to modify severe convective storms and their associated hazards, including hailstorms, a primary driver of weather-related economic losses1,2,3,4. Despite some research on the response of hailstorms to ACC, most studies have focused on regional-scale changes2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9, whereas global-scale assessments of hailstone size remain scarce. Here we show a 36.5–42.1% increase in global hailstorm-induced damage potential by the late twenty-first century, with the magnitude determined by the emission scenario. Our results arise from hailstone trajectory simulations conducted under historical and future scenarios, driven by EC-Earth3 ensemble outputs10 that are cross-validated through multimodel comparisons. Globally, increased low-level temperature and specific humidity drive a shift towards larger hailstones, with the frequency of ≥30-mm-diameter hailstones rising by 37.9–51.8% and
title_zh: 世界变暖，全球冰雹损害的可能性不断上升
abstract_zh: 人为气候变化 (ACC) 预计将改变强对流风暴及其相关危害，包括冰雹，冰雹是与天气相关的经济损失的主要驱动因素1,2,3,4。尽管有一些关于冰雹对 ACC 响应的研究，但大多数研究都集中在区域尺度的变化2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9，而全球尺度的冰雹大小评估仍然很少。在这里，我们显示，到 21 世纪末，全球冰雹造成的损害潜力增加了 36.5-42.1%，其幅度由排放情景决定。我们的结果来自在历史和未来情景下进行的冰雹轨迹模拟，由 EC-Earth3 集合输出 10 驱动，这些输出通过多模型比较进行交叉验证。在全球范围内，低层温度和比湿度的增加导致冰雹尺寸增大，直径≥30毫米的冰雹频率增加了37.9-51.8%，

title: Four ppm measurement of the antihydrogen ground-state hyperfine splitting
source: Nature
abstract: The hydrogen atom is a touchstone for the foundations, evolution and frontiers of quantum theory1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9. Key spectral lines of this atom have been determined to remarkable precision10,11. Our research focuses on the study of antihydrogen, the antimatter counterpart of hydrogen. We test fundamental symmetries of nature (such as simultaneous charge conjugation, parity inversion, and time reversal or CPT symmetry) through precision comparisons of these atomic systems12. Recent 1S–2S spectroscopic measurements on trapped antihydrogen have achieved relative precisions of parts per trillion (refs. 13,14). However, the ground-state hyperfine splitting, which is sensitive to the internal structure of the antiproton, has only been measured to 400 parts per million (ppm). Here we report a 4 ppm measurement of the antihydrogen ground-state hyperfine splitting energy a1S, advancing the state-of-the-art precision15 by two orders of magnitude. From microwave spectroscopy experiments with roughly 24,000 anti-atoms, we determine {a}_{1{\rm{S}}}/h=\mathrm{1,420,404.8}\pm 1.1(\mathrm{stat.})\pm 5.6\,(\mathrm{sys.})\,\text{kHz}{a}_{1{\rm{S}}}/h=\mathrm{1,420,404.8}\pm 1.1(\mathrm{stat.})\pm 5.6\,(\mathrm{sys.})\,\text{kHz} in a 1-T magnetic field, consistent with expectations for hydrogen11. At this level, our measurement is sensitive to the internal structure of the antiproton, which contributes at about 40 ppm and is approaching the limit of existing theoretical analyses16. The gains we report are the product of marked advances in magnetic trap field control, stabilization and characterization; anti-atom spin-state manipulation; and improved antihydrogen accumulation rate17.
title_zh: 反氢基态超精细分裂的 4 ppm 测量
abstract_zh: 氢原子是量子理论基础、演化和前沿的试金石1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9。该原子的关键谱线已被极其精确地确定10,11。我们的研究重点是反氢的研究，即氢的反物质对应物。我们通过对这些原子系统的精确比较来测试自然的基本对称性（例如同时电荷共轭、奇偶校验反转和时间反转或 CPT 对称性）12。最近对捕获的反氢进行的 1S-2S 光谱测量已达到万亿分之一的相对精度（参考文献 13,14）。然而，对反质子内部结构敏感的基态超精细分裂仅测量到百万分之 400 (ppm)。在这里，我们报告了反氢基态超精细分裂能 a1S 的 4 ppm 测量结果，将最先进的精度15提高了两个数量级。通过大约 24,000 个反原子的微波光谱实验，我们确定 {a}_{1{\rm{S}}}/h=\mathrm{1,420,404.8}\pm 1.1(\mathrm{stat.})\pm 5.6\,(\mathrm{sys.})\,\text{kHz}{a}_{1{\rm{S}}}/h=\mathrm{1,420,404.8}\pm 1.1(\mathrm{stat.})\pm 5.6\,(\mathrm{sys.})\,\text{kHz} 在 1-T 磁场中，与氢11 的预期一致。在这个水平上，我们的测量对反质子的内部结构很敏感，其贡献约为 40 ppm，接近现有理论分析的极限16。我们报告的成果是磁阱场控制、稳定性和稳定性方面显着进步的产物。

title: Chemical efflux imaging using an annular nanosensor array for in situ bladder cancer detection
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Detection of analytes in extracted biofluids, such as urine for bladder cancer biomarkers, is challenging owing to sample dilution and instability outside the human body. Here we demonstrate an annular nanosensor array grafted onto a standard biomedical catheter, which enables three-dimensional chemical efflux imaging from within a tissue compartment or luminal space. This platform integrates near-infrared fluorescent single-walled carbon nanotubes with the catheter, leveraging a ball-lens scanning optical device for chemical signal mapping. We develop nanosensors based on a phospholipid copolymer that selectively detect nuclear matrix protein (NMP-22), a biomarker for bladder cancer. The results show differential sensor responses between apoptosis in six bladder cancer cell lines and healthy fibroblast cells. Nanosensor-functionalized catheters track gemcitabine-stimulated cell death and monitor protein efflux in vitro. We demonstrate spatial imaging of incident chemical flux using this platform, achieving localization of biomarker sources in complex tissues and organs with 182-fold signal enhancement compared with extracted biofluid sampling. As an application, the catheter equipped with a rotating ball lens chemically images porcine bladders, detecting biomarker efflux up to 2 cm away, highlighting its potential as a point-of-care diagnostic tool.
title_zh: 使用环形纳米传感器阵列进行化学流出成像，用于原位膀胱癌检测
abstract_zh: 由于样品稀释和人体外不稳定，检测提取的生物体液（例如尿液中的膀胱癌生物标志物）中的分析物具有挑战性。在这里，我们展示了一个嫁接到标准生物医学导管上的环形纳米传感器阵列，它能够从组织隔室或管腔空间内进行三维化学流出成像。该平台将近红外荧光单壁碳纳米管与导管集成在一起，利用球透镜扫描光学装置进行化学信号映射。我们开发基于磷脂共聚物的纳米传感器，可选择性检测核基质蛋白 (NMP-22)（膀胱癌的生物标志物）。结果显示六种膀胱癌细胞系和健康成纤维细胞的细胞凋亡之间存在差异的传感器反应。纳米传感器功能化导管可追踪吉西他滨刺激的细胞死亡并监测体外蛋白质流出。我们使用该平台演示了事件化学通量的空间成像，实现了复杂组织和器官中生物标志物源的定位，与提取的生物流体采样相比，信号增强了 182 倍。作为一种应用，配备旋转球透镜的导管对猪膀胱进行化学成像，检测最远 2 厘米外的生物标志物流出，凸显了其作为即时诊断工具的潜力。

title: Ambient-pressure conversion of plastic waste to jet fuel cycloalkanes by tandem hydropyrolysis and vapour-phase hydrogenation
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Converting plastic waste into jet fuel could support the decarbonization of the aviation industry, yet current upcycling routes rely on high pressures (~3 MPa) and prolonged reaction times (up to 144 h). Here we report a tandem hydropyrolysis and vapour-phase hydrogenation strategy enabled by a single-atom Ru catalyst on Co-Al oxides (RuSA@CoAlOx). The catalyst achieves a turnover frequency of 144 s−1 for benzene hydrogenation at atmospheric pressure, exceeding that of commercial Ru/C by over 100-fold. In a tandem fixed-bed reactor with hydropyrolysis at 460 °C and downstream vapour-phase hydrogenation at 160 °C, polystyrene is converted to 94.8 wt% cycloalkanes at 0.15 MPa and to 59 wt% cycloalkanes at atmospheric pressure. The approach extends to mixed plastics, achieving jet-fuel-range hydrocarbon yields above 82 wt%. The catalyst remains stable for over 110 h during continuous vapour-phase hydrogenation. Life-cycle analysis indicates a 73% reduction in well-to-pump CO2 emissions relative to petroleum-based jet fuel, and techno-economic analysis suggests a competitive minimum selling price of US$1.0–1.8 per kg.
title_zh: 通过串联加氢热解和气相加氢将塑料废物常压转化为喷气燃料环烷烃
abstract_zh: 将塑料废物转化为航空燃料可以支持航空业的脱碳，但目前的升级改造路线依赖于高压（~3 MPa）和较长的反应时间（长达 144 小时）。在这里，我们报告了一种由 Co-Al 氧化物 (RuSA@CoAlOx) 上的单原子 Ru 催化剂实现的串联加氢热解和气相加氢策略。该催化剂在常压下苯加氢的周转频率达到144 s−1，超过商业Ru/C的100倍以上。在串联固定床反应器中，在 460 °C 下进行加氢热解，并在 160 °C 下进行下游气相加氢，聚苯乙烯在 0.15 MPa 下转化为 94.8 wt% 环烷烃，在大气压下转化为 59 wt% 环烷烃。该方法扩展到混合塑料，实现了喷气燃料范围内碳氢化合物的产率超过 82 wt%。该催化剂在连续气相加氢过程中保持稳定超过 110 小时。生命周期分析表明，相对于石油基喷气燃料，从井到泵的二氧化碳排放量减少了 73%，技术经济分析表明，具有竞争力的最低售价为每公斤 1.0-1.8 美元。

title: Widespread range contraction of carnivores in protected areas of China
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: Protected areas (PAs) are cornerstones of biodiversity conservation, harbouring key mammal species such as apex predators that are important in maintaining trophic cascades and contribute to ecosystem resilience. However, whether PAs have preserved historical wildlife assemblages remains poorly quantified, mainly due to a lack of comparable data from historical and current periods. Here we used comprehensive data from historical investigations during the 1950s and 1970s, as well as current surveys based on 8,300 camera traps between 2008 and 2021 across 85 PAs in China, to assess range contractions of 82 large- and medium-bodied mammals. We found that carnivores disappeared from 59.4% of their historical sites, a rate much higher than that observed in ungulates (37.2%). Moreover, while 52.9% of PAs retained more than 70% of their ungulate species, over 70% of PAs lost over half of their carnivore species, with PAs in southern China being range contraction hotspots, particularly for carnivore species with larger body sizes and shorter generation lengths. Our findings reveal widespread range contraction of carnivores in China’s PAs compared with historical periods, driven primarily by legacy effects of large-scale anthropogenic disturbances and human–wildlife conflict, necessitating initiatives to maintain and restore historical assemblages of carnivores alongside habitat protection.
title_zh: 中国保护区食肉动物范围大范围缩小
abstract_zh: 保护区 (PA) 是生物多样性保护的基石，栖息着顶级捕食者等关键哺乳动物物种，这些物种对于维持营养级联至关重要，并有助于增强生态系统的恢复力。然而，保护区是否保存了历史上的野生动物组合仍然很难量化，这主要是由于缺乏历史和当前时期的可比数据。在这里，我们使用了 20 世纪 50 年代和 1970 年代历史调查的综合数据，以及基于 2008 年至 2021 年间中国 85 个保护区的 8,300 个相机陷阱的当前调查数据，来评估 82 种大中型哺乳动物的活动范围收缩。我们发现食肉动物从 59.4% 的历史遗址中消失，这一比例远高于观察到的有蹄类动物 (37.2%)。此外，虽然52.9%的保护区保留了超过70%的有蹄类动物，但超过70%的保护区失去了一半以上的肉食动物物种，中国南方的保护区是活动范围缩小的热点地区，特别是体型较大、世代长度较短的食肉动物物种。我们的研究结果表明，与历史时期相比，中国保护区的食肉动物范围出现了广泛的缩小，这主要是由大规模人为干扰和人类与野生动物冲突的遗留影响驱动的，因此需要在栖息地保护的同时采取措施维持和恢复食肉动物的历史组合。

title: Watching excitons synchronize
source: Nature Materials
abstract: The oscillating electric field emitted by excitons in layered antiferromagnets reveals how quasiparticles synchronize into collective coherence and shows that a complex multi-peak spectrum can arise from a single excitonic resonance dynamically modulated by spin and lattice excitations.

title: Dynamic self-assembly mediated by stored and released electrons in pimer supramolecular polymers of chromophore amphiphiles
source: Chem
abstract: Monomers cycle reversibly between soluble globular aggregates and a black conductive hydrogel of supramolecular polymers. These polymers form via π-π stacking and π-radical pimerization, driven by light, electricity, chemicals, or X-rays. Under anaerobic conditions, they harvest and store electrons. Oxygen exposure releases reactive species for catalytic oxidation, dissolving the hydrogel.
title_zh: 发色团两亲物的 pimer 超分子聚合物中存储和释放电子介导的动态自组装
abstract_zh: 单体在可溶性球状聚集体和超分子聚合物的黑色导电水凝胶之间可逆循环。这些聚合物在光、电、化学物质或 X 射线的驱动下，通过 π-π 堆积和 π-自由基二聚化形成。在厌氧条件下，它们收集并储存电子。暴露在氧气中会释放出用于催化氧化的活性物质，从而溶解水凝胶。

title: β-Arrestin condensates regulate G-protein-coupled receptor function
source: Nature
abstract: β-Arrestins 1 and 2 are multifunctional adaptor proteins1 that regulate the signalling of G-protein-coupled receptors (GPCRs), the largest class of receptors, which impact nearly all aspects of physiology and are one of the most common drug targets2. Although β-arrestins interact with a wide array of signalling effectors at many GPCRs, it is unclear how β-arrestins promote such varied functions. Here we show that β-arrestins undergo liquid–liquid phase separation, forming condensates that regulate GPCR function. We show that condensation is specific to visual arrestins and β-arrestins, and demonstrate that β-arrestin oligomerization occurs in proximity to the GPCR to regulate GPCR functions such as internalization and signalling. Our work provides a paradigm for β-arrestin condensates as regulators of GPCR function, with liquid–liquid phase separation serving as an important promoter of signalling compartmentalization at GPCRs.
title_zh: β-Arrestin 缩合物调节 G 蛋白偶联受体功能
abstract_zh: β-抑制蛋白 1 和 2 是多功能衔接蛋白 1，可调节 G 蛋白偶联受体 (GPCR) 的信号传导，GPCR 是最大的一类受体，几乎影响生理学的所有方面，是最常见的药物靶点之一2。尽管 β-抑制蛋白与许多 GPCR 上的多种信号传导效应子相互作用，但尚不清楚 β-抑制蛋白如何促进这些不同的功能。在这里，我们展示了 β-抑制蛋白经历液-液相分离，形成调节 GPCR 功能的冷凝物。我们证明缩合是视觉抑制蛋白和 β-抑制蛋白所特有的，并证明 β-抑制蛋白寡聚化发生在 GPCR 附近，以调节 GPCR 功能，例如内化和信号传导。我们的工作为 β-arrestin 缩合物作为 GPCR 功能调节剂提供了一个范例，其中液-液相分离作为 GPCR 信号区室化的重要促进剂。

title: Human haematopoietic stem cells remember inflammatory stress
source: Nature
abstract: Inflammation activates blood cells, contributing to ageing and malignancy1,2,3. Haematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) survive a lifetime of infection to sustain life-long haematopoiesis1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9, but how human HSCs respond and adapt to inflammatory stress is largely unknown. Here, to empirically understand this adaptation, we developed xenograft inflammation–recovery models and performed single-cell multiomics on xenografted human HSCs. Two transcriptionally and epigenetically distinct HSC subsets were identified with one, termed HSC inflammatory memory (HSC-iM), retaining a molecular memory of previous inflammatory treatments. The HSC-iM subset exhibited quiescence and restrained haematopoietic output. Molecularly, the HSC-iM program was enriched in HSCs from adult and paediatric samples across conditions ranging from COVID-19 recovery, sickle cell disease, ageing and clonal haematopoiesis, establishing both the validity of our xenograft models and the physiological relevance of HSC-iM. Clonal haematopoiesis mutations in HSC-iM attenuated the effects of inflammatory stress by promoting HSC activation and differentiation. Moreover, transmission of the pro-inflammatory HSC-iM transcriptional program to differentiated immune progeny was demonstrated in xenograft and physiological settings. Finally, HSC-iM program enrichment in circulating blood cells was associated with a heightened risk score for all-cause mortality in population cohort analyses, underscoring the clinical relevance of this newly identified HSC subset in characterizing heterogeneous health outcomes across a lifetime.
title_zh: 人类造血干细胞记住炎症应激
abstract_zh: 炎症会激活血细胞，导致衰老和恶性肿瘤1,2,3。造血干细胞 (HSC) 在感染后可存活一生，以维持终生造血功能 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9，但人类 HSC 如何响应和适应炎症应激尚不清楚。在这里，为了凭经验了解这种适应，我们开发了异种移植炎症恢复模型，并对异种移植的人类 HSC 进行了单细胞多组学研究。两个转录和表观遗传上不同的 HSC 亚群被鉴定出来，其中一个被称为 HSC 炎症记忆 (HSC-iM)，保留了先前炎症治疗的分子记忆。 HSC-iM 子集表现出静止和造血输出受限。从分子角度来看，HSC-iM 项目丰富了来自成人和儿童样本的 HSC，涵盖了从 COVID-19 恢复、镰状细胞病、衰老和克隆造血等各种条件，从而确立了我们异种移植模型的有效性和 HSC-iM 的生理相关性。 HSC-iM 的克隆造血突变通过促进 HSC 激活和分化来减弱炎症应激的影响。此外，在异种移植和生理环境中证实了促炎 HSC-iM 转录程序向分化免疫后代的传递。最后，HSC-iM 程序对循环血细胞的富集与人群队列分析中全因死亡率风险评分的升高相关，强调了这一新确定的 HSC 子集在表征不同人群的异质性健康结果方面的临床相关性。

title: Darkness and body size shaped end-Cretaceous marine extinction patterns
source: Nature
abstract: The Chicxulub asteroid impact at the Cretaceous–Paleogene (K–Pg) boundary (66 Ma) is thought to have caused the extinction of around 75% of species in the fossil record by triggering catastrophic environmental changes1. However, despite decades of research, the mechanisms linking the environmental changes to the selective extinction patterns observed in the marine fossil record remain unresolved. Here we use a global trait-based ecosystem model2,3 to establish this causality for the marine plankton community beyond the fossilized groups. Our model simulates diversity dynamics during the initial 100 years after the K–Pg boundary and represents explicitly extinction based on biomass thresholds that scales with body size. Under K–Pg climatic forcings, the model reproduces successfully key observed extinction patterns, including the high vulnerability of planktic foraminifera and other zooplankton, the survival of small mixotrophs4 and phytoplankton5,6, and potential for reduced diversity loss in high-latitude settings7. Our analysis suggests that impact-driven darkness and body-size-dependent extinction thresholds drove most of the observed extinction patterns. These results suggest that plankton ecologies enhance survival through differences in energy demand and acquisition. Our study bridges the gap between fossil evidence of extinction patterns and the K–Pg impact winter hypothesis, highlighting the value of trait-based models for understanding past biodiversity crises.
title_zh: 黑暗和体型塑造白垩纪末海洋灭绝模式
abstract_zh: 据认为，希克苏鲁伯小行星撞击白垩纪-古近纪 (K-Pg) 边界（66 Ma）引发灾难性的环境变化，导致化石记录中约 75% 的物种灭绝。然而，尽管进行了数十年的研究，但将环境变化与海洋化石记录中观察到的选择性灭绝模式联系起来的机制仍未解决。在这里，我们使用基于全球特征的生态系统模型2,3来建立化石群体之外的海洋浮游生物群落的这种因果关系。我们的模型模拟了 K-Pg 边界后最初 100 年的多样性动态，并根据与体型成比例的生物量阈值明确表示灭绝。在 K-Pg 气候强迫下，该模型成功再现了观察到的关键灭绝模式，包括浮游有孔虫和其他浮游动物的高度脆弱性、小型混合营养生物 4 和浮游植物 5,6 的生存，以及高纬度环境中减少多样性损失的潜力 7。我们的分析表明，撞击驱动的黑暗和与体型相关的灭绝阈值驱动了大多数观察到的灭绝模式。这些结果表明，浮游生物生态通过能量需求和获取的差异来增强生存。我们的研究弥合了灭绝模式的化石证据与 K-Pg 影响冬季假说之间的差距，强调了基于性状的模型对于理解过去生物多样性危机的价值。

title: Sparse-to-dense coding transformation between hippocampal areas CA3 and CA1
source: Nature
abstract: The hippocampus is crucial for spatial memory and navigation. It contains place cells1,2,3,4,5,6,7: spatially selective neurons found in areas CA1 and CA3—two distinct hippocampal subregions with substantially different anatomical connectivity8. Previous studies have found highly similar spatial coding between CA1 and CA3 place cells3,9,10,11. This raises the question of why two subregions that form consecutive processing stages would exhibit identical neural coding. Here we hypothesized that the lack of differences between CA1 and CA3 spatial coding is due to the experimental paradigm: using small arenas. We tested this hypothesis by simultaneously recording from CA1 and CA3 neurons in bats flying in flight tunnels up to 200 m in length. We identified highly distinct neural coding in CA1 and CA3: whereas CA1 neurons exhibited dense spatial coding, consisting of multiple place fields12, CA3 neurons exhibited ultrasparse spatial coding, consisting predominantly of single place fields. Despite this marked difference, the sizes of place fields were very similar between the two subregions, across 5 different environment sizes ranging from 6 m to 200 m. Using a neural-network model, we show that such a sparse-to-dense transformation can facilitate fast learning of new spatial maps. We also found that in a large multicompartment environment, place cells were strongly modulated by trajectory history—a contextual effect (retrospective coding) that could last for over 100 m. Together, by using large naturalistic environments, we identified a CA3-to-CA1 coding transformation that serves to reformat spatial information into a more efficient, compressed neural code.
title_zh: 海马区 CA3 和 CA1 之间的稀疏到密集编码转换
abstract_zh: 海马体对于空间记忆和导航至关重要。它包含位置细胞 1、2、3、4、5、6、7：在 CA1 和 CA3 区域发现的空间选择性神经元——两个不同的海马亚区域，具有显着不同的解剖连接性8。先前的研究发现 CA1 和 CA3 位置细胞之间的空间编码高度相似3,9,10,11。这就提出了一个问题：为什么形成连续处理阶段的两个子区域会表现出相同的神经编码。在这里，我们假设 CA1 和 CA3 空间编码之间缺乏差异是由于实验范式：使用小竞技场。我们通过同时记录在长达 200 m 的飞行隧道中飞行的蝙蝠的 CA1 和 CA3 神经元来测试这一假设。我们在 CA1 和 CA3 中发现了高度不同的神经编码：CA1 神经元表现出密集的空间编码，由多个位置场组成12，而 CA3 神经元表现出超稀疏的空间编码，主要由单个位置场组成。尽管存在显着差异，但两个次区域之间的场所场大小非常相似，涵盖从 6 m 到 200 m 的 5 种不同环境大小。使用神经网络模型，我们表明这种稀疏到密集的转换可以促进新空间地图的快速学习。我们还发现，在大型多室环境中，位置细胞受到轨迹历史的强烈调节——一种可以持续超过 100 m 的上下文效应（回顾性编码）。通过使用大型自然环境，我们共同确定了 CA3 到 CA1 的编码转换，该转换可以帮助

title: Technology mediation in child sexual exploitation and abuse in Africa and Asia
source: Nature
abstract: As digital access expands rapidly among children worldwide, technology-facilitated child sexual exploitation and abuse (CSEA), including online grooming, sexual solicitation, non-consensual image sharing and sexual extortion, has emerged as urgent yet underexamined category of digital harms1. Despite growing policy attention to online safety, evidence remains limited, particularly in low- and middle-income countries, where most of the world’s children live2. We analysed nationally representative survey data from 11,912 children aged 12–17 years across 12 countries in eastern and southern Africa and Southeast Asia, collected through the Disrupting Harm project in 2020–2021. We found that one in six internet-using children experienced at least one form of technology-facilitated CSEA, equivalent to over 10 million children. Despite this scale, many experiences went undisclosed, pointing to disclosure as a critical pathway for protection in the digital age. When children did disclose, they relied primarily on informal channels, especially friends, rather than formal reporting mechanisms such as police or helplines. Using Bayesian hierarchical models accounting for cross-country heterogeneity, we find that older children were less likely to disclose, whereas enabling parental mediation of online activities and children’s knowledge of where to seek help after sexual harassment or assault were associated with higher rates of disclosure. These findings provide population-level evidence to inform prevention and response across low- and middle-income countries, where coordinated action by policymakers, law enforcement and technology companies is urgently needed to protect all children.
title_zh: 非洲和亚洲儿童性剥削和性虐待的技术调解
abstract_zh: 随着数字化接触在全球儿童中迅速普及，技术促成的儿童性剥削和性虐待 (CSEA)，包括在线诱骗、性诱惑、未经同意的图像共享和性勒索，已成为紧迫但未经充分审查的数字危害类别1。尽管政策越来越关注网络安全，但证据仍然有限，特别是在世界上大多数儿童居住的低收入和中等收入国家2。我们分析了 2020-2021 年通过 Disrupting Harm 项目收集的东非、南部非洲和东南亚 12 个国家的 11,912 名 12-17 岁儿童的全国代表性调查数据。我们发现，六分之一的使用互联网的儿童至少经历过一种技术辅助的 CSEA，相当于超过 1000 万儿童。尽管规模如此之大，但许多经历并未被披露，这表明披露是数字时代保护的关键途径。当孩子们确实举报时，他们主要依靠非正式渠道，尤其是朋友，而不是警察或求助热线等正式报告机制。使用考虑跨国异质性的贝叶斯分层模型，我们发现年龄较大的孩子不太可能披露信息，而父母对在线活动的调解以及儿童在性骚扰或性侵犯后知道去哪里寻求帮助与较高的披露率相关。这些发现提供了人口层面的证据，为低收入和中等收入国家的预防和应对提供信息，这些国家采取协调一致的行动

title: αKG-mediated carnitine synthesis drives DNA repair via histone acetylation
source: Nature
abstract: Homologous recombination (HR) deficiency increases sensitivity to DNA-damaging agents that are commonly used to treat cancer1. In HR-proficient cancers, the metabolic mechanisms that drive response or resistance to DNA-damaging agents remain unclear. Here we have identified that depletion of α-ketoglutarate (αKG) sensitizes HR-proficient cells to DNA-damaging agents by metabolic regulation of histone acetylation. αKG is required for the activity of αKG-dependent dioxygenases2 (αKGDDs), and previous work has focused almost exclusively on the demethylase functions of αKGDD. Using a targeted CRISPR knockout library consisting of 64 αKGDDs, we discovered that trimethyllysine hydroxylase epsilon (TMLHE), the first and rate-limiting enzyme in de novo carnitine synthesis, is necessary for the survival of HR-proficient cells in the presence of DNA-damaging agents. Unexpectedly, αKG-mediated TMLHE-dependent carnitine synthesis was required for histone acetylation and was non-redundant with other nucleo-cytosolic acetyl-CoA-generating pathways. The increase in histone acetylation by means of the αKG–carnitine axis promoted HR-mediated DNA repair through site-specific histone acetylation. Finally, we observed a positive correlation between TMLHE and histone acetylation in patient samples and found that high TMLHE or acetylcarnitine correlates with worse progression-free survival in patients treated with DNA-damaging agents. This study demonstrates for the first time, to our knowledge, that αKG affects site-specific histone acetylation and provides a mechanism of HR proficiency through carnitine synthesis. Moreover, these data provide a metabolic avenue for inducing HR deficiency and promoting sensitivity to DNA-damaging agents.
title_zh: αKG 介导的肉碱合成通过组蛋白乙酰化驱动 DNA 修复

Unexpectedly, αKG-mediated TMLHE-dependent carnitine synthesis was required for histone acetylation and was non-redundant with other nucleo-cytosolic acetyl-CoA-generating pathways.
