title: Upcycling of plastic garbage bags to graphene@silica fabric for sensing platforms
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: Flexible sensors with high durability and multifunctionality are essential for next-generation wearable technologies and applications under extreme conditions. However, most existing sensors are subjected to polymer-based substrates, which intrinsically experience poor thermal resistance, insufficient structural and chemical robustness, and unsustainable large-scale fabrication. Here we develop a winding chemical vapour deposition method using waste plastic garbage bags as solid carbon precursors to achieve uniform graphene growth on silica fabric (G@SF), simultaneously enabling high-performance textile production for cost-efficient sensor fabrication and waste plastic upcycling to address environmental pollution. By leveraging the advantages of both the woven architecture and the laser-responsive nature of the graphene layer, multifunctional sensors can be fabricated from the obtained G@SF via programmable laser erasing. These sensors have reliable multimodal sensing capabilities, including temperature detection, pressure and deformation monitoring and near-field communication. The G@SF sensors exhibit excellent thermal stability of up to 1,000 °C, mechanical flexibility and chemical robustness. A proof-of-concept smart glove that integrates G@SF sensors further highlights their multifunctionality and resilience under harsh conditions. This study presents a viable strategy for fabricating sustainable and high-performance flexible sensor fabrics from plastic waste.
title_zh: 将塑料垃圾袋升级为用于传感平台的石墨烯@二氧化硅织物
abstract_zh: 具有高耐用性和多功能性的柔性传感器对于极端条件下的下一代可穿戴技术和应用至关重要。然而，大多数现有传感器都采用基于聚合物的基板，其本质上耐热性差、结构和化学稳定性不足以及不可持续的大规模制造。在这里，我们开发了一种缠绕化学气相沉积方法，使用废塑料垃圾袋作为固体碳前体，在二氧化硅织物（G@SF）上实现石墨烯的均匀生长，同时实现高性能纺织品生产，以实现成本效益高的传感器制造和废塑料升级回收，以解决环境污染。通过利用编织结构和石墨烯层的激光响应特性的优势，可以通过可编程激光擦除从获得的 G@SF 中制造多功能传感器。这些传感器具有可靠的多模式传感功能，包括温度检测、压力和变形监测以及近场通信。 The G@SF sensors exhibit excellent thermal stability of up to 1,000 °C, mechanical flexibility and chemical robustness.集成 G@SF 传感器的概念验证智能手套进一步凸显了其多功能性和恶劣条件下的弹性。这项研究提出了一种利用塑料废物制造可持续且高性能柔性传感器织物的可行策略。

title: Spatiotemporal transcriptome atlas of human embryos after gastrulation
source: Nature
abstract: The comprehensive spatiotemporal atlas of gene expression during early human embryonic development is critical for insights into embryogenesis1, organogenesis2 and disease origins3,4. Here, leveraging Stereo-seq technology, we generated spatial transcriptomic profiles across 77 sagittal sections of 13 whole-human embryos ranging from Carnegie stage 12 to 23, integrated with single-nucleus RNA sequencing to elucidate gene expression patterns within defined cellular contexts, revealing the cellular heterogeneity that drives organ-specific differentiation. Our study has established a regulatory profile for the development of 50 organs and 198 substructures, and identified potential tissue-identity regulators. Of note, it uncovered previously uncharacterized gene functions in cardiac and brain development. The atlas not only substantiates and refines the current understanding of human organ development but also highlights key organs susceptible to genetic disorders. Furthermore, we characterized the allelic gene expression within specific organs at different developmental stages. This work presents a comprehensive compilation of genome-wide gene expression profiles for each spatially defined cell population, which can be visualized as a spatial display of the embryonic transcriptional landscape. These results offer the most thorough delineation to data of the spatiotemporal transcriptomic dynamics of human organogenesis.
title_zh: 原肠胚形成后人类胚胎的时空转录组图谱
abstract_zh: 人类早期胚胎发育过程中基因表达的综合时空图谱对于深入了解胚胎发生1、器官发生2和疾病起源3、4至关重要。在这里，我们利用 Stereo-seq 技术，生成了 13 个全人类胚胎（从卡内基阶段 12 到 23）的 77 个矢状切片的空间转录组图谱，与单核 RNA 测序相结合，以阐明特定细胞背景下的基因表达模式，揭示驱动器官特异性分化的细胞异质性。我们的研究已经建立了 50 个器官和 198 个子结构发育的调控概况，并确定了潜在的组织身份调控因子。值得注意的是，它揭示了心脏和大脑发育中以前未表征的基因功能。该图谱不仅证实和完善了当前对人体器官发育的理解，而且还强调了易受遗传性疾病影响的关键器官。此外，我们还表征了不同发育阶段特定器官内等位基因的表达。这项工作为每个空间定义的细胞群提供了全基因组基因表达谱的全面汇编，可以将其可视化为胚胎转录景观的空间显示。这些结果为人类器官发生的时空转录组动力学数据提供了最彻底的描述。

title: Redesigning algorithms to intervene on social norm misperceptions during a national election
source: Nature
abstract: For the first time in history, civic discourse commonly occurs in digital environments in which algorithms influence exposure to social information1,2. It is increasingly important to understand whether and how these algorithms affect political discourse3,4,5. Here we built custom feed-ranking algorithms with full control over their features, and randomly assigned 2,000 participants to use them for 8 weeks (before and after the 2024 US presidential election). We tested whether an engagement-based algorithm (used on major social media platforms6,7) amplifies intergroup, moralized and emotional (IME) information in ways that skew perceptions of social norms around political dialogue5,8, and whether it increased engagement with IME content and perceptions of partisan animosity (compared with a reverse-chronological feed9,10). We also developed and tested a ‘diversified extremity’ algorithm to reduce the influence of extreme users11,12,13 to improve the accuracy of social norm perception14,15,16 and reduce perceptions of partisan animosity. We found that engagement-based feeds amplified IME and toxic content relative to reverse-chronological feeds, with the largest increases in moral outrage and political content. Engagement-based feeds also reduced prescriptive norm perception accuracy (albeit in an unexpected direction) and increased perceived partisan animosity. However, they did not significantly alter users’ own engagement behaviours. The diversified extremity algorithm reduced IME and toxic content exposure, improved prescriptive norm accuracy, yet maintained comparable platform enjoyment—suggesting that reducing the influence of extreme users can curb algorithmic distortions without diminishing user experience.protocol registration The Stage 1 protocol for this Registered Report was accepted in principle on 17 September 2024. The protocol, as accepted by the journal, can be found at https://osf.io/c9a3m.
title_zh: 重新设计算法以干预全国选举期间的社会规范误解
abstract_zh: 历史上第一次，公民话语普遍出现在数字环境中，其中算法影响社会信息的暴露1,2。了解这些算法是否以及如何影响政治话语变得越来越重要3,4,5。在这里，我们构建了自定义的 feed 排名算法，可以完全控制其功能，并随机分配 2,000 名参与者使用它们 8 周（2024 年美国总统大选前后）。我们测试了基于参与的算法（在主要社交媒体平台上使用6,7）是否会放大群体间、道德化和情感（IME）信息，从而扭曲对政治对话周围社会规范的看法5,8，以及它是否增加了对IME内容的参与和对党派敌意的看法（与按时间倒序排列的反馈相比9,10）。我们还开发并测试了“多元化极端”算法，以减少极端用户的影响11,12,13，提高社会规范感知的准确性14,15,16并减少党派仇恨的感知。我们发现，相对于逆时间顺序的提要，基于参与的提要放大了 IME 和有毒内容，其中道德义愤和政治内容的增幅最大。基于参与度的信息流还降低了规范性规范感知的准确性（尽管是朝着意想不到的方向），并增加了感知到的党派敌意。然而，它们并没有显着改变用户自己的参与行为。多样化的肢体算法减少了 IME 和有毒内容暴露，提高了规范标准的准确性，同时保持了可比的 p

title: Experimental randomness amplification
source: Nature
abstract: Realistic quantum information processing devices are inherently imperfect, leading to computational errors that require quantum error correction. Likewise, random bits generated by such devices are flawed and must be enhanced to be usable for applications such as generating cryptographic keys. This enhancement of randomness quality is achieved through a protocol known as randomness amplification1. Here we report on an experiment that implements such a protocol. Randomness amplification is device-independent, making no assumptions about the internal workings of the quantum devices. It requires executing a loophole-free Bell test2,3,4 within a specific parameter regime that involves both a high Bell violation and a high repetition rate. The experimental demonstration is made possible by a combination of theoretical advances, which allow for protocols with an experimentally realistic parameter regime, and experimental progress that achieves this regime with superconducting circuits. Crucially, randomness amplification has been proven to be impossible by purely classical means5. This experiment therefore demonstrates a definitive quantum advantage—leveraging quantum technology to accomplish a task unattainable by classical information processing.
title_zh: 实验随机性放大
abstract_zh: Realistic quantum information processing devices are inherently imperfect, leading to computational errors that require quantum error correction. Likewise, random bits generated by such devices are flawed and must be enhanced to be usable for applications such as generating cryptographic keys.随机性质量的增强是通过称为随机性放大的协议来实现的。在这里，我们报告了实施此类协议的实验。随机放大与设备无关，不对量子设备的内部工作原理做出任何假设。 It requires executing a loophole-free Bell test2,3,4 within a specific parameter regime that involves both a high Bell violation and a high repetition rate. The experimental demonstration is made possible by a combination of theoretical advances, which allow for protocols with an experimentally realistic parameter regime, and experimental progress that achieves this regime with superconducting circuits.至关重要的是，随机性放大已被证明通过纯粹的经典方法是不可能的5。因此，该实验展示了明确的量子优势——利用量子技术来完成经典信息处理无法完成的任务。

title: Cellular water-potential sensing through biomolecular condensation
source: Nature
abstract: Water molecules, as solvents for biomolecules, are essential to cells. The water potential of the cell decreases under water-deficient conditions1,2, yet how cells sense changes in water potential remains unknown. Here we identify a sterile alpha motif (SAM)-containing protein, SAM8, that undergoes water-potential-dependent condensation both in vivo and in vitro and is crucial for hyperosmotic stress tolerance and seed germination. We use biophysical techniques, in vitro reconstitution and bioimaging to demonstrate that SAM8 is strongly hydrated under normal water conditions, preventing its macroscopic condensation. A negatively charged patch determines SAM8 hydration by creating an electric field and micropolar environment. Water-deficient conditions weaken this hydration, thereby activating SAM8 condensation by reprogramming hydrogen bond, electrostatic and hydrophobic interactions. Furthermore, we demonstrate that SAM8 condensates selectively sequester RNA export factors, leading to nuclear retention of mRNAs and translational reprogramming under hyperosmotic stress. Our findings show a mechanism by which plant cells directly sense and respond to water status, shedding light on how they adapt to water deficit conditions.
title_zh: 通过生物分子缩合进行细胞水势传感
abstract_zh: 水分子作为生物分子的溶剂，对细胞至关重要。在缺水条件下，细胞的水势会降低1,2，但细胞如何感知水势的变化仍然未知。在这里，我们鉴定了一种含有无菌α基序（SAM）的蛋白质SAM8，它在体内和体外都会经历水势依赖性缩合，对于高渗胁迫耐受性和种子发芽至关重要。我们使用生物物理技术、体外重构和生物成像来证明 SAM8 在正常水条件下具有很强的水合性，从而防止其宏观凝结。带负电的贴片通过创建电场和微极性环境来确定 SAM8 水合作用。缺水条件会削弱这种水合作用，从而通过重新编程氢键、静电和疏水相互作用来激活 SAM8 缩合。此外，我们证明 SAM8 缩合物选择性地隔离 RNA 输出因子，导致 mRNA 的核保留和高渗应激下的翻译重编程。我们的研究结果揭示了植物细胞直接感知和响应水分状况的机制，揭示了它们如何适应缺水条件。

title: Transfer learning reveals large discrepancies between air and land surface temperatures in cities
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Understanding of urban weather and extreme events remains severely limited by data poverty resulting from a dearth of true urban weather stations. As a result, land surface temperature (Ts), obtained from remote sensing platforms, has been widely used as a stand-in for near-surface air temperature (Ta) despite their fundamental differences, especially in urban areas. Although Ts provides important scientific insights and practical utility for studying the urban thermal environment, this substitution risks introducing large uncertainties and biased characterization of impact-relevant urban heat stress. Here we develop an urban transfer-learning framework (U-TL) to address this critical gap and to provide urban high-resolution air temperature (U-HAT) data at large scales across the contiguous United States (CONUS). U-TL demonstrates high accuracy and strong robustness in predicting urban Ta, even with limited training data. The resulting U-HAT is a high-resolution urban Ta dataset capable of accurately reproducing observed and well-established urban climatology. U-HAT reveals substantial Ts–Ta discrepancies and therefore cautions the use of Ts to characterize urban heat. We show that satellite-measured Ts substantially overestimates both urban heat stress magnitude and intra-city spatial variability, which have consequential implications for urban heat exposure, vulnerability, and adaptation policy making.
title_zh: 迁移学习揭示了城市空气和地表温度之间的巨大差异
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏真正的城市气象站而导致数据匮乏，对城市天气和极端事件的了解仍然受到严重限制。因此，从遥感平台获得的地表温度（Ts）已被广泛用作近地表气温（Ta）的替代品，尽管它们存在根本差异，特别是在城市地区。尽管 Ts 为研究城市热环境提供了重要的科学见解和实际实用性，但这种替代可能会带来很大的不确定性和与影响相关的城市热压力的刻画偏差。在这里，我们开发了一个城市迁移学习框架（U-TL）来解决这一关键差距，并提供美国本土（CONUS）大范围的城市高分辨率气温（U-HAT）数据。即使训练数据有限，U-TL 在预测城市 Ta 方面也表现出很高的准确性和很强的鲁棒性。由此产生的 U-HAT 是一个高分辨率的城市 Ta 数据集，能够准确地再现观测到的、成熟的城市气候学。 U-HAT 揭示了 Ts-Ta 的巨大差异，因此警告使用 Ts 来表征城市热量。我们表明，卫星测量的 Ts 大大高估了城市热应力强度和城市内空间变异性，这对城市热暴露、脆弱性和适应政策的制定产生了重大影响。

title: Structural and mechanistic insights into the inhibition of Plasmodium falciparum MDR1
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Malaria, caused by the parasite Plasmodium falciparum, remains a significant global health threat, with multidrug resistance posing a major challenge to treatment. The P-glycoprotein homolog P. falciparum Multidrug Resistance Protein 1 (PfMDR1) is a key determinant of resistance to first-line antimalarials like mefloquine (MFQ) and chloroquine. ACT-451840, a clinical phase I drug, has been developed as an antimalarial candidate, but its mechanism of action and interaction with drug resistance markers remain to be fully understood. Here, we present the cryo-electron microscopy structure of PfMDR1 in complex with ACT-451840, determined at a resolution of 3.42 Å. The structure reveals that ACT-451840 binds within the central cavity and locks PfMDR1 in an inward-open conformation, inhibiting its basal ATPase activity. A structural comparison of the ACT-451840-bound state with the previously reported MFQ-bound state provides a molecular explanation for how ACT-451840 resistance mutations can lead to the sensitization of MFQ. Furthermore, a comparative structural analysis and biochemical characterization with human ABCB1 reveal the selective mechanism of ACT-451840 against PfMDR1. Our findings provide a structural basis for the inhibitory mechanism of ACT-451840, which may inform the future development of antimalarial candidates targeting PfMDR1.
title_zh: 抑制恶性疟原虫 MDR1 的结构和机制见解
abstract_zh: 由恶性疟原虫引起的疟疾仍然是全球健康的重大威胁，多重耐药性对治疗构成了重大挑战。 P-糖蛋白同源恶性疟原虫多药耐药蛋白 1 (PfMDR1) 是甲氟喹 (MFQ) 和氯喹等一线抗疟药物耐药的关键决定因素。 ACT-451840是一种临床I期药物，已被开发为抗疟候选药物，但其作用机制以及与耐药标记物的相互作用仍有待充分了解。 Here, we present the cryo-electron microscopy structure of PfMDR1 in complex with ACT-451840, determined at a resolution of 3.42 Å.该结构揭示了 ACT-451840 结合在中央腔内，并将 PfMDR1 锁定在向内开放的构象中，抑制其基础 ATP 酶活性。 ACT-451840 结合状态与之前报道的 MFQ 结合状态的结构比较为 ACT-451840 抗性突变如何导致 MFQ 致敏提供了分子解释。此外，与人 ABCB1 的比较结构分析和生化表征揭示了 ACT-451840 针对 PfMDR1 的选择性机制。我们的研究结果为 ACT-451840 的抑制机制提供了结构基础，这可能为针对 PfMDR1 的抗疟候选药物的未来开发提供信息。

title: Polyketide synthase-based controlled synthesis of polycyclopropanated fuel molecules
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Reducing carbon emissions from aviation and long-distance transportation sectors requires the development of sustainable biofuels with suitable energy density, freezing point, and other physical properties. We previously demonstrated biological production of high energy polycyclopropanated fatty acids (POP-FAs, class I) using an iterative polyketide synthase (iPKS) pathway in a Streptomyces host. Here, we used a computational model of fuel properties to identify chain length and cyclopropanation control as critical steps to engineer this iPKS for biofuel applications. We next explored the natural diversity of POP biosynthesis by investigating homologous pathways. Then, by in vivo gene exchange, we determined cyclopropanase (CP) catalysis to be key for POP-FA engineering. Leveraging both natural and engineered pathway product diversity, we demonstrate targeted production of improved POP-FAs, namely shortened POP-FAs with predicted superior freezing point properties for aviation, as well as fully cyclopropane-saturated POP-FAs which should have superior energy-density. These precise and controllable modifications to POP-FA structure open the door for bioproduction of designer POP fuels.
title_zh: 基于聚酮合酶的聚环丙烷化燃料分子的受控合成
abstract_zh: Reducing carbon emissions from aviation and long-distance transportation sectors requires the development of sustainable biofuels with suitable energy density, freezing point, and other physical properties. We previously demonstrated biological production of high energy polycyclopropanated fatty acids (POP-FAs, class I) using an iterative polyketide synthase (iPKS) pathway in a Streptomyces host. Here, we used a computational model of fuel properties to identify chain length and cyclopropanation control as critical steps to engineer this iPKS for biofuel applications.接下来，我们通过研究同源途径来探索 POP 生物合成的自然多样性。然后，通过体内基因交换，我们确定环丙烷酶 (CP) 催化是 POP-FA 工程的关键。 Leveraging both natural and engineered pathway product diversity, we demonstrate targeted production of improved POP-FAs, namely shortened POP-FAs with predicted superior freezing point properties for aviation, as well as fully cyclopropane-saturated POP-FAs which should have superior energy-density.这些对 POP-FA 结构的精确可控修改为设计 POP 燃料的生物生产打开了大门。

title: EnzymeTuning improves enzyme-constrained metabolic modeling and proteome abundance prediction through deep learning
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The accuracy of enzyme kinetic parameters, particularly enzyme turnover numbers (kcat), is critical for the predictive performance of enzyme-constrained genome-scale metabolic models. However, currently available kinetic datasets remain sparse and often fail to capture in vivo enzyme behavior, thereby limiting model accuracy. To address these limitations, we develop EnzymeTuning, a generative adversarial network-based framework for global kcat optimization. By further incorporating literature-derived protein degradation constants, we infer protein synthesis rates and systematically assess their impact on model performance. Here, we show that EnzymeTuning substantially improves prediction accuracy and expands proteome-level coverage across diverse organisms, including Saccharomyces cerevisiae, Kluyveromyces lactis, Kluyveromyces marxianus, Yarrowia lipolytica, and Escherichia coli. Furthermore, EnzymeTuning reveals context-dependent enzyme usage patterns and adaptive catalytic resource allocation under diverse carbon- and nitrogen-limited chemostat conditions, underscoring the substantial potential of this framework for integrative multi-omics analyses.
title_zh: EnzymeTuning 通过深度学习改进酶限制的代谢模型和蛋白质组丰度预测
abstract_zh: 酶动力学参数的准确性，特别是酶周转数 (kcat)，对于酶限制的基因组规模代谢模型的预测性能至关重要。然而，目前可用的动力学数据集仍然稀疏，并且通常无法捕获体内酶的行为，从而限制了模型的准确性。为了解决这些限制，我们开发了 EnzymeTuning，这是一种基于生成对抗网络的框架，用于全局 kcat 优化。通过进一步结合文献得出的蛋白质降解常数，我们推断蛋白质合成率并系统地评估其对模型性能的影响。在这里，我们表明 EnzymeTuning 显着提高了预测准确性，并扩大了不同生物体的蛋白质组水平覆盖范围，包括酿酒酵母、乳酸克鲁维酵母、马克斯克鲁维酵母、解脂耶氏酵母和大肠杆菌。此外，EnzymeTuning 揭示了在不同的碳和氮限制的恒化器条件下，上下文相关的酶使用模式和自适应催化资源分配，强调了该框架在综合多组学分析中的巨大潜力。

title: Early hexapod genomes reveal the deep origin of insect gustatory and odorant receptors
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Insect smell and taste is primarily mediated through a chemoreceptor superfamily that includes three lineages of gustatory receptors—sugar, carbon dioxide, and bitter—and a distinct lineage of odorant receptors. Although sugar gustatory receptors can be traced back to ancestral crustaceans, the evolutionary origins of the remaining lineages have been unclear. Here, we resolve this history through homology-driven searches and phylogenetic analyses across insect and non-insect hexapod genomes. We uncover several previously unrecognized gustatory receptor clades, including a fifth insect chemoreceptor lineage that we term relict gustatory receptors, which expanded in the non-insect hexapod order Diplura but dwindled in extant insects. We also identify a gustatory receptor lineage in non-insect hexapods that is sister to insect odorant receptors, and which provides strong evidence that odorant receptors arose from within the sugar gustatory receptors. These findings clarify relationships among the insect gustatory and odorant receptor lineages and illuminate the origins and subsequent diversification of chemoreception across Hexapoda.
title_zh: 早期六足动物基因组揭示了昆虫味觉和气味受体的深层起源
abstract_zh: 昆虫的气味和味道主要是通过化学感受器超家族介导的，该家族包括三种味觉受体谱系——糖、二氧化碳和苦味——以及独特的气味受体谱系。尽管糖味觉受体可以追溯到甲壳类动物祖先，但其余谱系的进化起源尚不清楚。在这里，我们通过昆虫和非昆虫六足基因组的同源驱动搜索和系统发育分析来解决这段历史。我们发现了几个以前未被识别的味觉受体进化枝，包括第五种昆虫化学感受器谱系，我们称之为残余味觉受体，它在非昆虫六足目 Diplura 中扩张，但在现存昆虫中缩小。我们还在非昆虫六足动物中发现了味觉受体谱系，它是昆虫气味受体的姐妹，这提供了强有力的证据表明气味受体起源于糖味觉受体。这些发现阐明了昆虫味觉和气味受体谱系之间的关系，并阐明了六足动物化学感受的起源和随后的多样化。

title: Evolution of limb and digit identity genes since the tetrapod ancestor
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Natural selection has sculpted tetrapod limbs and digits into a tremendous morphological diversity, but the underlying developmental mechanism remains unclear. This leads to an enduring debate concerning the identity of the three digits of bird wing. Here we use comparative digit transcriptomics across six tetrapod species to examine gene expression signatures of digit evolution. Here we show that the avian wing digits are homologous to reptilian forelimb digits 1,3,4. We find that birds uniquely increase fore-hindlimb transcriptome divergence during development, relaxing constraints and facilitating wing and foot digit specialization. We identify many limb- or digit- identity associated genes that have a biased expression between fore- or hind-limb, or toward specific digits. There are more limb and digit biased genes among the avian lineages than in other tetrapod lineages. Our work reveals ancient regulatory networks that maintain limb and digit molecular identity through persistent differential expression. We also show that this conserved network does not preclude independent digit evolution, especially when developmental constraints are reduced.
title_zh: 自四足动物祖先以来肢体和数字识别基因的进化
abstract_zh: 自然选择将四足动物的四肢和手指塑造成巨大的形态多样性，但潜在的发育机制仍不清楚。这导致了关于鸟翼三个数字的身份的持久争论。在这里，我们使用六个四足动物物种的比较数字转录组学来检查数字进化的基因表达特征。在这里我们表明鸟类翅膀的数字与爬行动物前肢的数字 1、3、4 同源。我们发现鸟类在发育过程中独特地增加了前后肢转录组的差异，放松了限制并促进了翅膀和足趾的特化。我们鉴定出许多与肢体或数字身份相关的基因，这些基因在前肢或后肢之间或针对特定数字有偏向表达。与其他四足动物谱系相比，鸟类谱系中存在更多的肢体和数字偏向基因。我们的工作揭示了古老的调控网络，通过持续的差异表达来维持肢体和数字的分子身份。我们还表明，这种保守的网络并不排除独立的数字进化，特别是当发育限制减少时。

title: Highly dynamic assemblies of glycolytic enzymes by quinary determinants
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Molecular channelling has long since been proposed as an amenable solution to efficiently drive sequential enzymatic reactions in the cell. Nonetheless, metabolic channelling in central pathways such as glycolysis is still a matter of debate and plausible underlying mechanisms are not known. Here we use correlation spectroscopy and proximity labelling methods to uncover extremely dynamic interactions among enzymes of the glycolysis pathway in yeast and human cells. The resulting transient protein assemblies, tentatively named as protein flocks, form in the cytoplasm with a lifetime shorter than 10 ms. Compared to other metabolic pathways, glycolytic enzymes display a greater similarity in the electrochemical properties of surface atoms, pointing to quinary structural features as molecular determinants of protein flocks. We observe a remarkable negative correlation between the spatiotemporal coincidence by correlation spectroscopy and the Euclidean distance in surface atom configuration within multiple protein pairs, including a collection of surface variants generated from a de novo designed protein framework. By underlying protein flock formation from yeast to human, quinary determinants would provide enzymes with higher efficiency and specificity in glycolysis but, perhaps more important to human cells, would limit intermediate concentrations and prevent their inherent toxic effects.
title_zh: 通过五元决定簇进行糖酵解酶的高度动态组装
abstract_zh: 分子通道早已被提出作为一种有效的解决方案来有效驱动细胞中的连续酶促反应。尽管如此，糖酵解等中心途径中的代谢通道仍然是一个有争议的问题，并且合理的潜在机制尚不清楚。在这里，我们使用相关光谱和邻近标记方法来揭示酵母和人类细胞中糖酵解途径的酶之间极其动态的相互作用。由此产生的瞬时蛋白质组装体（暂定名为蛋白质群）在细胞质中形成，寿命短于 10 毫秒。与其他代谢途径相比，糖酵解酶在表面原子的电化学特性方面表现出更大的相似性，表明五元结构特征是蛋白质群的分子决定因素。我们观察到相关光谱的时空一致性与多个蛋白质对内表面原子构型的欧几里德距离之间存在显着的负相关性，包括从头设计的蛋白质框架生成的表面变体的集合。通过从酵母到人类的潜在蛋白质群形成，五元决定簇将为糖酵解提供更高效率和特异性的酶，但对人类细胞来说可能更重要的是，它将限制中间浓度并防止其固有的毒性作用。

title: African swine fever virus B66L drives extracellular mitochondrial release to promote systemic inflammation in mice
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Systemic inflammation is a hallmark of viral infection, but the upstream signals that initiate it remain poorly defined. Here we show that extracellular mitochondria act as inflammatory mediators during infection by vesicular stomatitis virus, influenza A virus, rabies virus, herpes simplex virus 1 and African swine fever virus (ASFV). In ASFV-infected primary porcine alveolar macrophages, the viral protein B66L promotes the capture of damaged mitochondria by autophagosomes while blocking their fusion with lysosomes, causing mitochondria to accumulate outside cells. Extracellular mitochondria are detected in the serum and bronchoalveolar lavage fluid of mice expressing B66L and in the serum of ASFV-infected pigs. Purified extracellular mitochondria trigger inflammatory cytokine production through cGAS-STING signalling and contribute to lung injury in mice. These findings identify virus-associated extracellular mitochondrial release as a pro-inflammatory mechanism during infection.
title_zh: 非洲猪瘟病毒 B66L 驱动细胞外线粒体释放，促进小鼠全身炎症
abstract_zh: 全身炎症是病毒感染的标志，但引发炎症的上游信号仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现细胞外线粒体在水泡性口炎病毒、甲型流感病毒、狂犬病病毒、单纯疱疹病毒1和非洲猪瘟病毒（ASFV）感染过程中充当炎症介质。在感染 ASFV 的原代猪肺泡巨噬细胞中，病毒蛋白 B66L 促进自噬体捕获受损线粒体，同时阻止其与溶酶体融合，导致线粒体在细胞外积聚。在表达 B66L 的小鼠的血清和支气管肺泡灌洗液以及感染 ASFV 的猪的血清中检测到细胞外线粒体。纯化的细胞外线粒体通过 cGAS-STING 信号传导触发炎症细胞因子的产生，并导致小鼠肺损伤。 These findings identify virus-associated extracellular mitochondrial release as a pro-inflammatory mechanism during infection.

title: Long-term spatiotemporal evolution of drug-resistant Mycobacterium tuberculosis in China
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Antibiotics have been used to treat tuberculosis for over 80 years, yet the long-term evolutionary dynamics of Mycobacterium tuberculosis (Mtb) under antibiotic pressure remain poorly characterized at the population level. Here, we analyze more than 18,000 available Mtb genomes to reconstruct the temporal and spatial evolution of drug resistance across China. We observe that resistance mutations to different drugs arose repeatedly, giving rise to hundreds to over a thousand small drug-resistant clades that mostly emerged within the past two decades. Once established, transmission of these clades was predominantly sustained within provinces, but could expand geographically with increased human mobility and bacterial fitness. In addition, we integrate published genomic and CRISPRi screening data to identify mutations associated with the emergence and transmission of drug resistance. Our study highlights the importance of human migration and bacterial adaption in shaping local epidemics of drug-resistant tuberculosis in China.
title_zh: 中国耐药结核杆菌的长期时空演化
abstract_zh: 抗生素用于治疗结核病已有 80 多年的历史，但在抗生素压力下结核分枝杆菌 (Mtb) 的长期进化动态在群体水平上仍知之甚少。在这里，我们分析了 18,000 多个可用的结核分枝杆菌基因组，以重建中国各地耐药性的时空演变。我们观察到，对不同药物的耐药突变反复出现，产生了数百至一千多个小型耐药进化枝，这些进化枝大多在过去二十年中出现。一旦建立，这些分支的传播主要在省内持续，但随着人类流动性和细菌适应性的增加，可能会在地理上扩大。此外，我们整合已发表的基因组和 CRISPRi 筛选数据，以识别与耐药性的出现和传播相关的突变。我们的研究强调了人类迁徙和细菌适应对中国耐药结核病局部流行的重要性。

title: Telomere-to-telomere genome assembly of Oryza australiensis reveals transposon-driven centromere repositioning and shared EE–DD ancestry
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Oryza australiensis (EE genome), the sole representative of the EE genome in the genus, holds significant value for deciphering polyploid evolution and mining stress-resistance genes owing to its extreme environmental adaptability. Here, we report a telomere-to-telomere (T2T) genome assembly of O. australiensis, yielding a 901 Mb genome with 12 complete chromosomes. This enables comprehensive annotation of centromeres, telomeres, and 36,742 genes, revealing non-canonical telomeric repeats and three distinct centromere repositioning mechanisms: inversion-driven shifts, duplication-mediated neocentromerization, and transposon burst-induced neocentromere formation. Crucially, transposon dynamics analysis reveals synchronized amplification of Angela LTR retrotransposons in the EE genome and the DD subgenome of allotetraploid O. alta (CCDD) prior to CCDD formation. Phylogenetic and synteny analyses of Angela LTR integrase domains, alongside a 275-bp repeat marker exclusive to EE and DD, indicate that the ancestral lineage that contributed the DD subgenome share common ancestry with an EE-like progenitor. These findings refine Oryza evolutionary history and highlight transposon dynamics in reconstructing deep evolutionary relationships.
title_zh: 澳大利亚稻的端粒到端粒基因组组装揭示了转座子驱动的着丝粒重新定位和共同的 EE-DD 祖先
abstract_zh: 澳大利亚稻（Oryza australiensis）（EE基因组）是该属中EE基因组的唯一代表，由于其极端的环境适应性，对于破译多倍体进化和挖掘抗逆基因具有重要价值。在这里，我们报告了澳大利亚O. australiensis的端粒到端粒（T2T）基因组组装，产生了具有12条完整染色体的901 Mb基因组。这使得能够对着丝粒、端粒和 36,742 个基因进行全面注释，揭示非规范端粒重复和三种不同的着丝粒重新定位机制：倒位驱动的转变、复制介导的新着丝粒化和转座子爆发诱导的新着丝粒形成。至关重要的是，转座子动力学分析揭示了在 CCDD 形成之前，Angela LTR 反转录转座子在 EE 基因组和异源四倍体 O. alta (CCDD) 的 DD 亚基因组中同步扩增。 Angela LTR 整合酶结构域的系统发育和同线性分析，以及 EE 和 DD 独有的 275 bp 重复标记，表明贡献 DD 亚基因组的祖先谱系与 EE 样祖细胞具有共同的祖先。这些发现完善了稻的进化历史，并强调了重建深层进化关系中的转座子动力学。

title: Mechanism of age-related accumulation of mtDNA mutations in human blood
source: Nature
abstract: Accumulation of mutant mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) heteroplasmy is among the strongest signatures of ageing1. Here we investigated the underlying mechanism by calling mtDNA sequence, mtDNA abundance and mtDNA heteroplasmic variants in human blood using whole-genome sequences from approximately 750,000 individuals. We observed that mtDNA single-nucleotide variants (mtSNVs) accumulate sharply at age 60 years, occur at low levels of heteroplasmy, exhibit little evidence of positive selection and are likely to be predominantly neutral. The mutational spectrum of mtSNVs does not reflect oxidative lesions, as is commonly invoked, but is more consistent with mtDNA replication errors. To understand why mtSNVs become detectable with age, we performed a genome-wide association study for heteroplasmic mtSNV burden, identifying germline variants near TERT, TCL1A and SMC4, all of which have been linked to clonal haematopoiesis (CH)2. Rare-variant analysis also showed that high mtSNV burden is associated with mutations in numerous CH driver genes. These genetic associations persisted even after exclusion of individuals with known CH driver mutations. Our results support a model in which ‘cryptic’ mtDNA mutations initially arise randomly as replication errors but are undetectable in bulk. They then become apparent only through age-related expansion of cellular clones in blood. We propose that the high copy number and mutation rate of mtDNA make it a sensitive blood-based marker of somatic mosaicism due to CH. Our work mechanistically unifies three prominent signatures of ageing: common germline variants in TERT, CH and observed accrual of mtDNA mutations.
title_zh: 人类血液中线粒体DNA突变与年龄相关积累的机制
abstract_zh: 突变线粒体 DNA (mtDNA) 异质性的积累是衰老最强烈的特征之一。在这里，我们使用来自约 750,000 个人的全基因组序列调用人类血液中的 mtDNA 序列、mtDNA 丰度和 mtDNA 异质变异来研究潜在的机制。我们观察到，mtDNA 单核苷酸变异 (mtSNV) 在 60 岁时急剧积累，异质性水平较低，几乎没有表现出正选择的证据，并且可能主要是中性的。 mtSNV 的突变谱并不像通常所说的那样反映氧化损伤，而是与 mtDNA 复制错误更一致。为了了解为什么 mtSNV 会随着年龄的增长而被检测到，我们对异质性 mtSNV 负荷进行了全基因组关联研究，识别了 TERT、TCL1A 和 SMC4 附近的种系变异，所有这些变异都与克隆造血 (CH)2 相关。稀有变异分析还表明，高 mtSNV 负担与许多 CH 驱动基因的突变有关。即使在排除具有已知 CH 驱动突变的个体后，这些遗传关联仍然存在。我们的结果支持一个模型，其中“神秘”mtDNA 突变最初作为复制错误随机出现，但批量检测不到。然后，只有通过血液中细胞克隆与年龄相关的扩张，它们才会变得明显。我们认为，mtDNA 的高拷贝数和突变率使其成为 CH 所致体细胞嵌合体的敏感血液标记物。我们的工作从机制上统一了衰老的三个突出特征：常见细菌

title: Structural basis of chondroitin sulfate backbone polymer synthesis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Chondroitin sulfate (CS) proteoglycans are extended (-GlcAβ1,3GalNAcβ1,4-)n co-polymers attached to cell surface and extracellular matrix core proteins that are further modified by extensive sulfation and epimerization. Four homologous proteins contribute to CS backbone synthesis (CHPF1, CHPF2, CHSY1, and CHSY3) and prior data suggests assembly of the proteins into heterocomplexes is required for function. Here we show by sequence alignment and structural modeling that all CHSYs and CHPFs contain an N-terminal CAZy GT31-like domain and a C-terminal GT7-like domain separated by a cystatin-like linker domain. Co-expression of one CHPF and one CHSY is required to form a soluble, functional heterodimeric CS synthase and structural modeling indicates all four potential CHSY-CHPF combinations can form equivalent heterodimeric complexes. Cryo-EM studies on CHSY3-CHPF1 confirm the structure, interface, and active site features predicted by the structural models. Enzymatic analyses of catalytic mutants demonstrate that only the glycosyltransferase domains in the CHSYs are responsible for polymer synthesis: the GT31 domain transfers β1,3-GlcA while the GT7 domain transfers β1,4-GalNAc. The corresponding CHPF domains do not contribute to polymer synthesis but stabilize the corresponding CHSY functional domains. Additional mutagenesis and modeling suggest that the bridging cystatin-like domains may contribute to efficient polymer synthesis.
title_zh: 硫酸软骨素主链聚合物合成的结构基础
abstract_zh: 硫酸软骨素 (CS) 蛋白聚糖是附着在细胞表面和细胞外基质核心蛋白上的 (-GlcAβ1,3GalNAcβ1,4-)n 延伸共聚物，并通过广泛的硫酸化和差向异构化进一步修饰。四种同源蛋白有助于 CS 主链的合成（CHPF1、CHPF2、CHSY1 和 CHSY3），先前的数据表明将这些蛋白组装成异质复合物是功能所必需的。在这里，我们通过序列比对和结构建模表明，所有 CHSY 和 CHPF 都包含一个 N 端 CAZy GT31 样结构域和一个 C 端 GT7 样结构域，由半胱氨酸蛋白酶抑制剂样连接结构域分隔开。需要一种 CHPF 和一种 CHSY 共表达才能形成可溶性、功能性异二聚体 CS 合酶，结构模型表明所有四种潜在的 CHSY-CHPF 组合都可以形成等效的异二聚体复合物。 CHSY3-CHPF1 的冷冻电镜研究证实了结构模型预测的结构、界面和活性位点特征。催化突变体的酶分析表明，只有 CHSY 中的糖基转移酶结构域负责聚合物合成：GT31 结构域转移 β1,3-GlcA，而 GT7 结构域转移 β1,4-GalNAc。相应的CHPF结构域不参与聚合物合成，但稳定相应的CHSY功能结构域。额外的诱变和建模表明桥接半胱氨酸蛋白酶抑制剂样结构域可能有助于有效的聚合物合成。

title: Critical misalignments in climate pledges reveal imbalanced sustainable development pathways
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: We explore the integration of climate action and Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) in the first two submissions of nationally determined contributions (NDCs) using an AI-based, human-validated framework. Our goal is to provide ex-ante evidence relevant to assessing policy adequacy. We find disparities in topics of interest with high-income countries emphasizing systemic challenges (health, SDG3) and low-income nations prioritizing the water-energy-food nexus (SDGs 6-7-12) and natural resource management (SDG15). We discuss what these diverging development trajectories imply for the Paris Agreement and the 2030 Agenda for sustainable development in terms of global inequality, sustainable finance flows and multilateral governance.
title_zh: 气候承诺的严重失调揭示了可持续发展道路的不平衡
abstract_zh: 我们使用基于人工智能、经过人工验证的框架，在前两份提交的国家自主贡献 (NDC) 中探索气候行动和可持续发展目标 (SDG) 的整合。我们的目标是提供与评估政策充分性相关的事前证据。我们发现关注主题存在差异，高收入国家强调系统性挑战（健康、可持续发展目标 3），而低收入国家则优先考虑水-能源-粮食关系（可持续发展目标 6-7-12）和自然资源管理（可持续发展目标 15）。我们讨论这些不同的发展轨迹对《巴黎协定》和《2030 年可持续发展议程》在全球不平等、可持续资金流动和多边治理方面意味着什么。

title: Meta-analysis reveals asymmetric root and microbial phenology shifts under global change
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Global environmental change is reshaping phenological patterns across ecosystems, yet belowground phenological responses remain poorly characterized. Using a flux-based framework, we derived phenological metrics from 2100 site-years of paired root and microbial respiration time series across 163 sites worldwide. Our meta-analysis shows that root and microbial phenology typically shift asymmetrically in direction and magnitude under global change, except for a warming-induced symmetric advance in season onset. Warming and nitrogen addition extended root growing season, whereas microbial season lengthened under warming and reduced precipitation but shortened following partial vegetation removal. These phenological shifts were largely decoupled from changes in respiration fluxes, indicating a distinct dimension of ecosystem responses to global change. Such phenological adjustments critically influence carbon dynamics, as warming-driven extensions of the microbial season alone could increase global heterotrophic respiration by 2.5 ± 0.8 Pg C yr−1 (mean ± SE). Our results provide flux-based empirical guidance for representing root and microbial phenology as distinct, driver-sensitive processes in Earth system models, thereby improving projections of ecosystem carbon dynamics.
title_zh: 荟萃分析揭示了全球变化下不对称的根和微生物物候变化
abstract_zh: 全球环境变化正在重塑整个生态系统的物候模式，但地下物候反应的特征仍然很少。使用基于通量的框架，我们从全球 163 个地点的 2100 个地点年配对根系和微生物呼吸时间序列中得出物候指标。我们的荟萃分析表明，在全球变化下，根系和微生物物候通常会在方向和幅度上发生不对称变化，除了变暖引起的季节开始的对称提前之外。变暖和氮添加延长了根系生长季节，而微生物季节在变暖和降水减少的情况下延长，但在部分植被去除后缩短。这些物候变化在很大程度上与呼吸通量的变化脱钩，表明生态系统对全球变化的响应具有独特的维度。这种物候调整严重影响碳动态，因为仅由变暖驱动的微生物季节的延长就可以使全球异养呼吸增加 2.5 ± 0.8 Pg C yr−1（平均值±SE）。我们的结果提供了基于通量的经验指导，用于将根和微生物物候表示为地球系统模型中独特的、驱动敏感的过程，从而改善生态系统碳动态的预测。

title: Tianwen-2 mission target asteroid (469219) Kamoʻoalewa probably develops an Itokawa-compositional but more space-weathered surface
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: China’s ongoing Tianwen-2 mission will return samples from a small, rapidly spinning Earth quasi-satellite (469219) Kamoʻoalewa. Previous studies linked Kamoʻoalewa to lunar composition and origin. Here, we propose another scenario. We reanalyze the reflectance spectrum of Kamoʻoalewa and obtain an absorption band center at 1.001 ± 0.028 μm (error is 1σ), consistent with LL chondrites. We then conduct space weathering experiments on meteorites and find that highly space-weathered LL chondrite powder (but not slab) successfully reproduces the reflectance spectrum of Kamoʻoalewa. We further trace the dynamical origin of Kamoʻoalewa and find that it probably originated from the ν6 secular resonance, and more specifically, the Flora family. Kamoʻoalewa exhibits a similar composition to Itokawa and 7 objects in the Flora family, but with a higher degree of space weathering. We, therefore, propose that Kamoʻoalewa probably originated from the Flora family and developed an Itokawa-compositional, more space-weathered, fine-regolith-dominated surface.
title_zh: 天问二号任务目标小行星 (469219) 卡莫阿莱瓦可能形成了丝川成分但更多太空风化的表面
abstract_zh: 中国正在进行的天问二号任务将从一颗小型快速旋转的地球准卫星 (469219) Kamo'oalewa 传回样本。先前的研究将卡莫奥阿莱瓦与月球的组成和起源联系起来。在这里，我们提出另一种场景。我们重新分析了 Kamo'oalewa 的反射光谱，得到了吸收带中心位于 1.001 ± 0.028 μm（误差为 1σ），与 LL 球粒陨石一致。然后，我们对陨石进行了太空风化实验，发现高度太空风化的 LL 球粒陨石粉末（但不是板状）成功地再现了卡莫奥阿莱瓦的反射光谱。我们进一步追踪 Kamo'oalewa 的动力起源，发现它可能起源于 ν6 长期共振，更具体地说，起源于 Flora 家族。 Kamo'oalewa 的构图与糸川和弗洛拉家族的 7 件物品相似，但空间风化程度更高。因此，我们认为 Kamo'oalewa 可能起源于 Flora 家族，并发展了一个系川成分、更多太空风化、以细风化层为主的表面。

title: Progressive release of long-stored carbon from tropical peatland disturbances
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Tropical peatlands are globally important, millennia-old carbon sinks, yet unprecedented human-driven degradation is triggering alarming carbon emissions. Comprehensive quantification of carbon dynamics across the disturbance sequence—from peat swamp forests to drained and fire-impacted peatlands—remains a critical knowledge gap. Here we show that over 18 years (1996–2014), drainage and subsequent peat fires released approximately 30–41 kg C m−2 from peatlands in Central Kalimantan, Indonesia, using radiocarbon dating of peat profiles and groundwater dissolved organic carbon. Drainage contributed 5–11 kg C m−2, primarily from centuries- to millennium-old, previously waterlogged peat. Fires released 23–32 kg C m−2 from peat accumulated over the past 3,000 years, initiating progressive oxidative decomposition of older peat. Extrapolation to Indonesia’s disturbed peatlands suggests a release of 0.81–3.70 Gt C between 1996 and 2014, with ongoing decomposition releasing an additional 0.03–0.08 Gt C annually, accelerating the impact on the global carbon balance.
title_zh: 热带泥炭地扰动中长期储存的碳逐渐释放
abstract_zh: 热带泥炭地是全球重要的、具有千年历史的碳汇，但人类造成的前所未有的退化正在引发令人震惊的碳排放。从泥炭沼泽森林到干涸和受火灾影响的泥炭地，对整个扰动序列的碳动态进行全面量化仍然是一个关键的知识差距。在这里，我们使用泥炭剖面和地下水溶解有机碳的放射性碳测年法显示，在过去 18 年（1996-2014）的时间里，排水和随后的泥炭火灾从印度尼西亚中加里曼丹的泥炭地释放了大约 30-41 kg C m−2。排水贡献了 5-11 kg C m−2，主要来自数百年至千年历史的、先前浸水的泥炭。火灾从过去 3000 年积累的泥炭中释放出 23-32 kg C m−2，引发老泥炭的逐渐氧化分解。对印度尼西亚受干扰的泥炭地的推断表明，1996 年至 2014 年间释放了 0.81-3.70 Gt C，持续的分解每年额外释放 0.03-0.08 Gt C，加速了对全球碳平衡的影响。

title: Ice-sheet hydro-fracture not advanced inland by lower-elevation lake drainages in Kalaallit Nunaat
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Drainage of supraglacial lakes via hydro-fracture is widely argued to be a mechanism for destabilization of grounded ice sheets under climate-warming scenarios because it may accelerate surface meltwater access to the ice-sheet bed. Progress in interrogating this hypothesis has been hindered by the lack of regional observations of hydro-fracture event occurrence, and the lack of observations of regional ice-sheet response to hydro-fracture events. Here, we remedy both deficiencies using a 22-station Global Navigation Satellite System array to discern inter-lake, hydro-fracture-event triggering potential between lakes spanning the mid-to-upper Greenland Ice Sheet ablation zone. In four separate instances, multiple lake hydro-fracture events occur close in time at similar elevations; meanwhile, strain rates across higher-elevation lake basins are unperturbed. Our findings support a simple model for the inland progression of surface-to-bed meltwater pathways beneath lakes: pathway initiation migrates alongside advancing surface melt, but is not accelerated by drainage activity at distant, lower-elevation lakes.
title_zh: 卡拉利特努纳特的低海拔湖泊排水系统并未将冰盖水力破裂推进到内陆
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，在气候变暖的情况下，通过水力压裂对冰上湖泊进行排水是导致接地冰盖不稳定的一种机制，因为它可能会加速地表融水进入冰盖床。由于缺乏对水力压裂事件发生的区域观测以及缺乏对水力压裂事件的区域冰盖响应的观测，质疑这一假设的进展受到阻碍。在这里，我们使用 22 个站的全球导航卫星系统阵列来弥补这两个缺陷，以识别跨越格陵兰冰盖中上部消融区的湖泊之间的湖间水力压裂事件触发潜力。在四个不同的实例中，多个湖泊水力压裂事件在相似的海拔高度上同时发生；与此同时，高海拔湖盆的应变率并未受到干扰。我们的研究结果支持了湖泊下方地表到河床融水路径向内陆进展的简单模型：路径的启动沿着地表融化的推进而迁移，但不会因遥远、低海拔湖泊的排水活动而加速。

title: Nonlinear temperature change responses shape soil organic carbon loss-gain transitions in global Mollisol croplands
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mollisol croplands are important for global food production and soil carbon storage, yet it remains unclear how climate warming affects transitions between soil organic carbon loss and gain. Here we show that surface soil organic carbon across global Mollisol croplands declined by 5.59% from 1990 to 2020, although the rate of loss slowed over time. Using 5,535 soil samples and satellite observations, we identified a nonlinear relationship between soil carbon change and the rate of warming, with a threshold at 0.0309 °C/yr above which net soil carbon change shifted from loss toward gain. This threshold increased toward lower latitudes, indicating that warmer regions require stronger warming to reach a similar transition. If recent climate-soil relationships persist, about 65% of Mollisol cropland may exceed this threshold by 2050 under a moderate emissions scenario. These results highlight the importance of nonlinear threshold responses in predicting soil carbon dynamics under climate change.
title_zh: 非线性温度变化响应影响全球 Mollisol 农田土壤有机碳的损失-增加转变
abstract_zh: 软土农田对于全球粮食生产和土壤碳储存非常重要，但目前尚不清楚气候变暖如何影响土壤有机碳损失和增加之间的转变。在这里，我们发现，从 1990 年到 2020 年，全球 Mollisol 农田的表层土壤有机碳下降了 5.59%，尽管损失速度随着时间的推移而放缓。利用 5,535 个土壤样本和卫星观测，我们确定了土壤碳变化与变暖速率之间的非线性关系，阈值为 0.0309 °C/年，高于该阈值，土壤碳净变化从损失转向增加。这个阈值向低纬度地区增加，表明较温暖的地区需要更强的变暖才能达到类似的转变。如果最近的气候-土壤关系持续存在，在适度排放的情况下，到 2050 年，大约 65% 的 Mollisol 耕地可能会超过这一阈值。这些结果凸显了非线性阈值响应在预测气候变化下土壤碳动态方面的重要性。

title: Water engineering via surfactant coacervates enables efficient and robust solar hydrogen evolution
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Water is essential in photosynthesis, acting both as a reactant and a medium regulating charge transport and reaction kinetics. While catalyst design has received significant attention, the impact of water structure on reactivity remains almost unexplored. Here, we report that water engineering via surfactant coacervates can significantly improve the performance of artificial photosynthesis for hydrogen production. By creating dynamic aqueous coacervate phases within a disrupted hydrogen-bond network, we create environments that yield more active, disordered water molecules. This tuned water state yields a stable hydrogen evolution rate of 918 mmol·g−1·h−1 and an apparent quantum efficiency of 69% at 420 nm in an aqueous methanol solution, demonstrating competitive catalytic performance. Spectroscopic and calorimetric characterizations, as well as computational simulations, indicate that surfactant coacervates increase the amount of intermediate water while weakening hydrogen bonding, thereby reducing the apparent activation energy, promoting charge transfer, and facilitating efficient catalysis. This study presents an approach to regulate water structure to enhance catalytic reactivity for solar hydrogen production, with broad potential for applications in water-involved catalytic systems.
title_zh: 通过表面活性剂凝聚层进行的水工程可实现高效、稳健的太阳能析氢
abstract_zh: 水在光合作用中至关重要，它既充当反应物又充当调节电荷传输和反应动力学的介质。虽然催化剂设计受到了广泛关注，但水结构对反应活性的影响几乎仍未被探索。在这里，我们报告通过表面活性剂凝聚层进行水工程可以显着提高人工光合作用制氢的性能。通过在破坏的氢键网络内创建动态水性凝聚层相，我们创造了产生更活跃、无序水分子的环境。这种调整后的水态在甲醇水溶液中产生了 918 mmol·g−1·h−1 的稳定析氢速率和 420 nm 处 69% 的表观量子效率，表现出具有竞争力的催化性能。光谱和量热表征以及计算模拟表明，表面活性剂凝聚层增加了中间水的量，同时削弱了氢键，从而降低了表观活化能，促进了电荷转移，并促进了高效催化。这项研究提出了一种调节水结构以增强太阳能制氢催化反应活性的方法，在涉及水的催化系统中具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Author Correction: Electrified interfacial oxygen-down water boosts efficient and durable electrolysis
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
title_zh: 作者更正：带电界面降氧水促进高效、持久的电解

title: Dynamical freezing for magnetometry in an interacting spin ensemble
source: Nature
abstract: Understanding and controlling non-equilibrium dynamics in quantum many-body systems is a fundamental challenge in modern physics1,2,3,4,5, with profound implications for advancing quantum technologies. Typically, periodically driven systems in the absence of conservation laws thermalize to a featureless ‘infinite-temperature’ state, erasing all memory of their initial conditions6,7,8. However, this pattern can break down through mechanisms such as integrability9, many-body localization2,3,10,11, quantum many-body scars4 and Hilbert space fragmentation12,13. Here we report the experimental observation of dynamical freezing, a distinct mechanism of thermalization breakdown in driven systems14,15,16,17,18,19, and demonstrate its application in quantum sensing using an ensemble of approximately 104 interacting nitrogen-vacancy (NV) spins in diamond. By precisely controlling the driving frequency and detuning, we observe emergent long-lived spin magnetization and coherent oscillatory micromotions, persisting over timescales exceeding the interaction-limited coherence time (T2) by more than an order of magnitude. By using these unconventional dynamics, we develop a dynamical-freezing-enhanced a.c. magnetometry that extends optimal sensing times far beyond T2, outperforming conventional dynamical decoupling magnetometry with a 2.7-fold sensitivity enhancement. Our results not only provide clear experimental observation of dynamical freezing—a peculiar mechanism defying thermalization through emergent conservation laws—but also establish a robust control method generally applicable to diverse physical platforms, with broad implications in quantum metrology and beyond.
title_zh: 相互作用的自旋系综中磁力测量的动态冻结
abstract_zh: 理解和控制量子多体系统中的非平衡动力学是现代物理学的一项基本挑战1,2,3,4,5，对推进量子技术具有深远的影响。通常，在缺乏守恒定律的情况下，周期性驱动的系统会热化到无特征的“无限温度”状态，从而擦除其初始条件的所有记忆6,7,8。然而，这种模式可以通过可积性 9、多体局域化 2、3、10、11、量子多体疤痕 4 和希尔伯特空间碎片 12、13 等机制来分解。在这里，我们报告了动态冻结的实验观察，这是驱动系统中热化分解的一种独特机制14,15,16,17,18,19，并使用金刚石中大约 104 个相互作用的氮空位 (NV) 自旋来展示其在量子传感中的应用。通过精确控制驱动频率和失谐，我们观察到出现的长寿命自旋磁化和相干振荡微运动，它们在超过相互作用限制相干时间（T2）的时间尺度上持续存在一个数量级以上。通过使用这些非常规动力学，我们开发了一种动态冷冻增强型交流电。磁力测定法将最佳传感时间延长至远远超过 T2，其性能优于传统的动态解耦磁力测定法，灵敏度提高了 2.7 倍。我们的结果不仅提供了动态冻结的清晰实验观察（一种通过涌现守恒定律抵抗热化的特殊机制），而且还建立了一种普遍适用的鲁棒控制方法

title: Cavity-driven attractive interactions in quantum materials
source: Nature
abstract: Many-body phenomena in quantum materials emerge from the interplay among a broad continuum of electronic states and controlling these interactions is critical for engineering new phases. One promising approach exploits light confined within optical cavities to tailor electronic properties1. Here we demonstrate that terahertz cavity photons can mediate attractive interactions in a tunable van der Waals (vdW) material and reorganize a continuum of electron–hole transitions into an exciton-like state. We introduce a broadband, sub-wavelength time-domain microscope that integrates exfoliated, dual-gated 2D quantum materials into a terahertz cavity. This approach enables the spectroscopic measurement of the field-tunable bandgap of bilayer graphene2 (BLG) in the terahertz range and, at resonance, reveals ultrastrong coupling3 (USC) with an effective interaction strength exceeding g/ωc ≈ 40% of the bare photon energy. Crucially, we identify a cavity-induced resonance emerging from the interband continuum that resembles Coulomb-bound excitons and remains stable across a broad temperature range. Our findings propose an experimental platform for designing and investigating hybrid light–matter phases in 2D quantum matter.
title_zh: 量子材料中空腔驱动的吸引相互作用
abstract_zh: 量子材料中的多体现象是由电子态的广泛连续体之间的相互作用产生的，控制这些相互作用对于设计新相至关重要。一种有前途的方法利用光学腔内限制的光来调整电子特性1。在这里，我们证明太赫兹腔光子可以介导可调谐范德华（vdW）材料中的吸引相互作用，并将电子-空穴跃迁的连续体重组为类激子态。我们推出了一种宽带亚波长时域显微镜，它将剥离的双门二维量子材料集成到太赫兹腔中。这种方法能够在太赫兹范围内对双层石墨烯 2 (BLG) 的场可调带隙进行光谱测量，并在共振时揭示超强耦合 3 (USC)，其有效相互作用强度超过 g/ωc ≈ 裸光子能量的 40%。至关重要的是，我们发现了从带间连续体中出现的空腔诱导共振，它类似于库仑束缚激子，并且在很宽的温度范围内保持稳定。我们的研究结果提出了一个用于设计和研究二维量子物质中混合光物质相的实验平台。

title: Distinct genetic architecture in the tails of complex traits
source: Nature
abstract: Complex traits are highly polygenic, with heritability explained by many hundreds of common variants of small effect together with rare variants of large effect1. Yet how this genetic architecture varies along the trait continuum has been underexplored, as has the role of natural selection in shaping this variation. Here we developed an approach based on polygenic risk scores that reveals widespread departures from common-variant architecture in one or both of the tails of 74 quantitative traits. These observations were replicated across ancestries, cohorts and repeated measures and using an alternative family-based approach2. Incorporating rare variants identified from sequence data resulted in marked reductions in these deviations, suggesting that rare alleles of large effect are key drivers of trait-tail architecture. Forward simulations showed that stabilizing selection could generate the observed patterns, whereas modelling reproductive success provided empirical support for the role of selection. These findings show that although complex traits are polygenic in the population at large, they have a distinct and less polygenic architecture in their tails due to selection. This has implications for rare-variant discovery and complex trait and disease prediction.
title_zh: 复杂性状尾部的独特遗传结构
abstract_zh: 复杂性状具有高度多基因性，其遗传性可以通过数百种常见的小效应变异和罕见的大效应变异来解释。然而，这种遗传结构如何沿着性状连续体变化，以及自然选择在塑造这种变化中的作用，尚未得到充分探索。在这里，我们开发了一种基于多基因风险评分的方法，该方法揭示了 74 个数量性状的一个或两个尾部与常见变异结构的广泛偏离。这些观察结果在不同血统、队列和重复测量中进行了重复，并使用了基于家庭的替代方法2。纳入从序列数据中鉴定出的罕见变异导致这些偏差显着减少，这表明具有大效应的罕见等位基因是性状尾结构的关键驱动因素。正向模拟表明，稳定选择可以产生观察到的模式，而繁殖成功建模为选择的作用提供了经验支持。这些发现表明，尽管复杂性状在整个种群中是多基因的，但由于选择，它们的尾巴具有独特且多基因程度较低的结构。这对于罕见变异的发现以及复杂性状和疾病的预测具有重要意义。

title: Gaps and drivers of global marine animal biodiversity from the surface to abyss
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: With advances in global biodiversity data sharing, particularly following the Census of Marine Life, understanding of marine biodiversity has improved but remains incomplete. The Ocean Biodiversity Information System and Global Biodiversity Information Facility host over 150 million marine occurrence records, enabling reassessment of global biodiversity and data gaps. Here, we compile a quality-controlled dataset of ca. 48 million records covering 184,141 marine animal species, representing ~87% of accepted World Register of Marine Species and 91% of Ocean Biodiversity Information System taxa. Generalised Linear and Additive Models assess how geoecological drivers and human impact influence species richness while accounting for sampling effort and spatial autocorrelation across depth and taxa. Approximately 50% of the global ocean remains insufficiently sampled, with more than 160 million km² below 200 m lacking data. Sampling is biased toward developed regions, especially the North Atlantic, with major gaps in equatorial and Global South regions. Central tropical areas ( − 5° to 5°) contribute only
title_zh: 从表面到深渊全球海洋动物生物多样性的差距和驱动因素
abstract_zh: 随着全球生物多样性数据共享的进步，特别是在海洋生物普查之后，对海洋生物多样性的了解有所改善，但仍然不完整。海洋生物多样性信息系统和全球生物多样性信息设施拥有超过 1.5 亿条海洋事件记录，有助于重新评估全球生物多样性和数据缺口。在这里，我们编译了一个质量控制的数据集。 4800 万条记录，涵盖 184,141 种海洋动物物种，约占公认的世界海洋物种名录的 87% 和海洋生物多样性信息系统类群的 91%。广义线性和加性模型评估地质生态驱动因素和人类影响如何影响物种丰富度，同时考虑采样工作以及跨深度和类群的空间自相关。全球约 50% 的海洋仍未得到充分采样，超过 1.6 亿平方公里的 200 m 以下海域缺乏数据。抽样偏向发达地区，特别是北大西洋，赤道和南半球地区存在较大差距。中部热带地区（−5° 至 5°）仅贡献

title: Genetic architecture of sugarcane traits in a polyploid genomics framework
source: Nature
abstract: Sugarcane (Saccharum spp.) is a vital sugar and bioenergy crop with an exceptionally complex polyploid genome (10–12 sets of chromosomes). This complexity resulted from nobilization—a historical breeding process involving interspecific hybridization and repeated backcrossing1. However, the extreme ploidy has long impeded efforts to elucidate the genetic basis of its considerable sucrose-storing capacity. Here we present a fully phased genome assembly of the foundational cultivar POJ2878, achieved using a Pore-C-based assembly algorithm. This assembly resolved 118 chromosomes, revealing extensive subgenome recombination and non-homologous chromosomal rearrangements. Using identity-by-descent and allele-specific expression profiling, we identified breeder-favoured haplotypes, including a SUS2 haplotype with enhanced sucrose content. Resequencing of 981 Saccharum accessions traced POJ2878’s pervasive contribution to modern cultivars and identified key domestication and improvement sweeps. Genes under selection include CBL1 for cold tolerance, TIP1 for cell size regulation and TB1 for tillering control. A genome-wide association study tailored for polyploid genomes resolved loci associated with parenchyma cell size and sucrose storage capacity, including the functionally validated sucrose transporter Saccharum hybrid SUT2. These findings clarify the genetic architecture underlying sugarcane’s biomass productivity and sugar yield, offering a genomic foundation for accelerating improvement in sugarcane and other polyploid crops critical for global food and bioenergy security.
title_zh: 多倍体基因组学框架中甘蔗性状的遗传结构
abstract_zh: 甘蔗 (Saccharum spp.) 是一种重要的糖和生物能源作物，具有极其复杂的多倍体基因组（10-12 组染色体）。这种复杂性源于贵族化——一个涉及种间杂交和重复回交的历史育种过程。然而，极端的倍性长期以来一直阻碍着阐明其巨大蔗糖储存能力的遗传基础的努力。在这里，我们展示了基础品种 POJ2878 的完全定相基因组组装，这是使用基于 Pore-C 的组装算法实现的。该组装解析了 118 条染色体，揭示了广泛的亚基因组重组和非同源染色体重排。使用血统同一性和等位基因特异性表达谱，我们鉴定了育种者喜爱的单倍型，包括蔗糖含量增强的 SUS2 单倍型。对 981 个甘蔗品种的重新测序追踪了 POJ2878 对现代品种的普遍贡献，并确定了关键的驯化和改良扫描。正在选择的基因包括用于耐冷性的CBL1、用于细胞大小调节的TIP1和用于分蘖控制的TB1。一项针对多倍体基因组的全基因组关联研究解析了与薄壁细胞大小和蔗糖储存容量相关的基因座，包括功能验证的蔗糖转运蛋白 Saccharum 杂交 SUT2。这些发现阐明了甘蔗生物量生产力和糖产量的遗传结构，为加速改进甘蔗和其他对全球粮食和生物能源安全至关重要的多倍体作物提供了基因组基础。

title: Intertwined nematic and d-wave superconductive orders in optimally-doped La1.84Sr0.16CuO4 thin films
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: The anisotropy of the superconducting state and superconducting fluctuations in the CuO2 plane is directly related to the superconducting mechanism of copper oxide superconductors and is therefore pivotal for understanding high-temperature superconductivity. Here, we integrated the high-precision angle-resolved resistivity (ARR) measurement with a rotatable in-plane magnetic field to systematically study the angular dependence of superconducting fluctuations in optimally doped La1.84Sr0.16CuO4 (LSCO) thin films. By independently controlling the directions of the current and the magnetic field, we are able to isolate the magneto-resistivity contributed by the superconducting vortex motion and distinguish excitations from nematic superconductivity and d-wave superconductive order based on their respective C2 and C4 symmetries. Signatures of two intertwined superconductive orders are also evident in the measured angular dependence of the critical current. A T-B phase diagram of different types of superconducting fluctuations is determined. These findings are closely related to other intriguing phenomena, such as pair density wave, charge density wave, and local pairing.
title_zh: 最佳掺杂 La1.84Sr0.16CuO4 薄膜中相互交织的向列相和 d 波超导级
abstract_zh: The anisotropy of the superconducting state and superconducting fluctuations in the CuO2 plane is directly related to the superconducting mechanism of copper oxide superconductors and is therefore pivotal for understanding high-temperature superconductivity. Here, we integrated the high-precision angle-resolved resistivity (ARR) measurement with a rotatable in-plane magnetic field to systematically study the angular dependence of superconducting fluctuations in optimally doped La1.84Sr0.16CuO4 (LSCO) thin films. By independently controlling the directions of the current and the magnetic field, we are able to isolate the magneto-resistivity contributed by the superconducting vortex motion and distinguish excitations from nematic superconductivity and d-wave superconductive order based on their respective C2 and C4 symmetries.在测量的临界电流的角度依赖性中，两个相互缠绕的超导秩序的特征也很明显。确定了不同类型超导涨落的T-B相图。这些发现与其他有趣的现象密切相关，例如对密度波、电荷密度波和局域配对。

title: A multienzyme-mimicking nanoplatform induces disulfidptosis/cuproptosis/apoptosis for tumor therapy
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: The distinct characteristics of the tumor microenvironment (TME) provide great potential for valuable tumor-targeting therapies using enzymes. Herein, MOF-818 with a diameter of 139 nm is synthesized and exhibits multienzyme-mimicking activities, including peroxidase, catalase, glutathione oxidase, glucose oxidase, superoxide dismutase, and tyrosinase (TYR)-like activities. Based on these enzymatic activities, MOF-818 catalyzes an entire process that progresses through self-generated substrates and cyclic catalytic reactions, and notably induces TME remodeling. Synchronously, for the first time reported in nanozymes, MOF-818 activates the prodrug acetaminophen (APAP) through its TYR-like activity, further increasing reactive oxygen species accumulation. These features contribute to MOF-818’s antitumor activity by activating multiple combined programmed cell death pathways: apoptosis, disulfidptosis, and cuproptosis. The MOF-818 nanoplatform, 3-methyladenine (3-MA), THP-1 cell membranes (CMs), and a fusion protein of Fc and TNF-related apoptosis-inducing ligand (Fc-TRAIL) were integrated and constructed 3-MA@ MOF-818 @CM-Fc-TRAIL nanoparticles (3MCT NPs). These NPs target tumor cells and, when coupled with APAP, show efficient therapeutic effects with good biosafety. Our findings indicate that the MOF-818 could function as a multienzyme-mimetic scaffold for engineering targeted nanoplatforms that co-deliver combinatorial therapeutic agents, thereby enabling combined antitumor therapy.
title_zh: 多酶模拟纳米平台诱导二硫下垂/铜垂下/细胞凋亡用于肿瘤治疗
abstract_zh: 肿瘤微环境（TME）的独特特征为利用酶进行有价值的肿瘤靶向治疗提供了巨大的潜力。在此，合成了直径为139 nm的MOF-818，并表现出多酶模拟活性，包括过氧化物酶、过氧化氢酶、谷胱甘肽氧化酶、葡萄糖氧化酶、超氧化物歧化酶和酪氨酸酶（TYR）样活性。基于这些酶活性，MOF-818 催化通过自生成底物和循环催化反应进行的整个过程，特别是诱导 TME 重塑。同时，首次在纳米酶中报道，MOF-818 通过其 TYR 样活性激活前药对乙酰氨基酚 (APAP)，进一步增加活性氧的积累。这些特征通过激活多种组合的程序性细胞死亡途径（细胞凋亡、二硫下垂和铜凋亡）来增强 MOF-818 的抗肿瘤活性。将MOF-818纳米平台、3-甲基腺嘌呤(3-MA)、THP-1细胞膜(CM)以及Fc和TNF相关凋亡诱导配体的融合蛋白(Fc-TRAIL)整合并构建3-MA@MOF-818@CM-Fc-TRAIL纳米颗粒(3MCT NPs)。这些纳米粒子靶向肿瘤细胞，与 APAP 结合时，显示出有效的治疗效果和良好的生物安全性。我们的研究结果表明，MOF-818 可以作为多酶模拟支架，用于工程靶向纳米平台，共同递送组合治疗剂，从而实现联合抗肿瘤治疗。

title: Deployment and clearance of microrobots for localized therapy: past, present and future
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Microrobots hold great promise for active and localized therapy by enabling precise navigation and intervention in areas inaccessible to conventional medical devices. However, clinical translation remains hindered by challenges such as navigating complex environments, achieving precise control under dynamic physiological conditions, and ensuring safe post-therapy clearance. This minireview encompasses recent advancements, including biohybrid microrobots that merge synthetic and biological components to improve biocompatibility and functionality, and catheter-assisted systems that integrate conventional medical tools with robotics for enhanced precision and adaptability. It also discusses strategies to tackle key challenges, such as propulsion mechanisms, closed-loop control, biodegradable designs, focused at improving safety, reliability, and clinical applicability. By compiling these developments, this work outlines a roadmap toward autonomous, multi-functional microrobotic systems capable of navigating complex physiological environments and delivering targeted therapies with minimal invasiveness.
title_zh: 用于局部治疗的微型机器人的部署和许可：过去、现在和未来
abstract_zh: 微型机器人能够在传统医疗设备无法到达的区域进行精确导航和干预，从而为主动和局部治疗带来了巨大的希望。然而，临床转化仍然受到诸如复杂环境导航、动态生理条件下实现精确控制以及确保治疗后安全清除等挑战的阻碍。这篇小型评论涵盖了最新的进展，包括融合合成和生物组件以提高生物相容性和功能的生物混合微型机器人，以及将传统医疗工具与机器人技术集成以提高精度和适应性的导管辅助系统。它还讨论了应对关键挑战的策略，例如推进机制、闭环控制、可生物降解设计，重点是提高安全性、可靠性和临床适用性。通过汇总这些进展，这项工作概述了自主多功能微型机器人系统的路线图，该系统能够导航复杂的生理环境并以最小的侵入性提供靶向治疗。

title: Realizing superior interfacial thermal conductance between β-Ga2O3 and diamond through metal-assisted epitaxial strategy
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: β-Ga2O3 exhibits great potential for next-generation power electronics, while its low thermal conductivity poses a challenge to efficient heat dissipation. We address this challenge by developing a gallium-assisted epitaxial strategy to synthesize highly-oriented β-Ga2O3 film on diamond. The β-Ga2O3 presents a high thermal conductivity of 9.0 W m−1 K−1 and low thermal boundary resistance of 6.05 m2 K GW−1. In-situ experiments reveal a high interfacial bonding strength (> 2.09 GPa), resulting from the atomically sharp and covalently bonded interface. The identified new interfacial phonon mode at ∼60 meV through the vibrational electron energy-loss spectroscopy can significantly enhance the phonon transport between diamond and β-Ga2O3. The developed gallium-assisted strategy may mitigate the thermal constraints of β-Ga2O3, offering a promising route for the heterointegration of β-Ga2O3-based power devices with diamond.
title_zh: 通过金属辅助外延策略实现 β-Ga2O3 和金刚石之间优异的界面热导
abstract_zh: β-Ga2O3在下一代电力电子器件中展现出巨大的潜力，但其低导热率对高效散热提出了挑战。我们通过开发镓辅助外延策略来在金刚石上合成高度取向的 β-Ga2O3 薄膜来应对这一挑战。 β-Ga2O3 具有 9.0 W m−1 K−1 的高导热率和 6.05 m2 K GW−1 的低热边界电阻。原位实验表明，由于原子级尖锐和共价键合界面，界面结合强度很高（> 2.09 GPa）。通过振动电子能量损失谱识别出 ~60 meV 的新界面声子模式可以显着增强金刚石和 β-Ga2O3 之间的声子传输。所开发的镓辅助策略可以减轻β-Ga2O3的热约束，为基于β-Ga2O3的功率器件与金刚石的异质集成提供了一条有前途的途径。

title: Interdecadal shift in the spring Southern Annular Mode intensifies its lagged influence on Antarctic summer sea ice
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Antarctic sea ice has recently shifted to a new low-extent regime, yet the underlying mechanisms remain uncertain. This study reveals an interdecadal shift in the spring Southern Annular Mode (SAM) pattern around 1998, after which its lagged influence on summer Antarctic sea ice intensified, particularly in the Weddell and Ross Seas. After 1998, the SAM exhibits stronger wave-like structures, featuring an intensified Pacific–South American (PSA)-like pattern that drives regional sea-ice loss. In the Weddell Sea, the positive SAM‑related anticyclonic circulation induces upper-ocean warming that promotes summer ice melt. However, in the Ross Sea, a deepened Amundsen Sea low enhances offshore ice export and positive ice‑albedo feedback, increasing summer ice loss. This interdecadal SAM shift is likely modulated by tropical variability, as the increased co-occurrence of a positive SAM with La Niña strengthens PSA-mediated processes. These findings highlight the nonstationary nature of tropical–polar linkages in recent Antarctic sea-ice lows.
title_zh: 春季南环模年代际变化加剧其对南极夏季海冰的滞后影响
abstract_zh: 南极海冰最近已转变为新的低范围状态，但其潜在机制仍不确定。这项研究揭示了1998年左右春季南环模（SAM）模式的年代际变化，此后其对夏季南极海冰的滞后影响加剧，特别是在威德尔海和罗斯海。 1998年之后，SAM呈现出更强的波状结构，具有强化的太平洋-南美（PSA）样模式，导致区域海冰损失。在威德尔海，与 SAM 相关的正反气旋环流会导致上层海洋变暖，从而促进夏季冰融化。然而，在罗斯海，加深的阿蒙森海低压增强了近海冰出口和积极的冰反照率反馈，从而增加了夏季冰损失。这种年代际 SAM 变化可能受到热带变率的调节，因为正 SAM 与拉尼娜现象同时出现的增加加强了 PSA 介导的过程。这些发现凸显了近期南极海冰低点中热带与极地联系的非平稳性质。

title: Direct observation of the superallowed α-decay of 104Te
source: Nature
abstract: The radioactivity of the α particle is among the most compelling evidence for the existence of cluster structures in atomic nuclei. During the decay process, a pre-existing α particle tunnels through the potential barrier formed by the residual nucleus1,2. The degree of preformation of the α particle, a strongly bound system of two protons and two neutrons, is extracted from the data by dividing the α-decay probability by the barrier penetrability for a given particle energy. The preformation probability changes rapidly near nuclear shell closures, which is direct evidence that clustering is connected to nuclear structure3. Enhanced preformation was observed in the lightest α-particle emitters, spherical tellurium and xenon isotopes decaying to magic isotopes of tin. Here we show the most extreme case of α-particle preformation from the measurement of the decay of tellurium-104 (104Te). With a half-life of 7.2−1.5+2.3ns" role="presentation">7.2−1.5+2.3ns7.{2}_{-1.5}^{+2.3}\,{\rm{ns}}, 104Te is the fastest ground-state α-emitting nucleus known so far. The deduced preformation demonstrates that the enhancement is greater for 104Te than for any other nucleus. One nuclear model that can explain our observation postulates that the α particle can exist only in the low-nuclear-matter-density regions on the surface of the nucleus. The uniquely high preformation for 104Te is attributed to its relation to doubly magic tin-100 (100Sn), creating conditions conducive to form an α particle.
title_zh: 直接观察104Te的超允许α衰变
abstract_zh: α粒子的放射性是原子核中存在簇结构的最有力的证据之一。在衰变过程中，预先存在的 α 粒子隧道穿过由残余原子核形成的势垒1,2。 α 粒子（两个质子和两个中子的强束缚系统）的预形成程度是通过将 α 衰变概率除以给定粒子能量的势垒穿透性从数据中提取的。在核壳闭合附近，预形成概率快速变化，这是聚类与核结构相关的直接证据。在最轻的 α 粒子发射体、球形碲和氙同位素衰变成神奇的锡同位素中观察到增强的预形成。在这里，我们通过测量碲 104 (104Te) 的衰变来展示 α 粒子预形成的最极端情况。 104Te 的半衰期为 7.2−1.5+2.3ns" role="presentation">7.2−1.5+2.3ns7.{2}_{-1.5}^{+2.3}\,{\rm{ns}}，是迄今为止已知最快的基态 α 发射核。推导的预形成表明 104Te 的增强效果比任何其他核都要大。一种可以解释的核模型我们的观察假设α粒子只能存在于原子核表面的低核物质密度区域，104Te独特的高预形成归因于它与双魔锡100（100Sn）的关系，创造了有利于形成α粒子的条件。

title: Self-powered intelligence for personalized healthcare
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Personalized healthcare is crucial for transforming medical practice, offering more precise, efficient, and patient-centred care. It not only improves individual health outcomes but also enhances the overall efficiency of healthcare systems. Wearable and implantable devices have emerged as key technologies in this transformation, offering unprecedented opportunities for real-time physiological monitoring, early disease detection, and personalized health intervention. In parallel, the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) has further accelerated the integration of data-driven intelligence into healthcare systems, making interdisciplinary research at the intersection of AI, flexible electronics, and biomedical engineering increasingly important. However, the long-term deployment of intelligent wearable and implantable healthcare systems remains fundamentally constrained by power sustainability, mechanical flexibility, and the energy cost of on-device data processing. This review focuses on self-powered intelligence as an emerging paradigm for personalized healthcare, enabling continuous, long-term and autonomous health monitoring beyond the limitations of battery-powered systems. By integrating flexible and smart electronics with low-power AI, self-powered intelligence provide a viable pathway toward intelligent, on-body and in-body healthcare platforms capable of real-time analysis and personalized health management.
title_zh: 用于个性化医疗保健的自供电智能
abstract_zh: 个性化医疗保健对于改变医疗实践、提供更精确、更高效、以患者为中心的护理至关重要。它不仅可以改善个人健康状况，还可以提高医疗保健系统的整体效率。可穿戴和植入式设备已成为这一转型的关键技术，为实时生理监测、早期疾病检测和个性化健康干预提供了前所未有的机会。与此同时，人工智能（AI）的快速发展进一步加速了数据驱动的智能与医疗保健系统的融合，使得人工智能、柔性电子和生物医学工程交叉学科的研究变得越来越重要。然而，智能可穿戴和植入式医疗保健系统的长期部署仍然从根本上受到电力可持续性、机械灵活性和设备上数据处理的能源成本的限制。本次审查的重点是自供电智能作为个性化医疗保健的新兴范例，能够超越电池供电系统的限制，实现连续、长期和自主的健康监测。通过将灵活的智能电子产品与低功耗人工智能相集成，自供电智能为实现能够实时分析和个性化健康管理的智能、体上和体内医疗保健平台提供了可行的途径。

title: Metamaterial-enhanced near-field radiative heat transfer
source: Nature
abstract: When radiative thermal energy is exchanged at near field, evanescent surface waves such as surface phonon polaritons can tunnel through the gap, boosting heat transfer above the far-field blackbody limit by several orders of magnitude1,2. Such extreme radiative energy fluxes have been experimentally demonstrated in dielectric materials supporting surface phonon polaritons3,4,5. Although theories and simulations have suggested metamaterials as a promising route to further manipulate and enhance near-field radiative heat exchange beyond the limits of unstructured Drude- or Lorentz-type materials6,7,8,9,10, experimental validation remains elusive. Here we experimentally demonstrate metamaterial-mediated enhancement on near-field radiative heat transfer between gold split-ring resonators patterned on silicon nitride (SiN) membranes. Compared with unstructured gold plates on the SiN membrane or bare SiN membranes, the radiative heat transfer between the metamaterials is enhanced several-fold. This observed enhancement results from the split-ring-resonator resonant modes and their strong coupling with surface phonon polaritons in the SiN membrane, as supported by direct electromagnetic simulations and coupled-mode-theory modelling. Our work provides experimental verification of the strong capability of metamaterials in manipulating radiative energy exchange at near field, opening opportunities for thermal energy harvesting and infrared sensing applications.
title_zh: 超材料增强近场辐射传热
abstract_zh: 当辐射热能在近场交换时，表面声子极化激元等瞬逝表面波可以穿过间隙，将传热速度提高几个数量级1,2，使其超出远场黑体极限。这种极端的辐射能通量已在支持表面声子极化的介电材料中得到实验证明3,4,5。尽管理论和模拟表明超材料是进一步操纵和增强近场辐射热交换超越非结构化德鲁德或洛伦兹型材料6,7,8,9,10的有前途的途径，但实验验证仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们通过实验证明了超材料介导的氮化硅（SiN）膜上图案化的金开口环谐振器之间近场辐射传热的增强。与SiN膜上的非结构化金板或裸SiN膜相比，超材料之间的辐射传热增强了数倍。这种观察到的增强是由开环谐振器谐振模式及其与 SiN 膜中表面声子极化子的强耦合引起的，并得到直接电磁模拟和耦合模式理论建模的支持。我们的工作通过实验验证了超材料在近场操纵辐射能量交换方面的强大能力，为热能收集和红外传感应用提供了机会。

title: Reconstruction of magnon eigenfunctions by X-ray magnetic vector chronoscopy
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: The collective precession of magnetization manifests itself as magnon modes. These modes are governed by complex-valued vectorial eigenfunctions, which have remained experimentally challenging to observe. Here we introduce X-ray magnetic vector chronoscopy (XMVC), a time-resolved resonant scattering method that reconstructs the full magnetization dynamics with angular resolution of 0.1° (±0.01°). Applied to a synthetic antiferromagnetic multilayer (Si/NiFe (8 nm)/Ru (0.8 nm)/CoFeB (5.5 nm)), XMVC enables magnon state tomography, by directly measuring the nanoscale vectorial eigenfunctions of hybridized modes arising from magnon–magnon coupling. This approach provides full access to the system’s non-Hermitian Hamiltonian, revealing the complex-valued coupling strengths and non-orthogonal eigenbases. These results establish XMVC as an experimental platform for studying nanoscale spin systems by extracting the eigenfunctions of the system.
title_zh: X射线磁矢量计时重建磁振子本征函数
abstract_zh: 磁化强度的集体进动表现为磁振子模式。这些模式受复值矢量本征函数控制，而观察这些模式在实验上仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们介绍 X 射线磁矢量计时 (XMVC)，这是一种时间分辨共振散射方法，可以以 0.1° (±0.01°) 的角分辨率重建完整的磁化动力学。 XMVC 应用于合成反铁磁多层（Si/NiFe (8 nm)/Ru (0.8 nm)/CoFeB (5.5 nm)），通过直接测量磁振子-磁振子耦合产生的混合模式的纳米级矢量本征函数，实现磁振子态断层扫描。这种方法提供了对系统的非厄米哈密顿量的完全访问，揭示了复值耦合强度和非正交特征基。这些结果将 XMVC 确立为通过提取系统特征函数来研究纳米级自旋系统的实验平台。

title: Design and implementation of floating photovoltaics
source: Nature Reviews Clean Technology
abstract: Floating photovoltaic (FPV) systems have experienced rapid growth since 2015, with over 9.6 GWp installed capacity by 2024, and FPV could become an important source of power generation in land-scarce regions. In this Review, we explore trends in global FPV deployment. The large estimated power-generation potential of FPV, over 22 TWp from 10% of inland water bodies and more than 718 TWp from 10% of offshore areas within exclusive economic zones, indicates FPV’s relevance for meeting energy demands. Capital expenditures have declined to a median of 1.25 USD Wp–1; however, levelized cost of electricity generally remains higher than for land-based PV. Nevertheless, ancillary benefits such as water conservation, synergies with hydropower and aquaculture, and reduced land-use conflict enhance FPV’s economic and environmental value. Challenges include increased operations and maintenance complexity and harsher operational conditions compared with land-based systems. The impacts of FPV systems on their local environment require further investigation, and system developers can face regulatory uncertainty. Offshore FPV and hybrid systems with wind, wave and desalination offer new frontiers but require further technical maturation. Coordinated research, policy support and standardization are needed to enable FPV’s full potential as a scalable, low-carbon energy solution.

source: Matter
abstract: The instability of interfacial layers inside batteries accelerates performance degradation. In this work, a chemically anchored elastic protective film is formed in situ through polymerization within potassium-ion batteries. This film buffers drastic electrode expansion and simultaneously provides fast ion transport pathways. The conflict between structural stability and transport efficiency is therefore effectively resolved. As a result, the battery exhibits significantly prolonged lifespan and can operate stably even at −40°C, offering a promising route toward all-climate energy storage systems.

title: Temporary carbon dioxide removal to offset short-lived climate forcers
source: Nature
abstract: Carbon dioxide removal (CDR) is considered for achieving the long-term temperature objectives of the Paris Agreement and national net-zero emission targets1,2,3,4,5. The durability of these CDR methods varies widely, ranging from decades to theoretically permanent6. Temporary CDR dominates present deployment, whereas permanent solutions face further feasibility and cost challenges at scale1. However, efforts to integrate temporary CDR into climate policies have relied on equivalency assumptions between temporary and permanent CDR that contradict physical climate science: temporary CDR cannot fully offset CO2 emissions as permanent CDR can6,7. Here we show that temporary CDR can serve as compensation for non-CO2 climate forcers, particularly for short-lived species whose compensation ratios are fairly insensitive to the choice of time horizon. For instance, offsetting 1 kg CH4 requires 498 kg CO2 with 20-year temporary storage (such as bioplastics) or 101 kg CO2 with 100-year storage (such as durable wood products). We suggest a critical lifetime threshold separating short-lived and long-lived species for temporary CDR applications, with implementation requiring differentiated reporting of these categories. This framework can provide a physical basis for crediting temporary CDR activities in sectors such as agriculture, in which non-CO2 emissions dominate and direct emission reductions remain challenging.
title_zh: 临时清除二氧化碳以抵消短暂的气候影响因素
abstract_zh: 二氧化碳去除（CDR）被认为是为了实现《巴黎协定》的长期温度目标和国家净零排放目标1、2、3、4、5。这些 CDR 方法的持久性差异很大，从几十年到理论上永久不等6。临时 CDR 在当前部署中占主导地位，而永久解决方案则面临进一步的可行性和成本挑战1。然而，将临时 CDR 纳入气候政策的努力依赖于临时和永久 CDR 之间的等效假设，这与物理气候科学相矛盾：临时 CDR 无法像永久 CDR 那样完全抵消二氧化碳排放6,7。在这里，我们表明，临时 CDR 可以作为非二氧化碳气候驱动因素的补偿，特别是对于短命物种，其补偿率对时间范围的选择相当不敏感。例如，抵消 1 千克甲烷需要 498 千克二氧化碳，临时储存 20 年（例如生物塑料），或 101 千克二氧化碳，储存 100 年（例如耐用木制品）。我们建议为临时 CDR 应用设置一个关键的生命周期阈值，将短命和长命物种分开，实施时需要对这些类别进行差异化报告。该框架可以为农业等部门的临时 CDR 活动提供物理基础，在这些部门中，非二氧化碳排放占主导地位，直接减排仍然具有挑战性。
