title: Monolithic three-dimensional integration of silicon transistors
source: Nature
abstract: Monolithic, three-dimensional (3D) integrated circuits promise advantages in packing density, energy consumption and interconnectivity bandwidth but require forming high-performance semiconductors and transistors on top tiers under the constraint of a limited thermal budget compatible with back-end-of-line integration1,2. Back-end-of-line-compatible transistors have been built on laser-annealed polycrystalline silicon, metal-oxide semiconductors, carbon nanotubes and two-dimensional chalcogenides3,4,5. However, their performance and reliability are much inferior to bottom-tier silicon metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistors, which mask most of the improvements offered by monolithic 3D integration. Here we show that uniformly doped, ultrathin (≤10 nm) single-crystalline silicon nanomembranes can be vertically stacked using a roll-transfer-printing process that is scalable to wafer-scale and tolerant to substrate topology and surface roughness, enabling multi-tiers of complementary junctionless transistors to be sequentially fabricated on the same starting substrate under a processing temperature ≤400 °C. These devices achieve performance approaching that of front-end-of-line silicon metal–oxide–semiconductor field-effect transistors with current density above 650 µA µm−1 and sub-10-nm inter-tier registration for high-density vertical integration. We vertically constructed logic gates, including inverters, NAND, NOR gates and static random-access memory cells, based on up to three-tier integration at transistor-level granularity. Our demonstrations provide a promising route towards silicon-based monolithic 3D circuits, especially for research and low-volume prototyping.
title_zh: 单片三维集成硅晶体管
abstract_zh: 单片三维 (3D) 集成电路在封装密度、能耗和互连带宽方面具有优势，但需要在与后端集成兼容的有限热预算的约束下在顶层形成高性能半导体和晶体管1,2。后端兼容晶体管是基于激光退火多晶硅、金属氧化物半导体、碳纳米管和二维硫属化物3、4、5 构建的。然而，它们的性能和可靠性远不如底层硅金属氧化物半导体场效应晶体管，这掩盖了单片 3D 集成提供的大部分改进。在这里，我们展示了均匀掺杂的超薄（≤10 nm）单晶硅纳米膜可以使用辊转印工艺垂直堆叠，该工艺可扩展到晶圆级并容忍衬底拓扑和表面粗糙度，从而能够在加工温度≤400°C的情况下在同一起始衬底上顺序制造多层互补无结晶体管。这些器件的性能接近前端硅金属氧化物半导体场效应晶体管，电流密度高于 650 µA µm−1，并具有亚 10 nm 层间配准，可实现高密度垂直集成。我们基于晶体管级粒度的三层集成垂直构建逻辑门，包括反相器、NAND、NOR 门和静态随机存取存储器单元。我们的演示提供了希望

title: A direct black-hole mass measurement in a little red dot at high redshift
source: Nature
abstract: Recent discoveries of faint active galactic nuclei (AGN) at the redshift frontier have revealed a plethora of broad Hα emitters with optically red continua, named little red dots (LRDs)1, which comprise 15–30% of the high-redshift broad-line AGN population2. Owing to their peculiar properties3,4,5,6, modelling LRDs with standard AGN scenarios has proven challenging. In particular, the validity of single-epoch virial mass estimates in determining the black-hole masses of LRDs has been called into question, with some models claiming that masses might be overestimated by up to two orders of magnitude7,8,9,10. Here we report a direct, dynamical black-hole mass measurement in a strongly lensed LRD at a redshift of 7.04. The combination of lensing with deep spectroscopic data reveals a rotation curve that is inconsistent with a nuclear star cluster, yet can be well explained by Keplerian rotation around a point mass of 50 million solar masses, consistent with virial black-hole mass estimates. The Keplerian rotation leaves little room for any stellar component in a host galaxy, as we conservatively infer MBH/M⁎ > 2 (where MBH is the black-hole mass and M⁎ is the stellar mass). Such a ‘naked’ black hole, together with its near-pristine environment11, indicates that this LRD is a massive black-hole seed caught in its earliest accretion phase.
title_zh: 高红移处小红点的直接黑洞质量测量
abstract_zh: 最近在红移边界发现的微弱活动星系核 (AGN) 揭示了大量具有光学红色连续体的宽 Hα 发射体，称为小红点 (LRD)1，占高红移宽线 AGN 群体的 15-30%2。由于 LRD 的特殊特性3、4、5、6，使用标准 AGN 场景对 LRD 进行建模已被证明具有挑战性。特别是，单历元维里质量估计在确定 LRD 黑洞质量方面的有效性受到质疑，一些模型声称质量可能被高估多达两个数量级7,8,9,10。在这里，我们报告了在红移为 7.04 的强透镜 LRD 中进行的直接动态黑洞质量测量。透镜效应与深光谱数据的结合揭示了一条与核星团不一致的旋转曲线，但可以通过围绕 5000 万太阳质量的点质量的开普勒旋转来很好地解释，这与维里黑洞质量估计一致。开普勒旋转为宿主星系中的任何恒星成分留下的空间很小，因为我们保守地推断 MBH/M⁎ > 2（其中 MBH 是黑洞质量，M⁎ 是恒星质量）。这样一个“裸露”的黑洞，连同它近乎原始的环境，表明这个LRD是一个处于最早吸积阶段的巨大黑洞种子。

title: Smaller is Stronger: Topological Load-bearing of Crumpled 2D Macromolecule
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Two-dimensional (2D) macromolecules are atomically thin materials capable of forming crumpled configurations with complex topologies, defining a new paradigm in macromolecular mechanics. Here, we unveil a universal negative size effect, where smaller sheets yield substantially stronger load-bearing capabilities than larger ones. Coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations demonstrate a negative scaling between compression pressure or modulus and the Föppl-von Kármán number, with the power index determined by crumpling density but independent of material type. Energy analysis indicates that smaller sheets form dense ridge networks with minimizing self-folding, enabling efficient load transfer and energy absorption. During densification, a constant ridge-to-vertex increment ratio of 1.5 preserves the superior ridge density of small sheets. Experiments on paper, aluminum foil, polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS), and silicone rubber confirm this behavior across disparate length scales and across material classes. This work reveals the mechanics underlying size-dependent crumpling in 2D macromolecules and provides principles for designing structural metamaterials with tunable load-bearing characteristics.
title_zh: 越小越强：褶皱二维高分子的拓扑承载
abstract_zh: 二维 (2D) 大分子是原子级薄的材料，能够形成具有复杂拓扑的皱褶构型，定义了大分子力学的新范例。在这里，我们揭示了一种普遍的负尺寸效应，即较小的板材比较大的板材产生更强的承载能力。粗粒度分子动力学模拟表明，压缩压力或模量与 Föppl-von Kármán 数之间存在负比例关系，功率指数由起皱密度决定，但与材料类型无关。能量分析表明，较小的片材形成致密的脊网络，最大限度地减少自折叠，从而实现高效的载荷传递和能量吸收。在致密化过程中，1.5 的恒定脊与顶点增量比保留了小片材的优异脊密度。在纸张、铝箔、聚二甲基硅氧烷 (PDMS) 和硅橡胶上进行的实验证实了这种在不同长度尺度和不同材料类别中的行为。这项工作揭示了二维大分子​​中尺寸相关的褶皱的基本机制，并提供了设计具有可调承载特性的结构超材料的原理。

title: High Thermal Stability of Ultrathin‐Film Silver Transparent Electrodes for Over 100 cm2 Flexible Organic Photovoltaic Modules
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Thermal stability issue of ultrathin (< 10 nm) silver (Ag) transparent electrodes limit their applications for large‐area flexible organic photovoltaics (OPVs). In this work, we address this issue by developing a vacuum‐deposited tin oxide (SnO
                    2
                    (evap.), 1 nm) seed layer for growing an ultrathin Ag transparent electrode. The 4 nm Ag transparent electrode grown on SnO
                    2
                    (evap.) surface could withstand temperature as high as 250°C–300°C in air without any protection layer, which showed much higher thermal robustness than Ag films (4 nm) grown on other surfaces, including glass, polyethyleneimine, gold, nickel, chromium, copper, tungsten oxide, molybdenum oxide, and SnO
                    2
                    (atomic layer deposition, ALD). The high thermal robustness and high optoelectronic properties of the ultrathin Ag film grown on SnO
                    2
                    (evap.) are likely attributed to interfacial Sn–O–Ag chemical linkages. Based on the thin Ag/SnO
                    2
                    (evap.) transparent electrodes, a flexible OPV module with an active area of 108 cm
                    2
                    exhibits a PCE of 13.51%. Outdoor operational stability of the flexible module was further conducted via maximum power output point (MPP) tracking. After over one‐month outdoor tracking, the flexible OPV module showed high operational stability comparable to the silicon reference device. The flexible OPV module displayed higher power output than silicon reference devices under dim illumination.

title: Hypochlorite Redox Chemistry Enables High‐Voltage and High‐Power Saltwater Batteries
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Saltwater batteries (SWBs) are promising alternatives to lithium‐ion batteries for large‐scale stationary energy storage. However, the performance of conventional oxygen redox‐based saltwater battery systems is often constrained by sluggish oxygen evolution and reduction reactions (OER/ORR) at the cathode, leading to low voltage efficiency and limited power density. Here, OER and ORR are replaced by hypochlorite‐based redox reactions through the introduction of sodium hypochlorite into saltwater.
                    Operando
                    pH and dissolved oxygen measurements confirm that OER and ORR are minimized and that hypochlorite redox reactions dominate the cathode behavior. Owing to the higher operating potential and faster reaction kinetics, the hypochlorite‐redox‐based SWBs delivers a higher discharge voltage of 3.3 V and reduced charge‐discharge voltage polarization to 0.66 V. Further improvement is achieved by adjusting the saltwater pH to near‐neutral conditions, increasing the discharge voltage to 3.5 V and more than doubling the peak power. The hypochlorite redox environment also exhibits chemical stability with key cell components, including the solid electrolyte and cathode current collectors. Operation of series‐connected cells and cells employing hard carbon anodes demonstrates scalability and compatibility with alternative anode materials. These results provide a strong foundation for next‐generation SWBs targeting large‐scale stationary energy storage applications.
title_zh: 次氯酸盐氧化还原化学使高电压和高功率盐水电池成为可能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    盐水电池（SWB）是用于大规模固定储能的锂离子电池的有前途的替代品。然而，传统的基于氧氧化还原的盐水电池系统的性能通常受到阴极缓慢的析氧和还原反应（OER/ORR）的限制，导致电压效率低和功率密度有限。在这里，通过将次氯酸钠引入盐水中，OER和ORR被基于次氯酸盐的氧化还原反应所取代。
                    操作
                    pH 和溶解氧测量证实 OER 和 ORR 最小化，并且次氯酸盐氧化还原反应主导阴极行为。由于更高的工作电位和更快的反应动力学，基于次氯酸盐-氧化还原的SWB可提供3.3 V的更高放电电压，并将充放电电压极化降低至0.66 V。通过将盐水pH值调整至接近中性条件，将放电电压提高至3.5 V并将峰值功率增加一倍以上，可以实现进一步的改进。次氯酸盐氧化还原环境还表现出与关键电池组件（包括固体电解质和阴极集电器）的化学稳定性。串联电池和采用硬碳阳极的电池的运行表现出可扩展性以及与替代阳极材料的兼容性。这些结果为针对大规模固定储能应用的下一代SWB提供了坚实的基础。

title: Molecular Design Strategies for High‐Voltage Organic Cathodes
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Organic electrode materials (OEMs) offer promising pathways toward sustainable and high‐performance rechargeable batteries, yet their practical implementation is limited by rigid crystal structures, poor electronic conductivity, and low redox potential.  Here, we conduct a systematic molecular‐level investigation of two organic cathodes, phenazine‐1,4,6,9‐tetrone (PzTO) and dithiin‐fused naphthazarin (5,8‐dihydroxy‐1,4‐naphthoquinone) (DNP), through a combined computational and experimental approach. Solution‐phase cyclic voltammetry reveals a substantial redox potential gap between them, with DNP exhibiting a reduction potential ∼500 mV higher than PzTO. This difference becomes more pronounced in solid state measurements, where the first reduction potentials reach ∼3.68 V vs. Li
                    +
                    /Li for DNP and 3.08 V for PzTO. By dissecting the molecular origins of these trends, we identify two governing features: (i) changes of aromaticity upon reduction (differential aromaticity) and (ii) Li─O coordination number. Density functional theory calculations confirm that these features strongly modulate lithiation free energies. Extending our analysis to a series of hypothetical derivatives of PzTO and DNP, we establish a linear relationship between differential aromaticity and lithiation free energy and show that the introduction of additional Li─O coordination enhances redox potentials. Taken together, these molecular engineering insights offer a mechanistic foundation for rationalizing high‐voltage performance and guiding the design of next‐generation OEMs.
title_zh: 高压有机阴极的分子设计策略
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    有机电极材料（OEM）为可持续和高性能可充电电池提供了有前景的途径，但其实际应用受到刚性晶体结构、差的电子传导性和低氧化还原电位的限制。  在这里，我们通过计算和实验相结合的方法，对两种有机阴极：吩嗪-1,4,6,9-四酮（PzTO）和二硫英稠合萘醌（5,8-二羟基-1,4-萘醌）（DNP）进行了系统的分子水平研究。溶液相循环伏安法揭示了它们之间存在很大的氧化还原电位差，DNP 的还原电位比 PzTO 高约 500 mV。这种差异在固态测量中变得更加明显，其中第一还原电位相对于 Li 达到~3.68 V
                    +
                    DNP 为 /Li，PzTO 为 3.08 V。通过剖析这些趋势的分子起源，我们确定了两个控制特征：(i) 还原时芳香性的变化（差异芳香性）和 (ii) Li─O 配位数。密度泛函理论计算证实这些特征强烈调节锂化自由能。将我们的分析扩展到 PzTO 和 DNP 的一系列假设衍生物，我们在微分芳香性和锂化自由能之间建立了线性关系，并表明引入额外的 Li─O 配位可增强氧化还原电位。总而言之，这些分子工程见解为合理化高压 PE 提供了机械基础。

title: Flexible Perovskite/Silicon Tandem Solar Cells Exceeding 30% Efficiency at Scale
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Flexible perovskite/silicon tandem solar cells (FTSCs) represent a frontier for high‐power‐density, conformable electronics, yet their commercial viability is hindered by the dual challenges of interfacial carrier recombination and mechanical delamination at the perovskite/C
                    60
                    interface. Here, we demonstrate a bimolecular piperazine‐derived interface engineering strategy that simultaneously optimizes interfacial photophysics and structural integrity. By applying a synergistic combination of piperazine dihydrochloride (PDCl) and 1‐(4‐chlorophenyl) piperazine hydrochloride (
                    p
                    ‐ClPh‐PCl), we achieve complementary field‐effect passivation and in situ formation of a stabilizing low‐dimensional template. While PDCl effectively suppresses interfacial trap states and modulates band alignment for accelerated electron extraction, the
                    p

                    60

                    2
                    ) FTSCs, surpassing 30% PCE for the first time in FTSCs exceeding 10 cm
                    2
                    in device area. Furthermore, these devices exhibit exceptional durability, retaining 95% of their initial efficiency after 20,000 bending cycles and 650 h of continuous illumination.

title: Structurally engineered ultrasoft PEDOT:PSS fiber microelectrodes with enhanced electrochemical performance for neural interfaces
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Stable and reliable neural interfacing is essential for the diagnosis and treatment of chronic neurological disorders. Flexible neural probes are particularly important for this purpose, as they minimize tissue damage and inflammatory responses while maintaining stable electrode-tissue coupling; however, achieving both high electrical performance and tissue-like mechanics remains challenging. Here, we present a poly(3,4-ethylenedioxythiophene) polystyrene sulfonate (PEDOT:PSS) fiber microelectrode (PFME), an all-organic neural probe capable of recording single-neuron activities with potential for long-term interfacing. The PFME is entirely composed of organic components and fabricated without thermal processing. In addition, the posttreatment process enables to selectively remove PSS binder networks while promoting PEDOT chain alignment to optimize mechanical compliance and electrochemical performance. In vivo, the PFME enables stable single-unit recordings from the mouse hippocampus. Histological analysis after 1 week of implantation reveals minimal glial activation comparable to that elicited by a conventional probe. This structurally engineered PFME establishes a pathway to achieve minimally invasive neural interfacing platforms for chronic applications.
title_zh: 结构工程超软 PEDOT:PSS 纤维微电极，具有增强的神经接口电化学性能
abstract_zh: 稳定可靠的神经接口对于慢性神经系统疾病的诊断和治疗至关重要。柔性神经探针对于此目的特别重要，因为它们可以最大限度地减少组织损伤和炎症反应，同时保持稳定的电极-组织耦合；然而，同时实现高电气性能和类组织力学仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种聚（3,4-乙撑二氧噻吩）聚苯乙烯磺酸盐（PEDOT:PSS）纤维微电极（PFME），这是一种全有机神经探针，能够记录单神经元活动，并具有长期连接的潜力。 PFME 完全由有机成分组成，无需热处理即可制造。此外，后处理工艺能够选择性地去除 PSS 粘合剂网络，同时促进 PEDOT 链排列，以优化机械顺应性和电化学性能。在体内，PFME 可实现小鼠海马体的稳定单单元记录。植入 1 周后的组织学分析显示，与传统探针引起的神经胶质激活相比，神经胶质激活程度最低。这种结构设计的 PFME 建立了一条实现慢性应用微创神经接口平台的途径。

title: An integrated wireless deep-UV sensing system for intelligent early fire detection
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Uncontrolled fires, from wildlands to industrial facilities, have become a pressing global threat, causing widespread ecological damage, loss of life, and economic disruption. The fundamental challenge is the lack of rapid and reliable detection at the ignition stage. Once flames spread, suppression becomes increasingly difficult and damage escalates. Conventional methods such as smoke detectors and thermal imaging fall short for wildfire and large-scale fire scenarios. Effective systems require accurate detection without false activation, stable performance under varied and harsh environments, and low power or zero-bias photodetection for continuous use in remote locations. Here, we report a wireless and flexible deep-ultraviolet (DUV) sensing platform that addresses these requirements in a single integrated unit. The platform combines a zinc tin oxide nanocomposite photodetector, flexible circuit integration, portable power, and Bluetooth communication. The sensor shows a selective solar-blind DUV response, stable operation under mechanical stress and extended cycling (92.5% retention after 100 bending cycles and 96.7% after 180 days), and energy-efficient performance compatible with autonomous deployment. Data-driven analysis of response curves allows for machine learning models that classify flame types and estimate distance, extending the system beyond binary fire detection by providing additional information on flame type and relative distance. This integrated approach provides a practical route to reliable fire monitoring, relevant to early-stage fire monitoring concepts for wildfire and industrial safety applications.
title_zh: 用于智能早期火灾探测的集成无线深紫外传感系统
abstract_zh: 从荒地到工业设施，失控的火灾已成为紧迫的全球威胁，造成广泛的生态破坏、生命损失和经济破坏。根本挑战是在点火阶段缺乏快速可靠的检测。一旦火势蔓延，扑救就会变得越来越困难，损害也会升级。烟雾探测器和热成像等传统方法不足以应对野火和大规模火灾场景。有效的系统需要准确检测、无误激活、在各种恶劣环境下稳定的性能，以及低功耗或零偏置光电检测，以便在远程位置连续使用。在这里，我们报告了一种无线、灵活的深紫外线 (DUV) 传感平台，该平台可以在单个集成单元中满足这些要求。该平台结合了氧化锌锡纳米复合光电探测器、柔性电路集成、便携式电源和蓝牙通信。该传感器具有选择性日盲 DUV 响应、在机械应力和长时间循环下稳定运行（100 次弯曲循环后保持率为 92.5%，180 天后保持率为 96.7%），以及与自主部署兼容的节能性能。响应曲线的数据驱动分析允许机器学习模型对火焰类型进行分类并估计距离，通过提供有关火焰类型和相对距离的附加信息，将系统扩展到二元火灾检测之外。这种综合方法为可靠的火灾监测提供了一条实用途径，与早期火灾监测工作相关。

title: Armadillo-inspired active morphing skeletons for soft machines
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Armadillos can rapidly reconfigure their body into a rigid, enclosed sphere in active response to external threats, combining adaptive shape change with robust mechanical protection, which is rarely achieved in engineered systems. This rapid reconfiguration is achieved through real-time sensing and muscle activation, while the synergistic coordination of the exoskeleton and endoskeleton provides structural stiffness and impact resistance. Inspired by this natural strategy, we present an active morphing skeleton called morpho-interlocking protective module (MIPM). The architecture integrates curvature-conforming segmented exoskeleton with a spine-inspired interlocking endoskeleton framework, forming a coordinated load-bearing skeleton. A muscle-like liquid crystal elastomer composite layer drives structural transformation, while an embedded sensing layer detects external threats and autonomously triggers localized Joule heating for actuation of the liquid crystal elastomer layer. This enables multimodal morphing behaviors such as curling, rolling, and grasping, without compromising the structural integrity. The MIPM withstands impact, puncture, and concentrated loading while carrying and protecting fragile payloads in harsh conditions. An integrated Bluetooth module facilitates wireless, untethered operation, broadening its applicability to hazardous or inaccessible environments. By combining adaptive morphology, real-time sensory feedback, and on-demand mechanical stiffening within a unified internal-external skeletal framework, this work presents a previously unidentified paradigm for concurrent morphing and protection, with broad applicability across adaptive systems ranging from soft robotics to next-generation flexible electronics.
title_zh: 受犰狳启发的软机器主动变形骨骼
abstract_zh: 犰狳可以快速将其身体重新配置为刚性、封闭的球体，以主动响应外部威胁，将自适应形状变化与强大的机械保护相结合，这在工程系统中很少实现。这种快速重新配置是通过实时传感和肌肉激活来实现的，而外骨骼和内骨骼的协同协调提供了结构刚度和抗冲击性。受这种自然策略的启发，我们提出了一种称为形态互锁保护模块（MIPM）的主动变形骨架。该架构将曲率一致的分段外骨骼与受脊柱启发的互锁内骨骼框架集成在一起，形成协调的承重骨架。肌肉状液晶弹性体复合层驱动结构转变，而嵌入式传感层检测外部威胁并自动触发局部焦耳加热以驱动液晶弹性体层。这使得多模态变形行为成为可能，例如卷曲、滚动和抓握，而不会影响结构完整性。 MIPM 可承受冲击、穿刺和集中负载，同时在恶劣条件下承载和保护易碎的有效负载。集成蓝牙模块有利于无线、不受限制的操作，从而扩大了其对危险或难以进入的环境的适用性。通过在统一的内外骨骼框架内结合自适应形态、实时感觉反馈和按需机械硬化，这项工作提出了一种先前未识别的

title: TPM1 drives cytoskeleton-immunometabolism coupling and LGALS9/CD45-mediated neuroinflammatory propagation in retinitis pigmentosa
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Retinitis pigmentosa (RP), the most prevalent inherited retinal degeneration, features progressive photoreceptor loss with no approved disease-modifying therapies. While microglia-driven neuroinflammation accelerates RP progression, its sustaining mechanisms remain elusive. Through integrated multiomics profiling of retinal degeneration 10 (rd10) mice, we identify tropomyosin 1 (TPM1) as a previously unrecognized cytoskeletal-immune regulator orchestrating spatial neuroinflammation in RP. Genetic ablation of
                    Tpm1
                    attenuated microglial reactivity and preserved vision, whereas overexpression triggered self-reinforcing inflammation via four interlocked axes: (i) TPM1-mediated activator protein-1 (AP-1) hyperactivation initiates senescence-associated secretory phenotype (SASP) through mitogen-activated protein kinase (MAPK) kinase/extracellular signal–regulated kinase 3–dependent MAPK signaling; (ii) SASP subsequently mediates reduced phagocytosis; (iii)
                    Tpm1-Apoe/Fabp5
                    axis disruption precipitates lipid droplet accumulation with cholesterol crystallization; (iv) galectin-9 (LGALS9)/CD45-mediated intermicroglial signaling propagates inflammatory signals across the retina. Our work redefines TPM1 as a linchpin in self-sustaining neurodegeneration cycles, where cytoskeletal dysfunction fuels immunometabolic collapse. These findings unveil precision therapeutic strategies targeting TPM1 hubs—notably the LGALS9/CD45 axis—to disrupt inflammatory cycles while preserving retinal homeostasis.
title_zh: TPM1驱动色素性视网膜炎中的细胞骨架-免疫代谢耦合和LGALS9/CD45介导的神经炎症传播
abstract_zh:
色素性视网膜炎 (RP) 是最常见的遗传性视网膜变性，其特点是进行性光感受器丧失，且尚无批准的疾病缓解疗法。虽然小胶质细胞驱动的神经炎症加速了 RP 的进展，但其维持机制仍然难以捉摸。通过对视网膜变性 10 (rd10) 小鼠进行综合多组学分析，我们确定原肌球蛋白 1 (TPM1) 是一种以前未被识别的细胞骨架免疫调节因子，可协调 RP 中的空间神经炎症。基因消融
                    总温度1
                    减弱小胶质细胞反应性并保留视力，而过度表达通过四个互锁轴触发自我强化炎症：（i）TPM1介导的激活蛋白1（AP-1）过度激活通过丝裂原激活蛋白激酶（MAPK）激酶/细胞外信号调节激酶3依赖性MAPK信号传导启动衰老相关分泌表型（SASP）； (ii) SASP 随后介导吞噬作用减少； (三)
                    Tpm1-Apoe/Fabp5
                    轴破坏导致脂滴积累和胆固醇结晶； (iv) galectin-9 (LGALS9)/CD45 介导的小胶质细胞间信号传导在视网膜上传播炎症信号。我们的工作将 TPM1 重新定义为自我维持的神经退行性循环的关键，在这种循环中，细胞骨架功能障碍会加剧免疫代谢崩溃。这些发现揭示了针对 TPM1 中枢（尤其是 LGALS9/CD45 轴）的精准治疗策略，以破坏炎症循环，同时保持视网膜稳态。

title: A spin-orbit torque–based key generation system with key concealment and attack detection through irreversible physical changes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The confidentiality of key storage devices determines the trustworthiness of cryptographic systems. Existing attack detection methods typically depend on monitoring external variations of devices, which can be circumvented by attackers. This work presents a unified key generation and protection scheme using spin-orbit torque (SOT) devices. By unifying static and dynamic entropy sources within the same devices, the key generation system functions both as physically unclonable functions and as true random number generators. In idle states, devices retain only random numbers and conceal any extractable key. Illegal key access irreversibly destroys stored random numbers, offering a robust attack detection mechanism. A comparator circuit flags illegal key extraction activity, ensuring that the user can promptly detect and revoke compromised keys. This approach merges key generation, concealment, and detection into a single physical platform, providing a hardware-rooted, unforgeable method for key protection.
title_zh: 基于自旋轨道扭矩的密钥生成系统，通过不可逆的物理变化实现密钥隐藏和攻击检测
abstract_zh: 密钥存储设备的机密性决定了密码系统的可信度。现有的攻击检测方法通常依赖于监视设备的外部变化，这可以被攻击者规避。这项工作提出了一种使用自旋轨道扭矩（SOT）设备的统一密钥生成和保护方案。通过在同一设备内统一静态和动态熵源，密钥生成系统既可以充当物理上不可克隆的函数，也可以充当真正的随机数生成器。在空闲状态下，设备仅保留随机数并隐藏任何可提取的密钥。非法密钥访问会不可逆转地破坏存储的随机数，从而提供强大的攻击检测机制。比较器电路标记非法密钥提取活动，确保用户能够及时检测并撤销受损的密钥。这种方法将密钥生成、隐藏和检测合并到单个物理平台中，提供基于硬件的、不可伪造的密钥保护方法。

title: Which immigrants do citizens prefer? A meta-reanalysis of 100 conjoint experiments
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: In the past decade, an important literature in the social sciences has examined public attitudes toward immigrants in host societies. In it, a prominent experimental method—the conjoint design, where participants are tasked with rating or choosing between randomized profiles—has been used reliably to understand how immigrant characteristics shape admission preferences. We collate replication datasets from 100 individual studies spanning 1,475,403 immigrant profiles with 26 randomized attributes evaluated by 142,817 survey respondents from 36 countries. Meta-analyses reinforce well-established findings: Economic, cultural, humanitarian, and procedural factors all influence evaluations. Meta-reanalyses show that preferences are broadly similar across countries and demographic groups. However, they also reveal two additional patterns: Economic considerations have become more influential over time, and evaluations of individual immigrants differ sharply depending on where people stand on the broader immigration debate. These findings shed light on ongoing debates and point to fruitful areas for future research.
title_zh: 公民更喜欢哪些移民？ 100 个联合实验的荟萃再分析
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，社会科学领域的一篇重要文献研究了东道国社会公众对移民的态度。其中，一种著名的实验方法——联合设计，参与者的任务是在随机资料之间进行评分或选择——已被可靠地用于了解移民特征如何影响入学偏好。我们整理了来自 100 项独立研究的复制数据集，涵盖 1,475,403 份移民资料，并由来自 36 个国家的 142,817 名调查受访者评估了 26 个随机属性。荟萃分析强化了既定的发现：经济、文化、人道主义和程序因素都会影响评估。荟萃重新分析表明，不同国家和人口群体的偏好大致相似。然而，它们还揭示了两种额外的模式：随着时间的推移，经济因素的影响力变得越来越大，而且根据人们在更广泛的移民辩论中的立场，对个人移民的评估也存在很大差异。这些发现揭示了正在进行的争论，并指出了未来研究的富有成果的领域。

title: MR-AIV reveals in vivo brain-wide fluid flow with physics-informed AI
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The circulation of cerebrospinal and interstitial fluid plays a vital role in clearing metabolic waste from the brain, and its disruption has been linked to neurological disorders. However, directly measuring brain-wide fluid transport, especially in the deep brain, has remained elusive. Here, we introduce magnetic resonance artificial intelligence velocimetry (MR-AIV), a framework featuring a specialized physics-informed architecture and optimization method that reconstructs three-dimensional fluid velocity fields from dynamic contrast-enhanced magnetic resonance imaging (DCE-MRI). MR-AIV unveils brain-wide velocity maps while providing estimates of tissue permeability and pressure fields, quantities inaccessible to other methods. Applied to the brain, MR-AIV reveals a functional landscape of interstitial and perivascular flow, quantitatively distinguishing slow diffusion-driven transport [∼0.1 micrometers per second (μm/s)] from rapid advective flow (∼3 μm/s). This approach enables new investigations into brain clearance mechanisms and fluid dynamics in health and disease, with broad potential applications to other porous medium systems, from geophysics to tissue mechanics.
title_zh: MR-AIV 通过基于物理的 AI 揭示体内全脑流体流动
abstract_zh: 脑脊液和间质液的循环在清除大脑中的代谢废物方面发挥着至关重要的作用，其破坏与神经系统疾病有关。然而，直接测量全脑液体运输，尤其是大脑深部的液体运输，仍然难以实现。在这里，我们介绍磁共振人工智能测速（MR-AIV），这是一个具有专门的物理信息架构和优化方法的框架，可以从动态对比度增强磁共振成像（DCE-MRI）重建三维流体速度场。 MR-AIV 揭示了全脑速度图，同时提供了组织渗透性和压力场的估计，这些数量是其他方法无法获得的。应用于大脑时，MR-AIV 揭示了间质和血管周围流动的功能景观，定量区分缓慢扩散驱动的运输 [∼0.1 微米每秒 (μm/s)] 和快速平流流动 (∼3 μm/s)。这种方法能够对健康和疾病中的大脑清除机制和流体动力学进行新的研究，并在从地球物理学到组织力学的其他多孔介质系统中具有广泛的潜在应用。

title: Active protein-capturing hydrogel for broad-spectrum pathogen defense
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Proteinaceous agents, including viral particles and allergenic proteins, play central roles in infection, inflammation, and immune dysregulation, yet few materials can broadly neutralize them through direct protein capture. Here, we present an inhalable protein trap (IPT), an active hydrogel that rapidly immobilizes diverse amine-containing biomolecules via NHS-amine chemistry. Structural optimization enables IPT to stably incorporate a high density of reactive NHS esters that remain functional under physiological conditions, allowing efficient protein capture at mucosal surfaces. Upon hydration, powdery IPT rapidly forms an active barrier that covalently traps proteins and proteinaceous particles within minutes. This nonselective capture mechanism allows IPT to bind viral particles, allergens released from pollen or fungi, and soluble immune mediators such as histamine. Across multiple animal models, including allergic rhinitis, pollen-induced allergy, and viral infection, IPT consistently outperformed commercial barrier sprays in blocking pathogenic proteins and mitigating disease progression. These results establish IPT as a versatile platform for broad-spectrum protection at biological interfaces.
title_zh: 用于广谱病原体防御的活性蛋白质捕获水凝胶
abstract_zh: 蛋白质制剂，包括病毒颗粒和过敏蛋白，在感染、炎症和免疫失调中发挥着核心作用，但很少有材料可以通过直接蛋白质捕获来广泛中和它们。在这里，我们提出了一种可吸入蛋白质捕集器（IPT），这是一种活性水凝胶，可通过 NHS-胺化学快速固定多种含胺生物分子。结构优化使 IPT 能够稳定地掺入高密度的反应性 NHS 酯，这些酯在生理条件下仍保持功能，从而能够在粘膜表面有效捕获蛋白质。水合后，粉状 IPT 迅速形成活性屏障，在几分钟内共价捕获蛋白质和蛋白质颗粒。这种非选择性捕获机制使 IPT 能够结合病毒颗粒、花粉或真菌释放的过敏原以及组胺等可溶性免疫介质。在多种动物模型中，包括过敏性鼻炎、花粉引起的过敏和病毒感染，IPT 在阻断致病蛋白和减缓疾病进展方面始终优于商业屏障喷雾剂。这些结果使 IPT 成为生物界面广谱保护的多功能平台。

title: Deciphering competing elementary steps to correlate electrocatalyst chemical state with activity
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The overpotential in multielectron transfer heterogeneous electrocatalysis fundamentally arises from thermodynamic and kinetic disparities among elementary steps; however, deciphering coupled and competing steps has long remained a challenge. Here, we establish an electrochemical deconvolution paradigm based on key processes in electrocatalytic reactions, such as charge accumulation, electron/proton transfer, and intermediate evolution, to resolve competing elementary steps. Taking the oxygen evolution reaction as a prototypical reaction, we design a model catalyst featuring a precise isolated cation-anion vacancy pair and track the previously elusive electrochemical behavior of lattice oxygen by disentangling interference from adsorbed oxygen intermediates. Mechanistically, the lattice oxygen oxidation pathway originates from the spontaneous, nonelectrochemical deprotonation of replenished water molecules coordinated to unsaturated cation sites. Alternating current techniques further reveal that although lattice oxygen oxidation requires a higher potential than metal oxidation, it exhibits faster kinetics, providing insight into its superior catalytic activity. These findings establish a direct experimental correlation between the initial chemical state and the catalytic activity and prove surface-confined lattice oxygen cycling. Furthermore, expanding conventional potential-current analysis into a multidimensional framework enables disentanglement of thermodynamic and kinetic contributions of key elementary steps, thereby guiding the rational optimization of various complex multielectron transfer reactions.
title_zh: 破译将电催化剂化学状态与活性关联起来的竞争基本步骤
abstract_zh: 多电子转移多相电催化中的超电势从根本上来说是由基本步骤之间的热力学和动力学差异引起的。然而，解读耦合和竞争的步骤长期以来仍然是一个挑战。在这里，我们基于电催化反应中的关键过程（例如电荷积累、电子/质子转移和中间演化）建立了电化学反卷积范式，以解决竞争的基本步骤。以析氧反应为典型反应，我们设计了一种具有精确隔离的阳离子-阴离子空位对的模型催化剂，并通过消除吸附氧中间体的干扰来追踪以前难以捉摸的晶格氧的电化学行为。从机制上讲，晶格氧氧化途径源自与不饱和阳离子位点配位的补充水分子的自发、非电化学去质子化。交流电技术进一步揭示，尽管晶格氧氧化需要比金属氧化更高的电势，但它表现出更快的动力学，从而深入了解其卓越的催化活性。这些发现建立了初始化学状态和催化活性之间的直接实验相关性，并证明了表面限制晶格氧循环。此外，将传统的势流分析扩展到多维框架可以解开关键基本步骤的热力学和动力学贡献，从而指导各种复杂的合理优化。

title: Limited transmission of cervid prions to nonhuman primates provides insights into the zoonotic potential of chronic wasting disease
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Chronic wasting disease (CWD) is an expanding prion disease of cervids. CWD prions persist in the environment, are shed in excreta, and accumulate in tissues of infected cervids, raising concerns about its zoonotic potential. Using cynomolgus macaques, we explored the zoonotic potential of CWD. Although most inoculated macaques remained asymptomatic, sensitive in vitro prion amplification assays revealed low levels of prions in macaque tissues. Inoculation of transgenic mice and bank voles with macaque tissues induced prion disease, achieving 100% transmission rates upon serial passage. One interpretation of these findings is that CWD prions retain infectivity across species and that primate infection may manifest atypically while still enabling transmission. Our results challenge earlier conclusions that minimize the zoonotic risk of CWD and underscore the need for continued surveillance.
title_zh: 鹿科朊病毒向非人类灵长类动物的有限传播为了解慢性消耗性疾病的人畜共患潜力提供了见解
abstract_zh: 慢性消耗性疾病（CWD）是鹿科动物的一种不断扩大的朊病毒病。 CWD 朊病毒在环境中持续存在，通过排泄物排出，并在受感染鹿科动物的组织中积聚，引起人们对其人畜共患潜力的担忧。我们利用食蟹猴探索了 CWD 的人畜共患潜力。尽管大多数接种的猕猴仍然没有症状，但敏感的体外朊病毒扩增测定显示猕猴组织中的朊病毒水平较低。用猕猴组织接种转基因小鼠和田鼠诱导了朊病毒病，连续传代后实现了 100% 的传播率。对这些发现的一种解释是，CWD 朊病毒保留了跨物种的感染性，并且灵长类动物感染可能表现不典型，但仍然能够传播。我们的结果挑战了早期的结论，这些结论最大限度地降低了 CWD 的人畜共患风险，并强调了持续监测的必要性。

title: Phosphorylation remodels the mitotic centrosome matrix to generate bipartite γ-tubulin complex docking sites
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Mitotic centrosomes consist of centrioles surrounded by a proteinaceous matrix that docks and activates γ-tubulin complexes (γTuCs) to nucleate microtubules for spindle assembly. During mitotic entry, phosphorylation at centrosomes remodels CDK5 regulatory subunit associated protein 2 (CDK5RAP2) family matrix proteins to generate γTuC docking sites. We address the mechanism of this conversion using
                    Caenorhabditis elegans
                    SPindle Defective (SPD-5) as a model. We show that SPD-5 contains two regions, phospho-regulated γTuC binding region 1 (PRGB1) and PRGB2, that are each sufficient for polo-like kinase 1 (PLK1) phosphorylation–regulated γTuC binding. We define key phosphosites in each region and uncover autoinhibition mediated by interactions within and between them. PRGB2 is dimeric and requires γTuCs containing the Mozart family microprotein MZT-1 for binding, whereas PRGB1 is monomeric and binds independently of MZT-1. Our results support a model in which PLK1 phosphorylation induces a conformational change that enables MZT-1–dependent PRGB2 engagement, which in turn relieves PRGB1 inhibition. Such a multistep mechanism would ensure robust spindle assembly by restricting microtubule nucleation in space and time.
title_zh: 磷酸化重塑有丝分裂中心体基质，产生二分 γ-微管蛋白复合物对接位点
abstract_zh:
有丝分裂中心体由蛋白质基质包围的中心粒组成，蛋白质基质对接并激活γ-微管蛋白复合物（γTuC）以使微管成核以进行纺锤体组装。在有丝分裂进入过程中，中心体的磷酸化会重塑 CDK5 调节亚基相关蛋白 2 (CDK5RAP2) 家族基质蛋白，以产生 γTuC 对接位点。我们使用以下方法来解决这种转换的机制
                    秀丽隐杆线虫
                    主轴缺陷 (SPD-5) 作为型号。我们发现 SPD-5​​ 包含两个区域，即磷酸化调节的 γTuC 结合区 1 (PRGB1) 和 PRGB2，每个区域都足以进行 Polo 样激酶 1 (PLK1) 磷酸化调节的 γTuC 结合。我们定义了每个区域的关键磷酸位点，并揭示了它们内部和之间的相互作用介导的自抑制。 PRGB2 是二聚体，需要含有莫扎特家族微生物蛋白 MZT-1 的 γTuC 才能结合，而 PRGB1 是单体，独立于 MZT-1 结合。我们的结果支持一个模型，其中 PLK1 磷酸化诱导构象变化，使 MZT-1 依赖的 PRGB2 参与，进而减轻 PRGB1 抑制。这种多步骤机制将通过限制微管成核的空间和时间来确保稳健的主轴组装。

title: A strengthened and southward-shifted westerly jet mitigates warming-induced drying across Asian drylands
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The Eurasian Subtropical Westerly Jet (ESWJ), a key component of the Eurasia circulation system, has weakened in summer since 1979 due to uneven aerosol emissions. Its future evolution under human activities, including clean air policies, remains uncertain yet critical for climate adaptation in mid-latitude Asian drylands. Using multiscenario projections, we show that the ESWJ is projected to reverse its historical weakening trend and turn to strengthen during 2025–2100. This intensification arises from both increasing greenhouse gas (GHG) concentrations and declining anthropogenic aerosols. Aerosol reduction primarily triggers the transition from weakening to strengthening, already emerging around 2010, while GHG forcing additionally induces a southward displacement. These circulation changes enhance dynamic moisture advection into Central Asia, partially offsetting the “dry-get-drier” paradigm and resulting in limited changes in regional water availability. While recent studies have emphasized the warming effects of aerosol reduction, our findings highlight the critical role of circulation dynamics in shaping regional hydroclimatic security.
title_zh: 一股增强且向南移动的西风急流减轻了亚洲旱地因变暖引起的干燥
abstract_zh: 欧亚副热带西风急流（ESWJ）是欧亚大陆环流系统的重要组成部分，自1979年以来，由于气溶胶排放不均匀，该急流在夏季逐渐减弱。其未来在人类活动（包括清洁空气政策）下的演变仍然不确定，但对于亚洲中纬度旱地的气候适应至关重要。通过多情景预测，我们表明，ESWJ 预计将扭转其历史减弱趋势，并在 2025 年至 2100 年期间转为加强。这种加剧是由于温室气体（GHG）浓度增加和人为气溶胶减少造成的。气溶胶的减少主要引发了从减弱到增强的转变，这种转变在 2010 年左右就已经出现，而温室气体强迫还导致了向南的迁移。这些环流变化增强了进入中亚的动态水分平流，部分抵消了“干燥变得干燥”的范式，并导致区域可用水量的变化有限。虽然最近的研究强调了气溶胶减少的变暖效应，但我们的研究结果强调了环流动态在塑造区域水文气候安全方面的关键作用。

title: Bioelectric calcium transport and activation in mammalian cells using field-focused DNA-carbon nanotube meshes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Electrical signaling in biology is ionic. Safe modulation needs interfaces that couple electrons to ions at soft membranes without injury. We present DNA-FOCUS, a membrane-conformal, DNA-programmed carbon-nanotube biointerface that self-assembles on living cells, weaving DNA-wrapped SWCNTs into an ultraflexible mesh. A subvolt bias is condensed into nanometer hotspots at the membrane, lowering access resistance and engaging endogenous calcium-permeable ion channels. Subvolt stimulation drives sustained Ca
                    2+
                    influx across multiple lineages, with voltage-sensitive dye and impedance readouts showing stronger coupling. Responses occur without excess ROS or loss of viability. The focused field also enables gentle electroporation for plasmid delivery, augments mechano-electrical transduction, and modulates neuronal excitability. Transcriptional analysis and functional validation confirm NFAT activation, and in natural killer cells, it boosts perforin and IFN-γ release with higher tumor killing. This programmable, substrate-free interface supports low-voltage electro-modulation for high-throughput analytics and therapeutic augmentation.
title_zh: 使用场聚焦 DNA-碳纳米管网在哺乳动物细胞中进行生物电钙转运和激活
abstract_zh:
生物学中的电信号是离子的。安全调制需要能够在软膜上将电子与离子耦合而不会造成损伤的界面。我们推出了 DNA-FOCUS，一种膜保形、DNA 编程的碳纳米管生物界面，它可以在活细胞上自组装，将 DNA 包裹的单壁碳纳米管编织成超柔性的网格。亚伏偏压被凝结成膜上的纳米热点，降低进入阻力并接合内源性钙渗透离子通道。亚伏刺激驱动持续的 Ca
                    2+
                    跨多个谱系的涌入，电压敏感染料和阻抗读数显示出更强的耦合。反应发生时没有过量的 ROS 或活力丧失。聚焦领域还可以实现温和的电穿孔以进行质粒递送，增强机械电转导，并调节神经元兴奋性。转录分析和功能验证证实了 NFAT 的激活，并且在自然杀伤细胞中，它促进了穿孔素和 IFN-γ 的释放，并具有更高的肿瘤杀伤力。这种可编程、无基质接口支持低电压电调制，以实现高通量分析和治疗增强。

title: Femtosecond modulation of electron correlations in a Luttinger liquid
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Luttinger liquids emerge in one-dimensional metals with strong electron interactions, exhibiting intriguing near-equilibrium properties such as spin-charge separation and power-law correlations. Although these interactions suggest fast, distinctive out-of-equilibrium dynamics, such phenomena remain largely unexplored on ultrashort timescales. Here, we use femtosecond laser excitation to weakly deplete the electron density in the Luttinger band of Li
                    0.9
                    Mo
                    6
                    O
                    17
                    and track the response via time- and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy. By fitting the measured electron distributions to a finite-temperature Luttinger liquid model, we observe a fast drop in the Luttinger exponent, quantifying the strength of electron interactions. Subsequently, unlike hot electrons in conventional Fermi liquids that slowly relax within picoseconds via electron-phonon coupling, hot electrons in Li
                    0.9
                    Mo
                    6
                    O
                    17
                    relax within a short time of ~100 femtoseconds, through the excitation of a nonequilibrium collective plasmon. The extremely fast evolution of the Luttinger exponent and electron temperature—including a tens of femtosecond time lag between excitation, recovery, and plasmon-driven modulation—reveals previously unidentified pathways for modulating quantum many-body interactions in low-dimensional materials.

title: Understanding the density maximum of water with machine-learned potentials
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: After melting, at ambient pressure, the density of water continues to increase with temperature until it reaches a maximum around 4°C. For nearly a century, this phenomenon has been qualitatively attributed to a mixture of ordered and disordered structures. Here, we use a deep neural network to train a machine-learned (ML) interatomic potential for water using electronic structure data from advanced density functional theory. Notably, molecular dynamics simulations with the ML potential reproduce both the experimental water density anomaly and the thermal expansion coefficient. Detailed structural analysis of the computed hydrogen-bond network reveals that the density anomaly arises from an emergent liquid structure that retains nearly ideal tetrahedral coordination at short range but collapses at intermediate range. Our findings point to a more delicate mechanism causing the density maximum than the conventional picture, emphasizing the collective roles of structural orderings at different length scales.
title_zh: 通过机器学习潜力了解水的密度最大值
abstract_zh: 融化后，在环境压力下，水的密度继续随温度增加，直至达到 4°C 左右的最大值。近一个世纪以来，这种现象被定性地归因于有序和无序结构的混合。在这里，我们使用深度神经网络，利用先进密度泛函理论的电子结构数据来训练机器学习 (ML) 水原子间势。值得注意的是，利用 ML 势的分子动力学模拟再现了实验水密度异常和热膨胀系数。对计算的氢键网络的详细结构分析表明，密度异常是由一种新兴的液体结构引起的，该结构在短距离内保持近乎理想的四面体配位，但在中距离内崩溃。我们的研究结果指出了比传统图像更微妙的导致密度最大值的机制，强调了不同长度尺度上结构排序的集体作用。

title: Multiple photon field–induced topological states in bulk HgTe
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Strong light-matter interactions can be exploited to modify properties of quantum materials both in and out of thermal equilibrium. Recent studies suggest that electromagnetic fields in photonic structures can hybridize with condensed matter systems, resulting in photon field–dressed collective quantum. Here, we show that photon fields in photonic structures, including optical cavities and waveguides, induce emergent topological phases in solids through polarization-mediated symmetry-breaking mechanisms. Using state-of-the-art quantum electrodynamic density functional theory calculations, we demonstrate that strong light-matter coupling can reconfigure both the electronic and ionic structures of HgTe, driving the system into Weyl, nodal-line, or topological insulator phases. These phases depend on the relative orientation of the sample in the coupling strength. In contrast with laser-driven phenomena, the photon field–induced symmetry breaking arises from steady-state photon-matter hybridization, enabling multiple robust topological states to emerge. Our study demonstrates that vacuum fluctuations in photonic structures can be used to engineer material properties and realize rich topological phenomena in quantum materials on demand.
title_zh: 多光子场诱导的 HgTe 拓扑态
abstract_zh: 可以利用强的光-物质相互作用来改变处于热平衡状态和非热平衡状态的量子材料的特性。最近的研究表明，光子结构中的电磁场可以与凝聚态物质系统杂交，从而产生光子场修饰的集体量子。在这里，我们表明光子结构中的光子场（包括光腔和波导）通过偏振介导的对称破缺机制在固体中诱导出现的拓扑相。利用最先进的量子电动力学密度泛函理论计算，我们证明了强光-物质耦合可以重新配置 HgTe 的电子和离子结构，从而驱动系统进入外尔相、节线相或拓扑绝缘体相。这些相位取决于耦合强度中样品的相对方向。与激光驱动现象相反，光子场引起的对称性破缺是由稳态光子-物质杂化引起的，从而能够出现多种鲁棒的拓扑态。我们的研究表明，光子结构中的真空涨落可用于设计材料特性并根据需要实现量子材料中丰富的拓扑现象。

title: Mechanisms of ligand recognition and channel opening for P2X2 receptors in lipid nanodiscs
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Extracellular adenosine 5′-triphosphate (ATP) activates P2X receptor channels (P2XRs) that serve important roles in the immune and nervous systems. Available structures of P2XRs in detergents reveal that ATP binding to the extracellular domain leads to severing of subunit interfaces within transmembrane regions as the pore opens. Here we report cryo–electron microscopy structures of the human P2X2R in lipid nanodiscs in an apo closed state, with ATP
                    4−
                    , Mg-ATP
                    2−
                    , and suramin bound. We find that a unique Arg residue interacts with the γ-PO
                    4
                    of ATP
                    4−
                    in P2X2R and underlies the requirement of this subtype for ATP
                    4−
                    . Channel opening and desensitization occur when ATP
                    4−
                    binds, whereas the channel remains closed when Mg-ATP
                    2−
                    binds. A continuous belt of partially resolved lipids in the outer leaflet stabilizes the closed state, and the presence of lipids prevents the severing of subunit interfaces as the channel opens. These findings establish key mechanistic principles of gating for P2X2R in a membrane-like environment, providing a framework for future mechanistic studies and therapeutic development.

title: Hurricane air-sea drag saturation and sea-state dependence revealed by surface drones
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The ocean supplies energy for tropical cyclones (TCs) and slows their winds through surface friction, which exerts a force on the ocean termed wind stress. The drag coefficient (
                    C
                    d
                    ) is the key parameter that converts wind speed to wind stress and is currently estimated in forecast models from incomplete data collected in low-to-moderate ocean winds. Here, we use measurements from 11 Atlantic hurricanes to quantify
                    C
                    d
                    in winds up to 44 meters per second and surface waves up to 14 meters. It is found that
                    C
                    d
                    levels off, as wind speed surpasses 30 meters per second but does not decrease appreciably as suggested by previous indirect methods. Interaction of the wind and wave fields causes
                    C
                    d
                    to be 20 ± 2% higher on the motion-left side of a storm, where wind and waves are misaligned, than on the right. These results quantify directly a fundamental TC air-sea interaction parameter and demonstrate the importance of distinct TC quadrant-specific wind-wave interactions.
