title: Detection of peroxynitrite with spatial and temporal resolution: Challenges and opportunities
source: Chem
abstract: The future of precise and site-specific peroxynitrite detection, an important biomarker of oxidative stress, centers on the continued development of (1) selective molecular sensors, (2) their integration into tunable macromolecular architectures, and (3) evaluation across diverse 2D, 3D, and in vivo models.
title_zh: 具有空间和时间分辨率的过氧亚硝酸盐检测：挑战和机遇
abstract_zh: 精确和位点特异性的过氧亚硝酸盐检测是氧化应激的重要生物标志物，其未来集中于以下方面的持续开发：(1) 选择性分子传感器，(2) 将其集成到可调节的大分子结构中，以及 (3) 跨不同 2D、3D 和体内模型的评估。

title: Atropisomerism at the carbon–phosphorus bond
source: Chem
abstract: We describe the feasibility of halting the rotation about the C–P bond, which allows for the isolation of configurationally stable C–P atropisomers under ambient conditions. Triptycyl phosphine oxides with rotationally restricted C–P axes thereby feature threefold stereogenicity with barriers beyond 115 kJ/mol. Moreover, the feasibility of catalytically controlling the configuration of stereogenic C–P axes was established by means of a regio-, diastereo-, and enantioselective Fujiwara-Moritani reaction. A first application of C–P atropisomerism was identified by determining the absolute configuration of a chiral amino acid by 1H NMR.
title_zh: 碳磷键的阻转异构现象
abstract_zh: 我们描述了停止 C-P 键旋转的可行性，这允许在环境条件下分离构型稳定的 C-P 阻转异构体。因此，具有旋转限制的 C-P 轴的三蝶基氧化膦具有三重立体异构性，势垒超过 115 kJ/mol。此外，通过区域选择性、非对映选择性和对映选择性 Fujiwara-Moritani 反应，建立了催化控制立体 C-P 轴构型的可行性。 C-P 阻转异构现象的首次应用是通过 1H NMR 测定手性氨基酸的绝对构型来鉴定的。

title: Irregular porosity as a route to realistic soft thermoelectrics
source: Chem
abstract: Low performance and poor scalability have long prevented polymer-based soft thermoelectrics from being used in practical applications. In a recent issue of Science, Zhang et al. report a thermoelectric polymer with an irregular hierarchical-porous structure that couples multiscale phonon scattering with confinement-enhanced charge transport and enables a remarkable figure of merit (zT) of 1.64.
title_zh: 不规则孔隙率是实现现实软热电材料的途径
abstract_zh: 低性能和较差的可扩展性长期以来一直阻碍着基于聚合物的软热电材料在实际应用中的使用。在最近一期的《科学》杂志上，Zhang 等人。报道了一种具有不规则分层多孔结构的热电聚合物，该结构将多尺度声子散射与限制增强的电荷传输耦合在一起，并实现了 1.64 的卓越品质因数（zT）。

title: Primer PICKR: literature-mined scoring platform for robust RT–qPCR primers
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Reliable reverse-transcription quantitative PCR (RT–qPCR) depends on well-designed primers, yet undocumented or poorly validated sequences continue to compromise reproducibility. Existing resources catalog only modest sets of empirically verified primers or generate de-novo primer pairs without experimental validation. Here, we introduce Primer PICKR (Publication Integrations for Composite Knowledge Ranking), a large-scale, open, continuously updated database that systematically converts >7,000,000 community-validated oligonucleotides from >400,000 papers into actionable design resources. PICKR aligns sequences to reference transcriptomes and assembles ranked primer pairs for over 6000 genes across ten model organisms. Composite scoring integrates citation frequency, biophysical quality, and primer-pair synergy, while experimental validation of 154 human primer pairs spanning the score distribution demonstrates near-perfect amplification success above a PICKR score of 80. By converting decades of scattered primer choices into an immediately searchable database, Primer PICKR reduces empirical screening, conserves scarce samples, and accelerates reproducible assay development.
title_zh: Primer PICKR：基于文献挖掘的稳健 RT-qPCR 引物评分平台
abstract_zh: 可靠的逆转录定量 PCR (RT-qPCR) 取决于精心设计的引物，但未记录或验证不充分的序列继续损害重现性。现有资源仅编录了少量经经验验证的引物集，或在未经实验验证的情况下生成从头引物对。在这里，我们介绍 Primer PICKR（综合知识排名的出版集成），这是一个大规模、开放、持续更新的数据库，可以系统地将超过 400,000 篇论文中的超过 7,000,000 个经过社区验证的寡核苷酸转换为可操作的设计资源。 PICKR 将序列与参考转录组进行比对，并为 10 个模型生物体中的 6000 多个基因组装排序的引物对。综合评分整合了引用频率、生物物理质量和引物对协同作用，而跨越评分分布的 154 个人类引物对的实验验证表明，在 PICKR 评分高于 80 的情况下，扩增取得了近乎完美的成功。通过将数十年分散的引物选择转换为可立即搜索的数据库，Primer PICKR 减少了经验筛选，保留了稀缺样品，并加速了可重复测定的开发。

title: In-plane anomalous Hall effect in a low-dimensional system
source: Nature Materials
abstract: The anomalous Hall effect (AHE) in magnetic systems is typically governed by symmetry constraints that require the Hall response to be proportional to the out-of-plane magnetization component. Here we demonstrate the emergence of an unconventional in-plane AHE in a low-dimensional heterostructure. By interfacing a low-symmetry topological semimetal with a ferromagnetic insulator, we realize a system with reduced symmetry in which only a single mirror plane is preserved. When the magnetization acquires a finite component within this mirror plane, the remaining symmetry is broken, enabling a Hall response that depends on both in-plane and out-of-plane magnetization components. Measurements across multiple devices reveal a gate-tunable AHE, indicating electrostatic control of the underlying mechanisms. A minimal symmetry-constrained microscopic model shows that interfacial spin–orbit coupling and exchange interaction are responsible for the observed multidirectional AHE response. Our work establishes a pathway for engineering tunable, symmetry-driven Hall effects in low-dimensional quantum materials.
title_zh: 低维系统中的面内反常霍尔效应
abstract_zh: 磁系统中的反常霍尔效应 (AHE) 通常受对称约束控制，对称约束要求霍尔响应与面外磁化分量成比例。在这里，我们展示了低维异质结构中非常规面内 AHE 的出现。通过将低对称性拓扑半金属与铁磁绝缘体连接，我们实现了一种对称性降低的系统，其中仅保留了单个镜面。当磁化在该镜面内获得有限分量时，剩余的对称性就会被破坏，从而实现取决于面内和面外磁化分量的霍尔响应。跨多个器件的测量揭示了栅极可调的 AHE，表明了底层机制的静电控制。最小对称约束微观模型表明，界面自旋轨道耦合和交换相互作用是观察到的多向 AHE 响应的原因。我们的工作为低维量子材料中的可调谐、对称驱动霍尔效应的工程建立了一条途径。

title: A T7 RNAP regulatory toolbox for cell-free network engineering and biosensing applications
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: T7 RNA polymerase is ubiquitously used in the fields of synthetic biology and biotechnology. Yet the ability to precisely and modularly regulate T7 RNAP remains surprisingly limited. Here, we engineer a T7 RNAP regulatory toolbox consisting of programmable synthetic repressors, activators, and biosensors in a cell-free system. This toolbox enables scalable design of T7 RNAP-based gene regulatory networks and enables rapid, sensitive, and multiplexed detection of diverse biomolecules, including small-molecule drugs, antibodies, and proteins, in a simple one-pot reaction. By integrating a protein design pipeline, we generate biosensors using fully synthetic binders, demonstrating the potential for rapid development of protein-based sensors. We construct a diagnostic cell-free system combining SARS-CoV-2 Spike protein sensing, gene regulatory based amplification, enzymatic amplification, and glucose based detection demonstrating the potential for point-of-care detection with high sensitivity. This work demonstrates a flexible and expandable framework for constructing gene circuits responsive to a wide range of biomolecules and demonstrates the potential for engineering point-of-care cell-free diagnostic assays.
title_zh: 用于无细胞网络工程和生物传感应用的 T7 RNAP 调控工具箱
abstract_zh: T7 RNA 聚合酶广泛应用于合成生物学和生物技术领域。然而，精确和模块化调节 T7 RNAP 的能力仍然令人惊讶地有限。在这里，我们在无细胞系统中设计了一个 T7 RNAP 调控工具箱，其中包含可编程合成阻遏物、激活剂和生物传感器。该工具箱支持基于 T7 RNAP 的基因调控网络的可扩展设计，并能够在简单的一锅反应中快速、灵敏和多重检测多种生物分子，包括小分子药物、抗体和蛋白质。通过整合蛋白质设计流程，我们使用全合成粘合剂生成生物传感器，展示了快速开发基于蛋白质的传感器的潜力。我们构建了一个结合了 SARS-CoV-2 Spike 蛋白传感、基于基因调控的扩增、酶促扩增和基于葡萄糖的检测的无细胞诊断系统，展示了高灵敏度即时检测的潜力。这项工作展示了一个灵活且可扩展的框架，用于构建响应广泛生物分子的基因电路，并展示了工程床旁无细胞诊断分析的潜力。

title: A plant vesicle-dendritic cell chimera for enhancing cancer immunotherapy
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The tumour microenvironment (TME) causes mitochondrial dysfunction in resident dendritic cells (DCs), resulting in inadequate antigen presentation and weak T cell priming. Herein, we identify hypoxia as a key factor for causing pathological mitochondrial fission in tumour-associated DCs, and develop a plant vesicle-DC chimera to relieve hypoxia-induced mitochondrial dysfunction for enhancing cancer immunotherapy. The biohybrid chimera is fabricated by loading algae-derived nanovesicles (ANVs) with genetically engineered CCR2 overexpressing-DCs. The CCR2-DC-ANVs target tumour by leveraging the C-C motif chemokine ligand 2 (CCL2) in tumours. Upon light exposure, the ANVs produce oxygen and NADPH to resolve hypoxic and oxidative stress, which reverse pathological mitochondrial fission in DCs. Mitochondrial network restoration alleviates endoplasmic reticulum stress, reduces lipid droplet accumulation, and initiates metabolic reprogramming to enhance antigen presentation and T cell priming of CCR2-DC-ANVs in the TME. The biohybrid chimera enhances therapeutic efficiency in humanized mouse models of breast cancer in female mice without requiring external tumour antigens. This approach highlights a cross-species chimera for next-generation DC therapy, and provides the basis for a nanobiotechnology platform to facilitate organelle medicine by combining photosynthesis with immunotherapy.
title_zh: 用于增强癌症免疫治疗的植物囊泡-树突状细胞嵌合体
abstract_zh: 肿瘤微环境 (TME) 导致常驻树突状细胞 (DC) 线粒体功能障碍，导致抗原呈递不足和 T 细胞启动较弱。在此，我们确定缺氧是引起肿瘤相关树突状细胞病理性线粒体分裂的关键因素，并开发了一种植物囊泡-树突状细胞嵌合体来缓解缺氧引起的线粒体功能障碍，从而增强癌症免疫治疗。这种生物杂交嵌合体是通过将藻类衍生的纳米囊泡 (ANV) 与基因工程改造的 CCR2 过表达 DC 装载在一起而制成的。 CCR2-DC-ANV 通过利用肿瘤中的 C-C 基序趋化因子配体 2 (CCL2) 来靶向肿瘤。光照后，ANV 会产生氧气和 NADPH 来解决缺氧和氧化应激，从而逆转 DC 中的病理性线粒体裂变。线粒体网络恢复可减轻内质网应激，减少脂滴积累，并启动代谢重编程以增强 TME 中 CCR2-DC-ANV 的抗原呈递和 T 细胞启动。生物杂交嵌合体提高了雌性小鼠乳腺癌人源化小鼠模型的治疗效率，而不需要外部肿瘤抗原。这种方法突出了下一代 DC 疗法的跨物种嵌合体，并为纳米生物技术平台提供了基础，通过将光合作用与免疫疗法相结合来促进细胞器医学。

title: Direct imaging of magnetotransport at graphene-metal interfaces with a single-spin quantum sensor
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Magnetotransport underlines many important phenomena in condensed matter physics, such as the Hall effect and magnetoresistance (MR) effect. Thus far, most magnetotransport studies are based on bulk resistance measurements without direct access to microscopic details of the spatial transport pattern. Here, we report nanoscale imaging of magnetotransport using a scanning single-spin quantum magnetometer, which is demonstrated in a graphene-metal hybrid device at room temperature. By visualizing the current flow at elevated magnetic fields (~ 0.5 T), we directly observe the Lorentz deflection of current near the graphene-metal interface, which is a hallmark of magnetotransport. Combining the local current distribution with global resistance measurements, we reveal that transport properties of the hybrid are governed by a complex interplay of intrinsic MR around the Dirac cone, carrier hydrodynamics, interface resistance, and the nanoscale device geometry. Furthermore, accessing the local transport pattern across the interface enables quantitative mapping of spatial variations in contact resistance, which is commonly present in electronic devices made from two-dimensional materials yet non-trivial to characterize. Our work demonstrates the potential of nanoscale current imaging techniques for studying complex electronic transport phenomena that are difficult to probe by resistance-based measurements.
title_zh: 使用单自旋量子传感器直接成像石墨烯-金属界面的磁输运
abstract_zh: 磁输运强调了凝聚态物理中的许多重要现象，例如霍尔效应和磁阻（MR）效应。迄今为止，大多数磁输运研究都是基于体电阻测量，而没有直接获取空间输运模式的微观细节。在这里，我们报告了使用扫描单自旋量子磁力计进行磁输运的纳米级成像，这在室温下的石墨烯-金属混合器件中得到了演示。通过可视化升高磁场（~ 0.5 T）下的电流，我们直接观察到石墨烯-金属界面附近电流的洛伦兹偏转，这是磁输运的标志。将局部电流分布与全局电阻测量相结合，我们揭示了混合体的输运特性是由狄拉克锥周围的固有磁流变、载流子流体动力学、界面电阻和纳米级器件几何形状的复杂相互作用决定的。此外，通过界面访问局部传输模式可以定量映射接触电阻的空间变化，这通常存在于由二维材料制成的电子设备中，但表征起来并不简单。我们的工作证明了纳米级电流成像技术在研究复杂的电子传输现象方面的潜力，而这些现象很难通过基于电阻的测量来探测。

title: Single nucleotide variants drive evolutionary phage-host arms race in anaerobic carbon dioxide-converting microbiome
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Microbial bioconversions are shaped by environmental perturbations and the adaptation of resident microbiomes. Prokaryotes coexist with bacteriophages, yet their coevolutionary trajectories remain underexplored. Here, we investigate the effects of a cultivation vessel leak on an anaerobic consortium performing carbon dioxide reduction. Using time-series shotgun metagenomic sequencing, we reconstruct microbial and viral genomes to track community shifts. We further apply single-nucleotide variant profiling and CRISPR array analysis to monitor viral microdiversity and host defense mechanisms. After bioaugmentation restores bioconversion efficiency, the consortium undergoes pronounced restructuring, with new dominant taxa emerging from the rare biosphere. We identify patterns consistent with phage predation selectively removing certain species, while others exhibit resilience to infection. This shift aligns with a widespread viral outbreak and a transient increased frequency of single nucleotide variants in bacterial CRISPR–Cas defense genes. Expansion of CRISPR spacers further supports that CRISPR-mediated processes influence microbial resilience. Concurrently, phages infecting resilient hosts exhibited adaptive evolution, marked by high genetic heterogeneity. Selective pressure varies across their genomes, targeting infectivity genes and protospacer-adjacent motifs. These findings highlight a dynamic evolutionary arms race driven by the selection of beneficial genetic variants, providing a mechanistic framework for multi-omics investigations, and informing biotechnological applications, including phage-based microbiome manipulation.
title_zh: 单核苷酸变异驱动厌氧二氧化碳转化微生物组中进化噬菌体-宿主军备竞赛
abstract_zh: 微生物生物转化是由环境扰动和常驻微生物组的适应决定的。原核生物与噬菌体共存，但它们的共同进化轨迹仍未得到充分探索。在这里，我们研究了培养容器泄漏对进行二氧化碳还原的厌氧菌群的影响。使用时间序列鸟枪法宏基因组测序，我们重建微生物和病毒基因组以跟踪群落变化。我们进一步应用单核苷酸变异分析和 CRISPR 阵列分析来监测病毒微多样性和宿主防御机制。在生物强化恢复生物转化效率后，该联盟经历了明显的重组，新的优势类群从稀有生物圈中出现。我们确定了与噬菌体捕食一致的模式，选择性地去除某些物种，而其他物种则表现出对感染的抵抗力。这种转变与广泛的病毒爆发和细菌 CRISPR-Cas 防御基因中单核苷酸变异频率的短暂增加相一致。 CRISPR 间隔区的扩展进一步支持 CRISPR 介导的过程影响微生物的恢复能力。同时，感染弹性宿主的噬菌体表现出适应性进化，其特点是高度遗传异质性。选择压力在其基因组中各不相同，针对感染性基因和原型间隔子相邻基序。这些发现强调了由有益遗传变异的选择驱动的动态进化军备竞赛，为多组学研究提供了机制框架，并为生物技术研究提供了信息。

title: Low-power biomimetic ionic thermoelectric device for multi-gas olfaction
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: The escalating demand for intelligent multi-gas sensing has driven the need for high-performance artificial olfactory systems with enhanced power efficiency. This work proposes an innovative gas sensing mechanism enabled by the giant ionic-thermoelectric effects in solid-state ionic polymer, which overcomes the low thermopower-to-thermal conductivity (S/κ) limitation of the conventional electronic thermoelectric materials. Using wafer-scale microfabrication technology, we demonstrate the first functional ionic-thermoelectric biomimetic olfactory device that can simultaneously resolve mixed gas analytes. This monolithic platform integrates multiple sub-100 μm sensing units, each combining an ionic-thermoelectric module with a narrow-bandpass optical filter, to selectively resolve the contributions of individual gas species in mixed-gas environments. The device achieves a record responsivity of 2340 V/W, a 20-fold improvement over commercial detectors (typically 2, CH4 and CO, respectively. This work establishes a promising route to next-generation artificial olfactory systems based on the ionic-thermoelectric effects.
title_zh: 用于多种气体嗅觉的低功耗仿生离子热电装置
abstract_zh: 对智能多气体传感的需求不断增长，推动了对具有更高功效的高性能人工嗅觉系统的需求。这项工作提出了一种由固态离子聚合物中巨大的离子热电效应实现的创新气体传感机制，克服了传统电子热电材料的低热电导热系数（S/κ）限制。利用晶圆级微加工技术，我们展示了第一个功能性离子热电仿生嗅觉装置，可以同时解析混合气体分析物。该单片平台集成了多个亚 100 μm 传感单元，每个单元都将离子热电模块与窄带通光学滤波器相结合，以选择性地解析混合气体环境中单个气体种类的贡献。该设备实现了创纪录的 2340 V/W 响应度​​，比商用探测器（通常分别为 2、CH4 和 CO）提高了 20 倍。这项工作为基于离子热电效应的下一代人工嗅觉系统建立了一条有前景的路线。

title: Diverse configurations of binary asteroids explained by multi-generation satellites
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Binary asteroid systems are ubiquitous in the Solar System. Many of them originate from rotational breakup, where an asteroid’s spin-up triggers mass shedding and subsequent satellite formation from a transient debris disk. While prolate satellites on compact orbits are expected in this scenario, recent space missions revealed remarkable diversity of binary configurations, such as the contact-binary satellite Selam on a wide orbit around (152830) Dinkinesh. Here we show that multiple episodes of mass shedding and the resulting multi-generation satellites provide a unified framework for these diverse configurations. We find that a pre-existing satellite can strongly influence subsequent satellite formation pathways through disk-satellite and inter-satellite interactions. This mechanism explains the dynamical histories of the Dinkinesh system and several triple systems. Our analysis indicates that about 44% of known binaries have configurations indicative of multi-satellite histories, suggesting that a significantly greater diversity of binary asteroid configurations remains to be revealed.
title_zh: 多代卫星解释双星小行星的不同结构
abstract_zh: 双小行星系统在太阳系中无处不在。其中许多起源于旋转分裂，即小行星的自转引发质量脱落，并随后从瞬态碎片盘中形成卫星。虽然在这种情况下预计会出现在紧凑轨道上的长长卫星，但最近的太空任务揭示了双星结构的显着多样性，例如围绕（152830）丁基内什（Dinkinesh）的宽轨道上的接触双星卫星塞拉姆（Selam）。在这里，我们展示了多次大规模脱落以及由此产生的多代卫星为这些不同的配置提供了一个统一的框架。我们发现，预先存在的卫星可以通过盘-卫星和卫星间的相互作用强烈影响后续的卫星形成路径。这种机制解释了丁基什系统和几个三重系统的动力学历史。我们的分析表明，大约 44% 的已知双星具有表明多卫星历史的结构，这表明双星小行星结构的多样性仍有待揭示。

title: Self-adaptive nanozymes with enhanced multi-enzyme activities for sequential multimodal therapy of drug-resistant bacteria-infected wounds
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Drug-resistant bacterium-infected wounds pose a serious clinical challenge, underscoring the need for therapeutic materials that respond to dynamic healing stages. Herein, we report a sequential multimodal platform embedding a self-adaptive IrPtCu nanozyme into a madecassoside-enriched hyaluronic acid hydrogel (HIPCM) for rapid bacterial eradication and accelerated wound healing. Leveraging trimetallic synergy and pH-adaptive reactive oxygen species (ROS) regulation, IrPtCu nanozyme exhibits strong oxidase, peroxidase, glutathione oxidase, and glutathione peroxidase-like activities, enabling efficient ROS generation and potent antibacterial performance. After disinfection, it switches to ROS scavenging through superoxide dismutase and catalase-like cascades, alleviating oxidative stress and cooperating with madecassoside to promote tissue repair. In a methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA)-infected mouse model, HIPCM demonstrates strong antibacterial efficacy, promotes M2 macrophage polarization and angiogenesis, and accelerates high-quality repair. Preclinical studies in Bama mini-pigs further confirm improved collagen deposition, hair follicle regeneration, and functional restoration. This work offers a comprehensive strategy integrating adaptive nanozymes and natural herbal medicines for treating drug-resistant wounds.
title_zh: 具有增强多酶活性的自适应纳米酶用于耐药细菌感染伤口的序贯多模式治疗
abstract_zh: 耐药细菌感染的伤口构成了严峻的临床挑战，强调了对能够响应动态愈合阶段的治疗材料的需求。在此，我们报告了一种顺序多模式平台，将自适应 IrPtCu 纳米酶嵌入到富含羟基积雪草苷的透明质酸水凝胶（HIPCM）中，以快速根除细菌并加速伤口愈合。利用三金属协同作用和 pH 适应性活性氧 (ROS) 调节，IrPtCu 纳米酶表现出强氧化酶、过氧化物酶、谷胱甘肽氧化酶和类谷胱甘肽过氧化物酶活性，可实现高效的 ROS 生成和有效的抗菌性能。消毒后通过超氧化物歧化酶和过氧化氢酶级联转为ROS清除，减轻氧化应激并与羟基积雪草苷配合促进组织修复。在耐甲氧西林金黄色葡萄球菌（MRSA）感染的小鼠模型中，HIPCM表现出强大的抗菌功效，促进M2巨噬细胞极化和血管生成，加速高质量修复。巴马小型猪的临床前研究进一步证实了胶原蛋白沉积、毛囊再生和功能恢复的改善。这项工作提供了一种整合适应性纳米酶和天然草药来治疗耐药伤口的综合策略。

title: Detection of false data injection and black-box adversarial attacks in peer-to-peer energy trading: A cloud-edge collaborative context-aware learning approach
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: 点对点能源交易中虚假数据注入和黑盒对抗攻击的检测：云边缘协作上下文感知学习方法

title: An artefact-resilient wide bandwidth bidirectional graphene neural interface
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The ability to simultaneously record and modulate neural activity is critical for next-generation bidirectional neural interfaces aiming to enable adaptive neuromodulation therapies for neurological disorders. Active graphene transistor technologies are particularly promising for neural recordings, as they extend the ability to monitor brain activity at very low frequencies and support multiplexed operation for high-density neural interfaces. However, their limited charge injection capacity makes them unsuitable for stimulation. In this work, we present a bidirectional neural interface that combines nanoporous reduced graphene oxide (rGO) microelectrodes for high charge-injection focal stimulation and graphene solution-gated field-effect transistors (gSGFETs) for brain activity monitoring. Using scalable cleanroom microfabrication techniques, we monolithically integrate these two graphene-based technologies into fully flexible neural probes, leveraging their complementary functionalities within a single-device platform. We evaluate the performance of the hybrid devices both in saline and in vivo, with a particular focus on transistor performance during stimulation. Our results demonstrate that the recording capability of this bidirectional neural interface, including the monitoring of infraslow and local field potential activity, is not compromised during stimulation, opening avenues for future development of adaptive infraslow-based neuromodulation therapies
title_zh: 一种抗人工制品的宽带双向石墨烯神经接口
abstract_zh: 同时记录和调节神经活动的能力对于下一代双向神经接口至关重要，该接口旨在实现针对神经系统疾病的自适应神经调节疗法。有源石墨烯晶体管技术对于神经记录特别有前途，因为它们扩展了以极低频率监测大脑活动的能力，并支持高密度神经接口的多路复用操作。然而，它们有限的电荷注入能力使得它们不适合刺激。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种双向神经接口，它结合了用于高电荷注入焦点刺激的纳米多孔还原氧化石墨烯（rGO）微电极和用于监测大脑活动的石墨烯溶液门控场效应晶体管（gSGFET）。使用可扩展的洁净室微加工技术，我们将这两种基于石墨烯的技术整体集成到完全灵活的神经探针中，在单个设备平台中利用它们的互补功能。我们评估了混合设备在盐水和体内的性能，特别关注刺激期间的晶体管性能。我们的结果表明，这种双向神经接口的记录能力，包括对 infraslow 和局部场电位活动的监测，在刺激过程中不会受到影响，为未来开发基于 infraslow 的自适应神经调节疗法开辟了道路

title: The trade route to renewables: Import as a catalyst for the diffusion of renewable energy technology
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Energy Policy
title_zh: 可再生能源贸易路线：进口作为可再生能源技术传播的催化剂

title: Photonic-integrated quantum sensor array for microscale magnetic localisation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Nitrogen-vacancy centres (NVs) are promising solid-state nanoscale quantum sensors for applications ranging from material science to biotechnology. Using multiple sensors simultaneously offers advantages for probing spatiotemporal correlations of fluctuating fields or the dynamics of point defects. In this work, by integrating NVs with foundry silicon-nitride photonic integrated circuits, we realise the scalable operation of eight localised NV-ensemble sensors in an array, with simultaneous, distinct readout of the individual sensors. Using the eight NV sensors and machine-learning methods for multi-point magnetic field reconstruction, we demonstrate microscale magnetic localisation of a 30 μm-sized needle tip. Experimentally, the needle tip can be localised with an error below its dimension and tracked dynamically with high fidelity. We use simulations of microrobot-relevant magnetic profiles as an application-motivated case study to quantify the operating bounds and requirements for translation and rotation tracking. By moving multi-NV localisation from bulk-optical addressing to a fibre-addressed, guided-wave, multi-channel architecture with simultaneous distinct readout, this work provides a scalable architecture towards magnetic localisation in optically inaccessible environments.
title_zh: 用于微尺度磁定位的光子集成量子传感器阵列
abstract_zh: 氮空位中心（NV）是一种很有前途的固态纳米级量子传感器，适用于从材料科学到生物技术的各种应用。同时使用多个传感器为探测波动场的时空相关性或点缺陷的动态提供了优势。在这项工作中，通过将 NV 与代工氮化硅光子集成电路集成，我们实现了阵列中八个局部 NV 整体传感器的可扩展操作，同时对各个传感器进行不同的读数。使用八个 NV 传感器和机器学习方法进行多点磁场重建，我们演示了 30 μm 大小的针尖的微尺度磁定位。实验上，针尖可以定位为低于其尺寸的误差，并以高保真度进行动态跟踪。我们使用微型机器人相关磁剖面的模拟作为应用驱动的案例研究，以量化平移和旋转跟踪的操作范围和要求。通过将多 NV 定位从批量光学寻址转移到光纤寻址、导波、具有同时不同读出的多通道架构，这项工作为光学无法访问的环境中的磁定位提供了一种可扩展的架构。

title: Bridging quantum mechanics to liquid properties via a universal organic force field
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Molecular dynamics simulations are essential tools for unraveling atomic-level insights into the structure and behavior of condensed-phase systems. However, the universal and accurate prediction of macroscopic properties based on quantum mechanical calculations remains a significant challenge, often hindered by the trade-off between computational cost and simulation accuracy. Here we present ByteFF-Pol, a polarizable force field parameterized by a graph neural network and trained exclusively on high-level quantum mechanical data. By leveraging physically-motivated force field forms and training strategies, ByteFF-Pol predicts thermodynamic and transport properties for a wide range of small-molecule liquids and electrolytes with high accuracy, surpassing current classical and machine learning force fields. This ability to make predictions without system-specific training bridges the gap between microscopic calculations and macroscopic liquid properties, enabling the exploration of previously intractable chemical spaces. This advancement enables the precise design of new electrolytes and custom-tailored solvents, establishing a robust foundation for data-driven materials discovery.
title_zh: 通过通用有机力场将量子力学与液体特性联系起来
abstract_zh: 分子动力学模拟是揭示原子级凝聚相系统结构和行为的重要工具。然而，基于量子力学计算的宏观特性的普遍而准确的预测仍然是一个重大挑战，通常受到计算成本和模拟精度之间的权衡的阻碍。在这里，我们介绍了 ByteFF-Pol，这是一种由图神经网络参数化的可极化力场，并专门针对高级量子力学数据进行了训练。通过利用物理驱动的力场形式和训练策略，ByteFF-Pol 可以高精度预测各种小分子液体和电解质的热力学和输运特性，超越了当前的经典力场和机器学习力场。这种无需特定系统训练即可进行预测的能力弥合了微观计算和宏观液体特性之间的差距，从而能够探索以前难以处理的化学空间。这一进步使得新电解质和定制溶剂的精确设计成为可能，为数据驱动的材料发现奠定了坚实的基础。

title: Breaking the membrane heredity paradox through de novo protocell formation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Lipid membranes define cell boundaries, acting as gatekeepers for transport and signaling. A central paradigm in biology is that all cellular membranes descend from a common ancestral membrane, as they cannot be generated in the absence of pre-existing lipid structures. It is thus unclear whether lipid membranes can arise from membrane-less precursors. Here we demonstrate the de novo generation of lipid bilayers in the absence of any pre-existing membranes, membrane-bound proteins, or lipid nanostructure templates. Using acetate and cysteine as simple metabolites, lipid tails are constructed by soluble enzymes and spontaneously form diacyl lipids that assemble into vesicles. Pore-forming peptides facilitate precursor transport into vesicles, allowing the continuous generation of new lipids. Formation of glycolipid membranes creates compartments that can maintain proton gradients. Our findings demonstrate that lipid compartments can form without pre-existing membranes, establishing a unique route linking lipid synthesis to compartment formation and function.
title_zh: 通过从头形成原始细胞打破膜遗传悖论
abstract_zh: 脂膜定义细胞边界，充当运输和信号传导的看门人。生物学的一个中心范例是，所有细胞膜都源自共同的祖先膜，因为它们不能在没有预先存在的脂质结构的情况下产生。因此，尚不清楚脂质膜是否可以由无膜前体产生。在这里，我们展示了在没有任何预先存在的膜、膜结合蛋白或脂质纳米结构模板的情况下脂质双层的从头生成。使用乙酸盐和半胱氨酸作为简单的代谢物，通过可溶性酶构建脂质尾部，并自发形成组装成囊泡的二酰基脂质。成孔肽促进前体转运到囊泡中，从而不断产生新的脂质。糖脂膜的形成产生了可以维持质子梯度的隔室。我们的研究结果表明，脂质区室可以在没有预先存在的膜的情况下形成，从而建立了将脂质合成与区室形成和功能联系起来的独特途径。

title: DSDINet: Deep semantic decoupling and integration photovoltaic solar cell defect segmentation network
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: DSDINet：深度语义解耦与集成光伏太阳能电池缺陷分割网络

title: Volatile self-selective memristive neuron for millisecond-latency neuromorphic object detection at the edge
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The deployment of artificial intelligence for real-time object detection in edge applications is constrained by the power and latency limitations of conventional computing architectures. Here we show a bio-inspired neuromorphic system built around a self-selective GaOx/ZnO memristor to address this challenge. The device exhibits a selection ratio and nonlinearity (both of ~10⁷), picoampere-level leakage currents, and microsecond-scale volatile dynamics. We integrate these memristors into a 32×32 array emulating the first-spike-time-coding mechanism of the frog visual system, enabling millisecond-scale pulse responses. When applied to aerial drone object detection, our hardware system achieves reliable recognition for pedestrians and vehicles, with only a 2.5% accuracy drop compared to software simulations. Furthermore, the array demonstrates a parallel processing scale of ~8.36×10¹² computational nodes under a 10% read margin. This work provides a tangible hardware solution for constructing fast-response neuromorphic computing systems at the edge, suitable for intelligent transportation and real-time monitoring.
title_zh: 用于边缘毫秒延迟神经形态物体检测的易失性自选择忆阻神经元
abstract_zh: 在边缘应用中部署用于实时对象检测的人工智能受到传统计算架构的功率和延迟限制的限制。在这里，我们展示了一个围绕自选 GaOx/ZnO 忆阻器构建的仿生神经形态系统，以应对这一挑战。该器件具有选择比和非线性（均约为 10⁷）、皮安级漏电流和微秒级不稳定动态特性。我们将这些忆阻器集成到一个 32×32 阵列中，模拟青蛙视觉系统的第一尖峰时间编码机制，从而实现毫秒级脉冲响应。当应用于空中无人机物体检测时，我们的硬件系统实现了对行人和车辆的可靠识别，与软件模拟相比，准确率仅下降了2.5%。此外，该阵列在 10% 的读取余量下展示了约 8.36×10^2 计算节点的并行处理规模。这项工作为在边缘构建快速响应的神经拟态计算系统提供了有形的硬件解决方案，适用于智能交通和实时监控。

title: Superconductivity from quasiparticle pairing of intervalley coherent state in rhombohedral trilayer graphene
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Superconductivity is observed in rhombohedral trilayer graphene in a narrow regime between the flavour-symmetric state and the symmetry breaking phase, which cannot be described by the conventional Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer theory. The measured coherence length, for instance, is roughly two orders of magnitude shorter than the value predicted by the Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer relation based on the large fermi velocity and an extremely low charge carrier density of the flavour-symmetric phase. To resolve the discrepancies, we propose that the rhombohedral trilayer graphene superconducting phase arises from the pairing of quasiparticles of the adjacent inter-valley coherent state. We illustrate the superconducting phenomenology using gapped Dirac cones with the chemical potential μ close to the valence band’s edge. Our findings indicate that the transition temperature Tc obeys Tc∝ϵDexp⁡(−2/ρqpU)" role="presentation">Tc∝ϵDexp⁡(−2/ρqpU){T}_{c}\propto {\epsilon }_{D}\exp (-2/{\rho }_{\rm{qp}}U) with the density of states ρqp of intervalley coherent state quasiparticles, which is much suppressed compared to predictions from the Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer theory. The coherence length ξ we predict behaves according to ξ∼v/μTc" role="presentation">ξ∼v/μTc\xi \sim v/\sqrt{\mu {T}_{c}} with v being the velocity of Dirac cone. Applying our assumption to a microscopic model, our predictions align well with experimental data and effectively capture key measurable quantities such as the transition temperature Tc and the coherence length ξ `without parameter fine-tuning.
title_zh: 菱面体三层石墨烯中层间相干态准粒子配对的超导性
abstract_zh: 在菱面体三层石墨烯中，在风味对称态和对称破缺相之间的狭窄区域中观察到超导性，这是传统的巴丁-库珀-施里弗理论无法描述的。例如，测得的相干长度比基于风味对称相的大费米速度和极低载流子密度的 Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer 关系预测的值大约短两个数量级。为了解决这些差异，我们提出菱面体三层石墨烯超导相是由相邻谷间相干态的准粒子配对产生的。我们使用化学势 μ 接近价带边缘的有间隙狄拉克锥来说明超导现象。我们的研究结果表明，转变温度 Tc 服从 Tc∝ϵDexp⁡(−2/ρqpU)" role="presentation">Tc∝ϵDexp⁡(−2/ρqpU){T}_{c}\propto {\epsilon }_{D}\exp (-2/{\rho }_{\rm{qp}}U) 以及间隔相干态的态密度 ρqp准粒子，与 Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer 理论的预测相比，我们预测的相干长度 xi 的行为符合 xi∼v/μTc" role="presentation">xi∼v/μTc\xi \sim v/\sqrt{\mu {T}_{c}}，其中 v 是狄拉克锥的速度。将我们的假设应用于微观模型，我们的预测与实验数据很好地吻合，并有效地捕获了关键的可测量量，例如转变温度 Tc 和相干长度

title: Simulating electron transfer on noisy quantum computers
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: While simple spin-boson models have been realized on quantum hardware, simulating extended electronic networks with local vibrational environments remains a fundamental challenge in the presence of non-equilibrium, long-lived electronic-vibrational (vibronic) coherence. We present a framework for the digital-analog simulation of open quantum systems governed by Hamiltonians with linear-vibronic coupling (LVC) and structured vibrational environments. Our approach exploits the intrinsic dissipation of qubits in near-term quantum hardware as a resource to emulate vibrational relaxation, combined with a model-specific error mitigation scheme to filter out noise sources incompatible with the target open system. We validate our strategy by resolving the vibronic transfer spectra of a one-dimensional donor-acceptor chain on IBM superconducting processors, reproducing non-Markovian dynamics and scaling the chain length up to 10 electronic sites, an unprecedented scale for chemical dynamics on quantum computers. Our model of vibronic electron transfer offers a portable, application-oriented benchmark for simulating long-lived entangled states on NISQ computers.
title_zh: 在嘈杂的量子计算机上模拟电子转移
abstract_zh: 虽然简单的自旋玻色子模型已经在量子硬件上实现，但在存在非平衡、长寿命的电子振动（电子振动）相干性的情况下，模拟具有局部振动环境的扩展电子网络仍然是一个基本挑战。我们提出了一个开放量子系统的数模模拟框架，该系统由具有线性振动耦合（LVC）和结构化振动环境的哈密顿量控制。我们的方法利用近期量子硬件中量子位的固有耗散作为模拟振动弛豫的资源，并结合特定于模型的误差缓解方案来滤除与目标开放系统不兼容的噪声源。我们通过解析 IBM 超导处理器上一维供体-受体链的振动传递谱、再现非马尔可夫动力学并将链长度扩展到 10 个电子位点来验证我们的策略，这对于量子计算机上的化学动力学来说是前所未有的规模。我们的振动电子转移模型提供了一个便携式、面向应用的基准，用于在 NISQ 计算机上模拟长寿命纠缠态。

title: Sustainable supercritical-mechanochemical process
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mechanochemistry offers a route for converting metal oxides directly into metal organic frameworks (MOFs), ensuring maximal atomic utilization. Here, we have advanced reaction scope to the supercritical regime for establishing an integrated quasi-continuous synthesis, separation, and activation process (supercritical-mechanochemical process, SCM). Within SCM, supercritical CO2 (SC CO2) facilitates a spatiotemporally uniform distribution of substoichiometric cosolvent (η 1) across mechanochemical hot-spots, where its near-zero interfacial tension optimizes mass transfer efficiency and accelerates grinding-induced nucleation. The circulation of SC CO2-cosolvent enhanced the ability of metastable phases to form specific topological frameworks, either through monomer-crystalline interactions or intermediate transitions. A pilot-scale facility verified a rapid production rate from an initial input of 3.5 kg to the final product within 8-hour process cycle (space-time yield of 544.29 kg·m−3·d−1), along with ligand and cosolvent recovery rates reaching 42.66 wt% and 89.48 wt%, respectively. Techno-economic assessment underscored substantial cost advantages over conventional solvent-based methods, positioning SCM as a sustainable and competitive approach for scalable production.
title_zh: 可持续的超临界机械化学过程
abstract_zh: 机械化学提供了一种将金属氧化物直接转化为金属有机骨架（MOF）的途径，确保最大程度的原子利用率。在这里，我们将反应范围提升至超临界状态，以建立集成的准连续合成、分离和活化过程（超临界机械化学过程，SCM）。在 SCM 中，超临界 CO2 (SC CO2) 促进亚化学计量助溶剂 (η 1) 在机械化学热点上时空均匀分布，其接近零的界面张力优化了传质效率并加速研磨诱导的成核。 SC CO2 共溶剂的循环增强了亚稳态相通过单体-晶体相互作用或中间转变形成特定拓扑框架的能力。中试规模的设施验证了从初始输入 3.5 kg 到 8 小时工艺周期内最终产品的快速生产率（时空产量为 544.29 kg·m−3·d−1），配体和共溶剂回收率分别达到 42.66 wt% 和 89.48 wt%。技术经济评估强调了相对于传统溶剂型方法的巨大成本优势，将 SCM 定位为可扩展生产的可持续且具有竞争力的方法。

title: Homeostatic dendritic neuron based on co-integrated volatile and non-volatile memristors for neuromorphic processing
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Neuromorphic systems offer energy-efficient solutions for temporal signal processing by emulating the dynamics and heterogeneity of biological neural circuits. However, conventional approaches face challenges in adaptive regulation and in capturing multi-timescale temporal features. Here, we present a bio-inspired neuromorphic hardware system that integrates homeostatic neurons with programmable dendritic structures. Utilizing the threshold-switching characteristics of VO2, we construct a homeostatic neuron enabling autonomous stabilization of neuronal activity. The dendritic module, co-designed using CMOS-RRAM and VO2 devices at the board level, enables programmable spike delays for multi-timescale temporal feature extraction. When embedded into a spiking neural network, the system achieves classification accuracies of 92.14% ± 0.99% for industrial defect detection and 86.53% ± 0.18% for speech recognition, while operating at 19.29 pJ per spike, surpassing conventional processors. The results demonstrate a scalable and biologically inspired hardware framework for efficient temporal signal processing, suggesting potential in next-generation neuromorphic accelerators.
title_zh: 基于共集成易失性和非易失性忆阻器的稳态树突神经元，用于神经形态处理
abstract_zh: 神经形态系统通过模拟生物神经回路的动态性和异质性，为时间信号处理提供节能的解决方案。然而，传统方法在自适应调节和捕获多时间尺度时间特征方面面临挑战。在这里，我们提出了一种仿生神经形态硬件系统，它将稳态神经元与可编程树突结构集成在一起。利用 VO2 的阈值切换特性，我们构建了一个稳态神经元，能够自主稳定神经元活动。树突模块在板级使用 CMOS-RRAM 和 VO2 器件共同设计，可实现可编程尖峰延迟，以实现多时间尺度时间特征提取。当嵌入尖峰神经网络时，该系统的工业缺陷检测分类精度为 92.14% ± 0.99%，语音识别分类精度为 86.53% ± 0.18%，同时每个尖峰的运行功耗为 19.29 pJ，超过了传统处理器。结果展示了一个可扩展且受生物学启发的硬件框架，可用于高效的时间信号处理，这表明了下一代神经形态加速器的潜力。

title: Invariance under quantum permutations rules out parastatistics
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Quantum systems invariant under particle exchange are either Bosons or Fermions, even though quantum theory in principle admits more general behavior under permutations. But why do we not observe such paraparticles in nature? The analysis of this question was previously limited primarily to specific quantum field theory models. Here we give two distinct model-independent arguments that rule out parastatistics, i.e. fundamentally indistinguishable quantum systems transforming under higher-dimensional representations of the symmetric group, which draw on quantum information theory and recent research on internal quantum reference frames. First, we introduce a notion of complete invariance: quantum systems should not only preserve their local state under permutations, but also the quantum information they carry about other systems, in analogy to the notion of complete positivity in quantum information theory. Second, we demand that quantum systems are invariant under quantum permutations, i.e. permutations conditioned on values of permutation-invariant observables. For both, we show that the respective principle is fulfilled if and only if the particle is a Boson or Fermion. Our results show how quantum reference frames can shed light on a longstanding problem of quantum physics, they underline the crucial role played by the compositional structure of quantum information, and demonstrate the explanatory power but also subtle limitations of recently proposed quantum covariance principles.
title_zh: 量子排列下的不变性排除了寄生统计
abstract_zh: 尽管量子理论原则上承认排列下更一般的行为，但粒子交换下不变的量子系统要么是玻色子，要么是费米子。但为什么我们在自然界中观察不到这样的副粒子呢？此前对该问题的分析主要局限于特定的量子场论模型。在这里，我们给出了两个不同的与模型无关的论点，排除了副统计，即在对称群的高维表示下基本上不可区分的量子系统，这利用了量子信息论和最近对内部量子参考系的研究。首先，我们引入完全不变性的概念：量子系统不仅应该在排列下保留其局部状态，而且还应该保留它们携带的关于其他系统的量子信息，类似于量子信息论中完全正性的概念。其次，我们要求量子系统在量子排列下保持不变，即排列以排列不变的可观测量值为条件。对于两者，我们证明当且仅当粒子是玻色子或费米子时，各自的原理才得到满足。我们的研究结果表明，量子参考系如何揭示量子物理学的一个长期存在的问题，它们强调了量子信息的组成结构所发挥的关键作用，并证明了最近提出的量子协方差原理的解释力，但也存在微妙的局限性。

title: Bulk spinodal-architected compositionally complex alloy with enhanced energy absorption across a wide temperature range
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Bulk mechanical energy-absorbing materials are critically needed for various engineering applications. However, existing state-of-the-art materials face significant limitations: architected systems such as 3D-printed nano- and micro-lattices suffer from scalability constraints, while conventional foams often exhibit a strength-ductility trade-off that limits energy absorption. Here, we overcome these challenges by fabricating bulk architected alloys via electrochemical dealloying of a machine learning-identified compositionally complex spinodal alloy. These materials display a hierarchical structural architecture spanning seven orders of magnitude – from atomic-scale lattice distortion, nanoscale precipitates and amorphous oxide layers, microscale ligaments, to macroscale network dimensions. This multi-scale integration enables synergistic deformation mechanisms, yielding energy absorption capacities of ~106 MJ/m3 in bulk and ~ 305 MJ/m3 in micro-samples. Crucially, this enhanced performance is retained from room temperature to 873 K. Our approach provides an effective strategy for designing scalable, high-performance architected materials for demanding condition energy absorption.
title_zh: 块状旋节线结构成分复杂合金，在宽温度范围内具有增强的能量吸收能力
abstract_zh: 各种工程应用都迫切需要块状机械吸能材料。然而，现有的最先进材料面临着巨大的局限性：3D 打印的纳米和微米晶格等架构系统受到可扩展性的限制，而传统泡沫通常表现出强度与延展性的权衡，限制了能量吸收。在这里，我们通过对机器学习识别的成分复杂的旋节线合金进行电化学脱合金来制造块体结构的合金，从而克服了这些挑战。这些材料显示出跨越七个数量级的分层结构体系——从原子级晶格畸变、纳米级沉淀物和无定形氧化物层、微米级韧带到宏观级网络尺寸。这种多尺度集成实现了协同变形机制，在散装样品中产生约 106 MJ/m3 的能量吸收能力，在微样品中产生约 305 MJ/m3 的能量吸收能力。至关重要的是，这种增强的性能在从室温到 873 K 的温度范围内得以保留。我们的方法为设计可扩展的高性能建筑材料提供了有效的策略，以实现苛刻条件下的能量吸收。

title: Direction-specific enhanced diffusion of CO2 in chiral hexagonal boron nitride nanotubes
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: To meet performance requirements, the next generation of gas separation membranes will need both high gas permeability and selectivity, attainable if we could coax adsorbates to minimize random Brownian motion and produce direction-specific diffusion along a desired axis. In this atomistic modeling study, we detail how direction-specific diffusion of CO2 can be achieved in chiral hexagonal boron nitride nanotubes (hBNNTs) by means of a non-Knudsen diffusion mechanism. Our findings detail how this mechanism of diffusion is driven by interactions with the tube walls and enables the CO2 molecules to diffuse along the nanotube’s z-axis with minimized collisions and directional changes. hBNNTs with chiral indices exhibit CO2 diffusion rates faster than non-chiral tubes of comparable and larger diameters. Of the hBNNTs studied, a (7,3) tube appears to be ideally sized (3.7 Å radius) exhibiting CO2 diffusion that is 3.4 times faster than diatomic N2. Applying this mechanism of diffusion to hypothetical sheet membranes prepared with aligned chiral (7,3) hBNNTs results in membranes with a calculated CO2/N2 permselectivity of 170 and a CO2 permeability limit of nearly 1.35 ×107 Barrer, readily surpassing the Robeson upper bound for CO2/N2 separations.
title_zh: CO2 在手性六方氮化硼纳米管中的定向增强扩散
abstract_zh: 为了满足性能要求，下一代气体分离膜将需要高气体渗透性和选择性，如果我们能够诱导吸附物最大限度地减少随机布朗运动并沿所需轴产生方向特异性扩散，就可以实现这一点。在这项原子建模研究中，我们详细介绍了如何通过非克努森扩散机制在手性六方氮化硼纳米管 (hBNNT) 中实现 CO2 的方向特异性扩散。我们的研究结果详细说明了这种扩散机制是如何通过与管壁的相互作用来驱动的，并使二氧化碳分子能够沿着纳米管的 z 轴扩散，同时最大限度地减少碰撞和方向变化。具有手性指数的 hBNNT 表现出比同等直径和更大直径的非手性管更快的 CO2 扩散速率。在研究的 hBNNT 中，(7,3) 管的尺寸似乎理想（半径为 3.7 Å），其 CO2 扩散速度比双原子 N2 快 3.4 倍。将这种扩散机制应用到用对齐的手性 (7,3) hBNNT 制备的假设片膜上，所得膜的计算 CO2/N2 选择性渗透率为 170，CO2 渗透性极限接近 1.35 ×107 Barrer，很容易超过 CO2/N2 分离的 Robeson 上限。

title: Laser fabricated micropattern of anode flow field enhances under-rib mass transport and performance in PEM water electrolysis
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: 激光制造的阳极流场微图案增强了质子交换膜水电解中的肋下质量传输和性能

title: Coherent quantum control of nitrogen vacancy spin with nanoscale magnets
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Coherent control of the nitrogen-vacancy (NV) center in diamond is commonly achieved by microwave fields from conventional antennas, which suffer from scalability and thermal noise. Their spatially extended field profiles also limit their specificity in driving one NV spin without affecting other NV spins. Here, we investigate quantum control of a single NV center with microwave fields generated from a nanoscale magnet that is proximal to the NV center. Our results show nanoscale coherent control with high contrast Rabi oscillations using nearfield microwaves from shape anisotropic nanomagnets of lateral dimensions down to 200 nm" role="presentation">nm{{{\rm{nm}}}}, driven by surface acoustic wave (SAW) excitation. Furthermore, we show that varying the acoustic power driving such nanomagnets can achieve control over Rabi frequency. We also report spin-spin relaxation time (T2" role="presentation">T2{T}_{2}) of the NV center, measured up to 3.48±" role="presentation">±\pm0.01 μs using microwave pulses generated by such nanomagnets. The use of the nanoscale magnets to implement highly localized coherent quantum control can replace thermally noisy microwave circuits and demonstrate a path to scalable quantum computing and sensing with NV-defects in diamond and other spin qubits.
title_zh: 用纳米级磁体对氮空位自旋进行相干量子控制
abstract_zh: 金刚石中氮空位（NV）中心的相干控制通常是通过传统天线的微波场来实现的，但传统天线存在可扩展性和热噪声问题。它们的空间扩展场分布也限制了它们驱动一种 NV 自旋而不影响其他 NV 自旋的特异性。在这里，我们研究了单个 NV 中心的量子控制，其中微波场是由靠近 NV 中心的纳米级磁体产生的。我们的结果显示了使用近场微波从横向尺寸低至 200 nm" role="presentation">nm{{{\rm{nm}}}} 的高对比度拉比振荡进行纳米级相干控制，由表面声波 (SAW) 激励驱动。此外，我们表明改变驱动此类纳米磁体的声功率可以实现对拉比频率的控制。我们还报告了自旋-自旋弛豫时间 (T2"使用此类纳米磁体产生的微波脉冲测量了 NV 中心的 T2{T}_{2}) 高达 3.48±" role="presentation">±\pm0.01 μs。使用纳米级磁体实现高度局域化的相干量子控制可以取代热噪声微波电路，并展示了利用金刚石和其他自旋量子位中的 NV 缺陷实现可扩展量子计算和传感的途径。

title: Mapping global resource driven nature loss in the mining sector from 2001 to 2022
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Global mineral extraction is expected to surge due to the growing demand for clean energy. While mining is critical to modern society, its environmental impacts, though increasingly studied, remain undocumented for half of the world’s mining areas and are rarely analysed at the commodity level. Here, we introduce a novel approach integrating remote sensing, machine learning, and cloud computing to classify approximately 70,000 mining sites by commodity. Using this newly detailed dataset, we quantify the nature loss associated with 20 extracted commodities, focusing on deforestation and habitat destruction. From 2001 to 2022, mining activities worldwide resulted in the removal of 16,268 km² of forest cover, with 65.64% occurring in tropical and subtropical regions. Notably, approximately half of this deforestation was attributed to the extraction of gold, coal, aluminium (bauxite), nickel-cobalt and copper, primarily in countries intersecting the Amazon, Southeast Asian, and Congo Basin rainforests. Our analysis also reveals that deforestation-to-mining area ratios and biodiversity risks vary by mining location, and conservation threats do not always scale with deforestation rates. By providing commodity-specific maps of mining-induced nature loss, our work equips companies and organisations with actionable insights to identify risks within their supply chains and implement targeted mitigation strategies.
title_zh: 绘制 2001 年至 2022 年采矿业全球资源导致的自然损失图
abstract_zh: 由于对清洁能源的需求不断增长，全球矿物开采预计将激增。虽然采矿对现代社会至关重要，但其对环境的影响尽管得到了越来越多的研究，但对于世界上一半的矿区来说，其环境影响仍然没有记录，而且很少在商品层面进行分析。在这里，我们介绍了一种集成遥感、机器学习和云计算的新颖方法，可按商品对大约 70,000 个矿场进行分类。使用这个新的详细数据集，我们量化了与 20 种提取的商品相关的自然损失，重点关注森林砍伐和栖息地破坏。 2001年至2022年，全球采矿活动导致森林覆盖面积减少16,268平方公里，其中65.64%发生在热带和亚热带地区。值得注意的是，大约一半的森林砍伐归因于黄金、煤炭、铝（铝土矿）、镍钴和铜的开采，主要发生在亚马逊、东南亚和刚果盆地雨林交汇的国家。我们的分析还表明，森林砍伐与采矿面积的比率和生物多样性风险因采矿地点而异，并且保护威胁并不总是随着森林砍伐率而增加。通过提供采矿引起的自然损失的特定商品地图，我们的工作为公司和组织提供了可行的见解，以识别其供应链中的风险并实施有针对性的缓解策略。

title: Evaluation of photovoltaic energy availability under extreme atmospheric attenuation through nanofluid spectral modulation pathways
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Applied Energy
title_zh: 通过纳米流体光谱调制途径评估极端大气衰减下光伏能源的可用性

title: GWAS of extended prescription analgesic use identifies genetic loci in chronic pain
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Pain-related conditions are the leading cause of disability worldwide. Existing GWAS for chronic pain have mainly focused on individual pain-related disorders, which may not optimally capture the phenotype. Here, we define chronic pain based on prescription analgesic use ( ≥ 90 days) in two large biobanks (UK Biobank and FinnGen). GWAS meta-analyses of 11 prescription-based pain phenotypes identify 140 associations with chronic pain, including 78 novel (e.g. ARPP21, CNTNAP2) and 62 previously reported (e.g. SLC39A8, DCC, TRPM8) associations. Integrating these genetic associations with functional data including transcriptome-wide association studies, cell-type and pathway enrichment, and gene enrichment in mouse phenotypes identifies potential mechanisms involved in chronic pain, implicating oligodendrocyte differentiation, neuronal guidance, endolysosomal function and post-synaptic endosome recycling. Our study showcases how the use of prescription data to identify and characterize pain can provide insights into pain genetics and its underlying biology.
title_zh: 长期使用处方镇痛药的 GWAS 确定了慢性疼痛的遗传位点
abstract_zh: 疼痛相关疾病是全世界残疾的主要原因。现有针对慢性疼痛的 GWAS 主要关注个体疼痛相关疾病，可能无法最佳地捕捉表型。在这里，我们根据两个大型生物库（UK Biobank 和 FinnGen）中的处方镇痛使用（≥ 90 天）来定义慢性疼痛。对 11 种基于处方的疼痛表型的 GWAS 荟萃分析确定了 140 种与慢性疼痛的关联，其中包括 78 种新关联（例如 ARPP21、CNTNAP2）和 62 种先前报道的关联（例如 SLC39A8、DCC、TRPM8）。将这些遗传关联与功能数据（包括全转录组关联研究、细胞类型和通路富集以及小鼠表型中的基因富集）相结合，确定了参与慢性疼痛的潜在机制，涉及少突胶质细胞分化、神经元引导、内溶酶体功能和突触后内体再循环。我们的研究展示了如何使用处方数据来识别和表征疼痛，从而深入了解疼痛遗传学及其基础生物学。

title: Human forebrain neural synchronization and entrainment to breathing during wakefulness, sleep, and external mechanical ventilation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The ability of the forebrain to track and integrate respiratory signals, a process known as breathing interoception, is critical for detecting respiratory threats and ensuring survival, yet its neural mechanisms remain largely unknown. Using human intracranial recordings, we identified widespread synchronization between forebrain neural oscillations and breathing rhythms across wakefulness, sleep, and external mechanical ventilation. During wakefulness, localized sites within known interoceptive regions such as insula, somatosensory cortex, anterior cingulate cortex, and amygdala robustly synchronized with breathing, highlighting their critical roles in breathing interoception. During sleep, forebrain synchronization with breathing decreased, while persisting in the amygdala and hippocampus, which may support vigilance and memory consolidation. In contrast to rodents, nasal airflow was not required for this synchronization, implicating multiple afferent pathways in respiratory interoception and possible unique evolutionary changes in humans. When breathing was driven by an external mechanical ventilator, the imposed breathing rhythm directly entrained forebrain activity, indicating a causal link. Notably, ventilator-driven slow, deep breathing entrained more forebrain sites, suggesting a potential mechanism through which breath-based practices might influence emotion and cognition. Together, these findings redefine breathing interoception as a pervasive influence within the forebrain, with implications for understanding disorders of respiratory awareness, emotional regulation, and cognitive health.
title_zh: 清醒、睡眠和外部机械通气期间人类前脑神经同步和呼吸夹带
abstract_zh: 前脑跟踪和整合呼吸信号的能力（这一过程称为呼吸内感受）对于检测呼吸威胁和确保生存至关重要，但其神经机制仍然很大程度上未知。利用人类颅内记录，我们发现在清醒、睡眠和外部机械通气期间，前脑神经振荡和呼吸节律之间存在广泛的同步。在清醒期间，已知内感受区域内的局部部位，如岛叶、体感皮层、前扣带皮层和杏仁核，与呼吸强烈同步，突出了它们在呼吸内感受中的关键作用。在睡眠期间，前脑与呼吸的同步性降低，而杏仁核和海马体持续存在，这可能支持警觉和记忆巩固。与啮齿类动物相比，这种同步不需要鼻气流，这暗示了呼吸内感受的多个传入途径以及人类可能独特的进化变化。当呼吸由外部机械呼吸机驱动时，强加的呼吸节律直接带动前脑活动，表明存在因果关系。值得注意的是，呼吸机驱动的缓慢、深呼吸带动了更多的前脑部位，这表明基于呼吸的练习可能影响情绪和认知的潜在机制。总之，这些发现将呼吸内感受重新定义为前脑内的普遍影响，对于理解呼吸意识、情绪调节障碍具有重要意义。

title: A photoexcited triplet state germylene with a half-life of hours at room temperature
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Triplet state tetrylenes posess significant potential for transforming chemically inert substrates, but their fleeting nature has limited their detection beyond low-temperature matrix environments, making the study of their physical and chemical properties challenging. This challenge is exacerbated in heavier tetrylenes, such as germylenes, due to their higher singlet–triplet (S1–T1) energy gaps. Here we report the photoinduced generation of a long-lived triplet germylene with a 14-h half-life time at room temperature, achieved through an excited singlet–triplet trap stabilization strategy. The metastable nature of this excited state enabled its spectroscopic investigation and the study of its reactivity. Compared with the ground state, enhanced reactivity is observed, including the cleavage of N=N, C–Br, Si–H and even C–C bonds in a doubly reductive cleavage of benzene.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 室温下半衰期为数小时的光激发三重态亚甲锗烷基
abstract_zh: 三重态四甲苯具有转化化学惰性底物的巨大潜力，但其转瞬即逝的性质限制了它们在低温基质环境之外的检测，使得对其物理和化学性质的研究具有挑战性。在较重的四萘嵌苯（例如亚甲锗烷基）中，由于其较高的单线态-三线态（S1-T1）能隙，这一挑战更加严重。在这里，我们报告了通过激发单线态-三线态陷阱稳定策略实现的长寿命三线态亚甲锗烷基的光诱导生成，在室温下半衰期为 14 小时。这种激发态的亚稳态性质使其能够进行光谱研究和反应性研究。与基态相比，观察到反应性增强，包括苯的双还原裂解中 N=N、C–Br、Si–H 甚至 C–C 键的裂解。该图像的替代文本可能是使用 AI 生成的。

title: Molecular rotation and large polarization in charge-transfer ferroelectric cocrystals
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Organic ferroelectrics offer solution processability, mechanical flexibility and promising applications in sensing, energy storage and actuation. However, their polarization and Curie temperatures are typically lower than those of inorganic ferroelectrics because weak intermolecular interactions hinder efficient dipole alignment. The development of organic materials that integrate dipole units, long-range dipole ordering and switchable polarization may enable the design of high-performance organic ferroelectrics. Here we report a donor–acceptor cocrystal in which V-shaped donor molecules pack into a gear-like arrangement, enabled by supramolecular interactions. Within this binary confined lattice, a cooperative in-plane rotation of 42° by the donor molecules—triggered by an external electric field—enables reversible polarization switching. This rotational mechanism yields a remanent polarization of 58 μC cm−2, stable ferroelectricity up to 479 K and a low coercive field of 0.022 MV m−1, exhibiting superior performance compared with previously reported organic ferroelectrics. These findings provide a pathway towards the design of high-performance organic ferroelectrics.The alternative text for this image may have been generated using AI.
title_zh: 电荷转移铁电共晶中的分子旋转和大极化
abstract_zh: 有机铁电体具有溶液加工性、机械灵活性以及在传感、能量存储和驱动方面有前景的应用。然而，它们的极化温度和居里温度通常低于无机铁电体，因为弱的分子间相互作用阻碍了有效的偶极子排列。集成偶极子单元、长程偶极子排序和可切换极化的有机材料的开发可能使高性能有机铁电体的设计成为可能。在这里，我们报道了一种供体-受体共晶体，其中 V 形供体分子通过超分子相互作用堆积成齿轮状排列。在这个二元受限晶格中，由外部电场触发的供体分子协同进行 42° 面内旋转，从而实现可逆的偏振切换。这种旋转机制产生 58 μC cm−2 的剩余极化、高达 479 K 的稳定铁电性和 0.022 MV m−1 的低矫顽场，与之前报道的有机铁电体相比表现出优越的性能。这些发现为高性能有机铁电体的设计提供了一条途径。该图像的替代文本可能是使用人工智能生成的。

title: Reversible self-assembly of polymeric solid electrolyte enables lithium battery recycling
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Solid-state batteries offer safe high-energy storage but are difficult to recycle. Now, a supramolecular electrolyte that forms a solid during operation and reverts to molecules afterwards combines electrochemical performance and recoverability — a combination of properties rarely achieved in battery technology.
title_zh: 聚合物固体电解质的可逆自组装使锂电池回收成为可能
abstract_zh: 固态电池提供安全的高能量存储，但难以回收。现在，超分子电解质在运行过程中形成固体，然后恢复为分子，结合了电化学性能和可恢复性——这是电池技术中很少实现的特性组合。

title: Efficacy of seaweed-based carbon dioxide removal reduced by iron limitation and nutrient competition with phytoplankton
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Carbon dioxide removal (CDR) through seaweed cultivation has been proposed as a promising marine CDR approach due to its high afforestation potential and favorable carbon-to-nutrient ratios. However, recent studies suggest that the afforestation potential is constrained by iron limitation, and efficiency depends on relative stoichiometry with phytoplankton. Global CDR models overlook iron limitation and fail to capture how nutrient feedbacks with phytoplankton will reduce ocean carbon uptake. Here, an ocean biogeochemical model is used to assess how nutrient demand, affinity, and limitation influence the afforestation potential and CDR efficiency of seaweed cultivation. Iron limitation reduces afforestation potential by threefold after accounting for N and P limitation. Variations in nutrient affinity and demand cause large differences in CDR efficiency, from −43% to +78%. We show that if seaweed is less nutrient-efficient than phytoplankton, cultivation results in negative net CDR. Failing to account for these nutrient dynamics risks overestimating seaweed-based CDR efficacy.
title_zh: 铁限制和与浮游植物的营养竞争降低了基于海藻的二氧化碳去除效果
abstract_zh: 通过海藻种植去除二氧化碳（CDR）因其高造林潜力和有利的碳养分比而被认为是一种有前途的海洋 CDR 方法。然而，最近的研究表明，造林潜力受到铁限制的限制，效率取决于浮游植物的相对化学计量。全球 CDR 模型忽视了铁的限制，未能捕捉浮游植物的营养反馈如何减少海洋碳吸收。在这里，海洋生物地球化学模型用于评估养分需求、亲和力和限制如何影响海藻种植的造林潜力和 CDR 效率。考虑到氮和磷的限制后，铁的限制使造林潜力降低了三倍。营养亲和力和需求的变化导致 CDR 效率存在巨大差异，从 -43% 到 +78%。我们发现，如果海藻的营养效率低于浮游植物，则栽培会导致净 CDR 为负值。如果不考虑这些营养动态，可能会高估基于海藻的 CDR 功效。

title: Multimodal deep learning model for AI-based functional prognostic risk stratification in patients undergoing radical nephrectomy
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Making the decision between technically challenging partial nephrectomy (PN) and radical nephrectomy (RN) in patients with complex renal cell carcinoma (RCC) remains a significant challenge for urologists. Rapid glomerular filtration rate (GFR) decline (annual decline >3 mL/min/1.73 m²) after RN is considered an abnormal renal function state, and if this risk can be predicted preoperatively, PN may be pursued even when technically demanding. We retrospectively analyze contrast-enhanced computed tomography images and clinical data from 1621 patients across multiple centers. A multimodal deep learning model is developed to predict rapid GFR decline after RN. The model achieves an area under the curve of 0.788–0.873 in external test sets. It stratifies patients into high- and low-risk groups with significantly different risks of chronic kidney disease progression. Here we show that the model demonstrates potential for assisting treatment decisions in patients with complex RCC for whom PN is challenging but feasible.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的多模态深度学习模型对接受根治性肾切除术的患者进行功能预后风险分层
abstract_zh: 对于泌尿科医师来说，在复杂性肾细胞癌 (RCC) 患者中做出技术上具有挑战性的部分肾切除术 (PN) 和根治性肾切除术 (RN) 之间的决定仍然是一个重大挑战。 RN后肾小球滤过率（GFR）快速下降（每年下降>3 mL/min/1.73 m²）被认为是肾功能异常状态，如果术前可以预测这种风险，即使技术要求较高，也可以进行PN。我们回顾性分析了多个中心 1621 名患者的对比增强计算机断层扫描图像和临床数据。开发了多模态深度学习模型来预测 RN 后 GFR 的快速下降。该模型在外部测试集中实现了 0.788–0.873 的曲线下面积。它将患者分为高风险组和低风险组，慢性肾病进展的风险显着不同。在这里，我们表明该模型具有协助复杂肾细胞癌患者做出治疗决策的潜力，对于这些患者来说 PN 具有挑战性但可行。

title: North Atlantic influence reconciling model-observation discrepancy in the tropical Pacific warming pattern
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Over the past four decades, zonal contrast in the tropical Pacific sea surface temperature (SST) has strengthened in observations but weakened in majority of climate model simulations. This model–observation discrepancy cannot be explained by internal mode of interdecadal climate variability in the Pacific alone, and the source of possible model errors remains unclear. Here, using observations and a large ensemble of historical simulations by a climate model, we identified that the simulated SST pattern associated with the Atlantic Multidecadal Variability (AMV) is biased in the tropical Pacific despite the time evolution of the AMV being reproduced well. Observations suggest that the positive AMV acts to increase the Pacific zonal SST contrast whereas this teleconnection process falsely weakens it in the model, which is a common feature in other climate models, and correcting the AMV-related SST pattern, which is likely an externally forced response, partly reconciles the model-observation discrepancy.
title_zh: 北大西洋影响协调热带太平洋变暖模式中的模型观测差异
abstract_zh: 在过去的四十年中，热带太平洋海面温度（SST）的纬向对比在观测中有所增强，但在大多数气候模型模拟中有所减弱。这种模型与观测的差异不能仅用太平洋年代际气候变率的内部模式来解释，并且可能的模型误差的来源仍不清楚。在这里，通过气候模型的观测和大量历史模拟，我们发现与大西洋多年代变率（AMV）相关的模拟海温模式在热带太平洋中存在偏差，尽管 AMV 的时间演变得到了很好的再现。观测结果表明，正 AMV 会增加太平洋纬向海温对比，而这种遥相关过程会在模型中错误地削弱它，这是其他气候模型的共同特征，并且校正与 AMV 相关的海温模式（可能是外部强迫响应）部分地调和了模型与观测的差异。

title: Brain FGF2 and NCAM1 contribute to FGFR1-dependent progression of estrogen receptor-positive breast cancer brain metastases
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Estrogen receptor-positive breast cancer represents a significant proportion of breast cancer brain metastasis but remains understudied. Here we show that FGFR1-amplification, a well-established driver of estrogen receptor-positive breast cancer endocrine resistance, promotes estrogen receptor-positive breast cancer brain metastatic colonization in young and aged female mice, through both canonical FGF2/FGFR1 signaling and non-canonical NCAM1/FGFR1 interactions. Astrocytic FGF2-mediated paracrine activation of FGFR1 promotes breast cancer brain metastasis in estrogen-treated young mice, but FGF2 levels and signaling decrease in the brain with aging and estrogen-depletion. Neuronal and astrocytic NCAM1, which remain unchanged in young and aged brains, promote adhesion to neurons, migration, and growth of estrogen receptor-positive cells, suggesting that interactions with astrocytes and neurons facilitate early estrogen receptor-positive breast cancer brain metastasis colonization through FGFR1. Importantly, FDA-approved FGFR inhibitors effectively block early colonization but not late-stage brain metastases, suggesting prevention of FGFR1+ brain metastases as a window of opportunity for FGFR1 inhibitors.
title_zh: 脑 FGF2 和 NCAM1 促进雌激素受体阳性乳腺癌脑转移的 FGFR1 依赖性进展
abstract_zh: 雌激素受体阳性乳腺癌在乳腺癌脑转移中占很大比例，但仍没有得到充分研究。在这里，我们表明，FGFR1 扩增是雌激素受体阳性乳腺癌内分泌抵抗的公认驱动因素，通过经典的 FGF2/FGFR1 信号传导和非经典的 NCAM1/FGFR1 相互作用，促进年轻和老年雌性小鼠中雌激素受体阳性乳腺癌脑转移定植。在雌激素治疗的年轻小鼠中，星形细胞 FGF2 介导的 FGFR1 旁分泌激活促进乳腺癌脑转移，但随着衰老和雌激素耗竭，大脑中 FGF2 水平和信号传导降低。神经元和星形胶质细胞 NCAM1 在年轻和老年大脑中保持不变，促进雌激素受体阳性细胞对神经元的粘附、迁移和生长，表明星形胶质细胞和神经元的相互作用通过 FGFR1 促进早期雌激素受体阳性乳腺癌脑转移的定植。重要的是，FDA 批准的 FGFR 抑制剂可有效阻止早期定植，但不能阻止晚期脑转移，这表明预防 FGFR1+ 脑转移是 FGFR1 抑制剂的一个机会之窗。

title: A unified framework to tailor multifunctional ionogel electrolytes for flexible energy storage
source: Matter
abstract: Ionogel electrolytes enable flexible energy storage by combining ionic liquids with polymer networks, offering high conductivity and mechanical adaptability. This review establishes a structure-property-function framework and highlights design strategies to overcome ion transport and interfacial limitations, guiding the development of robust, self-healing ionogel electrolytes for wearable electronics.
title_zh: 定制多功能离子凝胶电解质以实现灵活储能的统一框架
abstract_zh: 离子凝胶电解质通过将离子液体与聚合物网络相结合，实现灵活的能量存储，提供高电导率和机械适应性。本综述建立了结构-性能-功能框架，并重点介绍了克服离子传输和界面限制的设计策略，指导开发用于可穿戴电子产品的稳健、自修复离子凝胶电解质。

title: A persistent germylyne radical enabling reversible σ-dimerization and diverse bond activation
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The reversible σ-dimerization of radicals is a fundamental process in bond formation and cleavage, yet achieving this with an isolable heavy carbyne analogue has remained a paramount challenge. Herein, we report the synthesis and characterization of an isolable germylyne radical that demonstrates remarkable ambient stability while undergoing clean, reversible σ-dimerization via a Ge–Ge single bond. This reversible process, which exhibits a pronounced thermochromic response, is thoroughly elucidated through variable-temperature NMR/EPR spectroscopy and X-ray crystallography, revealing a moderate bond dissociation enthalpy. Beyond dimerization, this germylyne radical acts as a versatile synthon for main-group bond activation, readily cleaving chalcogen-chalcogen (S–S, Se–Se), phosphorus-phosphorus (in P₄), and even challenging aromatic carbon-chlorine (C–Cl) bonds. This work provides the direct structural evidence of a heavy carbyne’s dimerization pathway and establishes a new platform for dynamic covalent bonding in main-group chemistry, with implications for stimuli-responsive materials and radical-mediated activation.
title_zh: 持久的甲炔自由基可实现可逆的 σ-二聚化和多样化的键激活
abstract_zh: 自由基的可逆σ二聚化是键形成和断裂的基本过程，但利用可分离的重碳炔类似物实现这一过程仍然是一个首要挑战。在此，我们报道了可分离的甲炔自由基的合成和表征，该自由基在通过Ge-Ge单键进行清洁、可逆的σ二聚化时表现出显着的环境稳定性。这种可逆过程表现出明显的热致变色响应，通过变温 NMR/EPR 光谱和 X 射线晶体学得到彻底阐明，揭示了适度的键解离焓。除了二聚作用之外，这种甲炔自由基还可以作为主基团键激活的多功能合成子，轻松裂解硫属元素-硫属元素（S-S、Se-Se）、磷-磷（P₄），甚至具有挑战性的芳香族碳-氯（C-Cl）键。这项工作提供了重碳炔二聚途径的直接结构证据，并为主族化学中的动态共价键合建立了一个新平台，对刺激响应材料和自由基介导的活化具有影响。

title: Reference-point dependent reinforcement learning in humans and rats
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Rewards and punishments in reinforcement learning are encoded in both absolute and relative manners. Reference-point dependence, a valuation bias shared by adaptation-level and prospect theories, is often proposed as the computational mechanism underlying relative value encoding. However, the extent to which these behavioural and computational mechanisms are conserved across species remains to be fully understood. We therefore designed parallel reinforcement learning tasks in humans and rats to examine reference-point dependence across species. Behavioural analyses showed robust relative value encoding in both species, and computational modelling confirmed that reference-point dependence reliably accounts for behaviour in humans and rats. Despite these major similarities between species, some differences in behavioural and modelling parameters were observed. Overall, our study demonstrates that relative value encoding is a robust feature of reinforcement learning that is conserved across humans and rats.
title_zh: 人类和大鼠的参考点依赖强化学习
abstract_zh: 强化学习中的奖励和惩罚以绝对和相对方式编码。参考点依赖是适应水平理论和前景理论共有的一种评估偏差，通常被认为是相对值编码背后的计算机制。然而，这些行为和计算机制在不同物种之间的保守程度仍有待充分了解。因此，我们在人类和大鼠中设计了并行强化学习任务，以检查跨物种的参考点依赖性。行为分析显示这两个物种都有强大的相对值编码，计算模型证实参考点依赖性可靠地解释了人类和大鼠的行为。尽管物种之间存在这些主要相似之处，但仍观察到行为和建模参数的一些差异。总的来说，我们的研究表明，相对值编码是强化学习的一个强大特征，在人类和大鼠中都是保守的。

title: In situ ptychographic nanotomography captures activation, mobility, and deactivation of supported catalysts
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Nanoparticles supported on the surface of porous carrier materials are the dominant form of heterogeneous catalysts today. Yet, they suffer from a common deactivation mechanism: the loss of active surface area under industrial use conditions. Deactivation often stems from the sintering of nanoparticles, a mass-transport process whose mechanism and operating length-scale are a topic of controversy. Investigating this process is challenging, requiring not only a behavioral characterization of thousands of individual particles within the spatial confines of a hierarchically structured support but also a characterization of their ensemble behavior and local support interactions. Here, we introduce in situ ptychographic X-ray computed nanotomography as a tool to facilitate this characterization, allowing a local examination of catalysts in their use-geometry under operational-relevant conditions. Applied to methane oxidation over a palladium-on-silica supported catalyst, we reveal two concurrently operating deactivation drivers, short-range ripening and long-range particle migration, each with different temperature and atmosphere dependencies. The latter enables particles to traverse hundreds of nanometers through the support. These observations expand the current understanding of sintering behavior in supported catalysts and demonstrate PXCT’s capability to resolve restructuring processes within complex porous materials.
title_zh: 原位叠层纳米断层扫描捕获负载型催化剂的活化、迁移率和失活
abstract_zh: 负载在多孔载体材料表面的纳米粒子是当今多相催化剂的主要形式。然而，它们存在一个常见的失活机制：在工业使用条件下活性表面积的损失。失活通常源于纳米粒子的烧结，这是一种质量传输过程，其机制和工作长度尺度是一个有争议的话题。研究这个过程具有挑战性，不仅需要对分层结构支持的空间范围内的数千个单独粒子进行行为表征，还需要对它们的整体行为和局部支持相互作用进行表征。在这里，我们引入原位叠层X射线计算机纳米断层扫描作为促进这种表征的工具，允许在操作相关条件下对催化剂的使用几何形状进行局部检查。应用于二氧化硅负载催化剂上的甲烷氧化，我们揭示了两种同时运行的失活驱动因素，即短程成熟和长程颗粒迁移，每种驱动因素都具有不同的温度和大气依赖性。后者使粒子能够穿过支撑物数百纳米。这些观察结果扩展了目前对负载型催化剂烧结行为的理解，并证明了 PXCT 解决复杂多孔材料内重组过程的能力。

title: Inverse-designed silicon nitride nanophotonics
source: Physical sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Silicon nitride photonics has enabled integration of a variety of components for applications in linear and nonlinear optics, including telecommunications, optical clocks, astrocombs, bio-sensing, and LiDAR. With the advent of inverse design – where desired device performance is specified and closely achieved through iterative, gradient-based optimisation – and the increasing availability of silicon nitride photonics via foundries, it is now feasible to expand the photonic design library beyond the limits of traditional approaches and unlock new functionalities. In this work, we present inverse-designed photonics on a silicon nitride platform and demonstrate both the design capabilities and experimental verification by realising precisely tailored wavelength-division multiplexers, mode-division multiplexers, and high-Q resonators with controllable wavelength range and dispersion. This demonstrates inverse-designed enhanced manipulation of orthogonal bases of light. Furthermore, we use these inverse-designed structures to form optical cavities that hold promise for on-chip nonlinear and quantum optics experiments.
title_zh: 逆向设计的氮化硅纳米光子学
abstract_zh: 氮化硅光子学已经实现了线性和非线性光学应用中各种组件的集成，包括电信、光学时钟、星体梳、生物传感和激光雷达。随着逆向设计的出现（通过迭代、基于梯度的优化来指定并接近实现所需的器件性能）以及通过代工厂氮化硅光子学的可用性不断增加，现在可以将光子设计库扩展到传统方法的限制之外并解锁新功能。在这项工作中，我们在氮化硅平台上展示了​​逆向设计的光子学，并通过实现精确定制的波分复用器、模分复用器和具有可控波长范围和色散的高Q谐振器来展示设计能力和实验验证。这证明了逆向设计增强了对光正交基的操纵。此外，我们使用这些逆向设计的结构来形成光学腔，为片上非线性和量子光学实验带来希望。

title: Australia’s erosion of peer review
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Throughout the world, peer review serves as the cornerstone of the scientific enterprise, providing rigorous quality control and building the confidence that underpins progress for both science and society. Without such a robust process, scientists and the general public would rapidly lose the ability to distinguish groundbreaking advances from noise, which undermines policy decisions, research translation, and most importantly, public trust in science. Sadly, that is exactly what has been happening in Australia.

title: Hematite is a mineralogical marker of ancient climate change on Mars
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: The ancient climate of Mars changed from warm to cold surface conditions. This climate transition is demonstrated by geomorphological evidence but lacks suitable mineralogical indicators. We investigated the crystallographic properties of hematite (iron oxide) in Gale crater measured by the Curiosity rover and compared them with laboratory experiments. Hematite crystallite sizes are about 5 to 65 nm in the oldest sedimentary rocks investigated by the rover (the Murray formation) and less than 10 nm in the younger overlying strata (the Mirador and Carolyn Shoemaker formations). We attribute the larger crystallites in the Murray formation to postdepositional coarsening by groundwater in warm and wet conditions that persisted for several million years. Hematite with small crystallites co-occurs with goethite (iron oxyhydroxide) in the overlying layers, consistent with colder and water-limited conditions.
title_zh: 赤铁矿是火星古代气候变化的矿物学标志
abstract_zh: 火星古老的气候从温暖的表面条件转变为寒冷的表面条件。这种气候转变是由地貌证据证明的，但缺乏合适的矿物学指标。我们研究了好奇号火星车测量的盖尔陨石坑中赤铁矿（氧化铁）的晶体学特性，并将其与实验室实验进行了比较。火星车调查的最古老的沉积岩（墨累地层）中赤铁矿微晶尺寸约为 5 至 65 纳米，而较年轻的上覆地层（米拉多尔和卡罗琳舒梅克地层）的赤铁矿微晶尺寸小于 10 纳米。我们将墨累地层中较大的微晶归因于地下水在温暖和潮湿的条件下沉积后的粗化，这种粗化持续了数百万年。具有小晶粒的赤铁矿与针铁矿（羟基氧化铁）共生在上覆层中，这与较冷和缺水的条件一致。

title: An uncommon introduction to chemistry
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Infectious enthusiasm for the chemicals of everyday life pervades a nanoscientist’s moving narrative
title_zh: 不寻常的化学入门
abstract_zh: 纳米科学家动人的叙述充满了对日常生活中化学物质的感染力热情

title: Upper-mantle earthquakes beneath East Antarctica
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Intraplate intermediate-depth earthquakes (IDEs) occur at depths >70 kilometers, which is well below the brittle‒ductile transition in Earth’s crust, and their origins are difficult to reconcile with traditional plate tectonics. We applied a deep-learning technique to regional seismic data and identified intraplate IDEs beneath Antarctica. Their occurrence can be explained by concentrated bending stresses resulting from variable, thermally driven uplift along the edge of East Antarctica, where there is an abrupt change in lithospheric strength. Our results support geodynamic model predictions that intraplate seismicity strongly depends on lithosphere‒asthenosphere interactions. The Antarctic ice sheet can also affect regional stress conditions, highlighting the complex interplay between Earth systems. Advanced seismic detection capabilities, such as those used here, could reveal that intraplate IDEs are more common globally than currently recognized.
title_zh: 东南极洲下方的上地幔地震
abstract_zh: 板内中深度地震（IDE）发生在>70公里的深度，远低于地壳的脆性-韧性转变，其起源很难与传统的板块构造相一致。我们将深度学习技术应用于区域地震数据，并识别了南极洲下方的板内 IDE。它们的出现可以通过沿东南极洲边缘的可变热驱动隆起产生的集中弯曲应力来解释，那里的岩石圈强度发生了突变。我们的结果支持地球动力学模型的预测，即板内地震活动很大程度上取决于岩石圈与软流圈的相互作用。南极冰盖也会影响区域应力条件，凸显地球系统之间复杂的相互作用。先进的地震探测功能（例如此处使用的功能）可以表明，板内 IDE 在全球范围内比目前认识到的更为常见。

title: Dependence of catalytic properties of strongly supported platinum clusters with atom counts
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Metal cluster structures composed of tens of atoms represent a new class of catalysts with potentially superior catalytic activity and durability compared with those of other conventional catalysts. However, controlling the number of constituent atoms in clusters and achieving high-density loading on supports remain challenging. We reduce PtCl
                    4
                    2−
                    with methanol to create platinum atoms forming strongly anchored platinum clusters with controlled atom counts on selected surfaces of alumina. We resolved the atomic structures of the platinum clusters and could correlate the degree of cluster-support interaction, catalytic activity, and durability with atom counts. We demonstrate the promise of this approach by developing platinum clusters that exhibit the highest catalytic performance per platinum usage reported to date for hydrogen production from the dehydrogenation of cyclic hydrocarbon hydrogen carriers.
title_zh: 强支撑铂簇的催化性能与原子数的依赖性
abstract_zh:
由数十个原子组成的金属簇结构代表了一类新型催化剂，与其他传统催化剂相比，具有潜在的优异催化活性和耐久性。然而，控制簇中组成原子的数量并在支撑物上实现高密度负载仍然具有挑战性。我们减少PtCl
                    4
                    2−
                    与甲醇一起产生铂原子，在选定的氧化铝表面上形成牢固锚定的铂簇，并控制原子数。我们解析了铂簇的原子结构，并且可以将簇-载体相互作用的程度、催化活性和耐久性与原子计数相关联。我们通过开发铂簇展示了这种方法的前景，该铂簇在迄今为止报道的环烃氢载体脱氢制氢中表现出最高的每次铂使用催化性能。

title: Valorization of lithium hardrock concentrates into battery raw materials and commodity products
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
The production of lithium chemicals needs to increase to meet rising demand for lithium batteries. Spodumene [LiAl(SiO
                    3
                    )
                    2
                    ] is an abundant mineral source of lithium, but its extraction is not cost-competitive with brine resources. Current spodumene-refining methods are energy- and waste-intensive, requiring high-temperature roasting (>1000°C) and chemical leaching. We demonstrate a low-temperature, near-zero-waste process that converts α-spodumene into battery-grade lithium carbonate (Li
                    2
                    CO
                    3
                    ), smelter-grade alumina (Al
                    2
                    O
                    3
                    ), and cementitious silica (SiO
                    2
                    ). Aqueous ammonium fluoride (NH
                    4
                    F) is used as the reagent to solubilize the mineral feedstock at <100°C in a closed-loop process that regenerates the reagent. Techno-economic analysis indicates that this approach may reduce the cost of producing lithium from α-spodumene by >40% and enable cost parity with brines.
title_zh: 硬岩锂的增值集中于电池原材料和商品
abstract_zh:
需要增加锂化学品的产量以满足对锂电池不断增长的需求。锂辉石 [LiAl(SiO

                    2

                    3

                    2
                    氧
