                    2
                    ）。氟化铵水溶液 (NH
                    4
                    F) 用作试剂，在<100°C 的温度下在试剂再生的闭环过程中溶解矿物原料。技术经济分析表明，这种方法可以将 α-锂辉石生产锂的成本降低 40% 以上，并使成本与卤水持平。

title: Mechanical resonator–based quantum computing
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Hybrid quantum systems combine the advantages of different physical platforms with the goal of realizing more powerful quantum information processing devices. Mechanical systems, such as bulk acoustic wave resonators, feature many highly coherent harmonic modes in a compact footprint, complementing the strong nonlinearities and fast operation of superconducting quantum circuits. We developed an architecture for mechanical resonator–based quantum computing in which a superconducting qubit is used to perform quantum gates on a collection of mechanical modes. We demonstrate a universal gate set composed of single-qubit gates and controlled arbitrary-phase gates and showcase their use in the quantum Fourier transform and period-finding algorithms. These results show the potential of using mechanical systems to build crucial components for quantum technologies, such as quantum random-access memories.
title_zh: 基于机械谐振器的量子计算
abstract_zh: 混合量子系统结合了不同物理平台的优点，目标是实现更强大的量子信息处理设备。体声波谐振器等机械系统在紧凑的占地面积中具有许多高度相干的谐波模式，补充了超导量子电路的强非线性和快速运行。我们开发了一种基于机械谐振器的量子计算架构，其中超导量子位用于在一组机械模式上执行量子门。我们演示了由单量子位门和受控任意相位门组成的通用门组，并展示了它们在量子傅里叶变换和周期查找算法中的用途。这些结果显示了使用机械系统构建量子技术关键组件（例如量子随机存取存储器）的潜力。

title: Homing pigeon navigation relies on superparamagnetic macrophages under overcast conditions
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Birds use a variety of navigational strategies, including the geomagnetic field, especially when other cues are not available, such as under overcast or nocturnal conditions. Magnetite particles in the beak, cryptochromes in the eye, cellular ion-channel alterations, and changes in the vestibular system have been proposed to explain magnetoreception, but the exact mechanisms remain debated. Here, we used physical, morphological, functional, and genomic assays to identify the presence of superparamagnetic macrophages in the liver. We found that after macrophage depletion, pigeons flying under overcast conditions lacked their usual orientation capabilities. Orientation was unimpaired in birds without macrophages when the sun was visible, suggesting that this was their primary cue. We propose that in homing pigeons, superparamagnetic macrophages in the liver are required for finding magnetic direction.
title_zh: 阴天条件下信鸽导航依赖于超顺磁性巨噬细胞
abstract_zh: 鸟类使用各种导航策略，包括地磁场，尤其是在没有其他线索的情况下，例如在阴天或夜间条件下。喙中的磁铁矿颗粒、眼睛中的隐花色素、细胞离子通道的改变和前庭系统的变化都被提出来解释磁感受，但确切的机制仍然存在争议。在这里，我们使用物理、形态、功能和基因组分析来鉴定肝脏中超顺磁性巨噬细胞的存在。我们发现巨噬细胞耗竭后，在阴天条件下飞行的鸽子缺乏通常的定向能力。当太阳可见时，没有巨噬细胞的鸟类的定向能力没有受到影响，这表明这是它们的主要线索。我们认为，在信鸽中，肝脏中的超顺磁性巨噬细胞是寻找磁方向所必需的。

title: Disruptive effects of brief radiofrequency noise exposure on migratory bat navigation
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
title_zh: 短暂射频噪声暴露对迁徙蝙蝠导航的破坏性影响
abstract_zh:
人为电磁噪声如何影响生命系统，人们对日益城市化的自然环境的影响知之甚少，特别是当以亚致命的方式发生时。在这项研究中，我们研究了弱宽带射频 (RF) 场对动物行为的影响。我们暴露了迁徙的女高音蝙蝠（
                    侏儒海螺
                    ）到 0.01 到 300 兆赫的射频场，然后在晚上晚些时候测试它们的方向。对照蝙蝠的方向正常，而暴露于射频噪声的蝙蝠则表现出随机的离场飞行方向，这表明破坏性影响比立即暴露更持久。这些发现表明，电磁污染对动物行为的影响可能比之前的假设更大。

title: Stabilizing in-transition phases of superlattices through shape control of silver nanocrystals
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: In nanoscale assemblies, observations of structures in the transition pathways between high-symmetry lattices are rare because of the inherent instability of the intermediate phases. We report that silver nanocrystals with shapes similar to truncated octahedra (mecons) self-assemble into superlattices that are stable and resemble a previously unobserved phase that bridges face-centered and body-centered cubic structures along the Nishiyama-Wassermann martensitic pathway. These superlattices exhibited high structural purity and stability and created a robust and tunable dissymmetric phase landscape. Notably, light-matter coupling emerged in these silver nanocrystal superlattices through plasmon-photon hybridization at the quantum level.
title_zh: 通过银纳米晶体的形状控制稳定超晶格的过渡相
abstract_zh: 在纳米级组装中，由于中间相固有的不稳定性，对高对称性晶格之间的过渡路径中的结构的观察很少。我们报告说，形状类似于截顶八面体（mecons）的银纳米晶体自组装成稳定的超晶格，并且类似于以前未观察到的相，该相沿西山-瓦瑟曼马氏体路径桥接面心立方结构和体心立方结构。这些超晶格表现出高结构纯度和稳定性，并创造了强大且可调节的不对称相景观。值得注意的是，这些银纳米晶体超晶格中通过量子水平的等离激元-光子杂化出现了光-物质耦合。

title: High‐Density Co–Ir–Co Triple‐Atom Sites in Salphen‐Fused Nanoribbons Break the Activity‐Stability Dilemma in Alkaline Oxygen Evolution
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The development of stable, active, and well‐defined electrocatalysts for water oxidation is vital for large‐scale green hydrogen production. However, the inherent trade‐off between activity and stability of electrocatalysts imposes fundamental limitations on their practical applications. Herein, we fabricated a molecularly precise triatomic catalyst featuring highly dispersed atomic iridium (14.3 wt.%) along with dense atomic cobalt grippers (10.4 wt.%) anchored on a Salphen‐fused nanoribbon (Co
                    2
                    Ir‐SNR), enabling highly effective and durable oxygen evolution reaction (OER). In situ infrared spectroscopy together with theoretical calculations reveals that the Co
                    2
                    Ir‐SNR follows the infrequent oxide path mechanism (OPM) with a reduced energy barrier, where the active iridium sites confined in two cobalt grippers promote direct O−O radical coupling for O
                    2
                    evolution. Consequently, the triatomic catalyst achieves a remarkable overpotential of 212 ± 3 mV at 10 mA cm
                    −2
                    and possesses durability with stable operation for up to 1000 h at an ampere‐level current density under alkaline conditions. This work presents a viable strategy to break the activity‐stability dilemma encountered in OER, providing crucial guidance for developing catalysts that withstand the stringent requirements of industrial hydrogen production.
title_zh: Salphen 熔合纳米带中的高密度 Co-Ir-Co 三原子位点打破了碱性析氧过程中的活性-稳定性困境
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    开发稳定、活性和结构明确的水氧化电催化剂对于大规模绿色氢气生产至关重要。然而，电催化剂活性和稳定性之间固有的权衡对其实际应用造成了根本限制。在此，我们制造了一种分子精确的三原子催化剂，具有高度分散的原子铱（14.3% wt.%）以及固定在 Salphen 熔融纳米带（Co
                    2
                    Ir-SNR），实现高效且持久的析氧反应（OER）。原位红外光谱与理论计算表明，Co
                    2
                    Ir-SNR 遵循罕见氧化物路径机制 (OPM)，能量势垒降低，其中限制在两个钴夹具中的活性铱位点促进 O−O 自由基的直接耦合
                    2
                    进化。因此，三原子催化剂在 10mAcm 下实现了 212 ± 3 mV 的显着过电势
                    −2
                    并具有在碱性条件下在安培级电流密度下稳定运行长达1000小时的耐久性。这项工作提出了一种打破 OER 中遇到的活性稳定性困境的可行策略，为开发能够承受工业氢气生产严格要求的催化剂提供了重要指导。

title: Interface and Surface Chemistry Engineering in HgTe Quantum Dots for High‐Performance Infrared Optoelectronic Devices
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Colloidal quantum dots composed of mercury telluride (HgTe) have emerged as promising materials for infrared detection systems, imaging applications, focal plane array technologies, and various other optoelectronic platforms. These nanomaterials exhibit a distinctive bandgap that can be controlled through particle size manipulation, covering wavelengths from the near‐infrared through terahertz regions, and demonstrate robust charge carrier transport characteristics that position them favorably for advanced infrared technological applications. This review consolidates current developments in HgTe CQD fabrication methods, their electronic band structures, and integration strategies for functional devices. The nanoscale dimensions of HgTe induce quantum confinement phenomena that enable precise bandgap engineering, transitioning from negative to positive energy gaps and facilitating tunable light absorption and emission across an extensive wavelength spectrum. We analyze how variations in nanoparticle dimensions, morphology, and surface functionalization impact their optical behavior and electrical transport characteristics. Additionally, we explore the implementation of HgTe CQDs in photodetection platforms, field‐effect transistor configurations, and imaging array architectures, emphasizing design strategies, operational characteristics, and durability limitations. This comprehensive survey seeks to advance understanding of HgTe CQD systems and facilitate their continued evolution toward commercially viable, cost‐effective, and high‐efficiency infrared optoelectronic solutions.
title_zh: 高性能红外光电器件 HgTe 量子点的界面和表面化学工程
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  由碲化汞 (HgTe) 组成的胶体量子点已成为红外探测系统、成像应用、焦平面阵列技术和各种其他光电平台的有前途的材料。这些纳米材料表现出独特的带隙，可以通过粒度控制进行控制，覆盖从近红外到太赫兹区域的波长，并表现出强大的载流子传输特性，使其有利于先进的红外技术应用。本综述总结了 HgTe CQD 制造方法、其电子能带结构以及功能器件集成策略的当前发展。 HgTe 的纳米级尺寸会产生量子限制现象，从而实现精确的带隙工程，从负能隙过渡到正能隙，并促进在广泛的波长范围内可调谐的光吸收和发射。我们分析了纳米颗粒尺寸、形态和表面功能化的变化如何影响其光学行为和电传输特性。此外，我们还探索了 HgTe CQD 在光电探测平台、场效应晶体管配置和成像阵列架构中的实现，强调设计策略、操作特性和耐用性限制。这项全面的调查旨在增进对 HgTe CQD 系统的了解，并促进其不断发展为商业上可行、具有成本效益和高效的基础设施。

title: Boosting Solid–Solid Conversion Kinetics via Electron‐Pinned Interface Engineering for High‐Energy‐Density Li‐S Batteries
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The pursuit of high‐energy‐density lithium–sulfur (Li–S) batteries necessitates the use of lean electrolyte conditions. However, this goal is severely hampered by the sluggish kinetics of the sulfur reduction reaction (SRR), especially in the “solid–solid” conversion stage, where each step requires distinct active sites with specific electron‐donating capabilities. Herein, we report a catalyst architecture that integrates “long‐range order” with “local disorder”, creating gradient‐ordered active sites through amorphous nanodomain modification and precise local electronic structure regulation. This catalyst, termed an electron‐pinned interface catalyst (EPIC) and denoted as
                    a
                    ‐FeOOH@Fe/AlO
                    x
                    , exhibits synergistic catalytic enhancement via multi‐level electronic interactions. Operando studies and DFT simulations reveal that the catalyst establishes conductive pathways facilitated by its gradient electron‐donating properties, thereby decoupling the SRR process and significantly enhancing the “solid–solid” conversion efficiency. Under lean electrolyte conditions, this catalyst achieves a high areal capacity of 10.7 mAh·cm
                    −2
                    at a sulfur loading of 10.2 mg·cm
                    −2
                    , exhibits 94.2% capacity retention after 150 cycles in a pouch cell, and enables stable operation of a 3.6 Ah pouch cell with an energy density of 418.6 Wh·kg
                    −1
                    . This strategy effectively overcomes the reaction kinetic limitations in lean electrolyte conditions, providing valuable insights and a novel design paradigm for future high‐energy‐density Li–S batteries.
title_zh: 通过电子钉扎界面工程促进高能量密度锂硫电池的固-固转换动力学
abstract_zh:

title: Suppressing Surface Degradation in Na‐Rich Prussian Blue Cathodes via Liquid‐Phase Dehydration
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Na‐rich Prussian Blue (PB) is an attractive sodium‐ion battery cathode owing to its high capacity and low cost, yet approximately 10 wt.% of crystal water in its framework induces electrolyte side reactions and Fe dissolution. Conventional thermal dehydration has been used to remove crystal water, but it consistently results in capacity fading and poor air stability. Here, the primary cause of degradation is experimentally demonstrated to be surface oxidation driven by Fe–O bond formation during heat treatment. Guided by this insight, a liquid‐phase, low‐temperature dehydration strategy based on nitrogen bubbling is introduced, which simultaneously eliminates crystal water and stabilizes the surface. The approach can be seamlessly integrated into electrode fabrication to minimize air exposure and improve cycling stability. Overall, this work clarifies the mechanistic role of surface oxidation in moisture‐sensitive PB cathodes and highlights the critical importance of surface chemistry control in achieving stable electrochemical performance.
title_zh: 通过液相脱水抑制富钠普鲁士蓝阴极的表面降解
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  富钠普鲁士蓝 (PB) 因其高容量和低成本而成为一种有吸引力的钠离子电池正极，但其框架中约 10 wt.% 的结晶水会引起电解质副反应和 Fe 溶解。传统的热脱水已用于去除结晶水，但它始终会导致容量衰减和空气稳定性差。在这里，实验证明降解的主要原因是热处理过程中 Fe-O 键形成驱动的表面氧化。在这一见解的指导下，引入了基于氮气鼓泡的液相低温脱水策略，该策略可同时消除结晶水并稳定表面。该方法可以无缝集成到电极制造中，以最大限度地减少空气暴露并提高循环稳定性。总体而言，这项工作阐明了湿敏PB阴极中表面氧化的机制作用，并强调了表面化学控制在实现稳定的电化学性能方面的至关重要性。

title: Artificial Topological Nanostructures: Strategies for Design, Manufacturing, and Biomedical Applications
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  The rational design of nanoscale architectures with well‐defined and nontrivial topologies has emerged as an important direction in materials science for regulating structure‐dependent physicochemical and biological functions. However, a focused framework centered on artificial topological nanostructures (ATNs) remains underdeveloped. In this review, we focus on ATNs, a class of engineered nanosystems in which global connectivity and deformation‐invariant topology serve as design parameters beyond composition and morphology. Compared with conventional nanostructured materials, ATNs represent a topology‐driven design paradigm enabling controllable structural organization at the nanoscale. We summarize recent progress in ATNs featuring representative motifs such as Möbius strips, trefoil knots, and interlocked rings, highlighting how topology governs structural stability and function. Emphasis is placed on topology as the central organizing principle of structure‐function relationships in ATNs. Key design principles and assembly strategies are discussed across reticular frameworks, peptide and nucleic acid‐based systems, and soft‐matter assemblies, focusing on programmable encoding of topological states. We further highlight fabrication strategies and emerging biomedical applications in nanomedicine, where topology‐dependent properties enhance performance. Finally, we outline key challenges in scalable synthesis, quantitative topology function relationships, and biological translation, and discuss future opportunities for establishing topology as a unifying design paradigm for functional nanomaterials.
title_zh: 人工拓扑纳米结构：设计、制造和生物医学应用策略
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  具有明确定义和重要拓扑的纳米级结构的合理设计已成为材料科学中调节结构依赖的物理化学和生物功能的重要方向。然而，以人工拓扑纳米结构（ATN）为中心的框架仍然不发达。在这篇综述中，我们重点关注 ATN，这是一类工程纳米系统，其中全局连通性和变形不变的拓扑结构作为组成和形态之外的设计参数。与传统的纳米结构材料相比，ATN 代表了一种拓扑驱动的设计范式，能够在纳米尺度上实现可控的结构组织。我们总结了 ATN 的最新进展，以莫比乌斯带、三叶结和互锁环等代表性图案为特色，强调了拓扑结构如何控制结构稳定性和功能。重点强调拓扑结构作为 ATN 中结构-功能关系的中心组织原则。讨论了网状框架、基于肽和核酸的系统以及软物质组装的关键设计原则和组装策略，重点是拓扑状态的可编程编码。我们进一步强调了纳米医学中的制造策略和新兴生物医学应用，其中拓扑依赖的特性增强了性能。最后，我们概述了可扩展综合、定量拓扑函数关系和生物转化方面的关键挑战，并讨论了将拓扑建立为

title: Pan-cancer spatial atlas of tertiary lymphoid structures
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Tertiary lymphoid structures (TLSs) are critical regulators of antitumor immunity, yet their spatial organization, maturation, and clinical relevance remain incompletely defined across cancers. We analyzed spatial transcriptomics spanning 12 cancer types to construct a pan-cancer TLS atlas and characterized TLS spatial architecture and maturation states. TLS maturation was accompanied by coordinated remodeling of distinct niche cell populations and distance-dependent gradients in tumor programs, orthogonally supported by ultrahigh-plex single-cell spatial profiling. To enable scalable TLS profiling, we trained an artificial intelligence framework that predicts TLS maturation states directly from hematoxylin and eosin–stained images and evaluated it across TCGA and independent therapy cohorts. We further derived a maturation-aware composite score capturing intratumoral TLS state composition, which robustly stratifies patients across cancer and treatment contexts, outperforming conventional TLS metrics.
title_zh: 全癌三级淋巴结构空间图谱
abstract_zh: 三级淋巴结构（TLS）是抗肿瘤免疫的关键调节因子，但它们的空间组织、成熟度和临床相关性在癌症中仍未完全确定。我们分析了涵盖 12 种癌症类型的空间转录组学，构建了泛癌 TLS 图谱，并表征了 TLS 空间结构和成熟状态。 TLS 的成熟伴随着肿瘤程序中不同生态位细胞群和距离依赖性梯度的协调重塑，并由超高复数单细胞空间分析正交支持。为了实现可扩展的 TLS 分析，我们训练了一个人工智能框架，该框架直接从苏木精和伊红染色图像预测 TLS 成熟状态，并在 TCGA 和独立治疗队列中对其进行评估。我们进一步得出了一个成熟感知的综合评分，捕获肿瘤内 TLS 状态的组成，该评分可以对癌症和治疗背景下的患者进行稳健分层，优于传统的 TLS 指标。

title: Visualizing a lung neutrophil-platelet immunothrombosis cascade during sepsis in mice
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Sepsis is an immune paradox in which host defense is necessary for survival but also contributes to organ damage and death. We defined an immunothrombosis cascade of neutrophil and platelets in the lung microcirculation of
                    Escherichia coli
                    –septic mice. Cathelicidin, an antimicrobial peptide, localized neutrophils to
                    E. coli
                    and initiated immunothrombi through formyl-peptide receptors. Immunothrombi captured bacteria, and cathelicidin enabled antimicrobial activities in platelets. Blocking cathelicidin prevented immunothrombosis and attenuated early sepsis death but resulted in delayed death with uncontrolled infection. Leukotriene B4, an important neutrophil-to-neutrophil communication molecule, amplified immunothrombi, and inhibiting it improved vascular compromise while preserving host defense, thus representing a discrete inflection point of sepsis disease progression. Therefore, targeting the immunothrombi cascade can mitigate immunopathology without suppressing host defense during sepsis.
title_zh: 小鼠脓毒症期间肺中性粒细胞-血小板免疫血栓形成级联的可视化
abstract_zh:
脓毒症是一种免疫悖论，宿主防御对于生存是必要的，但也会导致器官损伤和死亡。我们定义了肺微循环中中性粒细胞和血小板的免疫血栓形成级联反应
                    大肠杆菌
                    –败血症小鼠。 Cathelicidin 是一种抗菌肽，可定位中性粒细胞
                    大肠杆菌
                    并通过甲酰肽受体引发免疫血栓。免疫血栓捕获细菌，抗菌素使血小板具有抗菌活性。阻断导管素可预防免疫血栓形成并减少早期脓毒症死亡，但会因感染不受控制而导致延迟死亡。白三烯 B4 是一种重要的中性粒细胞间通讯分子，可放大免疫血栓，抑制它可改善血管损害，同时保留宿主防御，从而代表脓毒症疾病进展的离散拐点。因此，针对免疫血栓级联反应可以减轻免疫病理学，而不抑制脓毒症期间宿主的防御。

title: A high-throughput selection system for fast-acting covalent protein drugs
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Covalent protein drugs offer therapeutic potential but are limited by slow target engagement and the absence of high-throughput selection platforms. Rapid covalent binding requires coordinated optimization of affinity, stability, and warhead geometry, which is an intrinsically multidimensional challenge. We developed a yeast display platform coupled with chemoselective modification that enables selection of fast-acting covalent proteins without increasing intrinsic warhead reactivity. Using this system, we engineered a covalent programmed death-ligand 1 (PD-L1) antagonistic nanobody with rapid cross-linking kinetics [observed rate constant (
                    k
                    obs
                    ) = 0.18 min
                    −1
                    , half-life (
                    t
                    1/2
                    ) = 3.8 min] and improved tumor suppression compared with envafolimab and atezolizumab. Similarly, we engineered a fast-acting covalent interleukin-18 (
                    k
                    obs
                    = 0.54 min
                    −1
                    ,
                    t
                    1/2
                    = 1.3 min) and a covalent miniprotein targeting the receptor binding domain of severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 (SARS-CoV-2), demonstrating applicability across protein modalities.
title_zh: 速效共价蛋白药物的高通量选择系统
abstract_zh:
共价蛋白药物具有治疗潜力，但受到靶标结合缓慢和缺乏高通量选择平台的限制。快速共价结合需要亲和力、稳定性和弹头几何形状的协调优化，这本质上是一个多维的挑战。我们开发了一个酵母展示平台，结合化学选择性修饰，可以选择快速作用的共价蛋白，而不增加内在的弹头反应性。使用该系统，我们设计了一种具有快速交联动力学的共价程序性死亡配体 1 (PD-L1) 拮抗纳米抗体 [观察到的速率常数 (
                    k
                    观测值
                    ) = 0.18 分钟
                    −1
                    ，半衰期（
                    t
                    1/2
                    ) = 3.8 分钟] 与 envafolimab 和 atezolizumab 相比，肿瘤抑制得到改善。同样，我们设计了一种快速作用的共价白细胞介素 18（
                    k
                    观测值
                    = 0.54 分钟
                    −1
                    ,
                    t
                    1/2
                    = 1.3 分钟）和针对严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒 2 (SARS-CoV-2) 受体结合域的共价小蛋白，证明了跨蛋白质模式的适用性。

title: Unstructured transcription factor interactions enable emergent specificity
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
How intrinsically disordered regions (IDRs) shape chromatin binding and nuclear organization of transcription factors (TFs) remains unclear. We used proximity-assisted photoactivation (PAPA), a single-molecule protein-protein interaction sensor, to investigate how IDRs might influence TF interactions with each other and with chromatin in live cells. We found that the Sp1 DNA binding domain (DBD) interacted poorly with chromatin and did not colocalize with Sp1. Weak interaction of the isolated IDR with full-length Sp1 was enhanced by fusion to various unrelated DBDs. Live imaging of
                    Drosophila
                    polytene chromosomes confirmed that an IDR could confer sharp locus specificity on an otherwise nonspecific DBD. These findings suggest that TF specificity emerges on chromatin when ensembles of diverse, unstructured interactions are scaffolded by transient DNA contacts.
title_zh: 非结构化转录因子相互作用实现了新兴的特异性
abstract_zh:
本质无序区域 (IDR) 如何塑造染色质结合和转录因子 (TF) 的核组织仍不清楚。我们使用邻近辅助光激活 (PAPA)（一种单分子蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用传感器）来研究 IDR 如何影响 TF 之间以及活细胞中 TF 与染色质的相互作用。我们发现 Sp1 DNA 结合域 (DBD) 与染色质的相互作用很差，并且不与 Sp1 共定位。分离的 IDR 与全长 Sp1 的弱相互作用通过与各种不相关的 DBD 融合而得到增强。实时成像
                    果蝇
                    多线染色体证实 IDR 可以赋予非特异性 DBD 尖锐的位点特异性。这些发现表明，当多种非结构化相互作用的整体通过短暂的 DNA 接触形成支架时，染​​色质上就会出现 TF 特异性。

title: Importance of elephants for dung beetle biodiversity and ecosystem functions
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Ecologists theorize that removing highly connected species from ecological networks will trigger waves of coextinction, but empirical evidence is scant. We show that elephants are central to a generalized network of interactions between dung beetles and large herbivores in East Africa. Computer simulations based on this network predicted disproportionate dung beetle losses if elephants go extinct, and a 15-year experiment supported this prediction: Excluding elephants diminished dung beetle abundance, diversity, and ecosystem functions, whereas excluding smaller ungulates had little added effect. Dung beetle abundance was depressed in nearby landscapes where livestock had displaced elephants, corroborating the experimental results. Our findings affirm the long-standing idea that large animals—which are inordinately extinction-prone—act as keystone species by provisioning many linked consumers with essential resources, thereby sustaining biodiversity and ecosystem services.
title_zh: 大象对粪甲虫生物多样性和生态系统功能的重要性
abstract_zh: 生态学家推测，从生态网络中移除高度关联的物种将引发共灭绝浪潮，但经验证据很少。我们表明，大象是东非粪甲虫和大型食草动物之间普遍相互作用网络的核心。基于该网络的计算机模拟预测，如果大象灭绝，粪甲虫将遭受不成比例的损失，一项为期 15 年的实验支持了这一预测：排除大象会减少粪甲虫的丰度、多样性和生态系统功能，而排除较小的有蹄类动物则几乎没有增加效果。在牲畜取代大象的附近地区，粪甲虫丰度下降，证实了实验结果。我们的研究结果证实了一个长期存在的观点，即极易灭绝的大型动物作为关键物种，为许多相互关联的消费者提供了必要的资源，从而维持了生物多样性和生态系统服务。

title: Selective autophagy fine-tunes plant immunity to promote cell survival during viral infection
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
RNA viruses co-opt host endomembranes to form replication complexes, often triggering cellular stress and immune responses. Here, we show that
                    Arabidopsis thaliana
                    activates selective autophagy to respond to viruses targeting mitochondria, chloroplasts, and the endoplasmic reticulum. Rather than degrading viral components, autophagy selectively removes the immune regulator Enhanced Disease Susceptibility 1 (EDS1) to prevent cell death. This targeted mechanism is mediated by oligomeric metabolic enzymes that moonlight as selective autophagy receptors, linking organelle stress to immune homeostasis. Our findings establish selective autophagy as an essential immune rheostat that fine-tunes defense responses and safeguards cellular integrity to promote host survival during viral infections.
title_zh: 选择性自噬微调植物免疫力以促进病毒感染期间细胞的存活
abstract_zh:
RNA病毒利用宿主内膜形成复制复合物，通常会引发细胞应激和免疫反应。在这里，我们表明
                    拟南芥
                    激活选择性自噬以响应针对线粒体、叶绿体和内质网的病毒。自噬不是降解病毒成分，而是选择性地去除免疫调节剂增强疾病易感性 1 (EDS1) 以防止细胞死亡。这种靶向机制是由寡聚代谢酶介导的，这些酶充当选择性自噬受体，将细胞器应激与免疫稳态联系起来。我们的研究结果表明，选择性自噬是一种重要的免疫变阻器，可以微调防御反应并保护细胞完整性，以促进病毒感染期间宿主的生存。

title: 3‐Deoxy‐3‐Fluoro Mannuronic Acid Alginates: Stereoselective Automated Synthesis and Conformational Behaviour
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Fluorination is a powerful strategy for the editing of glycans, creating bespoke tools to probe carbohydrate‐protein recognition and processing. Positioning the site for fluorination within a glycan is critical, whether examining bonding interactions or installing benign reporter capability. Herein, we study the effect of C‐3 fluorination of mannuronic acids in the assembly of β‐1,4‐
                    d
                    ‐mannuronic acid alginate fragments and the effect of these point mutations on the conformational preference of the generated oligosaccharides. We explore the synthesis and glycosylating properties of a 3‐deoxy‐3‐fluoro
                    d
                    ‐mannuronate donor to establish that the C‐3 fluoride does not thwart the high β‐stereoselectivity of the mannuronate system. Subsequent deployment of these building blocks in automated glycan assembly enables the preparation of a small library of β‐
                    d
                    ‐mannuronate oligosaccharides containing the C‐3‐F modification. Comprehensive NMR analysis shows that even though the 3‐deoxy‐3‐fluoro units disrupt the native inter‐residue C3‐OH•••O5 hydrogen bonds, the overall conformation remains in line with that of the native β‐1,4 mannuronic acid alginate. This indicates tolerance for this modification in these structural tools and provides an exciting foundation to study self‐assembly and enzymatic processing of β‐1,4 mannuronic acid oligosaccharides.
title_zh: 3-脱氧-3-氟甘露糖醛酸海藻酸盐：立体选择性自动合成和构象行为
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    氟化是编辑聚糖的一种强大策略，可创建定制工具来探测碳水化合物蛋白质的识别和加工。无论是检查键合相互作用还是安装良性报告能力，定位聚糖内的氟化位点都至关重要。在此，我们研究了甘露糖醛酸的 C-3 氟化对 β-1,4- 组装的影响
                    d
                    ‐甘露糖醛酸海藻酸盐片段以及这些点突变对生成的寡糖构象偏好的影响。我们探索了 3-脱氧-3-氟的合成和糖基化特性
                    d
                    ‐甘露糖醛酸供体，以确定 C-3 氟化物不会阻碍甘露糖醛酸系统的高 β-立体选择性。随后在自动化聚糖组装中部署这些构建模块可以制备小型 β- 文库
                    d
                    含有C-3-F修饰的-甘露糖醛酸寡糖。综合NMR分析表明，尽管3-脱氧-3-氟单元破坏了天然残基间C3-OH•••O5氢键，但整体构象仍然与天然β-1,4甘露糖醛酸海藻酸盐一致。这表明这些结构工具对这种修饰的耐受性，并为研究 β-1,4 甘露糖醛酸寡糖的自组装和酶促加工提供了令人兴奋的基础。

title: Strain-resilient intrinsically stretchable electrochemical biointerfaces
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Stretchable bioelectronics promise seamless integration with dynamic tissues, yet their electrochemical performance often collapses under strain owing to cracking, interlayer delamination, and signal distortion. We introduce an intrinsically stretchable interface for resilient electrochemical sensing (SIRES) built from a strain-resilient conductor, an electrically tunable interlayer, and a stretchable functional coating. By offsetting strain-induced resistance increases with gains in active surface area, SIRES maintains near-constant resistance and high-fidelity electrochemical readouts under strains up to 300%. The platform supports voltammetric, potentiometric, and amperometric modalities and enables multiplexed molecular monitoring across dynamically deforming tissues in wearable and implantable formats. Its unified architecture provides delamination-resistant interfaces suitable for long-term use, and the design rules generalize to affinity-based transduction, establishing a pathway toward strain-resilient molecular sensing for precision diagnostics and therapy.
title_zh: 应变弹性本质可拉伸电化学生物界面
abstract_zh: 可拉伸生物电子学有望与动态组织无缝集成，但其电化学性能通常会因破裂、层间分层和信号失真而在应变下崩溃。我们引入了一种用于弹性电化学传感（SIRES）的本质可拉伸接口，该接口由应变弹性导体、电可调夹层和可拉伸功能涂层构建而成。通过抵消应变引起的电阻随着活性表面积的增加而增加，SIRES 在高达 300% 的应变下保持接近恒定的电阻和高保真电化学读数。该平台支持伏安法、电位法和电流法模式，并能够以可穿戴和可植入的形式对动态变形组织进行多重分子监测。其统一的架构提供了适合长期使用的抗分层接口，并且设计规则推广到基于亲和力的转导，为精确诊断和治疗建立了一条通向应变弹性分子传感的途径。

title: A Focused Review on the Current Collector to Enable High‐Performance Soft‐Gel Electrode Batteries
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Current collectors are traditionally regarded as passive electronic substrates in batteries, with roles limited to electron transport and mechanical support. Recent studies, however, demonstrate that current collectors actively regulate electrochemical kinetics, reaction distribution, and interfacial stability, particularly under transport‐limited conditions. This review reframes current collectors as dynamic regulators of electrochemical processes and summarizes recent advances from four interconnected perspectives of geometric engineering, interfacial and surface chemistry engineering, multifunctional integration, and parameter‐driven/theory‐guided design. We show that collector geometry governs ionic migration pathways and reaction homogeneity, while surface chemistry, philicity, and electronic structure at the collector interface dictate metal nucleation behavior and charge‐transfer kinetics. Emerging multifunctional current collectors further integrate transport regulation, mechanical buffering, chemical stabilization, and safety‐related functions. The implications of these advances are discussed in the context of soft‐gel electrode batteries, where electrochemical behavior is highly sensitive to collector‐induced boundary conditions. This review establishes a unified framework for current collector design and outlines future directions toward high‐performance and durable battery systems.
title_zh: 对实现高性能软凝胶电极电池的集电器的重点审查
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  集流体传统上被视为电池中的无源电子基板，其作用仅限于电子传输和机械支撑。然而，最近的研究表明，集流体可以主动调节电化学动力学、反应分布和界面稳定性，特别是在传输受限的条件下。这篇综述将集电器重新定义为电化学过程的动态调节器，并从几何工程、界面和表面化学工程、多功能集成以及参数驱动/理论指导设计这四个相互关联的角度总结了最新进展。我们表明，收集器几何形状控制离子迁移路径和反应均匀性，而收集器界面的表面化学、亲和性和电子结构决定金属成核行为和电荷转移动力学。新兴的多功能集电器进一步集成了传输调节、机械缓冲、化学稳定和安全相关功能。这些进展的影响是在软凝胶电极电池的背景下讨论的，其中电化学行为对集电极引起的边界条件高度敏感。本综述为集电器设计建立了统一的框架，并概述了高性能和耐用电池系统的未来方向。

title: Labile Semi‐Cage Solvation Structures Enable Efficient Ion Transport in Solid Polymer Electrolytes
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Solid polymer electrolytes (SPEs) offer a promising pathway toward safer, higher‐energy‐density lithium metal batteries, yet their room‐temperature ionic conductivity remains limited by the strong coupling between Li
                    +
                    transport and polymer segmental motion. Here, we reveal the intrinsic solvation chemistry in poly(ethylene oxide) (PEO)‐based electrolytes using enhanced metadynamics sampling combined with
                    7
                    Li nuclear magnetic resonance spectroscopy. Rigid cage‐like solvation structures impose a key thermodynamic constraint on Li
                    +
                    mobility. By contrast, targeted salt and additive engineering enables the construction of a labile semi‐cage solvation structure that markedly enhances ion transport. At a Li: ether oxygen (EO) ratio of 0.10, Li
                    +
                    transitions from tightly bound PEO cages to semi‐cage structures by overcoming a moderate activation barrier of 19.88 kJ mol
                    −1
                    . As Li
                    +
                    ‐EO coordination is weakened through competitive coordination with anions and additives, the ionic conductivity increases from 9.57 × 10
                    −3
                    to 2.91 × 10
                    −2
                     mS cm
                    −1
                    at 30°C. Furthermore, tuning the donor number of solvent additives reveals that intermediate donor strength promotes rapid ligand exchange within semi‐cage structures, thereby accelerating local segmental relaxation through structural diffusion. This work establishes labile semi‐cage solvation as a rational design principle beyond conventional plasticization strategies for optimizing the transport properties of next‐generation SPEs.

title: Lewis‐Base Coordination Enables Highly Dispersed Pt Cocatalyst on Pyrene‐Based MOFs for Enhanced Photocatalytic Hydrogen Evolution
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Rationally optimizing the coordination structures of Pt‐based cocatalysts to concurrently achieve enhanced charge separation/transfer and lowered reaction energy barriers is significant for photocatalysis. Herein, we engineered the coordination of Pt cocatalyst on pyrene‐based metal‐organic frameworks (MOFs) through grafting different Lewis‐base groups. The softness of the introduced groups directly determines their affinity for Pt precursors, allowing for precise tailoring of the electronic metal‐support interactions (EMSI) of Pt and MOFs, which leads to the distinct Pt coordination structures. These structural features accelerate charge separation/transfer by an established internal electric field and lower catalytic energy barriers enabled by the oxidized Pt surface, leading to significantly enhanced photocatalytic activity. Specifically, the ‐SH‐functionalized MOF (Pt/NU‐M), featuring strong EMSI, achieves atomic dispersion of Pt‐O/S coordination and delivers a superior hydrogen evolution rate of 5.68 mmol g
                    cat
                    −1
                     h
                    −1
                    (405.71 mmol g
                    pt
                    −1
                     h
                    −1
                    ) when using ascorbic acid as a sacrificial agent upon full‐spectrum light irradiation, which is about 16 times higher than that of the Pt/NU control and surpasses many reported MOF‐based materials. Notably, the catalyst maintains exceptional stability over 20 h of continuous operation. This work highlights Lewis‐base coordination for tailoring active sites and optimizing EMSI, providing new insights for rational catalyst design and related energy applications.

title: Oxidative PCET‐Triggered Benzylic C─H Iminolactonization via 1,5‐HAT/Cyclization Enabled by Cage‐Confined Photocatalysis
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  We present a visible‐light‐driven photocatalytic platform based on a photosensitive metal–organic cage (PMOC), which enables selective recognition and activation of amidyl N─H bonds while suppressing competing homocoupling pathways. This system promotes a controlled intramolecular 1,5‐HAT/cyclization cascade via an oxidative proton‐coupled electron transfer (PCET) process, using commercially available BPO as oxidant and the in situ generated benzoate anion as the base. Mechanistic studies reveal that the cage architecture serves a dual role—facilitating oxidative PCET and enforcing product selectivity through spatial confinement—which steers the reaction through a unimolecular pathway, effectively inhibiting N─N homodimerization typical of bulk‐phase systems. This work establishes cage‐confined photocatalysis as a powerful strategy for directing nitrogen‐centered radical (NCR) reactivity toward the synthesis of value‐added heterocyclic compounds.
title_zh: 通过 1,5-HAT 氧化 PCET 触发的苄基 C─H 亚氨基内酯化/笼内光催化环化
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  我们提出了一种基于光敏金属有机笼（PMOC）的可见光驱动光催化平台，该平台能够选择性识别和激活酰胺基 N─H 键，同时抑制竞争性自偶联途径。该系统使用市售的 BPO 作为氧化剂和原位生成的苯甲酸阴离子作为碱，通过氧化质子耦合电子转移 (PCET) 过程促进受控的分子内 1,5-HAT/环化级联。机理研究表明，笼结构具有双重作用——促进 PCET 氧化并通过空间限制增强产物选择性——引导反应通过单分子途径，有效抑制本体相系统中典型的 N─N 同二聚化。这项工作将笼型光催化确立为一种强有力的策略，用于引导氮中心自由基（NCR）反应性合成增值杂环化合物。

title: Tuning Reaction Pathways via Symmetric Fluorination Enables High‐Temperature and High‐Voltage Electrolytes
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Ni‐rich layered oxide cathodes deliver high capacity, but they suffer from severe interfacial instability and thermal safety risks when operated at high voltages and elevated temperatures. Here we propose an electrolyte design strategy based on molecular fluorination symmetry. This approach employs difluoro‐symmetric substitution to precisely steer decomposition pathways towards preferential ring‐opening reactions, thereby effectively suppressing defluorination decomposition and the concomitant formation of acidic byproducts at elevated temperatures. Through rational molecular engineering of synergistic fluorination, we achieve directed interfacial chemistry control. Under harsh operational conditions (4.5 V, 45°C), the modified cells retain 83% of their capacity after 300 cycles, along with significantly reduced gas generation and an elevated thermal runaway onset temperature. Furthermore, 2 Ah graphite||LiNi

These results establish molecular fluorination symmetry as a practical design principle for electrolytes that enhance high‐temperature performance and intrinsic safety in Ni‐rich cathodes under demanding operational conditions.

title: Mitochondria‐Targeting Iridium(III) Complexes Induce PANoptosis and Ferroptosis for Boosting Chemoimmunotherapy Against Immune‐Desert Colorectal Cancer
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Over 80% of colorectal cancer (CRC) cases are classified as microsatellite stable (MSS), a subtype characterized by an immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment that poses a significant challenge for chemotherapy. Emerging evidence suggests that inflammatory programmed cell death pathways can effectively activate anti‐cancer immunity across various cancer types. However, studies exploring the role of these death pathways in reversing the immune desertification and providing unique therapeutic advantages in MSS‐CRC remain scarce. Herein, we present a strategy using iridium(III)‐based inducers to concurrently trigger immunogenic PANoptosis and ferroptosis, aiming to reverse the “immune desert” phenotype of MSS‐CRC and integrate chemotherapy with immunotherapy. Upon mitochondrial accumulation, these iridium(III) compounds inhibit complex I of the electron transport chain, leading to electron leakage and excessive reactive oxygen species generation, which collectively initiate the PANoptotic and ferroptotic signaling pathways in MSS‐CRC. Proteomic analysis and in vivo experiments further demonstrated that
                    Ir2
                    can activate PANoptotic and ferroptotic pathways to counteract immune desertification in MSS‐CRC. Importantly, this study establishes a mechanism‐guided chemical design strategy whereby subtle ligand engineering within a cyclometalated Ir(III) platform governs mitochondrial accumulation, redox disruption, and subsequent induction of immunogenic cell death.
title_zh: 线粒体靶向铱 (III) 复合物诱导全凋亡和铁死亡，以增强针对免疫沙漠结直肠癌的化学免疫疗法
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    超过 80% 的结直肠癌 (CRC) 病例被归类为微卫星稳定型 (MSS)，这是一种以免疫抑制肿瘤微环境为特征的亚型，对化疗提出了重大挑战。新的证据表明，炎症性程序性细胞死亡途径可以有效激活各种癌症类型的抗癌免疫。然而，探索这些死亡途径在逆转免疫荒漠化中的作用以及为 MSS-CRC 提供独特治疗优势的研究仍然很少。在此，我们提出了一种使用基于铱（III）的诱导剂同时触发免疫原性全凋亡和铁死亡的策略，旨在逆转 MSS-CRC 的“免疫沙漠”表型并将化疗与免疫治疗相结合。在线粒体积累时，这些铱(III)化合物抑制电子传递链的复合体I，导致电子泄漏和过量活性氧的产生，共同启动MSS-CRC中的PANoptotic和ferroptotic信号通路。蛋白质组分析和体内实验进一步证明

                    可以激活 PANoptotic 和 ferroptotic 途径来对抗 MSS-CRC 中的免疫荒漠化。重要的是，这项研究建立了一种机制引导的化学设计策略，通过环金属化 Ir(III) 平台内的微妙配体工程控制线粒体积累、氧化还原破坏以及随后诱导免疫原性细胞死亡。

title: Synthesis of Cyclopropene‐Modified Fatty Acids Allows Single‐Cell Quantification of Uptake by Immune Cells
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Immune cell activity is strongly influenced by the nutrients present during activation. The effects of specific fatty acids (FAs) can be particularly complex, with them exerting diverse and sometimes opposing effects on immune cells. These functional differences are thought to stem from structural differences between the FAs, leading to altered cellular handling. However, chemical tools to directly probe these aspects remain limited. Here, we report the design and synthesis of saturated, unsaturated, and polyunsaturated cyclopropenyl fatty acids, each incorporating a minimal one‐carbon cyclopropene moiety as a bioorthogonal click handle. This motif enables rapid and live‐cell‐compatible labeling via the inverse electron‐demand Diels–Alder reaction, providing a versatile platform to trace FA behavior in biological systems. Application of these synthetic cyclopropenyl FAs in primary immune cell mixtures reveals distinct uptake patterns between different cell types, with polyunsaturated analogues showing strong uptake across all immune cell types. Complementary metabolic and proteomic analyses suggest that this uptake results in biological differences between high/low uptake immune populations, highlighting the utility of cyclopropenyl FA probes for dissecting lipid uptake in the context of immune cell biology.
title_zh: 环丙烯修饰脂肪酸的合成允许免疫细胞摄取的单细胞定量
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  免疫细胞活性受到激活过程中存在的营养物质的强烈影响。特定脂肪酸 (FA) 的作用可能特别复杂，它们对免疫细胞产生多种甚至有时相反的作用。这些功能差异被认为源于 FA 之间的结构差异，从而导致细胞处理方式的改变。然而，直接探测这些方面的化学工具仍然有限。在这里，我们报告了饱和、不饱和和多不饱和环丙烯基脂肪酸的设计和合成，每种脂肪酸都包含最小的单碳环丙烯部分作为生物正交点击手柄。该基序通过逆电子需求 Diels-Alder 反应实现快速且活细胞兼容的标记，为追踪生物系统中的 FA 行为提供了一个多功能平台。这些合成环丙烯基 FA 在原代免疫细胞混合物中的应用揭示了不同细胞类型之间不同的摄取模式，多不饱和类似物在所有免疫细胞类型中均显示出强烈的摄取。补充代谢和蛋白质组学分析表明，这种摄取导致高/低摄取免疫群体之间的生物学差异，突出了环丙烯基 FA 探针在免疫细胞生物学背景下剖析脂质摄取的效用。

title: Dimensional Isomerism in COFs Enabled by Spirobifluorene Substitution for Enhanced Photocatalytic CO2 Reduction
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The concept of dimensional isomerism—covalent organic frameworks (COFs) constructed from identical molecular precursors but forming structures of different dimensions—remains largely unexplored. Here, we report a pair of isomeric COFs derived from the same spirobifluorene core, wherein substitution at either the C2/C7 or C3/C6 positions leads to the formation of a planar two‐dimensional (2D) or a nonplanar three‐dimensional (3D) framework, respectively. This substitution‐controlled strategy enables precise modulation of π‐conjugation and framework dimensionality without altering the molecular identity of the building block. Comparative photocatalytic experiments reveal that the 2D C2/C7‐substituted COF exhibits significantly superior CO
                    2
                    reduction activity under visible light, attributed to its extended conjugation and efficient charge transport. These findings underscore the critical role of molecular connectivity in determining the structure–function relationships of COFs and propose a generalizable approach for designing high‐performance photocatalytic materials through topological isomerism.
title_zh: COF 中的维度异构现象通过螺二芴取代实现增强光催化 CO2 还原
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    维度异构的概念——由相同的分子前体构建但形成不同维度的结构的共价有机框架（COF）——在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这里，我们报告了一对源自相同螺二芴核心的异构COF，其中C2/C7或C3/C6位置的取代分别导致平面二维（2D）或非平面三维（3D）框架的形成。这种取代控制策略能够精确调节 π 共轭和框架维度，而不改变结构单元的分子特性。比较光催化实验表明，2D C2/C7 取代的 COF 表现出明显优越的 CO
                    2
                    可见光下的还原活性归因于其延长的共轭和有效的电荷传输。这些发现强调了分子连接性在确定COF结构-功能关系中的关键作用，并提出了一种通过拓扑异构设计高性能光催化材料的通用方法。

title: Light‐Activated Isolation of High‐Quality Mitochondria for Therapeutic Transplantation
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Artificial mitochondrial transplantation (AMT) holds great promise for reprogramming cellular metabolism and restoring cell function. Its clinical translation, however, relies on access to mitochondria that are both of high purity and metabolically active, requirements that current isolation techniques struggle to meet. Conventional differential centrifugation (DC) method yields heterogeneous and low‐activity mitochondria, whereas magnetic bead (MB)‐based immuno‐isolation leaves non‐biodegradable beads permanently attached. Herein, we present a Light‐Activated Mitochondrial Isolation (
                    LAMI
                    ) platform comprising programmable mitochondria‐targeting MBs and a photo‐responsive release mechanism for the selective, efficient, and non‐destructive extraction of high‐quality mitochondria.
                    LAMI
                    employs magnetic nanoparticles decorated with a branched, modular probe architecture that supports systematic variation in mitochondria‐targeting ligand type, ligand density, and optical tracking elements. Incorporation of a photo‐cleavable linker allows on‐demand, mild, and reagent‐free release of captured mitochondria. Compared with DC method,
                    LAMI
                    produces mitochondria with markedly improved purity, structural integrity, and functionality. In an ischemia‐reperfusion injury (IRI) model,
                    LAMI
                    ‐isolated mitochondria‐based AMT exhibits superior therapeutic performance. Together,
                    LAMI
                    provides a non‐destructive, efficient, and versatile mitochondrial isolation strategy that overcomes long‐standing limitations of current methods, offering a robust platform to advance AMT and its future biomedical applications.
title_zh: 用于治疗性移植的高质量线粒体的光激活分离
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    人工线粒体移植（AMT）对于重新编程细胞代谢和恢复细胞功能具有广阔的前景。然而，其临床转化依赖于获得高纯度和代谢活性的线粒体，这是当前分离技术难以满足的要求。传统的差速离心 (DC) 方法会产生异质且低活性的线粒体，而基于磁珠 (MB) 的免疫分离会使不可生物降解的珠子永久附着。在此，我们提出了光激活线粒体分离（
                    左心肌梗死
                    ）平台包含可编程线粒体靶向 MB 和光响应释放机制，用于选择性、高效和非破坏性提取高质量线粒体。

title: Multicolor and Attenuated Light Intensity Responses in Protein Hydrogels Arising from Photoregulated Crosslink Dynamics
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Light‐responsive hydrogels enable noninvasive, precise, remote control over material properties with great biocompatibility, yet achieving multicolor addressability and dynamic regulation of mechanical properties remains challenging. Most systems rely on single photoswitches and regulate stiffness primarily through changes in crosslinking density. Here, we present a fully protein‐based hydrogel that combines multicolor light responsiveness with optical control of crosslink dynamics. The hydrogel includes two visible light‐responsive photoceptors: the cyanobacterial phytochrome Cph1, which enables reversible red/far‐red light‐controlled crosslinking, and CarH, which introduces irreversible green light‐induced gel‐sol transitions. Remarkably, Cph1‐based hydrogels exhibited an attenuated red light intensity response, forming stiffer networks under low‐intensity illumination than under high‐intensity light and show a subsequent dark‐adaptation with stiffening once red light illumination is stopped. This counterintuitive behavior arises from light‐driven bidirectional photoisomerization that modulates crosslink lifetimes without altering the photostationary state composition. Together, these findings establish orthogonally addressable reversible and irreversible crosslinks and photoregulated crosslink dynamics as new design principles for multicolor light‐responsive biomaterials.
title_zh: 光调节交联动力学引起的蛋白质水凝胶中的多色和衰减光强度响应
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  光响应水凝胶能够以良好的生物相容性对材料特性进行无创、精确、远程控制，但实现多色寻址和机械特性的动态调节仍然具有挑战性。大多数系统依赖于单个光电开关，并主要通过交联密度的变化来调节刚度。在这里，我们提出了一种完全基于蛋白质的水凝胶，它将多色光响应性与交联动力学的光学控制结合起来。该水凝胶包含两种可见光响应感光体：蓝藻光敏色素 Cph1（可实现可逆的红/远红光控制交联）和 CarH（可引入不可逆的绿光诱导的凝胶-溶胶转变）。值得注意的是，基于 Cph1 的水凝胶表现出减弱的红光强度响应，在低强度照明下形成比在高强度光下更僵硬的网络，并且一旦停止红光照明，就会显示出随后的暗适应和硬化。这种违反直觉的行为是由光驱动的双向光异构化引起的，它可以在不改变光稳态组成的情况下调节交联寿命。总之，这些发现确立了正交可逆和不可逆交联以及光调节交联动力学作为多色光响应生物材料的新设计原则。

title: Ultra‐High Dielectric Acceptor Enables 21% Efficiency and Thickness‐Insensitive Organic Solar Cells
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Dielectric constant (ε
                    r
                    ) of non‐fullerene acceptors (NFAs) is a crucial parameter in organic solar cells (OSCs), significantly influencing exciton dissociation efficiency and charge recombination dynamics. However, the state‐of‐the‐art NFAs typically exhibit relatively low dielectric constants (ε
                    r
                    ≈ 3–5), which inherently limit device performance by promoting substantial recombination losses. Herein, a new guest acceptor named L8‐BO‐FO is reported by replacing the branched alkyl chains on L8‐BO with dimethyl ether units, which presents a higher ε
                    r
                    value of 7.41 than that of L8‐BO (4.57). Subsequently, the high‐ε
                    r
                    L8‐BO‐FO was introduced into the PM6:L8‐BO system to improve the dielectric property of the active layer, which, encouragingly, increases the ε
                    r
                    value of the active layer, accelerates exciton dynamics, and suppresses the nonradiative charge recombination. As a result, the power conversion efficiency (PCE) of the ternary OSCs is boosted up to 21.0%. Surprisingly, the ternary OSCs maintained an outstanding PCE of 19.1% even when the active‐layer thickness increased to 300 nm. This work brings new insights into the design of high‐performance OSCs with excellent thickness tolerance by dielectric engineering, which is essential for high‐throughput and scale‐up fabrication of OSCs.
title_zh: 超高介电受体可实现 21% 的效率且对厚度不敏感的有机太阳能电池
abstract_zh:

                    r
                    ≈ 3-5），这通过促进大量的复合损失而本质上限制了器件的性能。在此，通过用二甲醚单元取代L8-BO上的支链烷基链，报道了一种名为L8-BO-FO的新客体受体，其具有更高的ε
                    r

                    r
                    L8-BO-FO 被引入到 PM6:L8-BO 系统中以改善有源层的介电性能，令人鼓舞的是，增加了 ε
                    r
                    活性层的值，加速激子动力学，并抑制非辐射电荷复合。结果，三元OSC的功率转换效率（PCE）提升至21.0%。令人惊讶的是，即使活性层厚度增加到 300 nm，三元 OSC 仍保持着 19.1% 的出色 PCE。这项工作为通过介电工程设计具有出色厚度公差的高性能 OSC 带来了新的见解，这对于 OSC 的高通量和放大制造至关重要。

title: Water Radiolysis Enables CO2‐Activated Radical Recycling of Spent Lithium‐Ion Cathodes
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Conventional recycling of spent lithium‐ion batteries (LIBs) relies on energy‐intensive and complex processes that hinder sustainability. Here, we report a mild, efficient recycling strategy using programmable water radiolysis with CO
                    2
                    to establish an aqueous reductive radical platform. This radiolytic approach enables simultaneous cathode peeling, metal leaching, and component separation under ambient conditions, which is inaccessible to existing methods. Within minutes, high‐dose‐rate irradiation degrades the polymeric binder, enabling ∼99.5% active material recovery. Radiolytically generated CO
                    2
                    •−
                    radicals reduce and leach transition metals (Co, Ni, Mn) and lithium with >96% efficiency. The dynamic pH evolution during irradiation precipitates transition metals in situ as carbonates while retaining Li
                    +
                    in solution, accomplishing one‐step separation. Regenerated cathodes deliver electrochemical performance comparable to commercial benchmarks. Techno‐economic analysis indicates this CO
                    2
                    ‐mediated radiolytic pathway offers a more sustainable, energy‐efficient, and cost‐effective route for battery recycling.
title_zh: 水辐射解使废锂离子阴极的二氧化碳激活自由基回收成为可能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    废旧锂离子电池（LIB）的传统回收依赖于能源密集型且复杂的流程，这阻碍了可持续性。在这里，我们报告了一种温和、高效的回收策略，利用 CO2 进行可编程水辐射分解
                    2

                    2
                    •−
                    自由基还原并浸出过渡金属（Co、Ni、Mn）和锂，效率 >96%。辐照过程中的动态 pH 变化使过渡金属以碳酸盐形式原位沉淀，同时保留 Li
                    +
                    溶液中，完成一步分离。再生阴极的电化学性能可与商业基准相媲美。技术经济分析表明，CO
                    2
                    ‐介导的放射分解途径为电池回收提供了一种更可持续、更节能、更经济的途径。

title: Water‐Triggered Structural Transformation in a Silver Chalcogenolate Cluster‐Based MOF (SCC‐MOF) Enables Visually Readable Trace Water Sensing
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Monitoring trace water is vital for chemical processes and moisture‐sensitive materials, but conventional electrical humidity sensors require complex instrumentation and lack intuitive visual readout. Luminescent metal‐organic frameworks (MOFs) offer optically driven water sensing; however, most existing systems still rely on traditional node‐linker structures, whereas cluster‐assembled frameworks may have potential due to their multisite existence and remain largely unexplored. Here, we introduce a silver chalcogenolate cluster‐based framework (SCC‐MOF),
                    
                      Ag
                      12

                    ) that exhibits a striking orange‐to‐yellow luminescence transition upon water exposure, enabling rapid, naked‐eye detection within relative humidity (RH) <1.26%. The atomically precise Ag
                    12
                    cluster node (
                    
                      Ag
                      12
                      ‐TCNB 0D
                    
                    ), bridged by the electron‐deficient TCNB linker, forms a 2D network that achieve coordination with water molecules (
                    
                      Ag
                      12

                      2

                    ). Single‐crystal X‐ray diffraction (SCXRD) and powder X‐ray diffraction (PXRD) reveal that water induces lattice displacement and perturbs the cluster‐centered excited states, a conclusion further supported by electronic structure calculations. This work establishes cluster‐based MOFs as a promising platform for optically readable water‐vapor sensing.

title: Giant Orbital Rashba–Edelstein Effect in Crystalline Cu2O/Cu Heterostructures
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Orbital current‐induced torque (OT) has emerged as a promising alternative to spin–orbit torque owing to the typically larger orbital Hall conductivity. A substantial OT can be generated at metal/oxide interfaces via the orbital Rashba–Edelstein effect (OREE), which has been predominantly reported in surface‐oxidized Cu structures. However, the lack of well‐defined crystalline and interfacial structures in oxidized Cu has hindered a clear understanding of the underlying mechanism and limited further enhancement of OT. Here, we demonstrate a significantly enhanced OREE in crystalline CuO
                    x
                    /Cu heterostructures with well‐defined interfaces. By employing controlled oxidation of single‐crystalline Cu, we fabricate crystalline CuO
                    x
                    layers with distinct chemical phases and quantify the resulting OT using harmonic Hall measurements. We find that the crystalline Cu
                    2
                    O/Cu heterostructure exhibits a damping‐like OT efficiency approximately seven times larger than that of naturally oxidized Cu, highlighting the crucial role of structural ordering and interface sharpness. Notably, this large OT efficiency, combined with the high electrical conductivity of Cu, yields a spin torque conductivity of 1.9 × 10
                    6
                     (ℏ/2e)Ω
                    −1
                     m
                    −1
                    , exceeding that of Pt. These results establish crystalline Cu
                    2
                    O/Cu heterostructures as a promising platform for ultralow‐power spin‐orbitronic devices.

title: Porous Organic Cages for CO2 Capture and Confined Reduction
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Porous organic cages (POCs) are discrete molecular materials that combine intrinsic porosity with solution processability and well‐defined, chemically tunable cavities. These features make them attractive for CO
                    2
                    capture and selective gas separation, and more recently for chemical transformations under confinement. Across amorphous and crystalline solids, as well as membrane and composite systems, POC‐based materials enable selective CO
                    2
                    uptake. However, their performance is governed by how molecular structure translates into accessible pore environments through solid‐state organization. In catalysis, POCs can promote local CO
                    2
                    enrichment and facilitate interaction with active sites, but their role extends beyond simple concentration effects. Even when not directly involved in the reaction, the POC's cavity can influence catalytic performance through confinement effects or host–guest interactions, as illustrated by hybrid systems and porphyrinic cages incorporating guest species. This Minireview examines recent advances in the use of POCs to integrate CO
                    2
                    capture with confined reduction. We discuss how cage structure, cavity size, internal functionality, solid‐state packing, and processing strategies govern gas binding, transport, and accessibility, and how confinement influences catalytic behavior. These studies highlight emerging design principles but also current limitations, and point to clearer structure–function relationships to enable applications under realistic conditions.
title_zh: 用于二氧化碳捕获和封闭还原的多孔有机笼
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    多孔有机笼（POC）是离散分子材料，它将固有孔隙率与溶液可加工性以及明确的化学可调腔相结合。这些特性使它们对 CO 具有吸引力

                    2
                    吸收。然而，它们的性能取决于分子结构如何通过固态组织转化为可进入的孔隙环境。在催化方面，POCs可以促进局部CO
                    2
                    富集并促进与活性位点的相互作用，但它们的作用超出了简单的浓度效应。即使不直接参与反应，POC 的空腔也可以通过限制效应或主客体相互作用影响催化性能，如混合系统和包含客体物种的卟啉笼所示。该小型评论探讨了使用 POC 整合 CO 的最新进展
                    2
                    有限还原捕获。我们讨论笼结构、空腔尺寸、内部功能、固态填充和加工策略如何控制气体结合、传输和可及性，以及限制如何影响催化行为。这些研究强调了新兴的设计原则，但也强调了当前的设计原则

title: Unlocking a Nitrosuccinate Lyase for Decarboxylative Enzymatic Hydronitration
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Nitro compounds are central to synthetic chemistry, yet mild and selective biocatalytic routes to these motifs remain elusive. We report an enzymatic strategy for the unique decarboxylative hydronitration of fumarate, achieved by repurposing the nitrosuccinate lyase CreD from the aspartase/fumarase superfamily for the synthetic direction. CreD from
                    Streptomyces cremeus
                    and three related bacterial homologues catalyze hydronitration using sodium nitrite salt with remarkable efficiency (turnover numbers up to 102,000) and high atom economy. With an already exceptionally broad functional group tolerance across the superfamily, this feature underscores a conserved yet adaptable activity landscape. Guided by comprehensive mutagenesis and computational analysis across all functionally distinct superfamily members, we uncovered key molecular determinants that govern nucleophile selectivity and preserve the structural integrity required for active tetramer assembly. We also define a diagnostic fingerprint for predicting hydronitration activity and propose a reaction mechanism supported by extensive QM/MM simulations. These molecular insights provide a foundation for expanding biocatalytic Michael‐type additions under environmentally benign aqueous conditions.
title_zh: 解锁用于脱羧酶加氢硝化的硝基琥珀酸裂解酶
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    硝基化合物是合成化学的核心，但这些基序的温和且选择性的生物催化途径仍然难以捉摸。我们报告了一种用于富马酸独特脱羧氢化硝化的酶促策略，该策略通过重新利用天冬氨酸酶/富马酸酶超家族的硝基琥珀酸裂解酶 CreD 来实现合成方向。信用证来自
                    奶油链霉菌
                    三种相关的细菌同系物利用亚硝酸钠盐催化氢化硝化，具有显着的效率（周转数高达102,000）和高原子经济性。由于整个超家族已经具有异常广泛的功能群耐受性，这一特征强调了保守但适应性强的活动景观。在所有功能不同的超家族成员的全面诱变和计算分析的指导下，我们发现了控制亲核试剂选择性并保持活性四聚体组装所需的结构完整性的关键分子决定因素。我们还定义了用于预测加氢硝化活性的诊断指纹，并提出了由广泛的 QM/MM 模拟支持的反应机制。这些分子见解为在环境友好的水条件下扩展生物催化迈克尔型加成提供了基础。

title: Lithium‐Germanium Alloy Interfaces for Efficient Low‐Pressure Ammonia Synthesis
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The lithium‐mediated nitrogen reduction reaction (Li‐NRR) offers a sustainable pathway for ammonia synthesis, providing a viable alternative to the energy‐intensive Haber‐Bosch process. While most prior studies focused on solution‐phase optimization, we introduce a transformative electrode engineering strategy via the rational design of triethylammonium germanate‐modified copper (Cu/TEG) electrodes. Multi‐technique characterization reveals the formation of the Li
                    15
                    Ge
                    4
                    alloy during the Li‐NRR. Electrochemical measurements combined with DFT calculations demonstrate that the Li
                    15
                    Ge
                    4
                    alloy simultaneously facilitates lithium deposition and shifts the N
                    2
                    adsorption energy more exothermic. Most importantly, this interfacial engineering enables a Faradaic efficiency (FE) of up to 92.5% at an unprecedented N
                    2
                    pressure as low as 4 bar and with minimal overpotential relative to the onset of lithium deposition. This synergy minimizes energy losses, achieving the highest reported pseudo‐energy efficiency value (17.6%) in a batch cell to the best of our knowledge. Overall, this work establishes dual‐function interfacial engineering via lithium‐germanium alloy formation as a breakthrough strategy, moving beyond conventional solution‐phase optimization to provide a new approach for efficient electrochemical nitrogen fixation.
title_zh: 用于高效低压氨合成的锂-锗合金界面
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    锂介导的氮还原反应（Li-NRR）为氨合成提供了一条可持续的途径，为能源密集型哈伯-博世工艺提供了可行的替代方案。虽然大多数先前的研究都集中在溶液相优化上，但我们通过合理设计三乙铵锗酸盐改性铜（Cu/TEG）电极引入了一种变革性的电极工程策略。多技术表征揭示了Li的形成

                    锗

                    Li-NRR期间的合金。电化学测量与 DFT 计算相结合表明 Li
                    15

                    4
                    合金同时促进锂沉积并转移N
                    2
                    吸附能较多放热。最重要的是，这种界面工程能够在前所未有的 N 条件下实现高达 92.5% 的法拉第效率 (FE)

title: Expanding High‐Fidelity Multiplexing in Ultrasensitive Single‐Molecule Protein Detection via Proximity Barcoding
source: Wiley: Angewandte Chemie International Edition: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  The human proteome presents a vast information reservoir for basic and diagnostics research, yet the low abundances of many proteins in biofluids pose an analytical challenge. While ultrasensitive methods such asdigital enzyme‐linked immunosorbent assay have expanded the window of detectable proteins, multiplexing with high accuracy, sensitivity, and throughput remains limited by cross‐reactivity and signal readout channels. To address this challenge, we introduce PRO‐MOSAIX (PROximity‐barcoded Molecular On‐bead Signal Amplification for Individual MultipleXing), a high‐accuracy multiplex digital immunoassay platform that integrates ultrasensitive single‐molecule protein detection with proximity ligation. PRO‐MOSAIX generates “ON” signals only from matched affinity reagents in proximity, minimizing false positives from cross‐reactive binding. This approach overcomes the multiplexing ceiling imposed by fluorescence spectral overlap by employing a single signal readout channel and DNA barcoding. We further improve multiplexing fidelity by mitigating a secondary source of false positives from DNA‐based signal amplification. As a proof of principle, we establish and validate a 15‐plex PRO‐MOSAIX assay in human plasma, with low femtomolar sensitivities and high measurement accuracies. PRO‐MOSAIX is modular and utilizes common laboratory instrumentation with a high‐throughput flow cytometric readout, providing a broadly accessible tool across research and clinical labs and bridging the gap between analytical sensitivity and high‐order multiplexing.
title_zh: 通过邻近条形码扩展超灵敏单分子蛋白质检测中的高保真多重检测
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  人类蛋白质组为基础和诊断研究提供了巨大的信息库，但生物体液中许多蛋白质的低丰度构成了分析挑战。虽然数字酶联免疫吸附测定等超灵敏方法扩大了可检测蛋白质的窗口，但高精度、高灵敏度和通量的多重检测仍然受到交叉反应和信号读出通道的限制。为了应对这一挑战，我们推出了 PRO-MOSAIX（用于单独多重分析的 PROximity 条形码分子珠上信号放大），这是一种高精度多重数字免疫分析平台，集成了超灵敏单分子蛋白质检测与邻近连接。 PRO-MOSAIX 仅从附近匹配的亲和试剂产生“ON”信号，最大限度地减少交叉反应结合的假阳性。该方法通过采用单个信号读出通道和 DNA 条形码克服了荧光光谱重叠造成的多重上限。我们通过减少基于 DNA 的信号放大产生的假阳性次要来源，进一步提高了多重分析的保真度。作为原理证明，我们在人血浆中建立并验证了 15 重 PRO-MOSAIX 测定，具有低飞摩尔灵敏度和高测量精度。 PRO-MOSAIX 是模块化的，利用具有高通量流式细胞仪读数的常见实验室仪器，为研究和临床实验室提供了一种广泛使用的工具，并弥合了分析灵敏度和高阶多重分析之间的差距。

title: Membrane-free osmotic power generators with high-performance energy conversion
source: RSC - Energy Environ. Sci. latest articles
abstract: Osmotic energy between two solutions with salinity gradients, is sustainable and converted generally into electricity through membrane-based processes. However, high membrane resistance limits extremely output power densities to 10 W m -2 at a large scale. Herein, we developed a membrane-free osmotic power generator (OPG), using immiscible polycation and polyanion aqueous sols. title_zh: 具有高性能能量转换的无膜渗透发电机
abstract_zh: 具有盐度梯度的两种溶液之间的渗透能是可持续的，并且通常通过基于膜的过程转化为电能。然而，高膜电阻将大规模输出功率密度限制在10 W m -2 。在此，我们使用不混溶的聚阳离子和聚阴离子水溶胶开发了一种无膜渗透发电器（OPG）。通过两个溶胶堆叠，聚电解质双层在界面处自发组装，从而实现双向阳离子/阴离子选择性传输。结合50倍的NaCl盐度梯度，单个无膜OPG单元由于相当低的内阻，可以表现出39.4（Na+梯度）或74.9（Cl-梯度）W m -2的最佳输出功率密度，远高于报道的工作（

title: Clinical translation and landscape of stimuli-responsive nanomedicines and microscale therapeutics
source: RSC - Chem. Soc. Rev. latest articles
abstract: Stimuli-responsive materials enable temporal and spatial control over drug delivery and action. Traditional triggerable therapeutics are largely based on small molecules, like prodrugs and photodynamic therapy agents. Advances in nanotechnology and micromaterials have greatly expanded the field, as evidenced by clinically translated hyperthermia-generating iron oxide nanoparticles, radiotherapy-enhancing hafnium oxide nanoparticles, and ultrasound-responsive microbubbles. We here analyze the (pre-)clinical landscape of trigger-responsive therapeutics between 2014 and 2024, encompassing over 90 000 publications and 1000 clinical trials. External stimuli include light, ultrasound, radiation, magnetic field and temperature. Key internal stimuli are pH, redox and enzymes. Our analysis shows that light is by far the most popular external stimulus (44% of papers; 361 trials). Among internal stimuli, which account for 46% of papers (558 trials), redox and enzyme activation are the most explored ones. In recent years, interest in radiation (114 trials), ultrasound (33 trials), temperature (14 trials), and magnetic actuation (3 trials) is increasing, typically involving nano- and microscale platforms. In the second part of our paper, we examine translational trajectories and identify key barriers that are limiting the clinical progress of stimuli-responsive therapeutics. Important issues to address to help promote clinical translation include: (1) inaccurate medical need identification; (2) overly complex material design; (3) limited tissue penetration; (4) limited device accessibility; (5) economic constraints; and (6) challenging clinical adoption. We conclude by providing practical and practicable solutions to address these key limitations, going from nano- and micro-formulation design to development, translation and implementation, together aiming to increase the clinical impact of stimuli-responsive therapeutics.
title_zh: 刺激响应纳米药物和微型疗法的临床转化和前景
abstract_zh: 刺激响应材料能够对药物输送和作用进行时间和空间控制。传统的可触发疗法主要基于小分子，例如前药和光动力治疗剂。纳米技术和微材料的进步极大地扩展了该领域，临床转化的热疗氧化铁纳米颗粒、增强放射治疗的氧化铪纳米颗粒和超声响应微泡就证明了这一点。我们在此分析了 2014 年至 2024 年间触发反应疗法的（前）临床情况，涵盖超过 90,000 篇出版物和 1000 项临床试验。外部刺激包括光、超声波、辐射、磁场和温度。关键的内部刺激是 pH 值、氧化还原和酶。我们的分析表明，光是迄今为止最受欢迎的外部刺激（44% 的论文；361 项试验）。在占论文（558 项试验）46% 的内部刺激中，氧化还原和酶激活是探索最多的。近年来，人们对辐射（114 项试验）、超声波（33 项试验）、温度（14 项试验）和磁驱动（3 项试验）的兴趣不断增加，通常涉及纳米和微米级平台。在本文的第二部分中，我们研究了转化轨迹并确定了限制刺激响应疗法临床进展的关键障碍。帮助促进临床转化需要解决的重要问题包括：（1）医疗需求识别不准确； (2)材质设计过于复杂； (3)组织穿透力有限； (4) 设备可访问性有限
